en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0430 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0430 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0430 fault typically range from around £53 to £1237, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn bank 2 catalytic converter, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ich habe einen 4-Zylinder, kann ich einen P0430 haben?
de.answer: Nein, 4-Zylinder-Reihenmotoren haben nur eine Bank und somit nur einen Katalysator. Dieser Code ist spezifisch für V6, V8 und Boxermotoren.

de.question: Muss ich beide Katalysatoren ersetzen?
de.answer: Nur wenn beide Codes P0420 und P0430 vorhanden sind. Wenn nur ein Code erscheint, ist nur ein Katalysator betroffen.

de.question: Ist der P0430 ein Grund für einen TÜV-Durchfall?
de.answer: Ja, jeder Emissionscode, der die Motorwarnleuchte aufleuchten lässt, ist ein Durchfallgrund in allen europäischen Ländern.

es.question: Tengo un 4 cilindros, ¿puedo tener un P0430?
es.answer: No, los motores 4 cilindros en línea solo tienen un banco y por tanto un catalizador. Este código es específico de los V6, V8 y motores bóxer.

es.question: ¿Debo reemplazar ambos catalizadores?
es.answer: Solo si los dos códigos P0420 y P0430 están presentes. Si solo aparece uno, un único catalizador está en causa.

es.question: ¿El P0430 es motivo de rechazo en la ITV?
es.answer: Sí, todo código de emisiones que encienda el testigo del motor es motivo de rechazo en todos los países europeos.

pt.question: Tenho um 4 cilindros, posso ter um P0430?
pt.answer: Não, os motores 4 cilindros em linha só têm um banco e portanto um catalisador. Este código é específico dos V6, V8 e motores boxer.

pt.question: Devo substituir os dois catalisadores?
pt.answer: Apenas se os dois códigos P0420 e P0430 estiverem presentes. Se só aparecer um, apenas um catalisador está em causa.

pt.question: O P0430 é motivo de reprovação na IPO?
pt.answer: Sim, qualquer código de emissões que acenda a luz de avaria do motor é motivo de reprovação em todos os países europeus.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Efficacite catalyseur sous le seuil — prechauffage (banque 2)
name.en: Catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 2)
name.es: Eficiencia del catalizador por debajo del umbral — calentamiento (banco 2)
name.pt: Eficiência do catalisador abaixo do limite — aquecimento (banco 2)

description.fr: Le P0431 est l'equivalent du P0421 pour la banque 2. Il se declenche specifiquement pendant la phase de prechauffage, quand le catalyseur de la banque 2 ne monte pas assez vite en temperature ou en efficacite. Comme pour le P0421, les causes incluent un catalyseur vieillissant, un thermostat defaillant ou une sonde lambda lente. Sur les moteurs en V, les deux banques peuvent chauffer a des rythmes differents selon la configuration de l'echappement et l'emplacement du thermostat. Ce code est souvent le premier signe de fatigue du catalyseur cote banque 2 et merite une attention rapide pour eviter qu'il ne progresse vers un P0430 complet.
description.en: A P0431 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 2). This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0431 ist das Äquivalent zum P0421 für Bank 2. Er wird spezifisch während der Aufwärmphase ausgelöst, wenn der Katalysator von Bank 2 nicht schnell genug in Temperatur oder Effizienz steigt. Wie beim P0421 umfassen die Ursachen einen alternden Katalysator, einen defekten Thermostat oder eine langsame Lambdasonde. Bei V-Motoren können beide Bänke je nach Abgaskonfiguration und Thermostatposition unterschiedlich schnell aufheizen. Dieser Code ist oft das erste Zeichen von Ermüdung des Katalysators auf Seite Bank 2 und verdient schnelle Aufmerksamkeit, damit er nicht zu einem vollständigen P0430 fortschreitet.
description.es: El P0431 es el equivalente del P0421 para el banco 2. Se activa específicamente durante la fase de calentamiento, cuando el catalizador del banco 2 no sube lo bastante rápido en temperatura o en eficiencia. Como con el P0421, las causas incluyen un catalizador envejecido, un termostato defectuoso o una sonda lambda lenta. En los motores en V, los dos bancos pueden calentar a ritmos diferentes según la configuración del escape y la ubicación del termostato. Este código es a menudo el primer signo de fatiga del catalizador del lado banco 2 y merece atención rápida para evitar que progrese hacia un P0430 completo.
description.pt: O P0431 é o equivalente do P0421 para o banco 2. É acionado especificamente durante a fase de aquecimento, quando o catalisador do banco 2 não sobe suficientemente depressa em temperatura ou em eficiência. Como com o P0421, as causas incluem um catalisador envelhecido, um termóstato defeituoso ou uma sonda lambda lenta. Nos motores em V, os dois bancos podem aquecer a ritmos diferentes consoante a configuração do escape e a localização do termóstato. Este código é muitas vezes o primeiro sinal de fadiga do catalisador do lado banco 2 e merece atenção rápida para evitar que progrida para um P0430 completo.

fr.question: Dois-je m'inquieter d'un P0431 ?
fr.answer: C'est un avertissement precoce. Le catalyseur fonctionne encore mais ses performances declinent. Traitez la cause sous-jacente pour prolonger sa vie.

fr.question: Ce code est-il frequent ?
fr.answer: Moins frequent que le P0420/P0430 car il ne concerne que les moteurs en V et seulement la phase de prechauffage. C'est un code relativement rare.

fr.question: Peut-on passer le CT avec un P0431 ?
fr.answer: Non, le voyant moteur allume est un motif de refus quelle que soit la severite du code.

en.question: What does the P0431 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0431 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 2). This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0431 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0431 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0431 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0431 fault typically range from around £51 to £1249, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is ageing bank 2 catalytic converter, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Muss ich mir Sorgen um einen P0431 machen?
de.answer: Es ist eine Frühwarnung. Der Katalysator funktioniert noch, aber seine Leistung nimmt ab. Behandeln Sie die zugrunde liegende Ursache, um sein Leben zu verlängern.

de.question: Ist dieser Code häufig?
de.answer: Weniger häufig als P0420/P0430, da er nur V-Motoren und nur die Aufwärmphase betrifft. Es ist ein relativ seltener Code.

de.question: Kann man mit einem P0431 durch den TÜV?
de.answer: Nein, die leuchtende Motorwarnleuchte ist unabhängig vom Schweregrad des Codes ein Durchfallgrund.

es.question: ¿Debo preocuparme por un P0431?
es.answer: Es una advertencia temprana. El catalizador todavía funciona pero sus prestaciones declinan. Trata la causa subyacente para prolongar su vida.

es.question: ¿Este código es frecuente?
es.answer: Menos frecuente que el P0420/P0430 porque solo concierne a los motores en V y solo a la fase de calentamiento. Es un código relativamente raro.

es.question: ¿Se puede pasar la ITV con un P0431?
es.answer: No, el testigo del motor encendido es motivo de rechazo sea cual sea la severidad del código.

pt.question: Devo preocupar-me com um P0431?
pt.answer: É um aviso precoce. O catalisador ainda funciona mas o seu desempenho declina. Trate a causa subjacente para prolongar a sua vida.

pt.question: Este código é frequente?
pt.answer: Menos frequente que o P0420/P0430 porque só diz respeito aos motores em V e apenas à fase de aquecimento. É um código relativamente raro.

pt.question: Pode passar-se a IPO com um P0431?
pt.answer: Não, a luz de avaria do motor acesa é motivo de reprovação seja qual for a severidade do código.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Systeme EVAP — debit de purge incorrect
name.es: Sistema EVAP — caudal de purga incorrecto
name.pt: Sistema EVAP — caudal de purga incorreto

description.fr: Le P0441 indique que le flux de vapeurs de carburant du canister vers le moteur n'est pas conforme aux attentes du calculateur. Le systeme EVAP stocke les vapeurs d'essence dans un canister au charbon actif puis les purge vers le moteur pour les bruler. Si le debit de purge est trop faible ou trop important, ce code est enregistre. La vanne de purge elle-meme peut etre bloquee, ou le canister peut etre sature. Un tuyau bouche ou deconnecte entre le canister et le collecteur d'admission est aussi une cause frequente. Ce code n'affecte pas la conduite mais contribue aux emissions polluantes.
description.en: The P0441 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with evap system — incorrect purge flow. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0441 zeigt an, dass der Kraftstoffdampfstrom vom Aktivkohlebehälter zum Motor nicht den Erwartungen des Steuergeräts entspricht. Das EVAP-System speichert Benzindämpfe in einem Aktivkohlebehälter und spült sie dann zum Motor, um sie zu verbrennen. Wenn der Spüldurchfluss zu niedrig oder zu hoch ist, wird dieser Code gespeichert. Das Spülventil selbst kann blockiert sein, oder der Aktivkohlebehälter kann gesättigt sein. Ein verstopfter oder getrennter Schlauch zwischen Aktivkohlebehälter und Ansaugkrümmer ist ebenfalls eine häufige Ursache. Dieser Code beeinträchtigt das Fahren nicht, trägt jedoch zu Schadstoffemissionen bei.
description.es: El P0441 indica que el flujo de vapores de combustible del cánister hacia el motor no es conforme a las expectativas de la ECU. El sistema EVAP almacena los vapores de gasolina en un cánister de carbón activo y luego los purga hacia el motor para quemarlos. Si el caudal de purga es demasiado bajo o demasiado alto, este código se registra. La propia válvula de purga puede estar bloqueada, o el cánister puede estar saturado. Un tubo atascado o desconectado entre el cánister y el colector de admisión también es una causa frecuente. Este código no afecta a la conducción pero contribuye a las emisiones contaminantes.
description.pt: O P0441 indica que o fluxo de vapores de combustível do cânister para o motor não está conforme as expectativas da ECU. O sistema EVAP armazena os vapores de gasolina num cânister de carvão ativo e depois purga-os para o motor para os queimar. Se o caudal de purga for demasiado baixo ou demasiado alto, este código é registado. A própria válvula de purga pode estar bloqueada, ou o cânister pode estar saturado. Um tubo entupido ou desligado entre o cânister e o coletor de admissão é também uma causa frequente. Este código não afeta a condução mas contribui para as emissões poluentes.

fr.question: C'est quoi le canister ?
fr.answer: Le canister est un boitier rempli de charbon actif qui absorbe les vapeurs d'essence du reservoir. Il les stocke temporairement puis les libere vers le moteur pour les bruler pendant la conduite.

fr.question: Le P0441 est-il lie au bouchon de reservoir ?
fr.answer: Pas directement. Le P0441 concerne le debit de purge entre le canister et le moteur, pas l'etancheite du systeme qui est plutot liee aux codes P0442 et P0455.

fr.question: La vanne de purge coute-t-elle cher ?
fr.answer: Non, entre 30 et 80 euros pour la piece. C'est accessible et le remplacement est rapide. Verifiez d'abord les tuyaux qui sont encore moins chers.

en.question: What does the P0441 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0441 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with evap system — incorrect purge flow. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0441 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0441 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0441 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0441 fault typically range from around £16 to £217, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty evap purge valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was ist der Aktivkohlebehälter?
de.answer: Der Aktivkohlebehälter ist ein Gehäuse gefüllt mit Aktivkohle, das die Benzindämpfe aus dem Tank absorbiert. Er speichert sie vorübergehend und gibt sie dann an den Motor ab, um sie während der Fahrt zu verbrennen.

de.question: Ist der P0441 mit dem Tankdeckel verbunden?
de.answer: Nicht direkt. Der P0441 betrifft den Spüldurchfluss zwischen Aktivkohlebehälter und Motor, nicht die Dichtheit des Systems, die eher mit den Codes P0442 und P0455 zusammenhängt.

de.question: Kostet das Spülventil viel?
de.answer: Nein, zwischen 30 und 80 Euro für das Teil. Es ist zugänglich und der Austausch geht schnell. Prüfen Sie zuerst die Schläuche, die noch günstiger sind.

es.question: ¿Qué es el cánister?
es.answer: El cánister es una caja llena de carbón activo que absorbe los vapores de gasolina del depósito. Los almacena temporalmente y luego los libera hacia el motor para quemarlos durante la conducción.

es.question: ¿El P0441 está ligado al tapón del depósito?
es.answer: No directamente. El P0441 concierne al caudal de purga entre el cánister y el motor, no a la estanqueidad del sistema que está más bien ligada a los códigos P0442 y P0455.

es.question: ¿La válvula de purga cuesta cara?
es.answer: No, entre 30 y 80 euros por la pieza. Es accesible y el reemplazo es rápido. Verifica primero los tubos que son aún más baratos.

pt.question: O que é o cânister?
pt.answer: O cânister é uma caixa cheia de carvão ativo que absorve os vapores de gasolina do depósito. Armazena-os temporariamente e depois liberta-os para o motor para os queimar durante a condução.

pt.question: O P0441 está ligado à tampa do depósito?
pt.answer: Não diretamente. O P0441 diz respeito ao caudal de purga entre o cânister e o motor, não à estanqueidade do sistema que está mais ligada aos códigos P0442 e P0455.

pt.question: A válvula de purga custa caro?
pt.answer: Não, entre 30 e 80 euros pela peça. É acessível e a substituição é rápida. Verifique primeiro os tubos que são ainda mais baratos.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Vanne de purge EVAP — circuit defaillant
name.es: Válvula de purga EVAP — fallo de circuito
name.pt: Válvula de purga EVAP — falha de circuito

description.fr: Le P0443 designe un probleme electrique sur la vanne de purge du systeme EVAP. Le calculateur ne parvient pas a commander correctement cette electrovanne, soit parce que le circuit est ouvert, soit parce que la bobine de la vanne est en court-circuit. La vanne de purge est une electrovanne qui s'ouvre sur commande du calculateur pour laisser passer les vapeurs du canister vers le moteur. Si le circuit est coupe, les vapeurs ne sont jamais purgees et le canister finit par saturer. Un connecteur corrode, un fil coupe ou une vanne dont la bobine a grille sont les principales causes. Ce code est purement electrique et n'a aucun impact sur la conduite quotidienne.
description.en: When your car shows a P0443 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to evap purge valve — circuit fault. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0443 bezeichnet ein elektrisches Problem am Spülventil des EVAP-Systems. Das Steuergerät kann dieses Magnetventil nicht korrekt ansteuern, entweder weil der Schaltkreis offen ist oder weil die Spule des Ventils kurzgeschlossen ist. Das Spülventil ist ein Magnetventil, das sich auf Befehl des Steuergeräts öffnet, um die Dämpfe vom Aktivkohlebehälter zum Motor zu lassen. Wenn der Schaltkreis unterbrochen ist, werden die Dämpfe nie gespült und der Aktivkohlebehälter sättigt sich schließlich. Ein korrodierter Stecker, ein unterbrochenes Kabel oder ein Ventil mit durchgebrannter Spule sind die Hauptursachen. Dieser Code ist rein elektrisch und hat keine Auswirkung auf das tägliche Fahren.
description.es: El P0443 designa un problema eléctrico en la válvula de purga del sistema EVAP. La ECU no consigue controlar correctamente esta electroválvula, ya sea porque el circuito está abierto o porque la bobina de la válvula está en cortocircuito. La válvula de purga es una electroválvula que se abre por orden de la ECU para dejar pasar los vapores del cánister hacia el motor. Si el circuito está cortado, los vapores nunca se purgan y el cánister termina saturándose. Un conector corroído, un cable cortado o una válvula cuya bobina se ha quemado son las principales causas. Este código es puramente eléctrico y no tiene impacto alguno en la conducción diaria.
description.pt: O P0443 designa um problema elétrico na válvula de purga do sistema EVAP. A ECU não consegue comandar corretamente esta eletroválvula, quer porque o circuito está aberto, quer porque a bobina da válvula está em curto-circuito. A válvula de purga é uma eletroválvula que se abre por ordem da ECU para deixar passar os vapores do cânister para o motor. Se o circuito estiver cortado, os vapores nunca são purgados e o cânister acaba por saturar. Um conector corroído, um fio cortado ou uma válvula cuja bobina se queimou são as principais causas. Este código é puramente elétrico e não tem qualquer impacto na condução diária.

name.es: Problema del driver de la ECU

fr.question: Comment tester la vanne de purge ?
fr.answer: Debranchez le connecteur et mesurez la resistance aux bornes. Elle doit etre entre 20 et 40 ohms. Circuit ouvert ou court-circuit confirme une vanne defaillante.

fr.question: La vanne est-elle facile a trouver ?
fr.answer: Oui, elle est generalement sur le collecteur d'admission ou pres du reservoir de liquide de frein. Suivez le tuyau qui vient du canister vers le moteur.

fr.question: Ce code est-il un motif de refus au CT ?
fr.answer: Oui, car le voyant moteur est allume. De plus, le systeme antipollution ne fonctionne pas correctement.

en.question: What does the P0443 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0443 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with evap purge valve — circuit fault. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0443 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0443 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0443 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0443 fault typically range from around £13 to £496, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is blown purge solenoid valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Wie testet man das Spülventil?
de.answer: Trennen Sie den Stecker und messen Sie den Widerstand an den Klemmen. Er muss zwischen 20 und 40 Ohm liegen. Unterbrochener Schaltkreis oder Kurzschluss bestätigt ein defektes Ventil.

de.question: Ist das Ventil leicht zu finden?
de.answer: Ja, es befindet sich im Allgemeinen auf dem Ansaugkrümmer oder in der Nähe des Bremsflüssigkeitsbehälters. Folgen Sie dem Schlauch, der vom Aktivkohlebehälter zum Motor kommt.

de.question: Ist dieser Code ein TÜV-Durchfallgrund?
de.answer: Ja, weil die Motorwarnleuchte leuchtet. Außerdem funktioniert das Abgasreinigungssystem nicht korrekt.

es.question: ¿Cómo se prueba la válvula de purga?
es.answer: Desconecta el conector y mide la resistencia en los bornes. Debe estar entre 20 y 40 ohmios. Circuito abierto o cortocircuito confirma una válvula defectuosa.

es.question: ¿La válvula es fácil de encontrar?
es.answer: Sí, generalmente está en el colector de admisión o cerca del depósito de líquido de frenos. Sigue el tubo que viene del cánister hacia el motor.

es.question: ¿Este código es motivo de rechazo en la ITV?
es.answer: Sí, porque el testigo del motor está encendido. Además, el sistema anticontaminación no funciona correctamente.

pt.question: Como testar a válvula de purga?
pt.answer: Desligue o conector e meça a resistência nos terminais. Deve estar entre 20 e 40 ohms. Circuito aberto ou curto-circuito confirma uma válvula defeituosa.

pt.question: A válvula é fácil de encontrar?
pt.answer: Sim, geralmente está no coletor de admissão ou perto do reservatório do líquido dos travões. Siga o tubo que vem do cânister para o motor.

pt.question: Este código é motivo de reprovação na IPO?
pt.answer: Sim, porque a luz de avaria do motor está acesa. Além disso, o sistema antipoluição não funciona corretamente.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Systeme EVAP — circuit de ventilation defaillant
name.es: Sistema EVAP — circuito de ventilación defectuoso
name.pt: Sistema EVAP — circuito de ventilação defeituoso

description.fr: Le P0446 signale un probleme sur le circuit de ventilation du systeme EVAP. Le canister dispose d'une ouverture vers l'atmosphere qui permet l'air de circuler pendant les cycles de purge et de test. Cette ouverture est controlee par une vanne de ventilation qui peut etre defaillante. Si cette vanne se bloque fermee, le systeme ne peut plus etre teste pour les fuites et le code apparait. Sur certains vehicules, la vanne de ventilation est integree au canister. Une toile d'araignee ou de la salete dans l'orifice de ventilation peut aussi bloquer le debit d'air et declencher le code. Ce probleme est absolument invisible pour le conducteur mais pose probleme au controle technique.
description.en: A P0446 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with evap system — vent circuit fault. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0446 meldet ein Problem am Entlüftungsschaltkreis des EVAP-Systems. Der Aktivkohlebehälter verfügt über eine Öffnung zur Atmosphäre, die den Luftdurchfluss während der Spül- und Testzyklen ermöglicht. Diese Öffnung wird durch ein Entlüftungsventil gesteuert, das defekt sein kann. Wenn dieses Ventil geschlossen blockiert, kann das System nicht mehr auf Lecks getestet werden und der Code erscheint. Bei einigen Fahrzeugen ist das Entlüftungsventil in den Aktivkohlebehälter integriert. Ein Spinnennetz oder Schmutz in der Entlüftungsöffnung kann ebenfalls den Luftstrom blockieren und den Code auslösen. Dieses Problem ist für den Fahrer absolut unsichtbar, stellt aber beim TÜV ein Problem dar.
description.es: El P0446 señala un problema en el circuito de ventilación del sistema EVAP. El cánister dispone de una abertura hacia la atmósfera que permite que el aire circule durante los ciclos de purga y test. Esta abertura está controlada por una válvula de ventilación que puede estar defectuosa. Si esta válvula se bloquea cerrada, el sistema ya no puede ser testeado en busca de fugas y el código aparece. En algunos vehículos, la válvula de ventilación está integrada en el cánister. Una tela de araña o suciedad en el orificio de ventilación también puede bloquear el caudal de aire y activar el código. Este problema es absolutamente invisible para el conductor pero plantea un problema en la ITV.
description.pt: O P0446 assinala um problema no circuito de ventilação do sistema EVAP. O cânister dispõe de uma abertura para a atmosfera que permite ao ar circular durante os ciclos de purga e teste. Esta abertura é controlada por uma válvula de ventilação que pode estar defeituosa. Se esta válvula se bloquear fechada, o sistema já não pode ser testado em busca de fugas e o código aparece. Em alguns veículos, a válvula de ventilação está integrada no cânister. Uma teia de aranha ou sujidade no orifício de ventilação também pode bloquear o caudal de ar e acionar o código. Este problema é absolutamente invisível para o condutor mas coloca um problema na IPO.

fr.question: Qu'est-ce que la ventilation EVAP ?
fr.answer: C'est un circuit d'air qui permet au canister de respirer. Quand le calculateur teste l'etancheite du systeme, il ferme cette ventilation pour creer un vide. Si la vanne est bloquee, le test echoue.

fr.question: Une araignee peut-elle causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est arrive plus souvent qu'on ne le pense. L'orifice de ventilation du canister est un endroit ideal pour les insectes. Un simple nettoyage peut resoudre le probleme.

fr.question: Ce code est-il specifique a certaines marques ?
fr.answer: Il est plus frequent sur les vehicules americains et japonais qui ont des systemes EVAP plus elabores. Les vehicules europeens utilisent des codes similaires mais avec des variantes constructeur.

en.question: What does the P0446 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0446 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with evap system — vent circuit fault. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0446 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0446 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0446 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0446 fault typically range from around £9 to £206, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is evap vent valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was ist die EVAP-Entlüftung?
de.answer: Es ist ein Luftkreislauf, der dem Aktivkohlebehälter das Atmen ermöglicht. Wenn das Steuergerät die Dichtheit des Systems testet, schließt es diese Entlüftung, um ein Vakuum zu erzeugen. Wenn das Ventil blockiert ist, schlägt der Test fehl.

de.question: Kann eine Spinne diesen Code verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, das kommt häufiger vor, als man denkt. Die Entlüftungsöffnung des Aktivkohlebehälters ist ein idealer Ort für Insekten. Eine einfache Reinigung kann das Problem lösen.

de.question: Ist dieser Code markenspezifisch?
de.answer: Er ist häufiger bei amerikanischen und japanischen Fahrzeugen, die aufwendigere EVAP-Systeme haben. Europäische Fahrzeuge verwenden ähnliche Codes, aber mit herstellerspezifischen Varianten.

es.question: ¿Qué es la ventilación EVAP?
es.answer: Es un circuito de aire que permite al cánister respirar. Cuando la ECU prueba la estanqueidad del sistema, cierra esta ventilación para crear un vacío. Si la válvula está bloqueada, el test falla.

es.question: ¿Una araña puede causar este código?
es.answer: Sí, ocurre más a menudo de lo que se piensa. El orificio de ventilación del cánister es un lugar ideal para los insectos. Una simple limpieza puede resolver el problema.

es.question: ¿Este código es específico de ciertas marcas?
es.answer: Es más frecuente en vehículos americanos y japoneses que tienen sistemas EVAP más elaborados. Los vehículos europeos usan códigos similares pero con variantes del fabricante.

pt.question: O que é a ventilação EVAP?
pt.answer: É um circuito de ar que permite ao cânister respirar. Quando a ECU testa a estanqueidade do sistema, fecha esta ventilação para criar um vácuo. Se a válvula estiver bloqueada, o teste falha.

pt.question: Uma aranha pode causar este código?
pt.answer: Sim, acontece mais vezes do que se pensa. O orifício de ventilação do cânister é um local ideal para os insetos. Uma simples limpeza pode resolver o problema.

pt.question: Este código é específico de certas marcas?
pt.answer: É mais frequente em veículos americanos e japoneses que têm sistemas EVAP mais elaborados. Os veículos europeus usam códigos semelhantes mas com variantes do fabricante.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Petite fuite detectee dans le systeme EVAP (tres petite)
name.en: Very small leak detected in EVAP system
name.de: Sehr kleines Leck im EVAP-System erkannt
name.es: Fuga muy pequeña detectada en el sistema EVAP
name.pt: Fuga muito pequena detetada no sistema EVAP

description.fr: Le P0456 est une version encore plus fine du P0442. Il detecte une fuite tres petite dans le systeme EVAP, souvent a peine mesurable. Les vehicules modernes ont des capteurs de pression tres sensibles dans le systeme EVAP qui peuvent detecter des fuites minuscules. Le bouchon de reservoir est encore une fois le suspect numero un, mais cette fois un simple joint de bouchon legerement aplati peut suffire a declencher le code. Les raccords des tuyaux EVAP qui se desserrent avec les vibrations sont aussi une cause frequente. Ce code est probablement le moins inquietant de tous les codes DTC — votre voiture fonctionne parfaitement, mais le systeme antipollution detecte une toute petite anomalie.
description.en: The P0456 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with very small leak detected in evap system. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0456 ist eine noch feinere Version des P0442. Er erkennt ein sehr kleines Leck im EVAP-System, oft kaum messbar. Moderne Fahrzeuge haben sehr empfindliche Drucksensoren im EVAP-System, die winzige Lecks erkennen können. Der Tankdeckel ist wieder einmal der Hauptverdächtige, aber diesmal kann schon eine leicht abgeflachte Deckeldichtung ausreichen, um den Code auszulösen. Die Verbindungen der EVAP-Schläuche, die sich durch Vibrationen lösen, sind ebenfalls eine häufige Ursache. Dieser Code ist wahrscheinlich der am wenigsten beunruhigende aller DTC-Codes — Ihr Auto funktioniert einwandfrei, aber das Abgasreinigungssystem erkennt eine winzige Anomalie.
description.es: El P0456 es una versión aún más fina del P0442. Detecta una fuga muy pequeña en el sistema EVAP, a menudo apenas medible. Los vehículos modernos tienen sensores de presión muy sensibles en el sistema EVAP que pueden detectar fugas minúsculas. El tapón del depósito es otra vez el sospechoso número uno, pero esta vez una simple junta de tapón ligeramente aplastada puede bastar para activar el código. Las conexiones de los tubos EVAP que se aflojan con las vibraciones también son una causa frecuente. Este código es probablemente el menos inquietante de todos los códigos DTC — tu coche funciona perfectamente, pero el sistema anticontaminación detecta una pequeñísima anomalía.
description.pt: O P0456 é uma versão ainda mais fina do P0442. Deteta uma fuga muito pequena no sistema EVAP, muitas vezes quase imensurável. Os veículos modernos têm sensores de pressão muito sensíveis no sistema EVAP que podem detetar fugas minúsculas. A tampa do depósito é mais uma vez o suspeito número um, mas desta vez uma simples junta de tampa ligeiramente achatada pode bastar para acionar o código. As ligações dos tubos EVAP que se desapertam com as vibrações são também uma causa frequente. Este código é provavelmente o menos preocupante de todos os códigos DTC — o seu carro funciona perfeitamente, mas o sistema antipoluição deteta uma minúscula anomalia.

name.es: Junta del tapón del depósito gastada
name.pt: Junta da tampa do depósito gasta

name.fr: Vanne de purge qui ne ferme pas completement
name.es: Válvula de purga que no cierra del todo
name.pt: Válvula de purga que não fecha totalmente

fr.question: Le P0456 est-il le code le moins grave ?
fr.answer: Parmi les codes emissions, oui. C'est une fuite minuscule qui n'affecte ni la conduite ni la consommation. Seul le voyant moteur et le controle technique sont concernes.

fr.question: Peut-on vivre avec un P0456 ?
fr.answer: Techniquement oui, mais le voyant moteur reste allume et peut masquer d'autres codes plus importants. De plus, le controle technique ne passera pas.

fr.question: Comment trouver une fuite aussi petite ?
fr.answer: Un garagiste utilise une machine a fumee EVAP qui injecte de la fumee dans le circuit. La fumee sort par la fuite, meme minuscule, et permet de la localiser visuellement.

en.question: What does the P0456 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0456 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with very small leak detected in evap system. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0456 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0456 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0456 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0456 fault typically range from around £4 to £128, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn fuel cap seal, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der P0456 der am wenigsten schwerwiegende Code?
de.answer: Unter den Emissionscodes ja. Es ist ein winziges Leck, das weder das Fahren noch den Verbrauch beeinflusst. Nur die Motorwarnleuchte und der TÜV sind betroffen.

de.question: Kann man mit einem P0456 leben?
de.answer: Technisch ja, aber die Motorwarnleuchte bleibt an und kann andere wichtigere Codes verdecken. Außerdem wird der TÜV nicht bestanden.

de.question: Wie findet man ein so kleines Leck?
de.answer: Ein Mechaniker verwendet eine EVAP-Rauchmaschine, die Rauch in den Kreislauf einspritzt. Der Rauch tritt durch das Leck aus, auch ein winziges, und ermöglicht es, es visuell zu lokalisieren.

es.question: ¿El P0456 es el código menos grave?
es.answer: Entre los códigos de emisiones, sí. Es una fuga minúscula que no afecta ni a la conducción ni al consumo. Solo el testigo del motor y la ITV están implicados.

es.question: ¿Se puede vivir con un P0456?
es.answer: Técnicamente sí, pero el testigo del motor permanece encendido y puede enmascarar otros códigos más importantes. Además, la ITV no se pasará.

es.question: ¿Cómo encontrar una fuga tan pequeña?
es.answer: Un mecánico usa una máquina de humo EVAP que inyecta humo en el circuito. El humo sale por la fuga, incluso minúscula, y permite localizarla visualmente.

pt.question: O P0456 é o código menos grave?
pt.answer: Entre os códigos de emissões, sim. É uma fuga minúscula que não afeta nem a condução nem o consumo. Apenas a luz de avaria do motor e a IPO estão envolvidas.

pt.question: Pode-se viver com um P0456?
pt.answer: Tecnicamente sim, mas a luz de avaria do motor permanece acesa e pode mascarar outros códigos mais importantes. Além disso, a IPO não será aprovada.

pt.question: Como encontrar uma fuga tão pequena?
pt.answer: Um mecânico usa uma máquina de fumo EVAP que injeta fumo no circuito. O fumo sai pela fuga, mesmo minúscula, e permite localizá-la visualmente.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.es: Recirculación de gases de escape — problema de caudal
name.pt: Recirculação de gases de escape — problema de caudal

description.fr: Le P0400 est le code generique de la vanne EGR indiquant un probleme de debit des gaz recircules. Le calculateur commande l'ouverture de la vanne EGR et mesure l'effet sur le fonctionnement du moteur, soit via un capteur de position EGR, soit via le capteur MAP ou le debitmetre. Si l'effet mesure ne correspond pas a la commande, ce code est enregistre. C'est un code tres courant sur les vehicules diesel et les moteurs essence turbo a injection directe, ou la vanne EGR s'encrasse rapidement par la calamine et la suie. Un decalaminage regulier est la meilleure prevention contre ce probleme. Les conduits d'admission en aval de la vanne EGR sont aussi concernes par l'encrassement.
description.en: When your car shows a P0400 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to exhaust gas recirculation — flow issue. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0400 ist der generische Code des AGR-Ventils und zeigt ein Problem mit dem Durchfluss der rezirkulierten Gase an. Das Steuergerät kommandiert das Öffnen des AGR-Ventils und misst die Auswirkung auf den Motorbetrieb, entweder über einen AGR-Positionssensor oder über den MAP-Sensor oder den Luftmassenmesser. Wenn die gemessene Wirkung nicht mit dem Befehl übereinstimmt, wird dieser Code gespeichert. Dies ist ein sehr häufiger Code bei Dieselfahrzeugen und aufgeladenen Direkteinspritzer-Benzinmotoren, bei denen sich das AGR-Ventil schnell durch Ölkohle und Ruß zusetzt. Eine regelmäßige Entkokung ist die beste Vorbeugung gegen dieses Problem. Auch die Ansaugkanäle stromabwärts des AGR-Ventils sind von der Verschmutzung betroffen.
description.es: El P0400 es el código genérico de la válvula EGR que indica un problema de caudal de los gases recirculados. La ECU ordena la apertura de la válvula EGR y mide el efecto sobre el funcionamiento del motor, ya sea mediante un sensor de posición EGR, ya sea mediante el sensor MAP o el caudalímetro. Si el efecto medido no se corresponde con la orden, este código se registra. Es un código muy común en vehículos diésel y motores de gasolina turbo de inyección directa, donde la válvula EGR se ensucia rápidamente por la carbonilla y el hollín. Una descarbonización regular es la mejor prevención contra este problema. Los conductos de admisión aguas abajo de la válvula EGR también están afectados por la suciedad.
description.pt: O P0400 é o código genérico da válvula EGR indicando um problema de caudal dos gases recirculados. A ECU comanda a abertura da válvula EGR e mede o efeito no funcionamento do motor, quer através de um sensor de posição EGR, quer através do sensor MAP ou do medidor de caudal. Se o efeito medido não corresponder ao comando, este código é registado. É um código muito comum em veículos diesel e motores a gasolina turbo de injeção direta, onde a válvula EGR se suja rapidamente pela carbonilha e pela fuligem. Uma descarbonização regular é a melhor prevenção contra este problema. Os condutos de admissão a jusante da válvula EGR também são afetados pela sujidade.

fr.question: L'EGR est-elle obligatoire ?
fr.answer: Oui, la vanne EGR est obligatoire pour les normes antipollution. La supprimer est illegal et constitue un motif de refus au controle technique.

fr.question: Le decalaminage fonctionne-t-il vraiment ?
fr.answer: Pour la prevention et les cas legers d'encrassement, oui. Un decalaminage a l'hydrogene ou chimique peut prolonger la vie de l'EGR. Mais une vanne tres encrassee necessite un demontage et un nettoyage manuel.

fr.question: Les diesels sont-ils plus touches ?
fr.answer: Oui, les particules de suie des moteurs diesel encrassent l'EGR beaucoup plus vite. Les courts trajets urbains aggravent le phenomene car le moteur ne chauffe pas assez.

en.question: What does the P0400 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0400 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with exhaust gas recirculation — flow issue. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0400 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0400 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0400 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0400 fault typically range from around £35 to £423, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is clogged egr valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist die AGR obligatorisch?
de.answer: Ja, das AGR-Ventil ist für die Abgasnormen obligatorisch. Es zu entfernen ist illegal und stellt einen TÜV-Durchfallgrund dar.

de.question: Funktioniert die Entkokung wirklich?
de.answer: Für die Vorbeugung und leichte Verschmutzungsfälle ja. Eine Wasserstoff- oder chemische Entkokung kann das Leben der AGR verlängern. Aber ein stark verschmutztes Ventil erfordert Ausbau und manuelle Reinigung.

de.question: Sind Diesel stärker betroffen?
de.answer: Ja, die Rußpartikel von Dieselmotoren verschmutzen die AGR viel schneller. Kurze Stadtfahrten verschlimmern das Phänomen, weil der Motor nicht genug warm wird.

es.question: ¿La EGR es obligatoria?
es.answer: Sí, la válvula EGR es obligatoria para las normas anticontaminación. Suprimirla es ilegal y constituye motivo de rechazo en la ITV.

es.question: ¿La descarbonización funciona de verdad?
es.answer: Para la prevención y los casos ligeros de suciedad, sí. Una descarbonización por hidrógeno o química puede prolongar la vida de la EGR. Pero una válvula muy sucia requiere desmontaje y limpieza manual.

es.question: ¿Los diésel están más afectados?
es.answer: Sí, las partículas de hollín de los motores diésel ensucian la EGR mucho más rápido. Los trayectos urbanos cortos agravan el fenómeno porque el motor no calienta lo suficiente.

pt.question: A EGR é obrigatória?
pt.answer: Sim, a válvula EGR é obrigatória pelas normas antipoluição. Suprimi-la é ilegal e constitui motivo de reprovação na IPO.

pt.question: A descarbonização funciona mesmo?
pt.answer: Para a prevenção e os casos ligeiros de sujidade, sim. Uma descarbonização por hidrogénio ou química pode prolongar a vida da EGR. Mas uma válvula muito suja requer desmontagem e limpeza manual.

pt.question: Os diesel são mais afetados?
pt.answer: Sim, as partículas de fuligem dos motores diesel sujam a EGR muito mais depressa. Os trajetos urbanos curtos agravam o fenómeno porque o motor não aquece o suficiente.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le P0402 est l'inverse du P0401 : la vanne EGR laisse passer trop de gaz d'echappement dans l'admission. Un exces de gaz recircules etouffe le moteur car ils remplacent l'air frais necessaire a la combustion. Le moteur manque de puissance, hesite et peut caler au ralenti. La cause la plus frequente est une vanne EGR bloquee en position ouverte par la calamine. Le diaphragme de la vanne peut aussi etre perce, permettant aux gaz de passer en permanence. Sur les EGR electroniques, un capteur de position defaillant peut faire croire au calculateur que la vanne est fermee alors qu'elle est ouverte, provoquant un debit excessif non compense.
description.en: A P0402 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with egr flow excessive. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0402 ist das Gegenteil des P0401: Das AGR-Ventil lässt zu viel Abgas in die Ansaugung durch. Ein Überschuss an rezirkulierten Gasen erstickt den Motor, weil sie die Frischluft ersetzen, die für die Verbrennung notwendig ist. Der Motor verliert an Leistung, stottert und kann im Leerlauf abwürgen. Die häufigste Ursache ist ein durch Ölkohle in offener Position blockiertes AGR-Ventil. Die Membran des Ventils kann auch durchstoßen sein und die Gase dauerhaft durchlassen. Bei elektronischen AGRs kann ein defekter Positionssensor dem Steuergerät vorgaukeln, dass das Ventil geschlossen ist, während es geöffnet ist, was einen unkompensierten übermäßigen Durchfluss verursacht.
description.es: El P0402 es lo inverso del P0401: la válvula EGR deja pasar demasiados gases de escape a la admisión. Un exceso de gases recirculados ahoga el motor porque reemplazan al aire fresco necesario para la combustión. El motor pierde potencia, titubea y puede calarse al ralentí. La causa más frecuente es una válvula EGR bloqueada en posición abierta por la carbonilla. El diafragma de la válvula también puede estar perforado, dejando pasar los gases permanentemente. En las EGR electrónicas, un sensor de posición defectuoso puede hacer creer a la ECU que la válvula está cerrada cuando está abierta, provocando un caudal excesivo no compensado.
description.pt: O P0402 é o inverso do P0401: a válvula EGR deixa passar demasiados gases de escape para a admissão. Um excesso de gases recirculados sufoca o motor porque substituem o ar fresco necessário à combustão. O motor perde potência, hesita e pode parar ao ralenti. A causa mais frequente é uma válvula EGR bloqueada em posição aberta pela carbonilha. O diafragma da válvula também pode estar perfurado, deixando passar os gases permanentemente. Nas EGR eletrónicas, um sensor de posição defeituoso pode fazer a ECU crer que a válvula está fechada quando está aberta, provocando um caudal excessivo não compensado.

fr.question: Un exces d'EGR peut-il faire caler le moteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, trop de gaz d'echappement dans l'admission remplace l'air frais et le moteur etouffe. C'est particulierement marqué au ralenti quand le debit d'air est faible.

fr.question: Comment debloquer une vanne EGR ?
fr.answer: Demontez-la, trempez-la dans du nettoyant EGR pendant plusieurs heures, puis grattez mecaniquement les depots. Si elle est bloquee par la calamine, un nettoyant seul ne suffit generalement pas.

fr.question: L'EGR electronique est-elle meilleure que la pneumatique ?
fr.answer: Elle est plus precise dans son ouverture mais aussi plus complexe et couteuse. Les deux types s'encrassent de la meme maniere.

en.question: What does the P0402 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0402 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr flow excessive. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0402 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0402 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0402 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0402 fault typically range from around £34 to £295, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is egr valve stuck open, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann ein AGR-Überschuss den Motor abwürgen?
de.answer: Ja, zu viel Abgas in der Ansaugung ersetzt die Frischluft und der Motor erstickt. Das ist besonders ausgeprägt im Leerlauf, wenn der Luftdurchsatz gering ist.

de.question: Kann ich mit einem P0402 fahren?
de.answer: Mit Mühe. Der Motor wird unberechenbar, würgt ab und beschleunigt schlecht. Fahren Sie direkt zur Werkstatt und vermeiden Sie die Autobahn.

de.question: Kann man das Ventil reinigen statt es zu ersetzen?
de.answer: Ja, oft mit Erfolg. Eine gründliche manuelle Reinigung mit Bremsenreiniger oder einem spezifischen Produkt kann ein durch Ölkohle blockiertes Ventil retten.

es.question: ¿Un exceso de EGR puede calar el motor?
es.answer: Sí, demasiados gases de escape en la admisión reemplazan al aire fresco y el motor se ahoga. Es particularmente marcado al ralentí cuando el caudal de aire es bajo.

es.question: ¿Puedo circular con un P0402?
es.answer: Con dificultad. El motor se vuelve impredecible, se cala y acelera mal. Ve directamente al taller y evita la autopista.

es.question: ¿Se puede limpiar la válvula en lugar de reemplazarla?
es.answer: Sí, a menudo con éxito. Una limpieza manual a fondo con limpiador de frenos o un producto específico puede salvar una válvula bloqueada por la carbonilla.

pt.question: Um excesso de EGR pode parar o motor?
pt.answer: Sim, demasiados gases de escape na admissão substituem o ar fresco e o motor sufoca. É particularmente marcado ao ralenti quando o caudal de ar é baixo.

pt.question: Posso circular com um P0402?
pt.answer: Com dificuldade. O motor torna-se imprevisível, para e acelera mal. Vá diretamente à oficina e evite a autoestrada.

pt.question: Pode-se limpar a válvula em vez de a substituir?
pt.answer: Sim, muitas vezes com sucesso. Uma limpeza manual a fundo com limpa-travões ou um produto específico pode salvar uma válvula bloqueada pela carbonilha.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Circuit de recirculation EGR — dysfonctionnement electrique
name.es: Circuito de recirculación EGR — disfunción eléctrica
name.pt: Circuito de recirculação EGR — disfunção elétrica

description.fr: Le P0403 concerne specifiquement le circuit electrique de la vanne EGR electronique. Le calculateur detecte une anomalie dans la commande electrique de la vanne : circuit ouvert, court-circuit ou resistance hors plage. Contrairement au P0401 qui mesure le resultat, le P0403 pointe un probleme electrique pur. Le connecteur de la vanne EGR est souvent expose a la chaleur et aux vibrations, ce qui favorise la corrosion et les faux contacts. Le moteur electrique ou la bobine de l'EGR peut aussi griller avec le temps. Le calculateur met la vanne EGR en position fermee par defaut en cas de probleme electrique, ce qui augmente les emissions de NOx mais preserve le bon fonctionnement du moteur.
description.en: The P0403 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with egr recirculation circuit — electrical malfunction. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0403 betrifft spezifisch den elektrischen Schaltkreis des elektronischen AGR-Ventils. Das Steuergerät erkennt eine Anomalie in der elektrischen Ansteuerung des Ventils: offener Schaltkreis, Kurzschluss oder Widerstand außerhalb des Bereichs. Im Gegensatz zum P0401, der das Ergebnis misst, weist der P0403 auf ein rein elektrisches Problem hin. Der Stecker des AGR-Ventils ist oft Hitze und Vibrationen ausgesetzt, was Korrosion und Wackelkontakte begünstigt. Der Elektromotor oder die Spule der AGR kann ebenfalls mit der Zeit durchbrennen. Das Steuergerät bringt das AGR-Ventil bei einem elektrischen Problem standardmäßig in die geschlossene Position, was die NOx-Emissionen erhöht, aber den ordnungsgemäßen Motorbetrieb erhält.
description.es: El P0403 concierne específicamente al circuito eléctrico de la válvula EGR electrónica. La ECU detecta una anomalía en el mando eléctrico de la válvula: circuito abierto, cortocircuito o resistencia fuera de rango. Contrariamente al P0401 que mide el resultado, el P0403 apunta a un problema eléctrico puro. El conector de la válvula EGR está a menudo expuesto al calor y las vibraciones, lo que favorece la corrosión y los falsos contactos. El motor eléctrico o la bobina de la EGR también puede quemarse con el tiempo. La ECU pone la válvula EGR en posición cerrada por defecto en caso de problema eléctrico, lo que aumenta las emisiones de NOx pero preserva el buen funcionamiento del motor.
description.pt: O P0403 diz respeito especificamente ao circuito elétrico da válvula EGR eletrónica. A ECU deteta uma anomalia no comando elétrico da válvula: circuito aberto, curto-circuito ou resistência fora da gama. Contrariamente ao P0401 que mede o resultado, o P0403 aponta para um problema elétrico puro. O conector da válvula EGR está muitas vezes exposto ao calor e às vibrações, o que favorece a corrosão e os falsos contactos. O motor elétrico ou a bobina da EGR também pode queimar com o tempo. A ECU põe a válvula EGR em posição fechada por defeito em caso de problema elétrico, o que aumenta as emissões de NOx mas preserva o bom funcionamento do motor.

fr.question: La vanne EGR a-t-elle un moteur electrique ?
fr.answer: Les vannes EGR modernes oui. Le moteur electrique permet un controle precis de l'ouverture. Les anciennes vannes utilisaient une capsule a depression pour l'actionnement.

fr.question: Le calculateur ferme-t-il l'EGR en cas de panne electrique ?
fr.answer: Oui, par defaut la vanne reste fermee. Le moteur fonctionne normalement mais les emissions de NOx augmentent car il n'y a plus de recirculation.

fr.question: Comment tester le circuit electrique de l'EGR ?
fr.answer: Mesurez la resistance de la bobine ou du moteur aux bornes du connecteur. Verifiez aussi la tension d'alimentation et le signal de commande du calculateur avec un multimetre.

en.question: What does the P0403 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0403 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr recirculation circuit — electrical malfunction. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0403 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0403 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0403 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0403 fault typically range from around £13 to £348, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is connector egr corroded, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Hat das AGR-Ventil einen Elektromotor?
de.answer: Moderne AGR-Ventile ja. Der Elektromotor ermöglicht eine präzise Steuerung der Öffnung. Ältere Ventile verwendeten eine Unterdruckdose zur Betätigung.

de.question: Schließt das Steuergerät die AGR bei einem elektrischen Ausfall?
de.answer: Ja, standardmäßig bleibt das Ventil geschlossen. Der Motor läuft normal, aber die NOx-Emissionen steigen, weil keine Rezirkulation mehr stattfindet.

de.question: Wie testet man den elektrischen Schaltkreis der AGR?
de.answer: Messen Sie den Widerstand der Spule oder des Motors an den Klemmen des Steckers. Prüfen Sie auch die Versorgungsspannung und das Steuersignal des Steuergeräts mit einem Multimeter.

es.question: ¿La válvula EGR tiene un motor eléctrico?
es.answer: Las válvulas EGR modernas sí. El motor eléctrico permite un control preciso de la apertura. Las válvulas antiguas usaban una cápsula de vacío para el accionamiento.

es.question: ¿La ECU cierra la EGR en caso de avería eléctrica?
es.answer: Sí, por defecto la válvula permanece cerrada. El motor funciona normalmente pero las emisiones de NOx aumentan porque ya no hay recirculación.

es.question: ¿Cómo probar el circuito eléctrico de la EGR?
es.answer: Mide la resistencia de la bobina o del motor en los bornes del conector. Verifica también la tensión de alimentación y la señal de mando de la ECU con un multímetro.

pt.question: A válvula EGR tem um motor elétrico?
pt.answer: As válvulas EGR modernas sim. O motor elétrico permite um controlo preciso da abertura. As válvulas antigas usavam uma cápsula de vácuo para o acionamento.

pt.question: A ECU fecha a EGR em caso de avaria elétrica?
pt.answer: Sim, por defeito a válvula permanece fechada. O motor funciona normalmente mas as emissões de NOx aumentam porque já não há recirculação.

pt.question: Como testar o circuito elétrico da EGR?
pt.answer: Meça a resistência da bobina ou do motor nos terminais do conector. Verifique também a tensão de alimentação e o sinal de comando da ECU com um multímetro.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le P0404 indique que le capteur de position de la vanne EGR renvoie des valeurs qui ne correspondent pas a la commande du calculateur. La vanne ne s'ouvre pas autant que demande ou au contraire s'ouvre trop. C'est souvent un signe que la vanne commence a coller a cause de la calamine, mais le mecanisme fonctionne encore partiellement. Le capteur de position integre a la vanne detecte que la position reelle ne correspond pas a la position commandee. Ce code est intermediaire entre un fonctionnement normal et une panne complete. Un nettoyage de la vanne peut resoudre le probleme si l'encrassement est la cause. Si le capteur lui-meme est defaillant, il faut remplacer la vanne complete.
description.en: When your car shows a P0404 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to egr circuit — range/performance. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0404 zeigt an, dass der Positionssensor des AGR-Ventils Werte zurückgibt, die nicht dem Befehl des Steuergeräts entsprechen. Das Ventil öffnet sich nicht so weit wie angefordert oder im Gegenteil zu weit. Das ist oft ein Zeichen, dass das Ventil aufgrund von Ölkohle zu kleben beginnt, aber der Mechanismus noch teilweise funktioniert. Der in das Ventil integrierte Positionssensor erkennt, dass die tatsächliche Position nicht der befohlenen Position entspricht. Dieser Code ist eine Zwischenstufe zwischen normalem Betrieb und vollständigem Ausfall. Eine Reinigung des Ventils kann das Problem lösen, wenn die Verschmutzung die Ursache ist. Wenn der Sensor selbst defekt ist, muss das komplette Ventil ersetzt werden.
description.es: El P0404 indica que el sensor de posición de la válvula EGR devuelve valores que no corresponden al mando de la ECU. La válvula no se abre tanto como se le pide o al contrario se abre demasiado. Es a menudo una señal de que la válvula empieza a pegarse por la carbonilla, pero el mecanismo todavía funciona parcialmente. El sensor de posición integrado en la válvula detecta que la posición real no corresponde a la posición ordenada. Este código es intermedio entre un funcionamiento normal y una avería completa. Una limpieza de la válvula puede resolver el problema si la suciedad es la causa. Si el propio sensor es defectuoso, hay que reemplazar la válvula completa.
description.pt: O P0404 indica que o sensor de posição da válvula EGR devolve valores que não correspondem ao comando da ECU. A válvula não se abre tanto quanto pedido ou pelo contrário abre-se demais. É muitas vezes um sinal de que a válvula começa a colar devido à carbonilha, mas o mecanismo ainda funciona parcialmente. O sensor de posição integrado na válvula deteta que a posição real não corresponde à posição comandada. Este código é intermédio entre um funcionamento normal e uma avaria completa. Uma limpeza da válvula pode resolver o problema se a sujidade for a causa. Se o próprio sensor estiver defeituoso, é preciso substituir a válvula completa.

fr.question: Le P0404 est-il urgent ?
fr.answer: Non, c'est un code de performance degradee. La vanne fonctionne encore mais pas parfaitement. C'est le bon moment pour la nettoyer avant qu'elle ne se bloque completement.

fr.question: Le nettoyage peut-il suffire ?
fr.answer: Dans beaucoup de cas oui. Si la vanne est juste encrassee, un bon nettoyage restaure son fonctionnement. C'est la premiere intervention a tenter.

fr.question: Le capteur de position est-il remplacable separement ?
fr.answer: Sur certaines vannes oui, sur d'autres il est integre. Consultez la documentation de votre vehicule. Souvent, remplacer la vanne complete est plus simple et plus fiable.

en.question: What does the P0404 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0404 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr circuit — range/performance. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0404 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0404 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0404 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0404 fault typically range from around £35 to £416, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is partially clogged egr valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der P0404 dringend?
de.answer: Nein, es ist ein Code für verminderte Leistung. Das Ventil funktioniert noch, aber nicht perfekt. Es ist der richtige Moment, es zu reinigen, bevor es sich vollständig blockiert.

de.question: Kann eine Reinigung ausreichen?
de.answer: In vielen Fällen ja. Wenn das Ventil nur verschmutzt ist, stellt eine gute Reinigung seine Funktion wieder her. Das ist der erste zu versuchende Eingriff.

de.question: Ist der Positionssensor separat austauschbar?
de.answer: Bei einigen Ventilen ja, bei anderen ist er integriert. Sehen Sie sich die Dokumentation Ihres Fahrzeugs an. Oft ist der Austausch des kompletten Ventils einfacher und zuverlässiger.

es.question: ¿El P0404 es urgente?
es.answer: No, es un código de rendimiento degradado. La válvula todavía funciona pero no perfectamente. Es el buen momento para limpiarla antes de que se bloquee por completo.

es.question: ¿Puede bastar con la limpieza?
es.answer: En muchos casos sí. Si la válvula solo está sucia, una buena limpieza restaura su funcionamiento. Es la primera intervención a intentar.

es.question: ¿El sensor de posición se reemplaza por separado?
es.answer: En algunas válvulas sí, en otras está integrado. Consulta la documentación de tu vehículo. A menudo, reemplazar la válvula completa es más sencillo y más fiable.

pt.question: O P0404 é urgente?
pt.answer: Não, é um código de desempenho degradado. A válvula ainda funciona mas não perfeitamente. É o bom momento para a limpar antes que se bloqueie completamente.

pt.question: A limpeza pode bastar?
pt.answer: Em muitos casos sim. Se a válvula apenas estiver suja, uma boa limpeza restaura o seu funcionamento. É a primeira intervenção a tentar.

pt.question: O sensor de posição substitui-se separadamente?
pt.answer: Em algumas válvulas sim, noutras está integrado. Consulte a documentação do seu veículo. Muitas vezes, substituir a válvula completa é mais simples e mais fiável.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Capteur de position EGR A — tension basse
name.en: EGR position sensor A — low voltage
name.es: Sensor de posición EGR A — tensión baja
name.pt: Sensor de posição EGR A — tensão baixa

description.fr: Le P0405 signale que le capteur de position de la vanne EGR envoie une tension trop basse. Le calculateur interprete cela comme la vanne etant en position fermee en permanence, meme quand il commande son ouverture. C'est souvent un court-circuit dans le cablage du capteur ou un capteur defaillant. La vanne elle-meme peut fonctionner mecaniquement mais le retour d'information est faux. Le calculateur ne sachant pas ou en est la vanne, il prefere la desactiver et mettre un defaut. L'impact sur la conduite est generalement minimal car le calculateur compense l'absence d'EGR, mais les emissions de NOx augmentent sensiblement.
description.en: A P0405 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with egr position sensor a — low voltage. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0405 meldet, dass der Positionssensor des AGR-Ventils eine zu niedrige Spannung sendet. Das Steuergerät interpretiert dies als dauerhafte geschlossene Position des Ventils, selbst wenn es die Öffnung befiehlt. Es handelt sich oft um einen Kurzschluss in der Sensorverkabelung oder einen defekten Sensor. Das Ventil selbst kann mechanisch funktionieren, aber die Rückmeldung ist falsch. Da das Steuergerät nicht weiß, wo sich das Ventil befindet, zieht es es vor, es zu deaktivieren und einen Fehler zu setzen. Die Auswirkung auf das Fahren ist im Allgemeinen minimal, weil das Steuergerät das Fehlen der AGR kompensiert, aber die NOx-Emissionen steigen spürbar.
description.es: El P0405 señala que el sensor de posición de la válvula EGR envía una tensión demasiado baja. La ECU lo interpreta como que la válvula está en posición cerrada permanentemente, incluso cuando ordena su apertura. Es a menudo un cortocircuito en el cableado del sensor o un sensor defectuoso. La propia válvula puede funcionar mecánicamente pero la información de retorno es falsa. Al no saber la ECU dónde está la válvula, prefiere desactivarla y poner un fallo.
