El impacto en la conducción es generalmente mínimo porque la ECU compensa la ausencia de EGR, pero las emisiones de NOx aumentan sensiblemente.
description.pt: O P0405 assinala que o sensor de posição da válvula EGR envia uma tensão demasiado baixa. A ECU interpreta-o como estando a válvula em posição fechada permanentemente, mesmo quando comanda a sua abertura. É muitas vezes um curto-circuito na cablagem do sensor ou um sensor defeituoso. A própria válvula pode funcionar mecanicamente mas a informação de retorno é falsa. Como a ECU não sabe onde está a válvula, prefere desativá-la e colocar um defeito. O impacto na condução é geralmente mínimo porque a ECU compensa a ausência de EGR, mas as emissões de NOx aumentam sensivelmente.

fr.question: L'EGR desactivee est-elle un probleme ?
fr.answer: Pas pour la conduite mais pour les emissions. Sans EGR, le moteur produit plus de NOx. C'est aussi un motif de refus au controle technique.

fr.question: Comment tester le capteur de position ?
fr.answer: Mesurez la tension de sortie avec un multimetre. Elle doit varier entre environ 0.5V (ferme) et 4.5V (ouvert). Si elle reste a 0V, le capteur ou le cablage est en cause.

fr.question: Peut-on conduire normalement sans EGR ?
fr.answer: Oui, le moteur fonctionne tres bien sans EGR. Certains disent meme mieux. Mais c'est illegal et polluant, donc il faut reparer.

en.question: What does the P0405 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0405 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr position sensor a — low voltage. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0405 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0405 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0405 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0405 fault typically range from around £17 to £422, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty egr position sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist eine deaktivierte AGR ein Problem?
de.answer: Nicht für das Fahren, aber für die Emissionen. Ohne AGR produziert der Motor mehr NOx. Es ist auch ein Grund für einen TÜV-Durchfall.

de.question: Wie testet man den Positionssensor?
de.answer: Messen Sie die Ausgangsspannung mit einem Multimeter. Sie muss zwischen etwa 0,5 V (geschlossen) und 4,5 V (geöffnet) variieren. Bleibt sie bei 0 V, ist der Sensor oder die Verkabelung die Ursache.

de.question: Kann man normal ohne AGR fahren?
de.answer: Ja, der Motor läuft sehr gut ohne AGR. Manche sagen sogar besser. Aber es ist illegal und umweltschädlich, also muss repariert werden.

es.question: ¿La EGR desactivada es un problema?
es.answer: No para la conducción pero sí para las emisiones. Sin EGR, el motor produce más NOx. También es motivo de rechazo en la ITV.

es.question: ¿Cómo probar el sensor de posición?
es.answer: Mide la tensión de salida con un multímetro. Debe variar entre alrededor de 0,5 V (cerrado) y 4,5 V (abierto). Si permanece a 0 V, el sensor o el cableado es la causa.

es.question: ¿Se puede circular normalmente sin EGR?
es.answer: Sí, el motor funciona muy bien sin EGR. Algunos dicen incluso que mejor. Pero es ilegal y contaminante, así que hay que reparar.

pt.question: A EGR desativada é um problema?
pt.answer: Não para a condução mas sim para as emissões. Sem EGR, o motor produz mais NOx. Também é motivo de reprovação na IPO.

pt.question: Como testar o sensor de posição?
pt.answer: Meça a tensão de saída com um multímetro. Deve variar entre cerca de 0,5 V (fechado) e 4,5 V (aberto). Se permanecer a 0 V, o sensor ou a cablagem é a causa.

pt.question: Pode-se conduzir normalmente sem EGR?
pt.answer: Sim, o motor funciona muito bem sem EGR. Alguns dizem até melhor. Mas é ilegal e poluente, portanto é preciso reparar.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.es: Sensor de velocidad del vehículo – disfunción
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade do veículo – avaria

description.fr: Le P0500 indique que le capteur de vitesse du vehicule (VSS) ne fonctionne plus correctement. Ce capteur informe le calculateur de la vitesse a laquelle le vehicule se deplace. Sans cette information, le compteur de vitesse ne fonctionne plus, la boite automatique ne change plus correctement les rapports et le regulateur de vitesse est desactive. Sur certains vehicules, l'ABS et l'ESP sont aussi affectes car ils utilisent cette information. Le capteur est generalement fixe sur la boite de vitesses ou le pont arriere. C'est un capteur magnetique qui lit les dents d'une roue dentee. La corrosion du connecteur et l'usure du capteur sont les causes les plus frequentes.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0500 relates to vehicle speed sensor — malfunction, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0500 zeigt an, dass der Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeitssensor (VSS) nicht mehr korrekt funktioniert. Dieser Sensor informiert das Steuergerät über die Geschwindigkeit, mit der sich das Fahrzeug bewegt. Ohne diese Information funktioniert der Tachometer nicht mehr, das Automatikgetriebe schaltet die Gänge nicht mehr korrekt und der Tempomat wird deaktiviert. Bei manchen Fahrzeugen sind auch ABS und ESP betroffen, da sie diese Information nutzen. Der Sensor ist in der Regel am Getriebe oder der Hinterachse befestigt. Es ist ein Magnetsensor, der die Zähne eines Zahnrads liest. Die Korrosion des Steckers und der Verschleiß des Sensors sind die häufigsten Ursachen.
description.es: El P0500 indica que el sensor de velocidad del vehículo (VSS) ya no funciona correctamente. Este sensor informa a la centralita de la velocidad a la que se desplaza el vehículo. Sin esta información, el velocímetro no funciona, la caja automática ya no cambia correctamente de marcha y el regulador de velocidad se desactiva. En algunos vehículos, el ABS y el ESP también se ven afectados porque utilizan esta información. El sensor está generalmente fijado en la caja de cambios o en el puente trasero. Es un sensor magnético que lee los dientes de una rueda dentada. La corrosión del conector y el desgaste del sensor son las causas más frecuentes.
description.pt: O P0500 indica que o sensor de velocidade do veículo (VSS) já não funciona corretamente. Este sensor informa a centralina da velocidade a que o veículo se desloca. Sem esta informação, o velocímetro deixa de funcionar, a caixa automática já não muda corretamente as relações e o regulador de velocidade é desativado. Em alguns veículos, o ABS e o ESP também são afetados pois utilizam esta informação. O sensor está geralmente fixado na caixa de velocidades ou no eixo traseiro. É um sensor magnético que lê os dentes de uma roda dentada. A corrosão do conector e o desgaste do sensor são as causas mais frequentes.

fr.question: Mon compteur de vitesse ne marche plus, est-ce le P0500 ?
fr.answer: Tres probablement. Le capteur VSS alimente directement le compteur. Si le capteur est HS, le compteur reste a zero ou affiche des valeurs erratiques.

fr.question: La boite automatique reagit-elle au P0500 ?
fr.answer: Oui, la boite a besoin de la vitesse vehicule pour determiner quand changer de rapport. Sans cette info, elle peut rester bloquee en 2e ou 3e vitesse.

fr.question: Ce code affecte-t-il le kilometrage ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le capteur ne fonctionne plus, le compteur kilometrique ne tourne plus non plus. C'est une anomalie qui sera visible a la vente du vehicule.

en.question: What does the P0500 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0500 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with vehicle speed sensor — malfunction. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0500 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0500 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0500 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0500 fault typically range from around £17 to £302, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty vehicle speed sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Mein Tachometer funktioniert nicht mehr, ist es der P0500?
de.answer: Sehr wahrscheinlich. Der VSS-Sensor versorgt den Tachometer direkt. Ist der Sensor defekt, bleibt der Tachometer auf null oder zeigt sprunghafte Werte an.

de.question: Reagiert das Automatikgetriebe auf den P0500?
de.answer: Ja, das Getriebe benötigt die Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeit, um zu bestimmen, wann geschaltet werden soll. Ohne diese Info kann es im 2. oder 3. Gang stecken bleiben.

de.question: Betrifft dieser Code den Kilometerstand?
de.answer: Ja, funktioniert der Sensor nicht mehr, läuft auch der Kilometerzähler nicht mehr. Es ist eine Anomalie, die beim Verkauf des Fahrzeugs sichtbar sein wird.

es.question: Mi velocímetro no funciona, ¿es el P0500?
es.answer: Muy probablemente. El sensor VSS alimenta directamente el velocímetro. Si el sensor está averiado, el velocímetro se queda a cero o muestra valores erráticos.

es.question: ¿Reacciona la caja automática al P0500?
es.answer: Sí, la caja necesita la velocidad del vehículo para determinar cuándo cambiar de marcha. Sin esta información, puede quedar bloqueada en 2ª o 3ª velocidad.

es.question: ¿Afecta este código al kilometraje?
es.answer: Sí, si el sensor no funciona, el cuentakilómetros tampoco gira. Es una anomalía que será visible en la venta del vehículo.

pt.question: O meu velocímetro não funciona, é o P0500?
pt.answer: Muito provavelmente. O sensor VSS alimenta diretamente o velocímetro. Se o sensor estiver avariado, o velocímetro fica a zero ou mostra valores erráticos.

pt.question: A caixa automática reage ao P0500?
pt.answer: Sim, a caixa precisa da velocidade do veículo para determinar quando mudar de relação. Sem esta informação, pode ficar bloqueada em 2ª ou 3ª.

pt.question: Este código afeta a quilometragem?
pt.answer: Sim, se o sensor não funciona, o conta-quilómetros também deixa de andar. É uma anomalia que será visível na venda do veículo.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.es: Sensor de velocidad del vehículo – rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade do veículo – faixa/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0501 est plus subtil que le P0500 : le capteur de vitesse fonctionne mais ses valeurs sont incoherentes avec d'autres sources d'information comme les capteurs ABS de roue. Le calculateur detecte des ecarts significatifs entre la vitesse VSS et la vitesse calculee par les capteurs de roue. Cela peut venir d'un capteur fatigue dont le signal est affaibli, d'un entrefer trop important entre le capteur et la roue dentee, ou d'une roue dentee partiellement endommagee. Les pneus de taille incorrecte peuvent aussi fausser la comparaison si la taille n'est pas correctement programmee dans le calculateur. Le compteur fonctionne mais peut afficher une vitesse incorrecte.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0501 code, it is telling you there is a problem with vehicle speed sensor — range/performance. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0501 ist subtiler als der P0500: der Geschwindigkeitssensor funktioniert, aber seine Werte sind mit anderen Informationsquellen wie den ABS-Radsensoren inkonsistent. Das Steuergerät erkennt erhebliche Abweichungen zwischen der VSS-Geschwindigkeit und der von den Radsensoren berechneten Geschwindigkeit. Das kann an einem ermüdeten Sensor mit geschwächtem Signal, einem zu großen Luftspalt zwischen Sensor und Zahnrad oder einem teilweise beschädigten Zahnrad liegen. Reifen in falscher Größe können den Vergleich ebenfalls verfälschen, wenn die Größe nicht korrekt im Steuergerät programmiert ist. Der Tachometer funktioniert, kann aber eine falsche Geschwindigkeit anzeigen.
description.es: El P0501 es más sutil que el P0500: el sensor de velocidad funciona pero sus valores son incoherentes con otras fuentes de información como los sensores ABS de rueda. La centralita detecta desviaciones significativas entre la velocidad VSS y la velocidad calculada por los sensores de rueda. Eso puede venir de un sensor fatigado cuya señal está debilitada, de un entrehierro demasiado grande entre el sensor y la rueda dentada, o de una rueda dentada parcialmente dañada. Los neumáticos de talla incorrecta también pueden falsear la comparación si la talla no está correctamente programada en la centralita. El velocímetro funciona pero puede mostrar una velocidad incorrecta.
description.pt: O P0501 é mais subtil que o P0500: o sensor de velocidade funciona mas os seus valores são incoerentes com outras fontes de informação como os sensores ABS das rodas. A centralina deteta desvios significativos entre a velocidade VSS e a velocidade calculada pelos sensores das rodas. Isto pode vir de um sensor fatigado cujo sinal está enfraquecido, de uma folga demasiado grande entre o sensor e a roda dentada, ou de uma roda dentada parcialmente danificada. Os pneus de tamanho incorreto também podem falsear a comparação se o tamanho não estiver corretamente programado na centralina. O velocímetro funciona mas pode mostrar uma velocidade incorreta.

fr.question: Des pneus trop grands peuvent-ils causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, si les pneus sont significativement plus grands que l'origine, le rapport entre la vitesse VSS et la vitesse ABS ne correspond plus. Certains calculateurs detectent cet ecart.

fr.question: L'entrefer du capteur, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est la distance entre l'extremite du capteur magnetique et les dents de la roue dentee. Si cet ecart augmente (usure, desserrage), le signal s'affaiblit et devient erratique.

fr.question: Ce code peut-il causer des amendes pour exces de vitesse ?
fr.answer: Si le compteur affiche une vitesse inferieure a la realite, vous roulez plus vite que ce que vous pensez. C'est effectivement un risque.

en.question: What does the P0501 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0501 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with vehicle speed sensor — range/performance. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0501 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0501 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0501 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0501 fault typically range from around £17 to £351, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn vehicle speed sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Können zu große Reifen diesen Code verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, wenn die Reifen deutlich größer als original sind, stimmt das Verhältnis zwischen VSS-Geschwindigkeit und ABS-Geschwindigkeit nicht mehr überein. Einige Steuergeräte erkennen diese Abweichung.

de.question: Was ist der Luftspalt des Sensors?
de.answer: Es ist der Abstand zwischen der Spitze des Magnetsensors und den Zähnen des Zahnrads. Vergrößert sich dieser Abstand (Verschleiß, Lockerung), wird das Signal schwächer und sprunghaft.

de.question: Kann dieser Code zu Bußgeldern wegen Geschwindigkeitsüberschreitung führen?
de.answer: Wenn der Tachometer eine niedrigere Geschwindigkeit als die Realität anzeigt, fahren Sie schneller, als Sie denken. Das ist tatsächlich ein Risiko.

es.question: ¿Pueden los neumáticos demasiado grandes causar este código?
es.answer: Sí, si los neumáticos son significativamente más grandes que los originales, la relación entre la velocidad VSS y la velocidad ABS ya no corresponde. Algunas centralitas detectan esta desviación.

es.question: El entrehierro del sensor, ¿qué es?
es.answer: Es la distancia entre el extremo del sensor magnético y los dientes de la rueda dentada. Si este espacio aumenta (desgaste, aflojamiento), la señal se debilita y se vuelve errática.

es.question: ¿Puede este código causar multas por exceso de velocidad?
es.answer: Si el velocímetro muestra una velocidad inferior a la realidad, usted rueda más rápido de lo que cree. Efectivamente es un riesgo.

pt.question: Pneus demasiado grandes podem causar este código?
pt.answer: Sim, se os pneus forem significativamente maiores que os originais, a relação entre a velocidade VSS e a velocidade ABS deixa de corresponder. Algumas centralinas detetam este desvio.

pt.question: A folga do sensor, o que é?
pt.answer: É a distância entre a extremidade do sensor magnético e os dentes da roda dentada. Se este espaço aumentar (desgaste, folga), o sinal enfraquece e torna-se errático.

pt.question: Este código pode causar multas por excesso de velocidade?
pt.answer: Se o velocímetro mostrar uma velocidade inferior à realidade, está a circular mais depressa do que pensa. Efetivamente é um risco.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Systeme de controle du ralenti — regime inferieur au seuil
name.en: Idle control system — RPM lower than expected
name.es: Sistema de control del ralentí – régimen inferior al umbral
name.pt: Sistema de controlo do ralenti – regime inferior ao limiar

description.fr: Le P0506 indique que le moteur tourne en dessous du regime de ralenti programme. Au lieu de 750-800 tours/minute, le moteur descend a 500-600 tours et risque de caler. Le calculateur essaie de remonter le regime en ouvrant la vanne de ralenti ou le papillon, mais n'y arrive pas suffisamment. Les causes classiques sont un boitier papillon encrasse qui ne laisse plus passer assez d'air, une vanne de ralenti bloquee en position basse, ou une charge electrique trop importante qui ralentit le moteur. La climatisation, les phares et la direction assistee electrique consomment de l'energie que le moteur doit compenser. Si le ralenti est trop faible, il ne compense pas et le moteur cale.
description.en: A P0506 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with idle control system — rpm lower than expected. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0506 zeigt an, dass der Motor unter der programmierten Leerlaufdrehzahl läuft. Statt 750-800 U/min fällt der Motor auf 500-600 U/min und droht abzusterben. Das Steuergerät versucht, die Drehzahl zu erhöhen, indem es das Leerlaufventil oder die Drosselklappe öffnet, schafft es aber nicht ausreichend. Die klassischen Ursachen sind eine verschmutzte Drosselklappe, die nicht mehr genug Luft durchlässt, ein in tiefer Stellung klemmendes Leerlaufventil oder eine zu hohe elektrische Last, die den Motor verlangsamt. Klimaanlage, Scheinwerfer und elektrische Servolenkung verbrauchen Energie, die der Motor kompensieren muss. Ist der Leerlauf zu schwach, kompensiert er nicht und der Motor stirbt ab.
description.es: El P0506 indica que el motor gira por debajo del régimen de ralentí programado. En lugar de 750-800 revoluciones/minuto, el motor baja a 500-600 revoluciones y corre el riesgo de calarse. La centralita intenta subir el régimen abriendo la válvula de ralentí o la mariposa, pero no lo consigue lo suficiente. Las causas clásicas son un cuerpo de mariposa sucio que ya no deja pasar suficiente aire, una válvula de ralentí bloqueada en posición baja, o una carga eléctrica demasiado importante que frena el motor. El aire acondicionado, los faros y la dirección asistida eléctrica consumen energía que el motor debe compensar. Si el ralentí es demasiado débil, no compensa y el motor cala.
description.pt: O P0506 indica que o motor trabalha abaixo do regime de ralenti programado. Em vez de 750-800 rotações/minuto, o motor desce a 500-600 rotações e arrisca parar. A centralina tenta subir o regime abrindo a válvula de ralenti ou a borboleta, mas não o consegue suficientemente. As causas clássicas são um corpo de borboleta sujo que já não deixa passar ar suficiente, uma válvula de ralenti bloqueada em posição baixa, ou uma carga elétrica demasiado importante que trava o motor. O ar condicionado, os faróis e a direção assistida elétrica consomem energia que o motor deve compensar. Se o ralenti for demasiado fraco, não compensa e o motor para.

name.es: Entrada de aire o fuga de depresión
name.pt: Entrada de ar ou fuga de depressão

fr.question: Mon moteur cale au feu rouge, est-ce le P0506 ?
fr.answer: C'est une possibilite. Un ralenti trop bas ne compense pas les charges electriques (clim, phares, direction) et le moteur cale. Verifiez l'etat du papillon en premier.

fr.question: La climatisation fait-elle caler le moteur ?
fr.answer: Si le ralenti est deja limite, l'enclenchement de la clim peut faire passer le moteur sous le seuil et provoquer un calage. Le calculateur devrait normalement remonter le regime a l'enclenchement de la clim.

fr.question: Nettoyer le papillon suffit-il ?
fr.answer: Souvent oui. Un papillon encrasse laisse passer moins d'air au ralenti. Un nettoyage avec un produit adapte restaure le passage d'air. N'oubliez pas le reapprentissage du ralenti apres.

en.question: What does the P0506 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0506 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with idle control system — rpm lower than expected. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0506 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0506 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0506 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0506 fault typically range from around £26 to £175, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is dirty throttle body, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Mein Motor stirbt an der Ampel ab, ist es der P0506?
de.answer: Das ist eine Möglichkeit. Ein zu niedriger Leerlauf kompensiert die elektrischen Lasten nicht (Klima, Scheinwerfer, Lenkung) und der Motor stirbt ab. Prüfen Sie zuerst den Zustand der Drosselklappe.

de.question: Bringt die Klimaanlage den Motor zum Absterben?
de.answer: Wenn der Leerlauf bereits eingeschränkt ist, kann das Einschalten der Klima den Motor unter den Schwellwert bringen und zum Absterben führen. Das Steuergerät sollte normalerweise die Drehzahl beim Einschalten der Klima erhöhen.

de.question: Reicht es, die Drosselklappe zu reinigen?
de.answer: Oft ja. Eine verschmutzte Drosselklappe lässt weniger Luft im Leerlauf durch. Eine Reinigung mit einem geeigneten Produkt stellt den Luftdurchgang wieder her. Vergessen Sie nicht das Neuanlernen des Leerlaufs danach.

es.question: Mi motor cala en el semáforo, ¿es el P0506?
es.answer: Es una posibilidad. Un ralentí demasiado bajo no compensa las cargas eléctricas (aire, faros, dirección) y el motor cala. Verifique primero el estado de la mariposa.

es.question: ¿Hace calar el aire acondicionado el motor?
es.answer: Si el ralentí ya está limitado, el acoplamiento del aire puede hacer pasar el motor por debajo del umbral y provocar un calado. La centralita debería normalmente subir el régimen al acoplarse el aire.

es.question: ¿Basta con limpiar la mariposa?
es.answer: A menudo sí. Una mariposa sucia deja pasar menos aire al ralentí. Una limpieza con un producto adaptado restaura el paso de aire. No olvide el reaprendizaje del ralentí después.

pt.question: O meu motor para no sinal vermelho, é o P0506?
pt.answer: É uma possibilidade. Um ralenti demasiado baixo não compensa as cargas elétricas (ar, faróis, direção) e o motor para. Verifique primeiro o estado da borboleta.

pt.question: O ar condicionado faz parar o motor?
pt.answer: Se o ralenti já estiver limitado, o acoplamento do ar pode fazer o motor passar abaixo do limiar e provocar uma paragem. A centralina deveria normalmente subir o regime ao acoplar o ar.

pt.question: Basta limpar a borboleta?
pt.answer: Muitas vezes sim. Uma borboleta suja deixa passar menos ar em ralenti. Uma limpeza com um produto adaptado restaura a passagem de ar. Não se esqueça da reaprendizagem do ralenti depois.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Systeme de controle du ralenti — circuit tension basse
name.en: Idle control system — low voltage circuit
name.es: Sistema de control del ralentí – circuito tensión baja
name.pt: Sistema de controlo do ralenti – circuito tensão baixa

description.fr: Le P0508 signale un probleme electrique sur le circuit de commande du systeme de ralenti. La tension est anormalement basse, ce qui peut indiquer un court-circuit dans le cablage de la vanne de ralenti ou du moteur pas a pas qui controle l'air au ralenti. Sur les vehicules avec papillon electronique, c'est le circuit de commande du moteur du papillon qui est concerne. Un connecteur corrode, un fil pince ou un composant interne en court-circuit sont les causes typiques. Le calculateur peut mettre le systeme en mode degrade avec un ralenti fixe qui n'est pas necessairement optimal pour toutes les conditions de charge.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0508 relates to idle control system — low voltage circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0508 signalisiert ein elektrisches Problem im Steuerkreis des Leerlaufsystems. Die Spannung ist ungewöhnlich niedrig, was auf einen Kurzschluss in der Verkabelung des Leerlaufventils oder des Schrittmotors hinweisen kann, der die Luft im Leerlauf steuert. Bei Fahrzeugen mit elektronischer Drosselklappe ist der Steuerkreis des Drosselklappenmotors betroffen. Ein korrodierter Stecker, ein eingeklemmtes Kabel oder ein internes Bauteil im Kurzschluss sind typische Ursachen. Das Steuergerät kann das System in einen Notlauf mit festem Leerlauf versetzen, der nicht unbedingt für alle Lastbedingungen optimal ist.
description.es: El P0508 señala un problema eléctrico en el circuito de mando del sistema de ralentí. La tensión es anormalmente baja, lo que puede indicar un cortocircuito en el cableado de la válvula de ralentí o del motor paso a paso que controla el aire al ralentí. En los vehículos con mariposa electrónica, es el circuito de mando del motor de la mariposa el que está afectado. Un conector corroído, un cable pellizcado o un componente interno en cortocircuito son las causas típicas. La centralita puede poner el sistema en modo degradado con un ralentí fijo que no es necesariamente óptimo para todas las condiciones de carga.
description.pt: O P0508 sinaliza um problema elétrico no circuito de comando do sistema de ralenti. A tensão é anormalmente baixa, o que pode indicar um curto-circuito na cablagem da válvula de ralenti ou do motor passo a passo que controla o ar em ralenti. Nos veículos com borboleta eletrónica, é o circuito de comando do motor da borboleta que está afetado. Um conector corroído, um fio entalado ou um componente interno em curto-circuito são as causas típicas. A centralina pode pôr o sistema em modo degradado com um ralenti fixo que não é necessariamente ótimo para todas as condições de carga.

fr.question: Le moteur pas a pas, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est un petit moteur electrique qui controle l'ouverture d'un passage d'air parallele au papillon. Il permet au calculateur d'ajuster le debit d'air au ralenti sans toucher au papillon lui-meme.

fr.question: Quel est l'impact d'un ralenti non adaptatif ?
fr.answer: Le moteur tourne a un regime fixe qui ne s'ajuste plus aux conditions. Quand la clim s'enclenche ou que la direction est braquee, le regime ne monte pas et le moteur peut caler.

fr.question: Ce probleme est-il lie a la batterie ?
fr.answer: Une tension de batterie trop basse peut perturber les signaux electriques. Verifiez l'etat de la batterie et de l'alternateur avant de remplacer des composants.

en.question: What does the P0508 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0508 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with idle control system — low voltage circuit. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0508 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0508 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0508 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0508 fault typically range from around £13 to £170, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is idle circuit short circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was ist der Schrittmotor?
de.answer: Es ist ein kleiner Elektromotor, der die Öffnung eines Luftdurchgangs parallel zur Drosselklappe steuert. Er ermöglicht dem Steuergerät, den Luftdurchsatz im Leerlauf anzupassen, ohne die Drosselklappe selbst anzufassen.

de.question: Welche Auswirkung hat ein nicht adaptiver Leerlauf?
de.answer: Der Motor läuft mit einer festen Drehzahl, die sich nicht mehr an die Bedingungen anpasst. Wenn die Klima einschaltet oder die Lenkung eingeschlagen ist, steigt die Drehzahl nicht an und der Motor kann absterben.

de.question: Ist dieses Problem mit der Batterie verbunden?
de.answer: Eine zu niedrige Batteriespannung kann die elektrischen Signale stören. Prüfen Sie den Zustand der Batterie und der Lichtmaschine, bevor Sie Bauteile ersetzen.

es.question: El motor paso a paso, ¿qué es?
es.answer: Es un pequeño motor eléctrico que controla la apertura de un paso de aire paralelo a la mariposa. Permite a la centralita ajustar el caudal de aire al ralentí sin tocar la propia mariposa.

es.question: ¿Cuál es el impacto de un ralentí no adaptativo?
es.answer: El motor gira a un régimen fijo que ya no se ajusta a las condiciones. Cuando el aire acondicionado se acopla o la dirección está girada, el régimen no sube y el motor puede calarse.

es.question: ¿Este problema está vinculado a la batería?
es.answer: Una tensión de batería demasiado baja puede perturbar las señales eléctricas. Verifique el estado de la batería y del alternador antes de sustituir componentes.

pt.question: O motor passo a passo, o que é?
pt.answer: É um pequeno motor elétrico que controla a abertura de uma passagem de ar paralela à borboleta. Permite à centralina ajustar o caudal de ar em ralenti sem tocar na própria borboleta.

pt.question: Qual é o impacto de um ralenti não adaptativo?
pt.answer: O motor trabalha a um regime fixo que já não se ajusta às condições. Quando o ar condicionado se liga ou a direção está virada, o regime não sobe e o motor pode parar.

pt.question: Este problema está ligado à bateria?
pt.answer: Uma tensão de bateria demasiado baixa pode perturbar os sinais elétricos. Verifique o estado da bateria e do alternador antes de substituir componentes.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0562 indique que le calculateur moteur a mesure une tension d'alimentation inferieure a la normale, generalement en dessous de 12 volts moteur tournant. L'alternateur devrait fournir entre 13.5V et 14.5V quand le moteur tourne. Une tension basse signifie que la batterie se decharge plus vite qu'elle ne se charge. Les causes incluent un alternateur fatigue dont les diodes ou les balais sont uses, une courroie d'accessoires patinante, une batterie en fin de vie qui ne tient plus la charge, ou un consommateur electrique parasite qui vide la batterie. Ce code est a prendre au serieux car une tension trop basse peut causer des dysfonctionnements de tous les calculateurs du vehicule et mener a une panne complete.
description.en: The P0562 code indicates an electrical system fault related to system voltage — low. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0562 zeigt an, dass das Motorsteuergeraet eine Versorgungsspannung unterhalb des Normalbereichs gemessen hat, in der Regel unter 12 Volt bei laufendem Motor. Die Lichtmaschine sollte bei laufendem Motor zwischen 13,5V und 14,5V liefern. Eine niedrige Spannung bedeutet, dass sich die Batterie schneller entlaedt als sie geladen wird. Zu den Ursachen gehoeren eine verschlissene Lichtmaschine mit abgenutzten Dioden oder Kohlebuersten, ein rutschender Keilriemen, eine Batterie am Ende ihrer Lebensdauer, die die Ladung nicht mehr haelt, oder ein parasitaerer Stromverbraucher, der die Batterie entleert. Dieser Code ist ernst zu nehmen, da eine zu niedrige Spannung Fehlfunktionen aller Steuergeraete im Fahrzeug verursachen und zu einem Totalausfall fuehren kann.
description.es: El P0562 indica que la centralita del motor ha medido un voltaje de alimentacion inferior al normal, generalmente por debajo de 12 voltios con el motor en marcha. El alternador deberia suministrar entre 13,5V y 14,5V cuando el motor esta funcionando. Un voltaje bajo significa que la bateria se descarga mas rapido de lo que se carga. Las causas incluyen un alternador desgastado con diodos o escobillas gastados, una correa de accesorios que patina, una bateria al final de su vida util que ya no mantiene la carga, o un consumidor electrico parasito que vacia la bateria. Este codigo debe tomarse en serio ya que un voltaje demasiado bajo puede causar mal funcionamiento de todas las centralitas del vehiculo y provocar una averia completa.
description.pt: O P0562 indica que a centralina do motor mediu uma voltagem de alimentacao inferior ao normal, geralmente abaixo de 12 volts com o motor a trabalhar. O alternador deveria fornecer entre 13,5V e 14,5V quando o motor esta a funcionar. Uma voltagem baixa significa que a bateria descarrega mais rapido do que carrega. As causas incluem um alternador desgastado com diodos ou escovas gastas, uma correia de acessorios a patinar, uma bateria em fim de vida que ja nao mantem a carga, ou um consumidor eletrico parasita que esvazia a bateria. Este codigo deve ser levado a serio pois uma voltagem demasiado baixa pode causar mau funcionamento de todas as centralinas do veiculo e levar a uma avaria completa.

name.es: Bateria al final de su vida util

pt: Luz de aviso da bateria acesa

fr.question: Mon voyant batterie s'allume en roulant, est-ce grave ?
fr.answer: Oui, cela signifie que l'alternateur ne charge plus correctement. Vous roulez sur la reserve de la batterie. Selon son etat, vous avez entre 30 minutes et 2 heures avant la panne complete.

fr.question: Comment tester l'alternateur ?
fr.answer: Avec un multimetre aux bornes de la batterie moteur tournant : 13.5V a 14.5V = alternateur OK. En dessous de 13V = alternateur faible. Au-dessus de 15V = regulateur defaillant.

fr.question: Une batterie neuve peut-elle resoudre le P0562 ?
fr.answer: Si le probleme est la batterie elle-meme, oui. Mais si l'alternateur est faible, la nouvelle batterie sera a son tour decharge en quelques jours. Il faut traiter la cause racine.

en.question: What does the P0562 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0562 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with system voltage — low. This is a medium-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0562 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0562 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0562 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0562 fault typically range from around £26 to £527, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty alternator, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Meine Batteriewarnleuchte leuchtet waehrend der Fahrt, ist das schlimm?
de.answer: Ja, das bedeutet, dass die Lichtmaschine nicht mehr richtig laedt. Sie fahren auf der Reserve der Batterie. Je nach ihrem Zustand haben Sie zwischen 30 Minuten und 2 Stunden bis zum vollstaendigen Ausfall.

de.question: Wie testet man die Lichtmaschine?
de.answer: Mit einem Multimeter an den Batteriepolen bei laufendem Motor: 13,5V bis 14,5V = Lichtmaschine in Ordnung. Unter 13V = Lichtmaschine schwach. Ueber 15V = Spannungsregler defekt.

de.question: Kann eine neue Batterie den P0562 beheben?
de.answer: Wenn das Problem die Batterie selbst ist, ja. Aber wenn die Lichtmaschine schwach ist, wird die neue Batterie innerhalb weniger Tage ebenfalls entladen sein. Die Ursache muss behoben werden.

es.question: Mi testigo de bateria se enciende mientras conduzco, ¿es grave?
es.answer: Si, significa que el alternador ya no carga correctamente. Esta circulando con la reserva de la bateria. Segun su estado, tiene entre 30 minutos y 2 horas antes de la averia completa.

es.question: ¿Como probar el alternador?
es.answer: Con un multimetro en los bornes de la bateria con el motor en marcha: 13,5V a 14,5V = alternador correcto. Por debajo de 13V = alternador debil. Por encima de 15V = regulador de voltaje defectuoso.

es.question: ¿Una bateria nueva puede resolver el P0562?
es.answer: Si el problema es la propia bateria, si. Pero si el alternador esta debil, la nueva bateria tambien se descargara en pocos dias. Hay que tratar la causa raiz.

pt.question: A luz da bateria acende enquanto conduzo, e grave?
pt.answer: Sim, isso significa que o alternador ja nao carrega corretamente. Esta a circular com a reserva da bateria. Dependendo do seu estado, tem entre 30 minutos e 2 horas antes da avaria completa.

pt.question: Como testar o alternador?
pt.answer: Com um multimetro nos terminais da bateria com o motor a trabalhar: 13,5V a 14,5V = alternador OK. Abaixo de 13V = alternador fraco. Acima de 15V = regulador de voltagem defeituoso.

pt.question: Uma bateria nova pode resolver o P0562?
pt.answer: Se o problema for a propria bateria, sim. Mas se o alternador estiver fraco, a nova bateria tambem ficara descarregada em poucos dias. E preciso tratar a causa raiz.

motFail: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

description.fr: Le P0563 est l'inverse du P0562 : la tension du systeme est trop elevee, generalement au-dessus de 15 volts. Le regulateur de l'alternateur est probablement defaillant et laisse passer trop de courant. Une surtension chronique endommage les ampoules, les calculateurs et la batterie. Les ampoules grillent plus souvent que la normale et la batterie gonfle et se deteriore. C'est un probleme a corriger rapidement car les consequences sur l'electronique sont couteuses. Le regulateur est parfois integre a l'alternateur et necessite le remplacement de l'ensemble. Sur certains vehicules, un probleme de masse (fil de masse corrode ou deconnecte) peut aussi causer une surtension apparente.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0563 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with system voltage — high. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0563 ist das Gegenteil des P0562: Die Bordspannung ist zu hoch, in der Regel ueber 15 Volt. Der Spannungsregler der Lichtmaschine ist wahrscheinlich defekt und laesst zu viel Strom durch. Eine chronische Ueberspannung beschaedigt Gluehbirnen, Steuergeraete und die Batterie. Gluehbirnen brennen haeufiger als normal durch und die Batterie blaecht sich auf und verschlechtert sich. Dieses Problem muss schnell behoben werden, da die Folgen fuer die Elektronik kostspielig sind. Der Regler ist manchmal in die Lichtmaschine integriert und erfordert den Austausch der gesamten Einheit. Bei einigen Fahrzeugen kann auch ein Masseproblem (korrodiertes oder getrenntes Massekabel) eine scheinbare Ueberspannung verursachen.
description.es: El P0563 es lo contrario del P0562: el voltaje del sistema es demasiado alto, generalmente por encima de 15 voltios. El regulador del alternador probablemente esta defectuoso y deja pasar demasiada corriente. Una sobretension cronica dana las bombillas, las centralitas y la bateria. Las bombillas se funden con mas frecuencia de lo normal y la bateria se hincha y se deteriora. Es un problema que hay que corregir rapidamente ya que las consecuencias en la electronica son costosas. El regulador a veces esta integrado en el alternador y requiere el reemplazo del conjunto completo. En algunos vehiculos, un problema de masa (cable de masa corroido o desconectado) tambien puede causar una sobretension aparente.
description.pt: O P0563 e o inverso do P0562: a voltagem do sistema esta demasiado alta, geralmente acima de 15 volts. O regulador do alternador esta provavelmente defeituoso e deixa passar demasiada corrente. Uma sobretensao cronica danifica as lampadas, as centralinas e a bateria. As lampadas fundem com mais frequencia que o normal e a bateria incha e deteriora-se. E um problema a corrigir rapidamente pois as consequencias na eletronica sao dispendiosas. O regulador esta por vezes integrado no alternador e requer a substituicao do conjunto completo. Em alguns veiculos, um problema de massa (cabo de massa corroido ou desconectado) tambem pode causar uma sobretensao aparente.

name.es: Regulador de voltaje del alternador defectuoso
name.pt: Regulador de voltagem do alternador defeituoso

fr.question: Une surtension peut-elle griller mon calculateur ?
fr.answer: Oui, une tension superieure a 16V pendant une periode prolongee peut endommager les composants electroniques sensibles. Corrigez le probleme rapidement.

fr.question: Comment verifier si c'est le regulateur ?
fr.answer: Mesurez la tension aux bornes de la batterie moteur tournant. Si elle depasse 14.8V et monte progressivement, le regulateur est defaillant. A plus de 15.5V, coupez le moteur.

fr.question: La batterie est-elle endommagee ?
fr.answer: Une surtension prolongee fait bouillir l'electrolyte de la batterie, ce qui la deteriore. Si la batterie gonfle ou sent l'oeuf pourri (acide), elle est probablement endommagee et doit etre remplacee.

en.question: What does the P0563 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0563 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with system voltage — high. This is a high-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0563 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0563 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0563 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0563 fault typically range from around £17 to £524, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty alternator voltage regulator, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann eine Ueberspannung mein Steuergeraet durchbrennen?
de.answer: Ja, eine Spannung ueber 16V ueber einen laengeren Zeitraum kann empfindliche elektronische Bauteile beschaedigen. Beheben Sie das Problem schnell.

de.question: Wie ueberpruefen ob es der Regler ist?
de.answer: Messen Sie die Spannung an den Batteriepolen bei laufendem Motor. Wenn sie 14,8V uebersteigt und weiter ansteigt, ist der Regler defekt. Bei mehr als 15,5V Motor abstellen.

de.question: Ist die Batterie beschaedigt?
de.answer: Eine laengere Ueberspannung bringt den Elektrolyt der Batterie zum Kochen, was sie beschaedigt. Wenn die Batterie sich aufblaecht oder nach faulen Eiern riecht (Saeure), ist sie wahrscheinlich beschaedigt und muss ersetzt werden.

es.question: ¿Una sobretension puede quemar mi centralita?
es.answer: Si, un voltaje superior a 16V durante un periodo prolongado puede danar los componentes electronicos sensibles. Corrija el problema rapidamente.

es.question: ¿Como verificar si es el regulador?
es.answer: Mida el voltaje en los bornes de la bateria con el motor en marcha. Si supera 14,8V y sigue subiendo, el regulador esta defectuoso. A mas de 15,5V, apague el motor.

es.question: ¿La bateria esta danada?
es.answer: Una sobretension prolongada hace hervir el electrolito de la bateria, lo que la deteriora. Si la bateria se hincha o huele a huevo podrido (acido), probablemente esta danada y debe ser reemplazada.

pt.question: Uma sobretensao pode queimar a minha centralina?
pt.answer: Sim, uma voltagem superior a 16V durante um periodo prolongado pode danificar os componentes eletronicos sensiveis. Corrija o problema rapidamente.

pt.question: Como verificar se e o regulador?
pt.answer: Meca a voltagem nos terminais da bateria com o motor a trabalhar. Se ultrapassar 14,8V e continuar a subir, o regulador esta defeituoso. Acima de 15,5V, desligue o motor.

pt.question: A bateria esta danificada?
pt.answer: Uma sobretensao prolongada faz ferver o eletrolito da bateria, o que a deteriora. Se a bateria inchar ou cheirar a ovos podres (acido), provavelmente esta danificada e deve ser substituida.

motFail: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

name.fr: Liaison serie — bus CAN interne calculateur
name.en: Serial communication link — internal ECU CAN bus
name.de: Serielle Verbindung — interner CAN-Bus des Steuergeraets
name.es: Enlace de comunicacion serie — bus CAN interno de la centralita
name.pt: Ligacao serie — barramento CAN interno da centralina

description.fr: Le P0600 signale un probleme de communication interne au calculateur moteur. Le processeur principal n'arrive plus a communiquer correctement avec les sous-systemes internes via le bus serie. C'est un code rare qui pointe souvent vers un probleme de calculateur lui-meme : memoire corrompue, composant interne defaillant ou alimentation instable. Avant de conclure que le calculateur est HS, verifiez les alimentations et les masses du calculateur car une tension instable peut provoquer des erreurs de communication internes. Un contact oxyde sur le connecteur du calculateur ou une mise a jour logicielle corrompue sont aussi des pistes. Ce code est plus frequent apres un debranchement de batterie mal gere ou une tentative de reprogrammation avortee.
description.en: The P0600 code indicates an electrical system fault related to serial communication link — internal ecu can bus. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0600 signalisiert ein internes Kommunikationsproblem im Motorsteuergeraet. Der Hauptprozessor kann nicht mehr korrekt mit den internen Subsystemen ueber den seriellen Bus kommunizieren. Es ist ein seltener Code, der oft auf ein Problem des Steuergeraets selbst hinweist: korrupter Speicher, defektes internes Bauteil oder instabile Stromversorgung. Bevor man zum Schluss kommt, dass das Steuergeraet defekt ist, sollten die Stromversorgung und die Masseverbindungen des Steuergeraets geprueft werden, da eine instabile Spannung interne Kommunikationsfehler verursachen kann. Ein oxidierter Kontakt am Stecker des Steuergeraets oder ein fehlgeschlagenes Software-Update sind ebenfalls moegliche Ursachen. Dieser Code tritt haeufiger nach einem unsachgemaessen Batterieabklemmen oder einem abgebrochenen Reprogrammierungsversuch auf.
description.es: El P0600 senala un problema de comunicacion interna en la centralita del motor. El procesador principal ya no puede comunicarse correctamente con los subsistemas internos a traves del bus serie. Es un codigo poco frecuente que a menudo apunta a un problema de la propia centralita: memoria corrupta, componente interno defectuoso o alimentacion inestable. Antes de concluir que la centralita esta averiada, verifique las alimentaciones y las masas de la centralita, ya que un voltaje inestable puede provocar errores de comunicacion internos. Un contacto oxidado en el conector de la centralita o una actualizacion de software corrupta tambien son posibles causas. Este codigo es mas frecuente despues de una desconexion de bateria mal gestionada o un intento de reprogramacion fallido.
description.pt: O P0600 sinaliza um problema de comunicacao interna na centralina do motor. O processador principal ja nao consegue comunicar corretamente com os subsistemas internos atraves do barramento serie. E um codigo raro que aponta frequentemente para um problema da propria centralina: memoria corrompida, componente interno defeituoso ou alimentacao instavel. Antes de concluir que a centralina esta avariada, verifique as alimentacoes e as massas da centralina, pois uma voltagem instavel pode provocar erros de comunicacao internos. Um contacto oxidado no conector da centralina ou uma atualizacao de software corrompida tambem sao possiveis causas. Este codigo e mais frequente apos uma desconexao de bateria mal gerida ou uma tentativa de reprogramacao falhada.

fr.question: Le calculateur est-il forcement mort ?
fr.answer: Pas toujours. Verifiez d'abord les connecteurs et les alimentations. Un probleme de masse ou de tension instable peut causer ce code sans que le calculateur soit HS.

fr.question: Peut-on reparer un calculateur ?
fr.answer: Oui, des specialistes en electronique automobile peuvent reparer et reprogrammer les calculateurs. C'est souvent 50 a 70% moins cher qu'un remplacement neuf.

fr.question: Une mise a jour logicielle peut-elle causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, une reprogrammation interrompue ou echouee peut corrompre le firmware du calculateur. Un passage chez le concessionnaire pour reflasher le calculateur peut resoudre le probleme.

en.question: What does the P0600 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0600 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with serial communication link — internal ecu can bus. This is a high-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0600 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0600 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0600 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0600 fault typically range from around £25 to £1720, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty engine ecu, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist das Steuergeraet zwangslaeufig defekt?
de.answer: Nicht immer. Pruefen Sie zuerst die Stecker und die Stromversorgung. Ein Masse- oder instabiles Spannungsproblem kann diesen Code verursachen, ohne dass das Steuergeraet defekt ist.

de.question: Kann man ein Steuergeraet reparieren?
de.answer: Ja, Spezialisten fuer Fahrzeugelektronik koennen Steuergeraete reparieren und umprogrammieren. Das ist oft 50 bis 70% guenstiger als ein Neuteil.

de.question: Kann ein Software-Update diesen Code verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, eine unterbrochene oder fehlgeschlagene Umprogrammierung kann die Firmware des Steuergeraets beschaedigen. Ein Besuch beim Haendler zum Neuprogrammieren des Steuergeraets kann das Problem loesen.

es.question: ¿La centralita esta necesariamente averiada?
es.answer: No siempre. Verifique primero los conectores y las alimentaciones. Un problema de masa o de voltaje inestable puede causar este codigo sin que la centralita este averiada.

es.question: ¿Se puede reparar una centralita?
es.answer: Si, los especialistas en electronica del automovil pueden reparar y reprogramar las centralitas. Suele ser un 50 a 70% mas barato que un reemplazo nuevo.

es.question: ¿Una actualizacion de software puede causar este codigo?
es.answer: Si, una reprogramacion interrumpida o fallida puede corromper el firmware de la centralita. Una visita al concesionario para reflashear la centralita puede resolver el problema.

pt.question: A centralina esta necessariamente avariada?
pt.answer: Nem sempre. Verifique primeiro os conectores e as alimentacoes. Um problema de massa ou de voltagem instavel pode causar este codigo sem que a centralina esteja avariada.

pt.question: Pode-se reparar uma centralina?
pt.answer: Sim, especialistas em eletronica automovel podem reparar e reprogramar as centralinas. E frequentemente 50 a 70% mais barato do que uma substituicao nova.

pt.question: Uma atualizacao de software pode causar este codigo?
pt.answer: Sim, uma reprogramacao interrompida ou falhada pode corromper o firmware da centralina. Uma visita ao concessionario para reprogramar a centralina pode resolver o problema.

motFail: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

name.es: Centralita del motor — error de memoria
name.pt: Centralina do motor — erro de memoria

description.fr: Le P0601 indique que le calculateur moteur a detecte une erreur dans sa memoire interne, typiquement un echec de la verification par somme de controle (checksum). Cela signifie que les donnees stockees dans la memoire du calculateur ne sont plus integres. Les causes peuvent etre une surtension qui a endommage les puces memoire, une tentative de reprogrammation avortee, ou simplement la degradation naturelle des composants electroniques apres de nombreuses annees. Les consequences vont d'un simple voyant moteur a un comportement totalement imprevisible du moteur. C'est un code serieux qui necessite generalement une intervention chez le concessionnaire ou un specialiste electronique pour reflasher ou remplacer le calculateur.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0601 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with engine ecu — memory error. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0601 zeigt an, dass das Motorsteuergeraet einen Fehler in seinem internen Speicher festgestellt hat, typischerweise einen Pruefsummenfehler (Checksum). Das bedeutet, dass die im Speicher des Steuergeraets gespeicherten Daten nicht mehr integritaet besitzen. Die Ursachen koennen eine Ueberspannung sein, die die Speicherchips beschaedigt hat, ein abgebrochener Reprogrammierungsversuch oder einfach die natuerliche Alterung der elektronischen Bauteile nach vielen Jahren. Die Folgen reichen von einer einfachen Motorkontrollleuchte bis zu einem voellig unvorhersehbaren Motorverhalten. Es ist ein ernster Code, der in der Regel einen Besuch beim Haendler oder einem Elektronikspezialisten erfordert, um das Steuergeraet neu zu programmieren oder zu ersetzen.
description.es: El P0601 indica que la centralita del motor ha detectado un error en su memoria interna, tipicamente un fallo de verificacion por suma de control (checksum). Esto significa que los datos almacenados en la memoria de la centralita ya no son integros. Las causas pueden ser una sobretension que ha danado los chips de memoria, un intento de reprogramacion fallido, o simplemente la degradacion natural de los componentes electronicos despues de muchos anos. Las consecuencias van desde un simple testigo del motor hasta un comportamiento totalmente impredecible del motor. Es un codigo serio que generalmente requiere una intervencion en el concesionario o un especialista en electronica para reflashear o reemplazar la centralita.
description.pt: O P0601 indica que a centralina do motor detetou um erro na sua memoria interna, tipicamente uma falha de verificacao por soma de controlo (checksum). Isto significa que os dados armazenados na memoria da centralina ja nao estao integros. As causas podem ser uma sobretensao que danificou os chips de memoria, uma tentativa de reprogramacao falhada, ou simplesmente a degradacao natural dos componentes eletronicos apos muitos anos. As consequencias vao desde uma simples luz do motor ate um comportamento totalmente imprevisivel do motor. E um codigo serio que geralmente requer uma intervencao no concessionario ou num especialista em eletronica para reprogramar ou substituir a centralina.

fr.question: La memoire du calculateur peut-elle se corrompre toute seule ?
fr.answer: Avec le temps et les cycles thermiques, les composants electroniques se degradent. C'est rare mais possible apres 10-15 ans. Les surtensions accelerent ce processus.

fr.question: Un reflashage suffit-il ?
fr.answer: Si la memoire flash est intacte et que seules les donnees sont corrompues, un reflashage chez le concessionnaire peut resoudre le probleme. Si la puce memoire est physiquement endommagee, il faut remplacer.

fr.question: Combien coute un calculateur neuf ?
fr.answer: Entre 500 et 2000 euros selon la marque et le modele. Un calculateur reconditionne ou repare revient a 200-800 euros. La reprogrammation est necessaire dans tous les cas.

en.question: What does the P0601 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0601 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine ecu — memory error. This is a critical-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0601 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0601 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0601 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0601 fault typically range from around £87 to £1685, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is ecu corrupted memory, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann sich der Speicher des Steuergeraets von selbst beschaedigen?
de.answer: Mit der Zeit und den Temperaturzyklen verschleissen elektronische Bauteile. Es ist selten, aber nach 10-15 Jahren moeglich. Ueberspannungen beschleunigen diesen Prozess.

de.question: Reicht ein Neuprogrammieren aus?
de.answer: Wenn der Flash-Speicher intakt ist und nur die Daten beschaedigt sind, kann ein Neuprogrammieren beim Haendler das Problem loesen. Wenn der Speicherchip physisch beschaedigt ist, muss er ersetzt werden.

de.question: Was kostet ein neues Steuergeraet?
de.answer: Zwischen 500 und 2000 Euro je nach Marke und Modell. Ein ueberholtes oder repariertes Steuergeraet kostet 200 bis 800 Euro. Die Neuprogrammierung ist in jedem Fall erforderlich.

es.question: ¿La memoria de la centralita puede corromperse sola?
es.answer: Con el tiempo y los ciclos termicos, los componentes electronicos se degradan. Es raro pero posible despues de 10-15 anos. Las sobretensiones aceleran este proceso.

es.question: ¿Es suficiente un reflasheo?
es.answer: Si la memoria flash esta intacta y solo los datos estan corrompidos, un reflasheo en el concesionario puede resolver el problema. Si el chip de memoria esta fisicamente danado, hay que reemplazarlo.

es.question: ¿Cuanto cuesta una centralita nueva?
es.answer: Entre 500 y 2000 euros segun la marca y el modelo. Una centralita reacondicionada o reparada cuesta entre 200 y 800 euros. La reprogramacion es necesaria en todos los casos.

pt.question: A memoria da centralina pode corromper-se sozinha?
pt.answer: Com o tempo e os ciclos termicos, os componentes eletronicos degradam-se. E raro mas possivel apos 10-15 anos. As sobretensoes aceleram este processo.

pt.question: Uma reprogramacao e suficiente?
pt.answer: Se a memoria flash estiver intacta e apenas os dados estiverem corrompidos, uma reprogramacao no concessionario pode resolver o problema. Se o chip de memoria estiver fisicamente danificado, tem de ser substituido.

pt.question: Quanto custa uma centralina nova?
pt.answer: Entre 500 e 2000 euros conforme a marca e o modelo. Uma centralina recondicionada ou reparada custa entre 200 e 800 euros. A reprogramacao e necessaria em todos os casos.

motFail: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

name.fr: Systeme de transmission — code defaut present
name.es: Sistema de transmision — codigo de averia presente
name.pt: Sistema de transmissao — codigo de avaria presente

description.fr: Le P0700 est un code informatif du calculateur moteur qui indique qu'un defaut a ete enregistre dans le calculateur de la transmission automatique. Ce n'est pas un diagnostic en soi mais un signal d'alerte : il faut lire les codes du calculateur de transmission pour connaitre la nature exacte du probleme. La plupart des outils OBD2 basiques ne lisent que le calculateur moteur, qui signale le P0700 pour dire qu'il y a quelque chose a voir du cote de la boite. Un outil capable de lire les codes de transmission specifiques est necessaire. Les problemes peuvent aller d'un simple capteur de vitesse a un defaut mecanique de la boite elle-meme.
description.en: The P0700 diagnostic code indicates a problem with gearbox system — fault code present in your gearbox system. Modern automatic and semi-automatic gearboxes are controlled by a dedicated computer that manages gear changes, torque converter operation, and various solenoid valves. When this computer detects an anomaly, it stores a fault code and may put the gearbox into limp mode — this is a safety feature that limits the car to one or two gears to protect the transmission from further damage. You might notice harsh or delayed gear changes, a reluctance to shift, or the car staying in a low gear regardless of speed. While it can be concerning, limp mode is actually your gearbox protecting itself. A specialist garage with gearbox diagnostic equipment can read the code and assess whether the issue is electrical — such as a faulty speed sensor or solenoid — or mechanical, like worn clutch packs or a failing torque converter. Gearbox repairs can be costly, so early diagnosis is essential. Sometimes a simple fluid change and solenoid replacement is all that is needed, saving you from a far more expensive rebuild.
description.de: Der P0700 ist ein informativer Code des Motorsteuergeraets, der anzeigt, dass ein Fehler im Steuergeraet des Automatikgetriebes gespeichert wurde. Es handelt sich nicht um eine eigenstaendige Diagnose, sondern um ein Warnsignal: Die Fehlercodes des Getriebesteuergeraets muessen ausgelesen werden, um die genaue Ursache des Problems zu ermitteln. Die meisten einfachen OBD2-Diagnosegeraete lesen nur das Motorsteuergeraet aus, das den P0700 meldet, um darauf hinzuweisen, dass ein Problem im Getriebe vorliegt. Ein Diagnosegeraet, das die spezifischen Getriebe-Fehlercodes auslesen kann, ist erforderlich. Die Probleme koennen von einem einfachen Drehzahlsensor bis hin zu einem mechanischen Defekt des Getriebes selbst reichen.
description.es: El P0700 es un codigo informativo de la centralita del motor que indica que se ha registrado una averia en la centralita de la transmision automatica. No es un diagnostico en si mismo, sino una senal de alerta: es necesario leer los codigos de la centralita de transmision para conocer la naturaleza exacta del problema. La mayoria de las herramientas OBD2 basicas solo leen la centralita del motor, que senala el P0700 para indicar que hay algo que revisar en la caja de cambios. Se necesita una herramienta capaz de leer los codigos especificos de transmision. Los problemas pueden ir desde un simple sensor de velocidad hasta un defecto mecanico de la propia caja de cambios.
description.pt: O P0700 e um codigo informativo da centralina do motor que indica que uma avaria foi registada na centralina da transmissao automatica. Nao e um diagnostico por si so, mas sim um sinal de alerta: e necessario ler os codigos da centralina de transmissao para conhecer a natureza exata do problema. A maioria das ferramentas OBD2 basicas so le a centralina do motor, que assinala o P0700 para dizer que ha algo a verificar do lado da caixa de velocidades. E necessaria uma ferramenta capaz de ler os codigos especificos de transmissao. Os problemas podem ir desde um simples sensor de velocidade ate um defeito mecanico da propria caixa de velocidades.

name.es: Problema mecanico de la caja de cambios
name.pt: Problema mecanico da caixa de velocidades

es: Caja de cambios bloqueada en modo de emergencia
pt: Caixa de velocidades bloqueada em modo de emergencia

fr.question: Le P0700 me dit-il ce qui ne va pas avec ma boite ?
fr.answer: Non, le P0700 dit simplement qu'il y a un code dans le calculateur de transmission. Il faut un scanner capable de lire les codes transmission pour connaitre le probleme exact.

fr.question: Ma boite est-elle en danger avec un P0700 ?
fr.answer: Pas necessairement. Ca peut etre un simple capteur. Mais ne tardez pas a diagnostiquer car certains problemes de transmission s'aggravent rapidement si on continue a rouler.

fr.question: Un outil OBD2 basique peut-il lire les codes transmission ?
fr.answer: La plupart des outils basiques ne lisent que le calculateur moteur (Mode 03). Il faut un outil capable de lire les modules supplementaires ou un scanner constructeur specifique.

en.question: What does the P0700 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0700 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with gearbox system — fault code present. This is a medium-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0700 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0700 fail my MOT?
