en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0700 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0700 fault typically range from around £44 to £2564, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is gearbox diagnostic required, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Sagt mir der P0700, was mit meinem Getriebe nicht stimmt?
de.answer: Nein, der P0700 sagt lediglich, dass ein Fehlercode im Getriebesteuergeraet gespeichert ist. Man braucht ein Diagnosegeraet, das die Getriebe-Fehlercodes auslesen kann, um das genaue Problem zu ermitteln.

de.question: Ist mein Getriebe mit einem P0700 in Gefahr?
de.answer: Nicht unbedingt. Es kann sich um einen einfachen Sensor handeln. Aber zoegern Sie die Diagnose nicht hinaus, denn bestimmte Getriebeprobleme verschlimmern sich schnell, wenn man weiterfaehrt.

de.question: Kann ein einfaches OBD2-Geraet die Getriebe-Fehlercodes auslesen?
de.answer: Die meisten einfachen Geraete lesen nur das Motorsteuergeraet aus (Mode 03). Man braucht ein Geraet, das zusaetzliche Module auslesen kann, oder einen herstellerspezifischen Scanner.

es.question: El P0700, me dice que le pasa a mi caja de cambios?
es.answer: No, el P0700 simplemente indica que hay un codigo almacenado en la centralita de transmision. Se necesita un escaner capaz de leer los codigos de transmision para conocer el problema exacto.

es.question: Esta en peligro mi caja de cambios con un P0700?
es.answer: No necesariamente. Puede ser un simple sensor. Pero no tarde en diagnosticar porque ciertos problemas de transmision se agravan rapidamente si se sigue conduciendo.

es.question: Puede una herramienta OBD2 basica leer los codigos de transmision?
es.answer: La mayoria de las herramientas basicas solo leen la centralita del motor (Modo 03). Se necesita una herramienta capaz de leer modulos adicionales o un escaner especifico del fabricante.

pt.question: O P0700 diz-me o que se passa com a minha caixa de velocidades?
pt.answer: Nao, o P0700 simplesmente indica que existe um codigo na centralina de transmissao. E necessario um scanner capaz de ler os codigos de transmissao para conhecer o problema exato.

pt.question: A minha caixa de velocidades esta em perigo com um P0700?
pt.answer: Nao necessariamente. Pode ser um simples sensor. Mas nao demore a diagnosticar porque certos problemas de transmissao agravam-se rapidamente se continuar a conduzir.

pt.question: Uma ferramenta OBD2 basica pode ler os codigos de transmissao?
pt.answer: A maioria das ferramentas basicas so le a centralina do motor (Modo 03). E necessaria uma ferramenta capaz de ler modulos adicionais ou um scanner especifico do fabricante.

motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

name.fr: Capteur de regime en entree de transmission — circuit defaillant
name.en: Gearbox input speed sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de regimen de entrada de transmision — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de rotacao de entrada da transmissao — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le P0715 concerne le capteur qui mesure la vitesse de rotation de l'arbre d'entree de la boite automatique (turbine). Ce capteur permet au calculateur de boite de connaitre la vitesse a laquelle le convertisseur de couple tourne et donc de determiner le rapport engage et le patinage du convertisseur. Sans cette information, la boite ne sait plus ou elle en est et passe en mode degrade. Le mode degrade signifie generalement que la boite reste bloquee en 2e ou 3e vitesse pour permettre au conducteur de se rendre au garage. Le capteur est un element magnetique monte sur le carter de la boite de vitesses.
description.en: A P0715 fault code has been logged by your gearbox control module, indicating an issue with gearbox input speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a transmission-related fault that warrants prompt attention. Your automatic gearbox uses a network of sensors, solenoid valves, and hydraulic circuits to deliver smooth gear changes. When any of these components develop a fault, the gearbox ECU stores a code and may activate limp mode as a precaution. In limp mode, the gearbox typically locks into a single gear — usually second or third — to prevent further damage while still allowing you to drive to a garage. Symptoms you may have noticed include jerky gear changes, the gearbox slipping, delayed engagement when selecting drive or reverse, or the car revving high before changing gear. A transmission specialist will be able to diagnose the issue properly using dedicated equipment. The fix might be relatively simple, such as replacing a speed sensor or a solenoid valve, or it could indicate a more significant internal problem. Getting an accurate diagnosis early on can prevent a minor issue from turning into a major and expensive repair.
description.de: Der P0715 betrifft den Sensor, der die Drehzahl der Eingangswelle des Automatikgetriebes (Turbine) misst. Dieser Sensor ermoeglicht es dem Getriebesteuergeraet, die Drehzahl des Drehmomentwandlers zu kennen und somit den eingelegten Gang sowie den Schlupf des Wandlers zu bestimmen. Ohne diese Information weiss das Getriebe nicht mehr, in welchem Zustand es sich befindet, und schaltet in den Notlaufmodus. Der Notlaufmodus bedeutet in der Regel, dass das Getriebe im 2. oder 3. Gang blockiert bleibt, damit der Fahrer zur Werkstatt fahren kann. Der Sensor ist ein magnetisches Bauteil, das am Getriebegehaeuse montiert ist.
description.es: El P0715 se refiere al sensor que mide la velocidad de rotacion del eje de entrada de la caja de cambios automatica (turbina). Este sensor permite a la centralita de la caja conocer la velocidad a la que gira el convertidor de par y asi determinar la marcha engranada y el deslizamiento del convertidor. Sin esta informacion, la caja ya no sabe en que estado se encuentra y pasa al modo de emergencia. El modo de emergencia significa generalmente que la caja queda bloqueada en 2a o 3a velocidad para permitir al conductor llegar al taller. El sensor es un elemento magnetico montado en la carcasa de la caja de cambios.
description.pt: O P0715 diz respeito ao sensor que mede a velocidade de rotacao do veio de entrada da caixa de velocidades automatica (turbina). Este sensor permite a centralina da caixa conhecer a velocidade a que o conversor de binario roda e assim determinar a mudanca engrenada e a patinagem do conversor. Sem esta informacao, a caixa ja nao sabe em que estado se encontra e passa para o modo de emergencia. O modo de emergencia significa geralmente que a caixa fica bloqueada em 2a ou 3a velocidade para permitir ao condutor chegar a oficina. O sensor e um elemento magnetico montado na carcaca da caixa de velocidades.

name.es: Sensor de regimen de entrada defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de rotacao de entrada defeituoso

name.es: Problema interno de la caja de cambios
name.pt: Problema interno da caixa de velocidades

fr.question: La boite en mode degrade, c'est quoi exactement ?
fr.answer: Le calculateur bloque la boite sur un rapport unique (generalement 2e ou 3e) pour eviter d'endommager la mecanique. La conduite est possible mais limitee en vitesse et en acceleration.

fr.question: Ce code peut-il indiquer un probleme interne de boite ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le capteur est bon et que le probleme persiste, des composants internes comme le convertisseur de couple ou les embrayages peuvent etre en cause. Un diagnostic approfondi est necessaire.

fr.question: La reparation est-elle accessible ?
fr.answer: Le capteur lui-meme est souvent accessible de l'exterieur du carter de boite. Si c'est juste le capteur, la reparation est rapide et abordable. Un probleme interne est une autre histoire.

en.question: What does the P0715 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0715 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with gearbox input speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a high-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0715 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0715 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0715 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0715 fault typically range from around £25 to £2119, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty input speed sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was genau ist der Notlaufmodus des Getriebes?
de.answer: Das Steuergeraet blockiert das Getriebe in einem einzigen Gang (in der Regel 2. oder 3. Gang), um mechanische Schaeden zu vermeiden. Das Fahren ist moeglich, aber in der Geschwindigkeit und Beschleunigung eingeschraenkt.

de.question: Kann dieser Code auf ein internes Getriebeproblem hinweisen?
de.answer: Ja, wenn der Sensor in Ordnung ist und das Problem weiterhin besteht, koennen interne Komponenten wie der Drehmomentwandler oder die Kupplungen betroffen sein. Eine eingehende Diagnose ist erforderlich.

de.question: Ist die Reparatur leicht zugaenglich?
de.answer: Der Sensor selbst ist oft von aussen am Getriebegehaeuse zugaenglich. Wenn es nur der Sensor ist, ist die Reparatur schnell und erschwinglich. Ein internes Problem ist eine andere Geschichte.

es.question: Que es exactamente el modo de emergencia de la caja?
es.answer: La centralita bloquea la caja en una sola marcha (generalmente 2a o 3a) para evitar danar la mecanica. La conduccion es posible pero limitada en velocidad y aceleracion.

es.question: Este codigo puede indicar un problema interno de la caja?
es.answer: Si, si el sensor esta bien y el problema persiste, componentes internos como el convertidor de par o los embragues pueden estar afectados. Un diagnostico en profundidad es necesario.

es.question: La reparacion es accesible?
es.answer: El sensor en si suele ser accesible desde el exterior de la carcasa de la caja. Si solo es el sensor, la reparacion es rapida y asequible. Un problema interno es otra historia.

pt.question: O que e exatamente o modo de emergencia da caixa?
pt.answer: A centralina bloqueia a caixa numa unica mudanca (geralmente 2a ou 3a) para evitar danificar a mecanica. A conducao e possivel mas limitada em velocidade e aceleracao.

pt.question: Este codigo pode indicar um problema interno da caixa?
pt.answer: Sim, se o sensor estiver bom e o problema persistir, componentes internos como o conversor de binario ou as embraiagens podem estar em causa. Um diagnostico aprofundado e necessario.

pt.question: A reparacao e acessivel?
pt.answer: O sensor em si e muitas vezes acessivel pelo exterior da carcaca da caixa. Se for apenas o sensor, a reparacao e rapida e acessivel. Um problema interno e outra historia.

motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

name.fr: Capteur de regime en sortie de transmission — circuit defaillant
name.en: Gearbox output speed sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de regimen de salida de transmision — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de rotacao de saida da transmissao — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le P0720 concerne le capteur de vitesse en sortie de la boite automatique, aussi appele capteur de vitesse de sortie (OSS). Ce capteur mesure la vitesse de l'arbre de sortie de la boite, ce qui correspond a la vitesse du vehicule. En combinaison avec le capteur d'entree, il permet au calculateur de determiner le rapport engage et le patinage eventuel. Un signal absent ou erratique provoque des changements de rapport inappropries, des a-coups et un passage en mode degrade. Le capteur est monte sur le carter de boite, generalement accessible sans demonter la boite elle-meme. La rouille, les vibrations et les fuites d'huile de boite sont les ennemis principaux de ce capteur.
description.en: The P0720 diagnostic code indicates a problem with gearbox output speed sensor — circuit fault in your gearbox system. Modern automatic and semi-automatic gearboxes are controlled by a dedicated computer that manages gear changes, torque converter operation, and various solenoid valves. When this computer detects an anomaly, it stores a fault code and may put the gearbox into limp mode — this is a safety feature that limits the car to one or two gears to protect the transmission from further damage. You might notice harsh or delayed gear changes, a reluctance to shift, or the car staying in a low gear regardless of speed. While it can be concerning, limp mode is actually your gearbox protecting itself. A specialist garage with gearbox diagnostic equipment can read the code and assess whether the issue is electrical — such as a faulty speed sensor or solenoid — or mechanical, like worn clutch packs or a failing torque converter. Gearbox repairs can be costly, so early diagnosis is essential. Sometimes a simple fluid change and solenoid replacement is all that is needed, saving you from a far more expensive rebuild.
description.de: Der P0720 betrifft den Drehzahlsensor am Getriebeausgang, auch Ausgangsdrehzahlsensor (OSS) genannt. Dieser Sensor misst die Drehzahl der Ausgangswelle des Getriebes, die der Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeit entspricht. In Kombination mit dem Eingangssensor ermoeglicht er dem Steuergeraet, den eingelegten Gang und den eventuellen Schlupf zu bestimmen. Ein fehlendes oder unregelmaessiges Signal verursacht unangemessene Gangwechsel, Ruckeln und den Uebergang in den Notlaufmodus. Der Sensor ist am Getriebegehaeuse montiert und in der Regel zugaenglich, ohne das Getriebe demontieren zu muessen. Rost, Vibrationen und Getriebeoel-Leckagen sind die Hauptfeinde dieses Sensors.
description.es: El P0720 se refiere al sensor de velocidad de salida de la caja automatica, tambien llamado sensor de velocidad de salida (OSS). Este sensor mide la velocidad del eje de salida de la caja, que corresponde a la velocidad del vehiculo. En combinacion con el sensor de entrada, permite a la centralita determinar la marcha engranada y el posible deslizamiento. Una senal ausente o erratica provoca cambios de marcha inapropiados, tirones y el paso al modo de emergencia. El sensor esta montado en la carcasa de la caja, generalmente accesible sin desmontar la caja en si. La corrosion, las vibraciones y las fugas de aceite de caja son los principales enemigos de este sensor.
description.pt: O P0720 diz respeito ao sensor de velocidade de saida da caixa automatica, tambem chamado sensor de velocidade de saida (OSS). Este sensor mede a velocidade do veio de saida da caixa, que corresponde a velocidade do veiculo. Em combinacao com o sensor de entrada, permite a centralina determinar a mudanca engrenada e a eventual patinagem. Um sinal ausente ou erratico provoca mudancas de velocidade inadequadas, solavancos e a passagem ao modo de emergencia. O sensor esta montado na carcaca da caixa, geralmente acessivel sem desmontar a caixa em si. A ferrugem, as vibracoes e as fugas de oleo da caixa sao os principais inimigos deste sensor.

name.es: Sensor de velocidad de salida defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade de saida defeituoso

es: Tirones en los cambios de marcha
Modo de emergencia de la transmision

fr.question: Ce capteur est-il le meme que le VSS ?
fr.answer: Sur certains vehicules oui, le capteur de sortie de boite sert aussi de capteur de vitesse vehicule. Sur d'autres, ce sont deux capteurs separes.

fr.question: Une fuite d'huile de boite peut-elle endommager le capteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, l'huile de boite qui s'infiltre dans le connecteur peut corroder les contacts et degrader le signal. Reparez la fuite et nettoyez le connecteur.

fr.question: Peut-on conduire en mode degrade longtemps ?
fr.answer: C'est prevu pour le depannage, pas pour la conduite quotidienne. En mode degrade, la boite chauffe plus car le rapport unique n'est pas optimal. Rendez-vous au garage rapidement.

en.question: What does the P0720 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0720 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with gearbox output speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a high-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0720 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0720 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0720 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0720 fault typically range from around £12 to £663, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty output speed sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist dieser Sensor derselbe wie der VSS?
de.answer: Bei manchen Fahrzeugen ja, der Ausgangssensor des Getriebes dient auch als Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeitssensor. Bei anderen sind es zwei separate Sensoren.

de.question: Kann ein Getriebeoel-Leck den Sensor beschaedigen?
de.answer: Ja, Getriebeoel, das in den Stecker eindringt, kann die Kontakte korrodieren und das Signal beeintraechtigen. Beheben Sie das Leck und reinigen Sie den Stecker.

de.question: Kann man laengere Zeit im Notlaufmodus fahren?
de.answer: Er ist fuer den Notbetrieb vorgesehen, nicht fuer den taeglichen Gebrauch. Im Notlaufmodus erhitzt sich das Getriebe staerker, da der einzelne Gang nicht optimal ist. Fahren Sie schnellstmoeglich zur Werkstatt.

es.question: Este sensor es el mismo que el VSS?
es.answer: En algunos vehiculos si, el sensor de salida de la caja sirve tambien como sensor de velocidad del vehiculo. En otros, son dos sensores separados.

es.question: Una fuga de aceite de caja puede danar el sensor?
es.answer: Si, el aceite de caja que se infiltra en el conector puede corroer los contactos y degradar la senal. Repare la fuga y limpie el conector.

es.question: Se puede conducir en modo de emergencia durante mucho tiempo?
es.answer: Esta pensado para emergencias, no para la conduccion diaria. En modo de emergencia, la caja se calienta mas porque la marcha unica no es optima. Acuda al taller lo antes posible.

pt.question: Este sensor e o mesmo que o VSS?
pt.answer: Em alguns veiculos sim, o sensor de saida da caixa serve tambem como sensor de velocidade do veiculo. Em outros, sao dois sensores separados.

pt.question: Uma fuga de oleo da caixa pode danificar o sensor?
pt.answer: Sim, o oleo da caixa que se infiltra no conector pode corroer os contactos e degradar o sinal. Repare a fuga e limpe o conector.

pt.question: Pode-se conduzir em modo de emergencia durante muito tempo?
pt.answer: Esta previsto para emergencias, nao para a conducao diaria. Em modo de emergencia, a caixa aquece mais porque a mudanca unica nao e otima. Dirija-se a oficina rapidamente.

motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

description.fr: Le P0730 indique que le calculateur de boite automatique detecte un rapport de vitesse incorrect. En comparant les vitesses d'entree et de sortie de la boite, il calcule un ratio qui ne correspond a aucun rapport programme. Cela peut signifier que les embrayages internes de la boite patinent, qu'un corps de vanne est defaillant ou que le niveau d'huile de boite est trop bas. C'est un code serieux qui indique un probleme mecanique ou hydraulique interne a la boite. Sur les boites a variation continue (CVT), ce code peut signaler un patinage de la courroie. Un diagnostic approfondi avec lecture des parametres en temps reel de la boite est indispensable.
description.en: A P0730 fault code has been logged by your gearbox control module, indicating an issue with incorrect gear ratio. This is a transmission-related fault that warrants prompt attention. Your automatic gearbox uses a network of sensors, solenoid valves, and hydraulic circuits to deliver smooth gear changes. When any of these components develop a fault, the gearbox ECU stores a code and may activate limp mode as a precaution. In limp mode, the gearbox typically locks into a single gear — usually second or third — to prevent further damage while still allowing you to drive to a garage. Symptoms you may have noticed include jerky gear changes, the gearbox slipping, delayed engagement when selecting drive or reverse, or the car revving high before changing gear. A transmission specialist will be able to diagnose the issue properly using dedicated equipment. The fix might be relatively simple, such as replacing a speed sensor or a solenoid valve, or it could indicate a more significant internal problem. Getting an accurate diagnosis early on can prevent a minor issue from turning into a major and expensive repair.
description.de: Der P0730 zeigt an, dass das Getriebesteuergeraet ein falsches Uebersetzungsverhaeltnis erkennt. Durch den Vergleich der Eingangs- und Ausgangsdrehzahlen des Getriebes berechnet es ein Verhaeltnis, das keinem programmierten Gang entspricht. Dies kann bedeuten, dass die internen Kupplungen des Getriebes durchrutschen, dass ein Ventilkoerper defekt ist oder dass der Getriebeoel-Stand zu niedrig ist. Es handelt sich um einen ernsthaften Code, der auf ein mechanisches oder hydraulisches Problem im Getriebe hinweist. Bei stufenlosen Getrieben (CVT) kann dieser Code auf einen Riemenschlupf hinweisen. Eine eingehende Diagnose mit Echtzeit-Parameterauswertung des Getriebes ist unerlaeesslich.
description.es: El P0730 indica que la centralita de la caja automatica detecta una relacion de velocidad incorrecta. Al comparar las velocidades de entrada y salida de la caja, calcula una relacion que no corresponde a ninguna marcha programada. Esto puede significar que los embragues internos de la caja patinan, que un cuerpo de valvulas esta defectuoso o que el nivel de aceite de la caja es demasiado bajo. Es un codigo serio que indica un problema mecanico o hidraulico interno de la caja. En las cajas de variacion continua (CVT), este codigo puede senalar un deslizamiento de la correa. Un diagnostico en profundidad con lectura de parametros en tiempo real de la caja es indispensable.
description.pt: O P0730 indica que a centralina da caixa automatica deteta uma relacao de velocidade incorreta. Ao comparar as velocidades de entrada e saida da caixa, calcula uma relacao que nao corresponde a nenhuma mudanca programada. Isto pode significar que as embraiagens internas da caixa patinam, que um corpo de valvulas esta defeituoso ou que o nivel de oleo da caixa esta demasiado baixo. E um codigo serio que indica um problema mecanico ou hidraulico interno da caixa. Nas caixas de variacao continua (CVT), este codigo pode assinalar uma patinagem da correia. Um diagnostico aprofundado com leitura de parametros em tempo real da caixa e indispensavel.

name.es: Nivel de aceite de caja demasiado bajo
name.pt: Nivel de oleo da caixa demasiado baixo

fr.question: Le P0730 est-il grave pour la boite ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est un code qui indique un probleme mecanique ou hydraulique reel. Continuez a rouler risque d'aggraver les degats et d'augmenter significativement le cout de reparation.

fr.question: Verifier le niveau d'huile de boite peut-il aider ?
fr.answer: C'est la premiere chose a faire car c'est gratuit. Un niveau d'huile trop bas cause du patinage et des rapports incorrects. Certaines boites n'ont pas de jauge, il faut un outil de diagnostic pour lire la temperature et verifier le niveau.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation d'une boite automatique ?
fr.answer: De 300 euros pour un corps de vanne a 3000 euros ou plus pour une revision complete avec remplacement des embrayages. C'est une des reparations les plus couteuses de l'automobile.

en.question: What does the P0730 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0730 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with incorrect gear ratio. This is a high-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0730 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0730 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0730 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0730 fault typically range from around £26 to £2515, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn internal clutches, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der P0730 schwerwiegend fuer das Getriebe?
de.answer: Ja, es handelt sich um einen Code, der auf ein echtes mechanisches oder hydraulisches Problem hinweist. Weiterfahren riskiert die Schaeden zu verschlimmern und die Reparaturkosten erheblich zu erhoehen.

de.question: Kann eine Pruefung des Getriebeoel-Stands helfen?
de.answer: Das ist das Erste, was man tun sollte, denn es kostet nichts. Ein zu niedriger Oelstand verursacht Schlupf und falsche Uebersetzungsverhaeltnisse. Manche Getriebe haben keinen Peilstab, man braucht ein Diagnosegeraet, um die Temperatur zu lesen und den Stand zu pruefen.

de.question: Was kostet die Reparatur eines Automatikgetriebes?
de.answer: Von 300 Euro fuer einen Ventilkoerper bis 3000 Euro oder mehr fuer eine komplette Ueberholung mit Kupplungstausch. Es ist eine der teuersten Reparaturen im Automobilbereich.

es.question: El P0730 es grave para la caja?
es.answer: Si, es un codigo que indica un problema mecanico o hidraulico real. Seguir conduciendo puede agravar los danos y aumentar significativamente el coste de la reparacion.

es.question: Verificar el nivel de aceite de la caja puede ayudar?
es.answer: Es lo primero que hay que hacer porque es gratuito. Un nivel de aceite demasiado bajo causa deslizamiento y relaciones de marcha incorrectas. Algunas cajas no tienen varilla, se necesita una herramienta de diagnostico para leer la temperatura y verificar el nivel.

es.question: Cuanto cuesta la reparacion de una caja automatica?
es.answer: De 300 euros por un cuerpo de valvulas a 3000 euros o mas por una revision completa con sustitucion de embragues. Es una de las reparaciones mas costosas del automovil.

pt.question: O P0730 e grave para a caixa?
pt.answer: Sim, e um codigo que indica um problema mecanico ou hidraulico real. Continuar a conduzir arrisca agravar os danos e aumentar significativamente o custo da reparacao.

pt.question: Verificar o nivel de oleo da caixa pode ajudar?
pt.answer: E a primeira coisa a fazer porque e gratuito. Um nivel de oleo demasiado baixo causa patinagem e relacoes de mudanca incorretas. Algumas caixas nao tem vareta, e necessaria uma ferramenta de diagnostico para ler a temperatura e verificar o nivel.

pt.question: Quanto custa a reparacao de uma caixa automatica?
pt.answer: De 300 euros por um corpo de valvulas a 3000 euros ou mais por uma revisao completa com substituicao de embraiagens. E uma das reparacoes mais dispendiosas no automovel.

motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

name.fr: Embrayage convertisseur de couple — circuit defaillant
name.es: Embrague del convertidor de par — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Embraiagem do conversor de binario — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le P0740 concerne l'embrayage de pontage du convertisseur de couple (TCC). Ce mecanisme verrouille le convertisseur de couple a haute vitesse pour eliminer le patinage et reduire la consommation. Si le circuit de commande est defaillant, l'embrayage ne se verrouille pas ou reste verrouille en permanence. Un embrayage qui ne se verrouille pas augmente la consommation de 5 a 10%. Un embrayage bloque en position verrouillee fait caler le moteur a l'arret. L'electrovanne TCC dans le corps de vanne est souvent en cause, mais le cablage et le calculateur de boite sont aussi a verifier. Ce probleme est frequent sur les vehicules avec beaucoup de kilometres en ville.
description.en: The P0740 diagnostic code indicates a problem with torque converter clutch — circuit fault in your gearbox system. Modern automatic and semi-automatic gearboxes are controlled by a dedicated computer that manages gear changes, torque converter operation, and various solenoid valves. When this computer detects an anomaly, it stores a fault code and may put the gearbox into limp mode — this is a safety feature that limits the car to one or two gears to protect the transmission from further damage. You might notice harsh or delayed gear changes, a reluctance to shift, or the car staying in a low gear regardless of speed. While it can be concerning, limp mode is actually your gearbox protecting itself. A specialist garage with gearbox diagnostic equipment can read the code and assess whether the issue is electrical — such as a faulty speed sensor or solenoid — or mechanical, like worn clutch packs or a failing torque converter. Gearbox repairs can be costly, so early diagnosis is essential. Sometimes a simple fluid change and solenoid replacement is all that is needed, saving you from a far more expensive rebuild.
description.de: Der P0740 betrifft die Ueberbrueckungskupplung des Drehmomentwandlers (TCC). Dieser Mechanismus verriegelt den Drehmomentwandler bei hoher Geschwindigkeit, um den Schlupf zu eliminieren und den Kraftstoffverbrauch zu senken. Wenn der Steuerkreis defekt ist, verriegelt sich die Kupplung nicht oder bleibt dauerhaft verriegelt. Eine Kupplung, die sich nicht verriegelt, erhoeht den Verbrauch um 5 bis 10 %. Eine in verriegelter Position blockierte Kupplung laesst den Motor beim Anhalten abwuergen. Das TCC-Magnetventil im Ventilkoerper ist haeufig die Ursache, aber auch die Verkabelung und das Getriebesteuergeraet sind zu pruefen. Dieses Problem tritt haeufig bei Fahrzeugen mit hoher Stadtkilometerleistung auf.
description.es: El P0740 se refiere al embrague de puente del convertidor de par (TCC). Este mecanismo bloquea el convertidor de par a alta velocidad para eliminar el deslizamiento y reducir el consumo. Si el circuito de mando esta defectuoso, el embrague no se bloquea o permanece bloqueado permanentemente. Un embrague que no se bloquea aumenta el consumo del 5 al 10%. Un embrague atascado en posicion bloqueada hace que el motor se cale al detenerse. El solenoide TCC en el cuerpo de valvulas suele ser el responsable, pero el cableado y la centralita de la caja tambien deben verificarse. Este problema es frecuente en vehiculos con muchos kilometros en ciudad.
description.pt: O P0740 diz respeito a embraiagem de ponte do conversor de binario (TCC). Este mecanismo bloqueia o conversor de binario a alta velocidade para eliminar a patinagem e reduzir o consumo. Se o circuito de comando estiver defeituoso, a embraiagem nao bloqueia ou permanece bloqueada permanentemente. Uma embraiagem que nao bloqueia aumenta o consumo em 5 a 10%. Uma embraiagem presa na posicao bloqueada faz o motor calar ao parar. O solenoide TCC no corpo de valvulas e frequentemente a causa, mas a cablagem e a centralina da caixa tambem devem ser verificadas. Este problema e frequente em veiculos com muitos quilometros em cidade.

de: Motor wuergt beim Anhalten ab wenn blockiert
es: Motor se cala al detenerse si esta bloqueado
pt: Motor cala ao parar se bloqueado

fr.question: L'embrayage du convertisseur, c'est la meme chose que l'embrayage classique ?
fr.answer: Non, c'est specifique aux boites automatiques. Le convertisseur de couple transmet la puissance par un fluide. L'embrayage de pontage le verrouille mecaniquement pour plus d'efficacite a haute vitesse.

fr.question: Pourquoi le moteur cale-t-il si le TCC est bloque ?
fr.answer: Normalement, le convertisseur permet au moteur de tourner meme quand la voiture est a l'arret (grace au fluide). Si l'embrayage est bloque, le moteur est directement couple aux roues et cale quand la voiture s'arrete.

fr.question: L'electrovanne TCC est-elle accessible ?
fr.answer: Elle est dans le corps de vanne a l'interieur de la boite. L'acces necessite generalement de demonter le carter d'huile de la boite, ce qui est faisable mais demande de l'experience.

en.question: What does the P0740 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0740 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with torque converter clutch — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0740 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0740 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0740 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0740 fault typically range from around £25 to £1712, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty tcc solenoid, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist die Kupplung des Drehmomentwandlers dasselbe wie eine normale Kupplung?
de.answer: Nein, sie ist spezifisch fuer Automatikgetriebe. Der Drehmomentwandler uebertraegt die Kraft ueber eine Fluessigkeit. Die Ueberbrueckungskupplung verriegelt ihn bei hoher Geschwindigkeit mechanisch fuer mehr Effizienz.

de.question: Warum wuergt der Motor ab, wenn der TCC blockiert ist?
de.answer: Normalerweise ermoeglicht der Drehmomentwandler dem Motor zu laufen, auch wenn das Fahrzeug steht (dank der Fluessigkeit). Wenn die Kupplung blockiert ist, ist der Motor direkt mit den Raedern verbunden und wuergt ab, wenn das Fahrzeug anhaelt.

de.question: Ist das TCC-Magnetventil zugaenglich?
de.answer: Es befindet sich im Ventilkoerper im Inneren des Getriebes. Der Zugang erfordert in der Regel die Demontage der Getriebeoel-Wanne, was machbar ist, aber Erfahrung erfordert.

es.question: El embrague del convertidor, es lo mismo que el embrague clasico?
es.answer: No, es especifico de las cajas automaticas. El convertidor de par transmite la potencia mediante un fluido. El embrague de puente lo bloquea mecanicamente para mayor eficiencia a alta velocidad.

es.question: Por que el motor se cala si el TCC esta bloqueado?
es.answer: Normalmente, el convertidor permite al motor girar incluso cuando el coche esta parado (gracias al fluido). Si el embrague esta bloqueado, el motor esta directamente acoplado a las ruedas y se cala cuando el coche se detiene.

es.question: El solenoide TCC es accesible?
es.answer: Esta en el cuerpo de valvulas dentro de la caja. El acceso requiere generalmente desmontar el carter de aceite de la caja, lo que es factible pero requiere experiencia.

pt.question: A embraiagem do conversor e a mesma coisa que a embraiagem classica?
pt.answer: Nao, e especifica das caixas automaticas. O conversor de binario transmite a potencia atraves de um fluido. A embraiagem de ponte bloqueia-o mecanicamente para maior eficiencia a alta velocidade.

pt.question: Porque e que o motor cala se o TCC esta bloqueado?
pt.answer: Normalmente, o conversor permite ao motor rodar mesmo quando o carro esta parado (gracas ao fluido). Se a embraiagem esta bloqueada, o motor esta diretamente acoplado as rodas e cala quando o carro para.

pt.question: O solenoide TCC e acessivel?
pt.answer: Esta no corpo de valvulas dentro da caixa. O acesso requer geralmente desmontar o carter de oleo da caixa, o que e possivel mas requer experiencia.

motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

name.es: Solenoide de cambio A — mal funcionamiento

description.fr: Le P0750 concerne l'electrovanne de passage A dans le corps de vanne hydraulique de la boite automatique. Les electrovannes controlent les circuits hydrauliques qui engagent les differents rapports. Si l'electrovanne A est defaillante, certains rapports ne sont plus accessibles ou les changements de rapports sont brutaux. Le corps de vanne contient typiquement 4 a 8 electrovannes, chacune pilotant un circuit hydraulique specifique. L'electrovanne peut etre collee par des depots, avoir un bobinage grille ou un tiroir hydraulique bloque. Un changement d'huile de boite avec un filtre neuf peut parfois resoudre le probleme si c'est un encrassement. Si l'electrovanne est electriquement defaillante, il faut la remplacer.
description.en: A P0750 fault code has been logged by your gearbox control module, indicating an issue with shift solenoid a — malfunction. This is a transmission-related fault that warrants prompt attention. Your automatic gearbox uses a network of sensors, solenoid valves, and hydraulic circuits to deliver smooth gear changes. When any of these components develop a fault, the gearbox ECU stores a code and may activate limp mode as a precaution. In limp mode, the gearbox typically locks into a single gear — usually second or third — to prevent further damage while still allowing you to drive to a garage. Symptoms you may have noticed include jerky gear changes, the gearbox slipping, delayed engagement when selecting drive or reverse, or the car revving high before changing gear. A transmission specialist will be able to diagnose the issue properly using dedicated equipment. The fix might be relatively simple, such as replacing a speed sensor or a solenoid valve, or it could indicate a more significant internal problem. Getting an accurate diagnosis early on can prevent a minor issue from turning into a major and expensive repair.
description.de: Der P0750 betrifft den Schaltmagneten A im hydraulischen Ventilkoerper des Automatikgetriebes. Die Schaltmagnete steuern die Hydraulikkreise, die die verschiedenen Gaenge einlegen. Wenn der Schaltmagnet A defekt ist, sind bestimmte Gaenge nicht mehr erreichbar oder die Gangwechsel sind ruckartig. Der Ventilkoerper enthaelt typischerweise 4 bis 8 Schaltmagnete, von denen jeder einen bestimmten Hydraulikkreis steuert. Der Schaltmagnet kann durch Ablagerungen verklemmt sein, eine durchgebrannte Wicklung oder einen blockierten Hydraulikschieber haben. Ein Getriebeoel-Wechsel mit neuem Filter kann das Problem manchmal loesen, wenn es sich um Verschmutzung handelt. Wenn der Schaltmagnet elektrisch defekt ist, muss er ersetzt werden.
description.es: El P0750 se refiere al solenoide de cambio A en el cuerpo de valvulas hidraulico de la caja automatica. Los solenoides controlan los circuitos hidraulicos que engranan las diferentes marchas. Si el solenoide A esta defectuoso, ciertas marchas ya no son accesibles o los cambios de marcha son bruscos. El cuerpo de valvulas contiene tipicamente de 4 a 8 solenoides, cada uno pilotando un circuito hidraulico especifico. El solenoide puede estar atascado por depositos, tener un bobinado quemado o un corredera hidraulica bloqueada. Un cambio de aceite de caja con filtro nuevo puede a veces resolver el problema si se trata de suciedad. Si el solenoide esta electricamente defectuoso, hay que reemplazarlo.
description.pt: O P0750 diz respeito ao solenoide de mudanca A no corpo de valvulas hidraulico da caixa automatica. Os solenoides controlam os circuitos hidraulicos que engrenam as diferentes mudancas. Se o solenoide A estiver defeituoso, certas mudancas deixam de estar acessiveis ou as mudancas de velocidade sao bruscas. O corpo de valvulas contem tipicamente 4 a 8 solenoides, cada um pilotando um circuito hidraulico especifico. O solenoide pode estar bloqueado por depositos, ter uma bobina queimada ou uma corredicca hidraulica bloqueada. Uma mudanca de oleo da caixa com filtro novo pode por vezes resolver o problema se se tratar de sujidade. Se o solenoide estiver eletricamente defeituoso, deve ser substituido.

es: Modo de emergencia de la caja

fr.question: Peut-on nettoyer une electrovanne de boite ?
fr.answer: Parfois oui, avec un nettoyage du corps de vanne et un rincage a l'huile neuve. Si le bobinage est grille, seul le remplacement fonctionne.

fr.question: Faut-il remplacer tout le corps de vanne ?
fr.answer: Pas necessairement. L'electrovanne seule est souvent remplacable. Mais si le corps de vanne a subi un encrassement severe, le remplacement complet est plus fiable.

fr.question: L'huile de boite sale cause-t-elle ce probleme ?
fr.answer: Oui, une huile vieille et degradee depose des particules qui bloquent les electrovannes. C'est pourquoi le changement regulier de l'huile de boite est important, meme si certains constructeurs la qualifient de remplissage a vie.

en.question: What does the P0750 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0750 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with shift solenoid a — malfunction. This is a high-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0750 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0750 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0750 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0750 fault typically range from around £87 to £1021, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is clogged shift solenoid a, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann man einen Getriebe-Schaltmagneten reinigen?
de.answer: Manchmal ja, durch eine Reinigung des Ventilkoerpers und eine Spuelung mit frischem Oel. Wenn die Wicklung durchgebrannt ist, hilft nur ein Austausch.

de.question: Muss der gesamte Ventilkoerper ersetzt werden?
de.answer: Nicht unbedingt. Der Schaltmagnet allein ist oft austauschbar. Aber wenn der Ventilkoerper stark verschmutzt ist, ist ein kompletter Austausch zuverlaessiger.

de.question: Verursacht verschmutztes Getriebeoel dieses Problem?
de.answer: Ja, altes und degradiertes Oel lagert Partikel ab, die die Schaltmagnete blockieren. Deshalb ist ein regelmaessiger Getriebeoel-Wechsel wichtig, auch wenn manche Hersteller von einer Lebensdauerfuellung sprechen.

es.question: Se puede limpiar un solenoide de caja?
es.answer: A veces si, con una limpieza del cuerpo de valvulas y un enjuague con aceite nuevo. Si el bobinado esta quemado, solo el reemplazo funciona.

es.question: Hay que reemplazar todo el cuerpo de valvulas?
es.answer: No necesariamente. El solenoide solo suele ser reemplazable. Pero si el cuerpo de valvulas ha sufrido una obstruccion severa, el reemplazo completo es mas fiable.

es.question: El aceite de caja sucio causa este problema?
es.answer: Si, un aceite viejo y degradado deposita particulas que bloquean los solenoides. Por eso el cambio regular del aceite de caja es importante, aunque algunos fabricantes lo califiquen de llenado de por vida.

pt.question: Pode-se limpar um solenoide de caixa?
pt.answer: Por vezes sim, com uma limpeza do corpo de valvulas e uma lavagem com oleo novo. Se a bobina estiver queimada, so a substituicao funciona.

pt.question: E preciso substituir todo o corpo de valvulas?
pt.answer: Nao necessariamente. O solenoide sozinho e muitas vezes substituivel. Mas se o corpo de valvulas sofreu uma obstrucao severa, a substituicao completa e mais fiavel.

pt.question: O oleo de caixa sujo causa este problema?
pt.answer: Sim, um oleo velho e degradado deposita particulas que bloqueiam os solenoides. Por isso a mudanca regular do oleo de caixa e importante, mesmo que alguns fabricantes o qualifiquem como enchimento vitalicio.

motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

name.fr: Capteur de vitesse de roue avant gauche — circuit defaillant
name.en: Front left wheel speed sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de velocidad de rueda delantera izquierda — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade da roda dianteira esquerda — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le C0035 signale un probleme sur le capteur ABS de la roue avant gauche. Ce capteur mesure la vitesse de rotation de la roue pour que le systeme ABS puisse detecter un blocage imminent lors du freinage. Sans le signal de cette roue, l'ABS est desactive car le calculateur ne peut plus comparer les vitesses entre les quatre roues. Le capteur est monte sur le moyeu ou l'etrier et lit une bague dentee fixee sur le disque ou le cardan. La corrosion, les debris de route et l'usure mecanique sont les causes principales. Le cablage du capteur chemine le long du bras de suspension et est expose aux projections et aux torsions lors des mouvements de roue.
description.en: The C0035 fault code relates to front left wheel speed sensor — circuit fault in your anti-lock braking system. The ABS is a crucial safety feature that prevents your wheels from locking up during heavy braking, allowing you to maintain steering control in emergency situations. When the ABS module detects a fault, it illuminates the ABS warning light on your dashboard and stores this code. Your normal brakes will still work perfectly fine, but the ABS function may be deactivated until the fault is repaired. This means that in an emergency stop, your wheels could lock up on slippery surfaces, which reduces your ability to steer. Common causes of ABS faults include dirty or damaged wheel speed sensors, corroded wiring, a faulty ABS ring on the wheel hub, or problems with the ABS hydraulic unit itself. A mechanic can diagnose the issue by reading the fault code and checking the sensor signals. Many ABS repairs are relatively straightforward and involve cleaning or replacing a sensor. It is worth noting that the MOT test does check the ABS warning light, so this needs fixing before your next test.
description.de: Der C0035 signalisiert ein Problem am ABS-Sensor des vorderen linken Rads. Dieser Sensor misst die Rotationsgeschwindigkeit des Rads, damit das ABS-System eine drohende Blockierung beim Bremsen erkennen kann. Ohne das Signal dieses Rads wird das ABS deaktiviert, da das Steuergeraet die Geschwindigkeiten der vier Raeder nicht mehr vergleichen kann. Der Sensor ist an der Nabe oder am Bremssattel montiert und liest einen Zahnkranz ab, der an der Bremsscheibe oder der Antriebswelle befestigt ist. Korrosion, Strassenablagerungen und mechanischer Verschleiss sind die Hauptursachen. Die Verkabelung des Sensors verlaeuft entlang des Querlenkers und ist Spritzwasser und Verdrehungen bei Radbewegungen ausgesetzt.
description.es: El C0035 senala un problema en el sensor ABS de la rueda delantera izquierda. Este sensor mide la velocidad de rotacion de la rueda para que el sistema ABS pueda detectar un bloqueo inminente durante el frenado. Sin la senal de esta rueda, el ABS se desactiva porque la centralita ya no puede comparar las velocidades entre las cuatro ruedas. El sensor esta montado en el buje o la pinza y lee un anillo dentado fijado en el disco o el palier. La corrosion, los residuos de la carretera y el desgaste mecanico son las causas principales. El cableado del sensor recorre el brazo de suspension y esta expuesto a las proyecciones y torsiones durante los movimientos de la rueda.
description.pt: O C0035 assinala um problema no sensor ABS da roda dianteira esquerda. Este sensor mede a velocidade de rotacao da roda para que o sistema ABS possa detetar um bloqueio iminente durante a travagem. Sem o sinal desta roda, o ABS e desativado porque a centralina ja nao consegue comparar as velocidades entre as quatro rodas. O sensor esta montado no cubo ou na pinca e le um anel dentado fixo no disco ou no semieixo. A corrosao, os detritos da estrada e o desgaste mecanico sao as causas principais. A cablagem do sensor percorre o braco de suspensao e esta exposta a projecoes e torcoes durante os movimentos da roda.

fr.question: Puis-je freiner normalement sans l'ABS ?
fr.answer: Oui, le systeme de freinage classique fonctionne toujours. Mais en cas de freinage d'urgence sur sol glissant, les roues risquent de bloquer car l'ABS ne pourra pas intervenir.

fr.question: Le capteur ABS et le capteur de vitesse de roue, c'est pareil ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est le meme capteur. Il sert a la fois a l'ABS, a l'ESP, au compteur de vitesse et parfois au systeme de surveillance de pression des pneus.

fr.question: La bague ABS, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est un anneau dente en metal ou magnetique fixe sur le moyeu ou le cardan. Le capteur lit les dents pour compter les tours de la roue. Si elle est fissuree ou couverte de rouille, le signal est perturbe.

en.question: What does the C0035 fault code mean?
en.answer: The C0035 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with front left wheel speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity ABS braking fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a C0035 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will C0035 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

en.question: How much does C0035 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a C0035 fault typically range from around £25 to £130, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is front left abs sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann ich ohne ABS normal bremsen?
de.answer: Ja, das klassische Bremssystem funktioniert weiterhin. Aber bei einer Notbremsung auf rutschigem Untergrund riskieren die Raeder zu blockieren, da das ABS nicht eingreifen kann.

de.question: Sind der ABS-Sensor und der Raddrehzahlsensor dasselbe?
de.answer: Ja, es ist derselbe Sensor. Er dient gleichzeitig dem ABS, dem ESP, dem Tachometer und manchmal dem Reifendruckkontrollsystem.

de.question: Was ist der ABS-Ring?
de.answer: Es ist ein gezahnter oder magnetischer Ring, der an der Nabe oder der Antriebswelle befestigt ist. Der Sensor liest die Zaehne, um die Radumdrehungen zu zaehlen. Wenn er gerissen oder von Rost bedeckt ist, wird das Signal gestoert.

es.question: Puedo frenar normalmente sin el ABS?
es.answer: Si, el sistema de frenado clasico sigue funcionando. Pero en caso de frenado de emergencia sobre suelo resbaladizo, las ruedas pueden bloquearse porque el ABS no podra intervenir.

es.question: El sensor ABS y el sensor de velocidad de rueda, son lo mismo?
es.answer: Si, es el mismo sensor. Sirve a la vez al ABS, al ESP, al velocimetro y a veces al sistema de control de presion de neumaticos.

es.question: Que es el anillo ABS?
es.answer: Es un anillo dentado de metal o magnetico fijado al buje o al palier. El sensor lee los dientes para contar las vueltas de la rueda. Si esta fisurado o cubierto de oxido, la senal se altera.

pt.question: Posso travar normalmente sem o ABS?
pt.answer: Sim, o sistema de travagem classico continua a funcionar. Mas em caso de travagem de emergencia em piso escorregadio, as rodas podem bloquear porque o ABS nao podera intervir.

pt.question: O sensor ABS e o sensor de velocidade da roda sao a mesma coisa?
pt.answer: Sim, e o mesmo sensor. Serve ao mesmo tempo ao ABS, ao ESP, ao velocimetro e por vezes ao sistema de monitorizacao de pressao dos pneus.

pt.question: O que e o anel ABS?
pt.answer: E um anel dentado de metal ou magnetico fixo no cubo ou no semieixo. O sensor le os dentes para contar as voltas da roda. Se estiver fissurado ou coberto de ferrugem, o sinal e perturbado.

motFail: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

name.fr: Capteur de vitesse de roue avant droite — circuit defaillant
name.en: Front right wheel speed sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de velocidad de rueda delantera derecha — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade da roda dianteira direita — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le C0040 est l'equivalent du C0035 pour la roue avant droite. Le capteur ABS de cette roue ne fonctionne plus correctement. Les memes causes s'appliquent : capteur defaillant, bague dentee endommagee ou cablage coupe. Le cote droit est parfois plus expose a l'eau et aux projections selon la configuration de la route et le sens de circulation. Sur les vehicules avec direction a droite, c'est le cote du conducteur qui est generalement le plus sollicite. Le voyant ABS et souvent le voyant ESP s'allument ensemble car l'ESP ne peut pas fonctionner sans l'information de toutes les roues. Le remplacement du capteur est une operation relativement simple.
description.en: Your car has logged a C0040 code, which indicates a problem with front right wheel speed sensor — circuit fault in the anti-lock braking system. Do not panic — your regular brakes are still working normally, but the ABS safety feature may be partially or fully deactivated. The ABS system uses sensors at each wheel to monitor rotation speed. If one wheel starts to lock during braking, the system rapidly pulses the brake on that wheel to maintain grip and steering control. When a sensor or its wiring develops a fault, the system cannot function correctly and switches itself off as a safety precaution. The ABS warning light on your dashboard confirms this. Typical causes include a damaged speed sensor, a cracked or dirty ABS ring, corroded connectors, or problems with the ABS module. Diagnosis usually involves scanning the codes and checking the sensor output with an oscilloscope. Repairs often come down to replacing a wheel speed sensor or cleaning a connector — both of which are fairly affordable. However, if the ABS hydraulic unit is at fault, costs can be higher. Either way, this is a safety-related system, so do get it checked at your earliest convenience, especially as it is part of the MOT test.
description.de: Der C0040 ist das Gegenstueck zum C0035 fuer das vordere rechte Rad. Der ABS-Sensor dieses Rads funktioniert nicht mehr korrekt. Die gleichen Ursachen kommen in Frage: defekter Sensor, beschaedigter Zahnkranz oder durchtrennte Verkabelung. Die rechte Seite ist je nach Strassenaufbau und Fahrtrichtung manchmal staerker Wasser und Spritzwasser ausgesetzt. Bei Fahrzeugen mit Rechtslenker ist es die Fahrerseite, die in der Regel am meisten beansprucht wird. Die ABS-Warnleuchte und oft auch die ESP-Warnleuchte leuchten zusammen, da das ESP ohne die Informationen aller Raeder nicht funktionieren kann. Der Sensortausch ist ein relativ einfacher Eingriff.
description.es: El C0040 es el equivalente del C0035 para la rueda delantera derecha. El sensor ABS de esta rueda ya no funciona correctamente. Las mismas causas se aplican: sensor defectuoso, anillo dentado danado o cableado cortado. El lado derecho esta a veces mas expuesto al agua y a las proyecciones segun la configuracion de la carretera y el sentido de circulacion. En los vehiculos con volante a la derecha, es el lado del conductor el que generalmente esta mas solicitado. La luz ABS y a menudo la luz ESP se encienden juntas porque el ESP no puede funcionar sin la informacion de todas las ruedas. La sustitucion del sensor es una operacion relativamente sencilla.
description.pt: O C0040 e o equivalente do C0035 para a roda dianteira direita. O sensor ABS desta roda ja nao funciona corretamente. As mesmas causas aplicam-se: sensor defeituoso, anel dentado danificado ou cablagem cortada. O lado direito esta por vezes mais exposto a agua e as projecoes conforme a configuracao da estrada e o sentido de circulacao. Nos veiculos com volante a direita, e o lado do condutor que e geralmente o mais solicitado. A luz ABS e frequentemente a luz ESP acendem-se em conjunto porque o ESP nao consegue funcionar sem a informacao de todas as rodas. A substituicao do sensor e uma operacao relativamente simples.

fr.question: L'ESP est-il aussi desactive ?
fr.answer: Oui, l'ESP a besoin de l'information de toutes les roues pour fonctionner. Si un seul capteur est defaillant, l'ESP est completement desactive.

fr.question: Le capteur est-il facile a remplacer ?
fr.answer: Generalement oui. Il est fixe par une vis ou un clip sur le moyeu. Le plus complique est parfois le demontage si la corrosion a soude le capteur en place. Un peu de degrippant aide.

fr.question: Peut-on rouler longtemps sans ABS ?
fr.answer: Ce n'est pas recommande. Pendant des decennies on a conduit sans ABS, mais les vehicules modernes sont concus autour de ce systeme. Les distances de freinage d'urgence sont significativement plus longues sans ABS.

en.question: What does the C0040 fault code mean?
en.answer: The C0040 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with front right wheel speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity ABS braking fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a C0040 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will C0040 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

en.question: How much does C0040 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a C0040 fault typically range from around £25 to £129, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is front right abs sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist das ESP ebenfalls deaktiviert?
de.answer: Ja, das ESP benoetigt die Information aller Raeder, um zu funktionieren. Wenn ein einziger Sensor defekt ist, wird das ESP vollstaendig deaktiviert.

de.question: Ist der Sensor leicht auszutauschen?
de.answer: In der Regel ja. Er ist mit einer Schraube oder einem Clip an der Nabe befestigt. Das Schwierigste ist manchmal die Demontage, wenn Korrosion den Sensor festgesetzt hat. Ein wenig Rostloeser hilft.

de.question: Kann man laengere Zeit ohne ABS fahren?
de.answer: Es ist nicht empfohlen. Jahrzehntelang wurde ohne ABS gefahren, aber moderne Fahrzeuge sind um dieses System herum konzipiert. Die Bremsweg bei Notbremsungen sind ohne ABS deutlich laenger.

es.question: El ESP tambien esta desactivado?
es.answer: Si, el ESP necesita la informacion de todas las ruedas para funcionar. Si un solo sensor esta defectuoso, el ESP se desactiva completamente.

es.question: El sensor es facil de reemplazar?
es.answer: Generalmente si. Esta fijado con un tornillo o un clip al buje. Lo mas complicado es a veces el desmontaje si la corrosion ha soldado el sensor en su sitio. Un poco de aflojatodo ayuda.

es.question: Se puede conducir mucho tiempo sin ABS?
es.answer: No es recomendable. Durante decadas se ha conducido sin ABS, pero los vehiculos modernos estan disenados alrededor de este sistema. Las distancias de frenado de emergencia son significativamente mas largas sin ABS.

pt.question: O ESP tambem esta desativado?
pt.answer: Sim, o ESP precisa da informacao de todas as rodas para funcionar. Se um unico sensor estiver defeituoso, o ESP e completamente desativado.

pt.question: O sensor e facil de substituir?
pt.answer: Geralmente sim. Esta fixo com um parafuso ou um clip no cubo. O mais complicado e por vezes a desmontagem se a corrosao soldou o sensor no lugar. Um pouco de desengripante ajuda.

pt.question: Pode-se conduzir muito tempo sem ABS?
pt.answer: Nao e recomendado. Durante decadas conduziu-se sem ABS, mas os veiculos modernos sao concebidos em torno deste sistema. As distancias de travagem de emergencia sao significativamente mais longas sem ABS.

motFail: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

name.fr: Capteur de vitesse de roue arriere gauche — circuit defaillant
name.en: Rear left wheel speed sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de velocidad de rueda trasera izquierda — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade da roda traseira esquerda — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le C0045 concerne le capteur ABS de la roue arriere gauche. Les capteurs arriere sont souvent plus exposes a la boue, l'eau et les projections de sel en hiver car ils sont plus proches du sol et moins proteges par la carrosserie. La bague ABS arriere est parfois integree au roulement de roue, ce qui signifie que si la bague est endommagee, il faut remplacer le roulement complet — une operation nettement plus couteuse. Certains vehicules ont des bagues magnetiques plutot que dentees, qui sont plus sensibles a la corrosion et aux debris metalliques. Le cablage arriere est plus long et traverse le dessous du vehicule, ce qui l'expose davantage aux dommages.
description.en: The C0045 fault code relates to rear left wheel speed sensor — circuit fault in your anti-lock braking system. The ABS is a crucial safety feature that prevents your wheels from locking up during heavy braking, allowing you to maintain steering control in emergency situations. When the ABS module detects a fault, it illuminates the ABS warning light on your dashboard and stores this code. Your normal brakes will still work perfectly fine, but the ABS function may be deactivated until the fault is repaired. This means that in an emergency stop, your wheels could lock up on slippery surfaces, which reduces your ability to steer. Common causes of ABS faults include dirty or damaged wheel speed sensors, corroded wiring, a faulty ABS ring on the wheel hub, or problems with the ABS hydraulic unit itself. A mechanic can diagnose the issue by reading the fault code and checking the sensor signals. Many ABS repairs are relatively straightforward and involve cleaning or replacing a sensor. It is worth noting that the MOT test does check the ABS warning light, so this needs fixing before your next test.
description.de: Der C0045 betrifft den ABS-Sensor des hinteren linken Rads. Die hinteren Sensoren sind oft staerker Schlamm, Wasser und Streusalz im Winter ausgesetzt, da sie naeher am Boden und weniger durch die Karosserie geschuetzt sind. Der hintere ABS-Ring ist manchmal in das Radlager integriert, was bedeutet, dass bei einem beschaedigten Ring das komplette Lager getauscht werden muss — ein deutlich teurerer Eingriff. Manche Fahrzeuge haben magnetische statt gezahnte Ringe, die empfindlicher gegenueber Korrosion und metallischen Ablagerungen sind. Die hintere Verkabelung ist laenger und verlaeuft unter dem Fahrzeug, was sie staerker Schaeden aussetzt.
description.es: El C0045 se refiere al sensor ABS de la rueda trasera izquierda. Los sensores traseros estan a menudo mas expuestos al barro, al agua y a la sal en invierno porque estan mas cerca del suelo y menos protegidos por la carroceria. El anillo ABS trasero esta a veces integrado en el rodamiento de rueda, lo que significa que si el anillo esta danado, hay que reemplazar el rodamiento completo — una operacion notablemente mas costosa. Algunos vehiculos tienen anillos magneticos en lugar de dentados, que son mas sensibles a la corrosion y a los residuos metalicos. El cableado trasero es mas largo y recorre la parte inferior del vehiculo, lo que lo expone mas a los danos.
description.pt: O C0045 diz respeito ao sensor ABS da roda traseira esquerda. Os sensores traseiros estao frequentemente mais expostos a lama, a agua e ao sal no inverno porque estao mais perto do solo e menos protegidos pela carrocaria. O anel ABS traseiro esta por vezes integrado no rolamento da roda, o que significa que se o anel estiver danificado, e necessario substituir o rolamento completo — uma operacao consideravelmente mais dispendiosa. Alguns veiculos tem aneis magneticos em vez de dentados, que sao mais sensiveis a corrosao e aos detritos metalicos. A cablagem traseira e mais longa e percorre a parte inferior do veiculo, o que a expoe mais a danos.

name.en: Wheel bearing with integrated ABS ring

fr.question: La bague ABS est-elle integree au roulement ?
fr.answer: Sur beaucoup de vehicules recents oui. Verifiez aupres de votre garagiste. Si c'est le cas, le remplacement du roulement complet est necessaire, ce qui augmente le cout.

fr.question: Le sel de route endommage-t-il les capteurs ABS ?
fr.answer: Oui, le sel accelere la corrosion de tous les composants metalliques sous le vehicule, y compris les capteurs ABS, les connecteurs et la bague dentee.

fr.question: Comment savoir si c'est le capteur ou la bague ?
fr.answer: Un examen visuel de la bague permet de voir si elle est fissuree ou rouillée. Un test electrique du capteur au multimetre confirme s'il est en circuit ouvert ou en court-circuit.

en.question: What does the C0045 fault code mean?
en.answer: The C0045 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with rear left wheel speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity ABS braking fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a C0045 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will C0045 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

en.question: How much does C0045 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a C0045 fault typically range from around £34 to £374, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is rear left abs sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der ABS-Ring in das Radlager integriert?
de.answer: Bei vielen neueren Fahrzeugen ja. Erkundigen Sie sich bei Ihrer Werkstatt. Ist dies der Fall, ist der Austausch des kompletten Radlagers erforderlich, was die Kosten erhoeht.

de.question: Beschaedigt Streusalz die ABS-Sensoren?
de.answer: Ja, Salz beschleunigt die Korrosion aller metallischen Komponenten unter dem Fahrzeug, einschliesslich der ABS-Sensoren, Stecker und des Zahnkranzes.

de.question: Wie erkennt man, ob es der Sensor oder der Ring ist?
de.answer: Eine Sichtpruefung des Rings zeigt, ob er gerissen oder verrostet ist. Eine elektrische Pruefung des Sensors mit einem Multimeter bestaetigt, ob er einen Unterbrechung oder einen Kurzschluss hat.

es.question: El anillo ABS esta integrado en el rodamiento?
es.answer: En muchos vehiculos recientes si. Consulte con su mecanico. Si es el caso, la sustitucion del rodamiento completo es necesaria, lo que aumenta el coste.

es.question: La sal de carretera dana los sensores ABS?
es.answer: Si, la sal acelera la corrosion de todos los componentes metalicos bajo el vehiculo, incluyendo los sensores ABS, los conectores y el anillo dentado.

es.question: Como saber si es el sensor o el anillo?
es.answer: Un examen visual del anillo permite ver si esta fisurado u oxidado. Una prueba electrica del sensor con un multimetro confirma si esta en circuito abierto o en cortocircuito.

pt.question: O anel ABS esta integrado no rolamento?
pt.answer: Em muitos veiculos recentes sim. Verifique junto do seu mecanico. Se for o caso, a substituicao do rolamento completo e necessaria, o que aumenta o custo.

pt.question: O sal da estrada danifica os sensores ABS?
pt.answer: Sim, o sal acelera a corrosao de todos os componentes metalicos sob o veiculo, incluindo os sensores ABS, os conectores e o anel dentado.

pt.question: Como saber se e o sensor ou o anel?
pt.answer: Um exame visual do anel permite ver se esta fissurado ou enferrujado. Um teste eletrico do sensor com um multimetro confirma se esta em circuito aberto ou em curto-circuito.

motFail: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

name.fr: Capteur de vitesse de roue arriere droite — circuit defaillant
name.en: Rear right wheel speed sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de velocidad de rueda trasera derecha — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade da roda traseira direita — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le C0050 signale un defaut sur le capteur ABS de la roue arriere droite. Les problemes et solutions sont symetriques au C0045. Ce capteur est le quatrieme et dernier de l'ensemble ABS. Si un seul capteur est defaillant, tout le systeme ABS est desactive car il a besoin des quatre signaux pour fonctionner correctement. Sur certains vehicules utilitaires ou tout-terrain, les capteurs arriere sont encore plus exposes aux chocs et aux projections. Apres un remplacement de capteur ABS, il est parfois necessaire de faire un calibrage du systeme chez le garagiste pour que le calculateur reapprenne les signaux de reference de chaque roue.
description.en: Your car has logged a C0050 code, which indicates a problem with rear right wheel speed sensor — circuit fault in the anti-lock braking system. Do not panic — your regular brakes are still working normally, but the ABS safety feature may be partially or fully deactivated. The ABS system uses sensors at each wheel to monitor rotation speed. If one wheel starts to lock during braking, the system rapidly pulses the brake on that wheel to maintain grip and steering control. When a sensor or its wiring develops a fault, the system cannot function correctly and switches itself off as a safety precaution. The ABS warning light on your dashboard confirms this. Typical causes include a damaged speed sensor, a cracked or dirty ABS ring, corroded connectors, or problems with the ABS module. Diagnosis usually involves scanning the codes and checking the sensor output with an oscilloscope. Repairs often come down to replacing a wheel speed sensor or cleaning a connector — both of which are fairly affordable. However, if the ABS hydraulic unit is at fault, costs can be higher. Either way, this is a safety-related system, so do get it checked at your earliest convenience, especially as it is part of the MOT test.
description.de: Der C0050 meldet einen Defekt am ABS-Sensor des hinteren rechten Rads. Probleme und Loesungen sind symmetrisch zum C0045. Dieser Sensor ist der vierte und letzte des ABS-Systems. Wenn ein einziger Sensor defekt ist, wird das gesamte ABS-System deaktiviert, da es die Signale aller vier Raeder benoetigt, um korrekt zu funktionieren. Bei bestimmten Nutzfahrzeugen oder Gelaendewagen sind die hinteren Sensoren noch staerker Stoessen und Spritzwasser ausgesetzt. Nach einem ABS-Sensortausch ist manchmal eine Kalibrierung des Systems in der Werkstatt erforderlich, damit das Steuergeraet die Referenzsignale jedes Rads neu erlernt.
description.es: El C0050 senala un defecto en el sensor ABS de la rueda trasera derecha. Los problemas y soluciones son simetricos al C0045. Este sensor es el cuarto y ultimo del conjunto ABS. Si un solo sensor esta defectuoso, todo el sistema ABS se desactiva porque necesita las cuatro senales para funcionar correctamente. En algunos vehiculos utilitarios o todoterreno, los sensores traseros estan aun mas expuestos a los impactos y a las proyecciones. Despues de una sustitucion de sensor ABS, a veces es necesario realizar una calibracion del sistema en el taller para que la centralita reaprenda las senales de referencia de cada rueda.
description.pt: O C0050 assinala um defeito no sensor ABS da roda traseira direita. Os problemas e solucoes sao simetricos ao C0045. Este sensor e o quarto e ultimo do conjunto ABS. Se um unico sensor estiver defeituoso, todo o sistema ABS e desativado porque precisa dos quatro sinais para funcionar corretamente. Em certos veiculos utilitarios ou todo-o-terreno, os sensores traseiros estao ainda mais expostos a impactos e projecoes. Apos uma substituicao de sensor ABS, e por vezes necessaria uma calibracao do sistema na oficina para que a centralina reaprenda os sinais de referencia de cada roda.

fr.question: Faut-il calibrer l'ABS apres remplacement du capteur ?
fr.answer: Sur certains vehicules oui. Le calculateur doit reapprendre les parametres de reference du nouveau capteur. Un outil de diagnostic est necessaire pour cette operation.

fr.question: Le frein a main est-il affecte ?
fr.answer: Non, le frein a main (ou frein de stationnement) est un systeme mecanique independant de l'ABS. Il fonctionne normalement meme si l'ABS est desactive.

fr.question: Tous les capteurs ABS sont-ils identiques ?
fr.answer: Non, les capteurs avant et arriere sont souvent differents (longueur de cable, fixation, type de signal). Meme entre gauche et droite, le cablage peut avoir une longueur differente.

en.question: What does the C0050 fault code mean?
en.answer: The C0050 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with rear right wheel speed sensor — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity ABS braking fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a C0050 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will C0050 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

en.question: How much does C0050 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a C0050 fault typically range from around £13 to £372, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is rear right abs sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Muss das ABS nach dem Sensortausch kalibriert werden?
de.answer: Bei manchen Fahrzeugen ja. Das Steuergeraet muss die Referenzparameter des neuen Sensors erlernen. Dafuer ist ein Diagnosegeraet erforderlich.

de.question: Ist die Handbremse betroffen?
de.answer: Nein, die Handbremse (oder Feststellbremse) ist ein mechanisches System, das unabhaengig vom ABS arbeitet. Sie funktioniert normal, auch wenn das ABS deaktiviert ist.

de.question: Sind alle ABS-Sensoren identisch?
