de.answer: Nein, die vorderen und hinteren Sensoren sind oft unterschiedlich (Kabellaenge, Befestigung, Signaltyp). Selbst zwischen links und rechts kann die Kabellaenge unterschiedlich sein.

es.question: Hay que calibrar el ABS despues de reemplazar el sensor?
es.answer: En algunos vehiculos si. La centralita debe reaprender los parametros de referencia del nuevo sensor. Se necesita una herramienta de diagnostico para esta operacion.

es.question: El freno de mano esta afectado?
es.answer: No, el freno de mano (o freno de estacionamiento) es un sistema mecanico independiente del ABS. Funciona normalmente incluso si el ABS esta desactivado.

es.question: Todos los sensores ABS son identicos?
es.answer: No, los sensores delanteros y traseros suelen ser diferentes (longitud de cable, fijacion, tipo de senal). Incluso entre izquierda y derecha, el cableado puede tener una longitud diferente.

pt.question: E preciso calibrar o ABS apos a substituicao do sensor?
pt.answer: Em alguns veiculos sim. A centralina deve reaprender os parametros de referencia do novo sensor. E necessaria uma ferramenta de diagnostico para esta operacao.

pt.question: O travao de mao e afetado?
pt.answer: Nao, o travao de mao (ou travao de estacionamento) e um sistema mecanico independente do ABS. Funciona normalmente mesmo que o ABS esteja desativado.

pt.question: Todos os sensores ABS sao identicos?
pt.answer: Nao, os sensores dianteiros e traseiros sao frequentemente diferentes (comprimento do cabo, fixacao, tipo de sinal). Mesmo entre esquerda e direita, a cablagem pode ter um comprimento diferente.

motFail: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

description.fr: Le C0060 pointe un probleme sur une electrovanne a l'interieur du bloc hydraulique ABS. Le bloc ABS contient des electrovannes qui modulent la pression de freinage independamment sur chaque roue lors d'un freinage d'urgence. Si une electrovanne est bloquee ou ne repond plus, l'ABS ne peut plus reduire la pression sur la roue qui bloque. Le bloc hydraulique est un composant couteux car il integre les electrovannes, la pompe et l'unite electronique. Cependant, des specialistes en reparation de blocs ABS existent et peuvent souvent reparer l'unite pour 30 a 50% du prix d'un remplacement neuf. Le defaut peut etre intermittent au debut, provoquant des interventions ABS inattendues ou un voyant qui s'allume puis s'eteint.
description.en: The C0060 fault code relates to abs hydraulic unit — solenoid fault in your anti-lock braking system. The ABS is a crucial safety feature that prevents your wheels from locking up during heavy braking, allowing you to maintain steering control in emergency situations. When the ABS module detects a fault, it illuminates the ABS warning light on your dashboard and stores this code. Your normal brakes will still work perfectly fine, but the ABS function may be deactivated until the fault is repaired. This means that in an emergency stop, your wheels could lock up on slippery surfaces, which reduces your ability to steer. Common causes of ABS faults include dirty or damaged wheel speed sensors, corroded wiring, a faulty ABS ring on the wheel hub, or problems with the ABS hydraulic unit itself. A mechanic can diagnose the issue by reading the fault code and checking the sensor signals. Many ABS repairs are relatively straightforward and involve cleaning or replacing a sensor. It is worth noting that the MOT test does check the ABS warning light, so this needs fixing before your next test.
description.de: Der C0060 weist auf ein Problem mit einem Magnetventil im ABS-Hydraulikblock hin. Der ABS-Block enthaelt Magnetventile, die den Bremsdruck bei einer Notbremsung unabhaengig an jedem Rad modulieren. Wenn ein Magnetventil blockiert ist oder nicht mehr reagiert, kann das ABS den Druck am blockierenden Rad nicht mehr reduzieren. Der Hydraulikblock ist ein teures Bauteil, da er die Magnetventile, die Pumpe und die Elektronikeinheit integriert. Es gibt jedoch Spezialisten fuer die Reparatur von ABS-Bloecken, die die Einheit oft fuer 30 bis 50% des Neupreises instand setzen koennen. Der Defekt kann anfangs intermittierend auftreten und unerwartete ABS-Eingriffe oder eine Warnleuchte verursachen, die sich ein- und ausschaltet.
description.es: El C0060 indica un problema en una electrovalvula del bloque hidraulico ABS. El bloque ABS contiene electrovalvulas que modulan la presion de frenado de forma independiente en cada rueda durante un frenado de emergencia. Si una electrovalvula esta bloqueada o no responde, el ABS no puede reducir la presion en la rueda que bloquea. El bloque hidraulico es un componente costoso porque integra las electrovalvulas, la bomba y la unidad electronica. Sin embargo, existen especialistas en reparacion de bloques ABS que pueden a menudo reparar la unidad por un 30 a 50% del precio de una nueva. El defecto puede ser intermitente al principio, provocando intervenciones ABS inesperadas o una luz que se enciende y se apaga.
description.pt: O C0060 aponta para um problema numa eletrovalvula no interior do bloco hidraulico ABS. O bloco ABS contem eletrovalvulas que modulam a pressao de travagem de forma independente em cada roda durante uma travagem de emergencia. Se uma eletrovalvula estiver bloqueada ou nao responder, o ABS nao consegue reduzir a pressao na roda que bloqueia. O bloco hidraulico e um componente dispendioso porque integra as eletrovalvulas, a bomba e a unidade eletronica. No entanto, existem especialistas em reparacao de blocos ABS que podem frequentemente reparar a unidade por 30 a 50% do preco de uma nova. O defeito pode ser intermitente no inicio, provocando intervencoes ABS inesperadas ou uma luz que acende e apaga.

es: ABS se activa de forma intempestiva

fr.question: Le bloc ABS est-il reparable ?
fr.answer: Oui, des specialistes comme BBA Reman ou ACtronics peuvent reparer les blocs ABS. C'est moins cher qu'un remplacement neuf et tout aussi fiable.

fr.question: L'ABS peut-il freiner une roue tout seul ?
fr.answer: Non, l'ABS ne freine pas — il module la pression que vous appliquez. Il ne peut pas ajouter de pression, seulement la reduire momentanement pour eviter le blocage.

fr.question: Pourquoi le bloc ABS est-il si cher ?
fr.answer: C'est un composant de precision qui integre des electrovannes, une pompe electrique et un module electronique dans un bloc d'aluminium usine. La fabrication est complexe et les tolerances tres strictes.

en.question: What does the C0060 fault code mean?
en.answer: The C0060 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with abs hydraulic unit — solenoid fault. This is a high-severity ABS braking fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a C0060 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will C0060 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

en.question: How much does C0060 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a C0060 fault typically range from around £165 to £1260, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is abs block solenoid valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der ABS-Block reparierbar?
de.answer: Ja, Spezialisten wie BBA Reman oder ACtronics koennen ABS-Bloecke reparieren. Es ist guenstiger als ein Neuteil und ebenso zuverlaessig.

de.question: Kann das ABS ein Rad von selbst bremsen?
de.answer: Nein, das ABS bremst nicht — es moduliert den Druck, den Sie aufbringen. Es kann keinen Druck hinzufuegen, sondern ihn nur kurzzeitig reduzieren, um ein Blockieren zu verhindern.

de.question: Warum ist der ABS-Block so teuer?
de.answer: Es ist ein Praezisionsbauteil, das Magnetventile, eine elektrische Pumpe und ein Elektronikmodul in einem gefraesten Aluminiumblock vereint. Die Herstellung ist komplex und die Toleranzen sind sehr eng.

es.question: El bloque ABS es reparable?
es.answer: Si, especialistas como BBA Reman o ACtronics pueden reparar los bloques ABS. Es mas barato que un reemplazo nuevo y igual de fiable.

es.question: El ABS puede frenar una rueda por si solo?
es.answer: No, el ABS no frena — modula la presion que usted aplica. No puede anadir presion, solo reducirla momentaneamente para evitar el bloqueo.

es.question: Por que el bloque ABS es tan caro?
es.answer: Es un componente de precision que integra electrovalvulas, una bomba electrica y un modulo electronico en un bloque de aluminio mecanizado. La fabricacion es compleja y las tolerancias muy estrictas.

pt.question: O bloco ABS e reparavel?
pt.answer: Sim, especialistas como BBA Reman ou ACtronics podem reparar os blocos ABS. E mais barato do que uma substituicao nova e igualmente fiavel.

pt.question: O ABS pode travar uma roda sozinho?
pt.answer: Nao, o ABS nao trava — modula a pressao que voce aplica. Nao pode adicionar pressao, apenas reduzi-la momentaneamente para evitar o bloqueio.

pt.question: Porque e que o bloco ABS e tao caro?
pt.answer: E um componente de precisao que integra eletrovalvulas, uma bomba eletrica e um modulo eletronico num bloco de aluminio maquinado. O fabrico e complexo e as tolerancias muito apertadas.

motFail: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

name.fr: Pompe de retour ABS — circuit defaillant
name.es: Bomba de retorno ABS — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Bomba de retorno ABS — circuito defeituoso

description.fr: Le C0065 signale un probleme sur le circuit electrique de la pompe du bloc ABS. Cette pompe sert a remonter la pression dans le circuit de freinage apres que les electrovannes l'ont reduite pendant une intervention ABS. Si la pompe ne fonctionne pas, l'ABS ne peut pas faire de cycles pression-relachement-pression qui permettent de freiner sans bloquer les roues. Le moteur electrique de la pompe peut etre grille, ou le relais qui l'alimente peut etre defaillant. Un bruit de ronronnement venant du bloc ABS quand la pompe tourne en permanence peut aussi indiquer un probleme. Ce code desactive completement l'ABS.
description.en: Your car has logged a C0065 code, which indicates a problem with abs return pump — circuit fault in the anti-lock braking system. Do not panic — your regular brakes are still working normally, but the ABS safety feature may be partially or fully deactivated. The ABS system uses sensors at each wheel to monitor rotation speed. If one wheel starts to lock during braking, the system rapidly pulses the brake on that wheel to maintain grip and steering control. When a sensor or its wiring develops a fault, the system cannot function correctly and switches itself off as a safety precaution. The ABS warning light on your dashboard confirms this. Typical causes include a damaged speed sensor, a cracked or dirty ABS ring, corroded connectors, or problems with the ABS module. Diagnosis usually involves scanning the codes and checking the sensor output with an oscilloscope. Repairs often come down to replacing a wheel speed sensor or cleaning a connector — both of which are fairly affordable. However, if the ABS hydraulic unit is at fault, costs can be higher. Either way, this is a safety-related system, so do get it checked at your earliest convenience, especially as it is part of the MOT test.
description.de: Der C0065 meldet ein Problem am elektrischen Schaltkreis der ABS-Blockpumpe. Diese Pumpe dient dazu, den Druck im Bremskreis wieder aufzubauen, nachdem die Magnetventile ihn waehrend einer ABS-Regelung reduziert haben. Wenn die Pumpe nicht funktioniert, kann das ABS keine Druck-Entlastungs-Druck-Zyklen durchfuehren, die ein Bremsen ohne Radblockierung ermoeglichen. Der Elektromotor der Pumpe kann durchgebrannt sein, oder das Relais, das ihn versorgt, kann defekt sein. Ein Brummgeraeusch vom ABS-Block, wenn die Pumpe staendig laeuft, kann ebenfalls auf ein Problem hinweisen. Dieser Code deaktiviert das ABS vollstaendig.
description.es: El C0065 senala un problema en el circuito electrico de la bomba del bloque ABS. Esta bomba sirve para restablecer la presion en el circuito de frenos despues de que las electrovalvulas la han reducido durante una intervencion ABS. Si la bomba no funciona, el ABS no puede realizar los ciclos de presion-liberacion-presion que permiten frenar sin bloquear las ruedas. El motor electrico de la bomba puede estar quemado, o el rele que lo alimenta puede estar defectuoso. Un ruido de zumbido proveniente del bloque ABS cuando la bomba funciona permanentemente tambien puede indicar un problema. Este codigo desactiva completamente el ABS.
description.pt: O C0065 assinala um problema no circuito eletrico da bomba do bloco ABS. Esta bomba serve para restabelecer a pressao no circuito de travagem apos as eletrovalvulas a terem reduzido durante uma intervencao ABS. Se a bomba nao funcionar, o ABS nao consegue fazer os ciclos de pressao-libertacao-pressao que permitem travar sem bloquear as rodas. O motor eletrico da bomba pode estar queimado, ou o rele que o alimenta pode estar defeituoso. Um ruido de zumbido vindo do bloco ABS quando a bomba funciona permanentemente tambem pode indicar um problema. Este codigo desativa completamente o ABS.

name.en: Wiring of the engine of pompe
name.es: Cableado del motor de la bomba

es: Posible ruido anormal de la bomba

fr.question: La pompe ABS tourne-t-elle en permanence ?
fr.answer: Non, normalement elle ne tourne que pendant une intervention ABS (freinage d'urgence). Si vous l'entendez tourner souvent ou en permanence, c'est un signe de defaillance.

fr.question: Le relais est-il le meme que celui de la pompe a carburant ?
fr.answer: Non, c'est un relais dedie au systeme ABS. Il est generalement dans la boite a fusibles sous le capot. Consultez le schema pour l'identifier.

fr.question: Peut-on rouler sans la pompe ABS ?
fr.answer: Oui, le freinage classique fonctionne normalement. Seule la fonction antiblocage est perdue. Soyez plus prudent sur sol mouille ou glissant.

en.question: What does the C0065 fault code mean?
en.answer: The C0065 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with abs return pump — circuit fault. This is a high-severity ABS braking fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a C0065 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will C0065 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

en.question: How much does C0065 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a C0065 fault typically range from around £17 to £1021, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty abs pump, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Laeuft die ABS-Pumpe staendig?
de.answer: Nein, normalerweise laeuft sie nur waehrend einer ABS-Regelung (Notbremsung). Wenn Sie sie haeufig oder staendig hoeren, ist das ein Zeichen fuer einen Defekt.

de.question: Ist das Relais dasselbe wie das der Kraftstoffpumpe?
de.answer: Nein, es ist ein spezielles Relais fuer das ABS-System. Es befindet sich in der Regel im Sicherungskasten unter der Motorhaube. Schlagen Sie im Schaltplan nach, um es zu identifizieren.

de.question: Kann man ohne ABS-Pumpe fahren?
de.answer: Ja, das klassische Bremssystem funktioniert normal. Nur die Antiblockierfunktion geht verloren. Seien Sie auf nassem oder rutschigem Untergrund vorsichtiger.

es.question: La bomba ABS funciona permanentemente?
es.answer: No, normalmente solo funciona durante una intervencion ABS (frenado de emergencia). Si la oye funcionar a menudo o permanentemente, es una senal de averia.

es.question: El rele es el mismo que el de la bomba de combustible?
es.answer: No, es un rele dedicado al sistema ABS. Generalmente se encuentra en la caja de fusibles bajo el capo. Consulte el esquema para identificarlo.

es.question: Se puede circular sin la bomba ABS?
es.answer: Si, el frenado clasico funciona normalmente. Solo se pierde la funcion antibloqueo. Sea mas prudente sobre suelo mojado o resbaladizo.

pt.question: A bomba ABS funciona permanentemente?
pt.answer: Nao, normalmente so funciona durante uma intervencao ABS (travagem de emergencia). Se a ouvir funcionar frequentemente ou permanentemente, e um sinal de avaria.

pt.question: O rele e o mesmo que o da bomba de combustivel?
pt.answer: Nao, e um rele dedicado ao sistema ABS. Encontra-se geralmente na caixa de fusiveis sob o capo. Consulte o esquema para o identificar.

pt.question: Pode-se circular sem a bomba ABS?
pt.answer: Sim, a travagem classica funciona normalmente. Apenas a funcao antibloqueio se perde. Seja mais prudente em piso molhado ou escorregadio.

motFail: Yes, the ABS warning light is checked during the MOT test. If the ABS light is illuminated, this will result in a fail. The ABS system must be functioning correctly to pass.

name.fr: Module airbag conducteur — resistance hors plage
name.en: Driver airbag module — resistance out of range
name.es: Modulo airbag del conductor — resistencia fuera de rango
name.pt: Modulo airbag do condutor — resistencia fora da faixa

description.fr: Le B0001 indique que le calculateur airbag mesure une resistance anormale sur le circuit de l'airbag conducteur, celui qui est dans le volant. La resistance du circuit doit etre dans une plage tres precise pour garantir que l'airbag se deploiera correctement en cas d'accident. Une resistance trop haute peut empecher le deploiement, une resistance trop basse peut provoquer un deploiement involontaire. Le ressort spirale (ou contacteur tournant) dans la colonne de direction est souvent en cause car il s'use avec les rotations du volant. Le connecteur du volant, qui subit des vibrations constantes, peut aussi se desserrer. C'est un code a ne pas ignorer car il affecte directement votre securite passive.
description.en: The B0001 fault code is a serious one — it relates to driver airbag module — resistance out of range in your supplemental restraint system, commonly known as the airbag system. When the airbag warning light is illuminated on your dashboard, it means the airbag control module has detected a fault that could prevent one or more airbags from deploying correctly in a collision. This is obviously a significant safety concern, and while the car is perfectly safe to drive in terms of engine and braking performance, you should be aware that your passive safety protection may be compromised. Common causes include a faulty clock spring behind the steering wheel, a damaged wiring connector under a seat, a worn seat occupancy sensor, or an issue with the airbag module itself. Airbag repairs should always be carried out by a qualified technician because the system contains explosive charges. Never attempt to work on airbag components yourself. A diagnostic scan will identify exactly which part of the system is at fault, and your mechanic can then advise on the repair. The MOT test does check the airbag warning light, so this will need to be resolved before your next test.
description.de: Der B0001 zeigt an, dass das Airbag-Steuergeraet einen abnormalen Widerstand im Stromkreis des Fahrer-Airbags misst, der sich im Lenkrad befindet. Der Widerstand des Stromkreises muss in einem sehr praezisen Bereich liegen, um sicherzustellen, dass der Airbag bei einem Unfall korrekt ausloest. Ein zu hoher Widerstand kann die Ausloesung verhindern, ein zu niedriger Widerstand kann eine unbeabsichtigte Ausloesung verursachen. Die Kontaktspule (Wickelfeder) in der Lenksaeule ist oft die Ursache, da sie sich mit den Lenkradbewegungen abnutzt. Der Lenkradstecker, der staendigen Vibrationen ausgesetzt ist, kann sich ebenfalls lockern. Dieser Code darf nicht ignoriert werden, da er direkt Ihre passive Sicherheit betrifft.
description.es: El B0001 indica que la centralita del airbag mide una resistencia anormal en el circuito del airbag del conductor, el que esta en el volante. La resistencia del circuito debe estar en un rango muy preciso para garantizar que el airbag se despliegue correctamente en caso de accidente. Una resistencia demasiado alta puede impedir el despliegue, una resistencia demasiado baja puede provocar un despliegue involuntario. El muelle espiral (reloj) en la columna de direccion suele ser la causa, ya que se desgasta con las rotaciones del volante. El conector del volante, que sufre vibraciones constantes, tambien puede aflojarse. Es un codigo que no debe ignorarse ya que afecta directamente a su seguridad pasiva.
description.pt: O B0001 indica que a centralina do airbag mede uma resistencia anormal no circuito do airbag do condutor, o que esta no volante. A resistencia do circuito deve estar numa faixa muito precisa para garantir que o airbag se ative corretamente em caso de acidente. Uma resistencia demasiado alta pode impedir a ativacao, uma resistencia demasiado baixa pode provocar uma ativacao involuntaria. A mola espiral (relogio) na coluna de direcao e frequentemente a causa, pois desgasta-se com as rotacoes do volante. O conector do volante, que sofre vibracoes constantes, tambem pode soltar-se. E um codigo que nao deve ser ignorado, pois afeta diretamente a sua seguranca passiva.

en: Horn or steering wheel controls malfunctioning
es: Claxon o mandos del volante defectuosos
pt: Luz de aviso do airbag acesa
Buzina ou comandos do volante com defeito

fr.question: Mon airbag va-t-il se deployer avec ce code ?
fr.answer: Impossible a garantir. Le voyant airbag allume signifie que le systeme a detecte un defaut et que le deploiement normal n'est pas garanti. Faites reparer rapidement.

fr.question: Le ressort spirale, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est un ruban conducteur enroule qui maintient la connexion electrique entre le volant (qui tourne) et la colonne de direction (qui ne tourne pas). Il transmet le courant aux airbags, au klaxon et aux commandes au volant.

fr.question: Est-ce dangereux de rouler avec le voyant airbag ?
fr.answer: Le freinage et la conduite ne sont pas affectes, mais en cas d'accident, l'airbag pourrait ne pas se deployer. C'est un risque pour votre vie et celle de vos passagers.

en.question: What does the B0001 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B0001 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with driver airbag module — resistance out of range. This is a critical-severity airbag safety fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B0001 code?
en.answer: While the car may still run, this is a critical fault and you should drive with extreme caution. Limit your driving to essential journeys only and get to a garage as soon as possible. Continuing to drive could cause further damage or put your safety at risk.

en.question: Will B0001 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

en.question: How much does B0001 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B0001 fault typically range from around £26 to £498, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is clock spring (rotary coupler), but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Wird mein Airbag mit diesem Code ausloesen?
de.answer: Das kann nicht garantiert werden. Die leuchtende Airbag-Warnleuchte bedeutet, dass das System einen Fehler erkannt hat und die normale Ausloesung nicht gewaehrleistet ist. Lassen Sie es schnell reparieren.

de.question: Was ist die Kontaktspule (Wickelfeder)?
de.answer: Es handelt sich um ein aufgerolltes leitendes Band, das die elektrische Verbindung zwischen dem Lenkrad (das sich dreht) und der Lenksaeule (die sich nicht dreht) aufrechthaelt. Es uebertraegt den Strom zu den Airbags, zur Hupe und zu den Lenkradtasten.

de.question: Ist es gefaehrlich, mit der Airbag-Warnleuchte zu fahren?
de.answer: Bremsen und Fahrverhalten sind nicht betroffen, aber bei einem Unfall koennte der Airbag nicht ausloesen. Das ist ein Risiko fuer Ihr Leben und das Ihrer Mitfahrer.

es.question: Mi airbag se desplegara con este codigo?
es.answer: Imposible de garantizar. El testigo de airbag encendido significa que el sistema ha detectado un defecto y que el despliegue normal no esta garantizado. Haga reparar rapidamente.

es.question: Que es el muelle espiral?
es.answer: Es una cinta conductora enrollada que mantiene la conexion electrica entre el volante (que gira) y la columna de direccion (que no gira). Transmite la corriente a los airbags, al claxon y a los mandos del volante.

es.question: Es peligroso circular con el testigo de airbag?
es.answer: La frenada y la conduccion no se ven afectadas, pero en caso de accidente, el airbag podria no desplegarse. Es un riesgo para su vida y la de sus pasajeros.

pt.question: O meu airbag vai disparar com este codigo?
pt.answer: Impossivel de garantir. A luz de aviso do airbag acesa significa que o sistema detetou um defeito e que o acionamento normal nao esta garantido. Faca reparar rapidamente.

pt.question: O que e a mola espiral (relogio)?
pt.answer: E uma fita condutora enrolada que mantem a ligacao eletrica entre o volante (que roda) e a coluna de direcao (que nao roda). Transmite a corrente aos airbags, a buzina e aos comandos do volante.

pt.question: E perigoso conduzir com a luz do airbag acesa?
pt.answer: A travagem e a conducao nao sao afetadas, mas em caso de acidente, o airbag pode nao disparar. E um risco para a sua vida e a dos seus passageiros.

motFail: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

name.fr: Module airbag passager — resistance hors plage
name.en: Passenger airbag module — resistance out of range
name.es: Modulo airbag del pasajero — resistencia fuera de rango
name.pt: Modulo airbag do passageiro — resistencia fora da faixa

description.fr: Le B0002 concerne l'airbag du cote passager, generalement situe dans le tableau de bord. Comme pour le B0001, la resistance du circuit est hors de la plage acceptable. Les causes sont similaires mais le connecteur est different car l'airbag passager n'est pas sur une partie tournante. Le connecteur sous le tableau de bord peut se desserrer avec les vibrations, ou le faisceau peut etre endommage par un objet place sous le siege. Sur certains vehicules avec desactivation d'airbag passager, un contact defaillant de desactivation peut aussi provoquer ce code. Le voyant airbag restera allume tant que le probleme n'est pas resolu.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a B0002 code, indicating a fault with passenger airbag module — resistance out of range in the airbag system. The airbag warning light on your dashboard will be illuminated, signalling that the system may not function as intended in the event of an accident. While this does not affect the drivability of your car, it is a critical safety concern that should be addressed as soon as possible. The airbag system is made up of multiple components — crash sensors, the airbag control module, wiring harnesses, and the airbag units themselves. A fault in any of these can trigger a warning code. Common culprits include damaged wiring under the front seats, a worn clock spring in the steering column, a faulty seat occupancy sensor, or a connector that has become corroded over time. Due to the explosive nature of airbag components, repairs must be carried out by a trained professional. Your mechanic will use a specialist scanner to identify the specific fault and recommend the appropriate repair. Remember that an illuminated airbag light will result in an MOT failure, so this needs attention before your next test date.
description.de: Der B0002 betrifft den Airbag auf der Beifahrerseite, der sich in der Regel im Armaturenbrett befindet. Wie beim B0001 liegt der Widerstand des Stromkreises ausserhalb des zulaessigen Bereichs. Die Ursachen sind aehnlich, aber der Stecker ist anders, da der Beifahrer-Airbag nicht an einem drehenden Teil montiert ist. Der Stecker unter dem Armaturenbrett kann sich durch Vibrationen lockern, oder der Kabelbaum kann durch einen unter dem Sitz abgelegten Gegenstand beschaedigt werden. Bei Fahrzeugen mit Beifahrer-Airbag-Deaktivierung kann ein defekter Deaktivierungskontakt ebenfalls diesen Code ausloesen. Die Airbag-Warnleuchte bleibt an, bis das Problem behoben ist.
description.es: El B0002 se refiere al airbag del lado del pasajero, generalmente situado en el salpicadero. Al igual que el B0001, la resistencia del circuito esta fuera del rango aceptable. Las causas son similares pero el conector es diferente ya que el airbag del pasajero no esta en una parte giratoria. El conector bajo el salpicadero puede aflojarse con las vibraciones, o el cableado puede danarse por un objeto colocado bajo el asiento. En algunos vehiculos con desactivacion de airbag del pasajero, un contacto de desactivacion defectuoso tambien puede provocar este codigo. El testigo de airbag permanecera encendido hasta que se resuelva el problema.
description.pt: O B0002 diz respeito ao airbag do lado do passageiro, geralmente situado no painel de instrumentos. Tal como no B0001, a resistencia do circuito esta fora da faixa aceitavel. As causas sao semelhantes mas o conector e diferente, pois o airbag do passageiro nao esta numa parte rotativa. O conector sob o painel pode soltar-se com as vibracoes, ou a cablagem pode ser danificada por um objeto colocado sob o banco. Em alguns veiculos com desativacao de airbag do passageiro, um contacto de desativacao defeituoso tambem pode provocar este codigo. A luz de aviso do airbag permanecera acesa ate que o problema seja resolvido.

name.pt: Modulo airbag do passageiro com defeito
Conector sob o painel de instrumentos

es: Airbag del pasajero potencialmente no funcional
pt: Luz de aviso do airbag acesa
Airbag do passageiro potencialmente nao funcional

fr.question: Mon passager est-il en danger ?
fr.answer: Si le voyant airbag est allume, l'airbag passager pourrait ne pas se deployer en cas de choc. C'est un risque reel pour le passager avant.

fr.question: Le bouton de desactivation airbag passager est-il en cause ?
fr.answer: C'est possible. Sur les vehicules avec ce bouton (souvent cote boite a gants), un contact defaillant peut fausser la lecture de resistance et allumer le voyant.

fr.question: Faut-il passer au concessionnaire pour l'airbag ?
fr.answer: Pas obligatoirement, mais les systemes airbag sont sensibles et necessitent un diagnostic precis. Un garagiste equipe d'un outil capable de lire les codes SRS peut intervenir.

en.question: What does the B0002 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B0002 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with passenger airbag module — resistance out of range. This is a critical-severity airbag safety fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B0002 code?
en.answer: While the car may still run, this is a critical fault and you should drive with extreme caution. Limit your driving to essential journeys only and get to a garage as soon as possible. Continuing to drive could cause further damage or put your safety at risk.

en.question: Will B0002 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

en.question: How much does B0002 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B0002 fault typically range from around £25 to £519, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty passenger airbag module, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist mein Beifahrer in Gefahr?
de.answer: Wenn die Airbag-Warnleuchte leuchtet, koennte der Beifahrer-Airbag bei einem Aufprall nicht ausloesen. Das ist ein reales Risiko fuer den Beifahrer vorne.

de.question: Kann der Beifahrer-Airbag-Deaktivierungsschalter die Ursache sein?
de.answer: Das ist moeglich. Bei Fahrzeugen mit diesem Schalter (oft auf der Handschuhfachseite) kann ein defekter Kontakt die Widerstandsmessung verfaelschen und die Warnleuchte aktivieren.

de.question: Muss ich zum Vertragshaendler fuer den Airbag?
de.answer: Nicht zwingend, aber Airbagsysteme sind empfindlich und erfordern eine praezise Diagnose. Eine Werkstatt mit einem Diagnosegeraet, das SRS-Codes lesen kann, kann die Reparatur durchfuehren.

es.question: Mi pasajero esta en peligro?
es.answer: Si el testigo de airbag esta encendido, el airbag del pasajero podria no desplegarse en caso de impacto. Es un riesgo real para el pasajero delantero.

es.question: El boton de desactivacion del airbag del pasajero puede ser la causa?
es.answer: Es posible. En los vehiculos con este boton (a menudo en el lado de la guantera), un contacto defectuoso puede falsear la lectura de resistencia y encender el testigo.

es.question: Hay que ir al concesionario para el airbag?
es.answer: No obligatoriamente, pero los sistemas de airbag son sensibles y necesitan un diagnostico preciso. Un taller equipado con una herramienta capaz de leer codigos SRS puede intervenir.

pt.question: O meu passageiro esta em perigo?
pt.answer: Se a luz do airbag esta acesa, o airbag do passageiro pode nao disparar em caso de colisao. E um risco real para o passageiro da frente.

pt.question: O botao de desativacao do airbag do passageiro pode ser a causa?
pt.answer: E possivel. Nos veiculos com este botao (frequentemente do lado do porta-luvas), um contacto defeituoso pode falsear a leitura de resistencia e acender a luz de aviso.

pt.question: E preciso ir ao concessionario para o airbag?
pt.answer: Nao obrigatoriamente, mas os sistemas de airbag sao sensiveis e necessitam de um diagnostico preciso. Uma oficina equipada com uma ferramenta capaz de ler codigos SRS pode intervir.

motFail: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

name.fr: Pretensionneur de ceinture conducteur — circuit defaillant
name.es: Pretensor del cinturon del conductor — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Pre-tensor do cinto do condutor — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B0003 signale un defaut sur le circuit du pretensionneur de ceinture du conducteur. Le pretensionneur est un mecanisme pyrotechnique integre a la ceinture de securite qui resserre brutalement la ceinture au moment d'un choc pour maintenir le conducteur en place avant que l'airbag ne se deploie. Si le circuit est defaillant, le pretensionneur pourrait ne pas se declencher lors d'un accident. Le connecteur sous le siege est souvent en cause car il subit les mouvements du siege et les vibrations. Un objet coince sous le siege peut aussi endommager le cablage. Apres un accident meme mineur, les pretensionneurs qui se sont declenches doivent etre remplaces.
description.en: The B0003 fault code is a serious one — it relates to driver seatbelt pretensioner — circuit fault in your supplemental restraint system, commonly known as the airbag system. When the airbag warning light is illuminated on your dashboard, it means the airbag control module has detected a fault that could prevent one or more airbags from deploying correctly in a collision. This is obviously a significant safety concern, and while the car is perfectly safe to drive in terms of engine and braking performance, you should be aware that your passive safety protection may be compromised. Common causes include a faulty clock spring behind the steering wheel, a damaged wiring connector under a seat, a worn seat occupancy sensor, or an issue with the airbag module itself. Airbag repairs should always be carried out by a qualified technician because the system contains explosive charges. Never attempt to work on airbag components yourself. A diagnostic scan will identify exactly which part of the system is at fault, and your mechanic can then advise on the repair. The MOT test does check the airbag warning light, so this will need to be resolved before your next test.
description.de: Der B0003 meldet einen Fehler im Stromkreis des Gurtstraffers des Fahrers. Der Gurtstraffer ist ein pyrotechnischer Mechanismus im Sicherheitsgurt, der den Gurt beim Aufprall schlagartig strafft, um den Fahrer vor der Airbag-Ausloesung im Sitz zu halten. Wenn der Stromkreis defekt ist, koennte der Gurtstraffer bei einem Unfall nicht ausloesen. Der Stecker unter dem Sitz ist oft die Ursache, da er den Sitzbewegungen und Vibrationen ausgesetzt ist. Ein unter dem Sitz eingeklemmter Gegenstand kann ebenfalls die Verkabelung beschaedigen. Nach einem Unfall, auch einem leichten, muessen ausgeloeste Gurtstraffer ersetzt werden.
description.es: El B0003 senala un defecto en el circuito del pretensor del cinturon del conductor. El pretensor es un mecanismo pirotecnico integrado en el cinturon de seguridad que tensa bruscamente el cinturon en el momento de un impacto para mantener al conductor en su sitio antes de que el airbag se despliegue. Si el circuito esta defectuoso, el pretensor podria no activarse durante un accidente. El conector bajo el asiento suele ser la causa ya que sufre los movimientos del asiento y las vibraciones. Un objeto atrapado bajo el asiento tambien puede danar el cableado. Tras un accidente, incluso leve, los pretensores que se hayan activado deben ser sustituidos.
description.pt: O B0003 assinala um defeito no circuito do pre-tensor do cinto do condutor. O pre-tensor e um mecanismo pirotecnico integrado no cinto de seguranca que aperta bruscamente o cinto no momento de um impacto para manter o condutor no lugar antes do airbag ser acionado. Se o circuito estiver defeituoso, o pre-tensor pode nao ser ativado durante um acidente. O conector sob o banco e frequentemente a causa, pois sofre os movimentos do banco e as vibracoes. Um objeto preso sob o banco tambem pode danificar a cablagem. Apos um acidente, mesmo ligeiro, os pre-tensores que foram ativados devem ser substituidos.

pt: Luz de aviso do airbag acesa

fr.question: C'est quoi un pretensionneur de ceinture ?
fr.answer: C'est un dispositif explosif miniature dans l'enrouleur de ceinture. En cas de choc, il se declenche en quelques millisecondes pour tendre la ceinture et plaquer le conducteur au siege avant le deploiement de l'airbag.

fr.question: Apres un accident, faut-il remplacer le pretensionneur ?
fr.answer: Oui, s'il s'est declenche. C'est un dispositif a usage unique, comme un airbag. Meme si l'accident etait mineur, si le pretensionneur a tire, il doit etre remplace.

fr.question: Un objet sous le siege peut-il causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, une bouteille, un parapluie ou tout objet glisse sous le siege peut pincer ou endommager le connecteur du pretensionneur. Verifiez regulierement sous vos sieges.

en.question: What does the B0003 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B0003 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with driver seatbelt pretensioner — circuit fault. This is a critical-severity airbag safety fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B0003 code?
en.answer: While the car may still run, this is a critical fault and you should drive with extreme caution. Limit your driving to essential journeys only and get to a garage as soon as possible. Continuing to drive could cause further damage or put your safety at risk.

en.question: Will B0003 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

en.question: How much does B0003 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B0003 fault typically range from around £17 to £436, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty seatbelt pretensioner, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was ist ein Gurtstraffer?
de.answer: Es handelt sich um eine miniaturisierte Sprengvorrichtung im Gurtaufroller. Bei einem Aufprall loest er in wenigen Millisekunden aus, um den Gurt zu straffen und den Fahrer vor der Airbag-Ausloesung im Sitz zu halten.

de.question: Muss der Gurtstraffer nach einem Unfall ersetzt werden?
de.answer: Ja, wenn er ausgeloest wurde. Es ist ein Einmalgeraet, wie ein Airbag. Auch wenn der Unfall leicht war — wenn der Gurtstraffer gezuendet hat, muss er ersetzt werden.

de.question: Kann ein Gegenstand unter dem Sitz diesen Code verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, eine Flasche, ein Regenschirm oder jeder unter den Sitz gerutschte Gegenstand kann den Stecker des Gurtstraffers einklemmen oder beschaedigen. Kontrollieren Sie regelmaessig unter Ihren Sitzen.

es.question: Que es un pretensor del cinturon?
es.answer: Es un dispositivo explosivo en miniatura en el enrollador del cinturon. En caso de impacto, se activa en pocos milisegundos para tensar el cinturon y sujetar al conductor en el asiento antes del despliegue del airbag.

es.question: Tras un accidente, hay que sustituir el pretensor?
es.answer: Si, si se ha activado. Es un dispositivo de un solo uso, como un airbag. Incluso si el accidente fue leve, si el pretensor se activo, debe ser sustituido.

es.question: Un objeto bajo el asiento puede causar este codigo?
es.answer: Si, una botella, un paraguas o cualquier objeto deslizado bajo el asiento puede pinzar o danar el conector del pretensor. Revise regularmente debajo de sus asientos.

pt.question: O que e um pre-tensor do cinto?
pt.answer: E um dispositivo explosivo miniaturizado no enrolador do cinto. Em caso de impacto, aciona-se em poucos milissegundos para apertar o cinto e manter o condutor no banco antes do acionamento do airbag.

pt.question: Apos um acidente, e preciso substituir o pre-tensor?
pt.answer: Sim, se tiver sido acionado. E um dispositivo de uso unico, como um airbag. Mesmo que o acidente tenha sido ligeiro, se o pre-tensor disparou, deve ser substituido.

pt.question: Um objeto sob o banco pode causar este codigo?
pt.answer: Sim, uma garrafa, um guarda-chuva ou qualquer objeto que tenha escorregado sob o banco pode prender ou danificar o conector do pre-tensor. Verifique regularmente sob os seus bancos.

motFail: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

name.es: Airbag lateral del conductor — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Airbag lateral do condutor — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B0010 concerne l'airbag lateral du cote conducteur, generalement loge dans le dossier du siege ou dans le montant de portiere. Cet airbag protege le torse et la tete en cas de choc lateral. Le circuit electrique de cet airbag est defaillant — resistance hors plage, circuit ouvert ou court-circuit. Le connecteur sous le siege, qui doit permettre le mouvement du siege tout en maintenant le contact, est une cause frequente de problemes. Les housses de siege montees par-dessus les airbags lateraux peuvent aussi interferer avec le systeme en appuyant sur le connecteur ou en bloquant le deploiement. Ce code desactive le deploiement de l'airbag lateral conducteur.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a B0010 code, indicating a fault with driver side airbag — circuit fault in the airbag system. The airbag warning light on your dashboard will be illuminated, signalling that the system may not function as intended in the event of an accident. While this does not affect the drivability of your car, it is a critical safety concern that should be addressed as soon as possible. The airbag system is made up of multiple components — crash sensors, the airbag control module, wiring harnesses, and the airbag units themselves. A fault in any of these can trigger a warning code. Common culprits include damaged wiring under the front seats, a worn clock spring in the steering column, a faulty seat occupancy sensor, or a connector that has become corroded over time. Due to the explosive nature of airbag components, repairs must be carried out by a trained professional. Your mechanic will use a specialist scanner to identify the specific fault and recommend the appropriate repair. Remember that an illuminated airbag light will result in an MOT failure, so this needs attention before your next test date.
description.de: Der B0010 betrifft den Seitenairbag auf der Fahrerseite, der in der Regel in der Sitzlehne oder in der Tuersaeule untergebracht ist. Dieser Airbag schuetzt den Oberkörper und den Kopf bei einem Seitenaufprall. Der elektrische Stromkreis dieses Airbags ist defekt — Widerstand ausserhalb des Bereichs, offener Stromkreis oder Kurzschluss. Der Stecker unter dem Sitz, der die Sitzbewegung ermoeglichen und gleichzeitig den Kontakt halten muss, ist eine haeufige Problemursache. Sitzbezuege, die ueber den Seitenairbags montiert werden, koennen das System ebenfalls beeintraechtigen, indem sie auf den Stecker druecken oder die Ausloesung blockieren. Dieser Code deaktiviert die Ausloesung des Fahrer-Seitenairbags.
description.es: El B0010 se refiere al airbag lateral del lado del conductor, generalmente alojado en el respaldo del asiento o en el montante de la puerta. Este airbag protege el torso y la cabeza en caso de impacto lateral. El circuito electrico de este airbag esta defectuoso — resistencia fuera de rango, circuito abierto o cortocircuito. El conector bajo el asiento, que debe permitir el movimiento del asiento manteniendo el contacto, es una causa frecuente de problemas. Las fundas de asiento montadas sobre los airbags laterales tambien pueden interferir con el sistema al presionar el conector o bloquear el despliegue. Este codigo desactiva el despliegue del airbag lateral del conductor.
description.pt: O B0010 diz respeito ao airbag lateral do lado do condutor, geralmente alojado no encosto do banco ou no pilar da porta. Este airbag protege o torso e a cabeca em caso de impacto lateral. O circuito eletrico deste airbag esta defeituoso — resistencia fora da faixa, circuito aberto ou curto-circuito. O conector sob o banco, que deve permitir o movimento do banco mantendo o contacto, e uma causa frequente de problemas. As capas de banco montadas sobre os airbags laterais tambem podem interferir com o sistema ao pressionar o conector ou bloquear o acionamento. Este codigo desativa o acionamento do airbag lateral do condutor.

fr.question: Les housses de siege affectent-elles les airbags ?
fr.answer: Oui, des housses non adaptees peuvent bloquer le deploiement de l'airbag lateral ou interferer avec le connecteur. Utilisez uniquement des housses certifiees compatibles airbag.

fr.question: L'airbag lateral protege-t-il la tete ?
fr.answer: Ca depend des modeles. Certains airbags lateraux protegent uniquement le torse, d'autres sont combines avec un airbag rideau pour la tete. Les airbags rideaux sont generalement dans le pavillon.

fr.question: Un choc lateral est-il plus dangereux qu'un choc frontal ?
fr.answer: Oui, car l'espace de deformation est beaucoup plus reduit. C'est pourquoi les airbags lateraux sont essentiels et pourquoi il ne faut pas ignorer ce code.

en.question: What does the B0010 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B0010 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with driver side airbag — circuit fault. This is a critical-severity airbag safety fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B0010 code?
en.answer: While the car may still run, this is a critical fault and you should drive with extreme caution. Limit your driving to essential journeys only and get to a garage as soon as possible. Continuing to drive could cause further damage or put your safety at risk.

en.question: Will B0010 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

en.question: How much does B0010 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B0010 fault typically range from around £26 to £416, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is connector airbag lateral, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Beeintraechtigen Sitzbezuege die Airbags?
de.answer: Ja, nicht angepasste Sitzbezuege koennen die Ausloesung des Seitenairbags blockieren oder den Stecker beeintraechtigen. Verwenden Sie nur Bezuege, die als airbag-kompatibel zertifiziert sind.

de.question: Schuetzt der Seitenairbag auch den Kopf?
de.answer: Das haengt vom Modell ab. Einige Seitenairbags schuetzen nur den Oberkörper, andere sind mit einem Kopfairbag (Curtain-Airbag) kombiniert. Die Kopfairbags befinden sich in der Regel im Dachhimmel.

de.question: Ist ein Seitenaufprall gefaehrlicher als ein Frontalaufprall?
de.answer: Ja, da die Knautschzone deutlich kleiner ist. Deshalb sind Seitenairbags unverzichtbar, und deshalb sollte dieser Code nicht ignoriert werden.

es.question: Las fundas de asiento afectan a los airbags?
es.answer: Si, fundas no adaptadas pueden bloquear el despliegue del airbag lateral o interferir con el conector. Utilice unicamente fundas certificadas como compatibles con airbag.

es.question: El airbag lateral protege la cabeza?
es.answer: Depende de los modelos. Algunos airbags laterales protegen solo el torso, otros estan combinados con un airbag de cortina para la cabeza. Los airbags de cortina se encuentran generalmente en el techo.

es.question: Un impacto lateral es mas peligroso que uno frontal?
es.answer: Si, porque el espacio de deformacion es mucho mas reducido. Por eso los airbags laterales son esenciales y por eso no hay que ignorar este codigo.

pt.question: As capas de banco afetam os airbags?
pt.answer: Sim, capas nao adaptadas podem bloquear o acionamento do airbag lateral ou interferir com o conector. Utilize apenas capas certificadas como compativeis com airbag.

pt.question: O airbag lateral protege a cabeca?
pt.answer: Depende dos modelos. Alguns airbags laterais protegem apenas o torso, outros estao combinados com um airbag de cortina para a cabeca. Os airbags de cortina encontram-se geralmente no tejadilho.

pt.question: Um impacto lateral e mais perigoso do que um frontal?
pt.answer: Sim, porque o espaco de deformacao e muito mais reduzido. E por isso que os airbags laterais sao essenciais e que este codigo nao deve ser ignorado.

motFail: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

name.fr: Capteur de temperature interieure — circuit defaillant
name.es: Sensor de temperatura interior — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de temperatura interior — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B1420 indique que le capteur de temperature a l'interieur de l'habitacle ne fonctionne plus. Ce capteur, souvent situe dans le tableau de bord ou pres du retroviseur interieur, mesure la temperature de l'habitacle pour que la climatisation automatique puisse maintenir la temperature souhaitee. Sans cette information, la climatisation ne peut plus regler automatiquement la puissance de chauffage ou de refroidissement. Elle peut souffler trop chaud ou trop froid de maniere aleatoire. Le capteur lui-meme est un petit composant peu couteux, mais il est parfois difficile d'acces. Un petit ventilateur aspire l'air de l'habitacle pour le faire passer sur le capteur — si ce ventilateur est bloque, le capteur ne mesure pas la bonne temperature.
description.en: The B1420 fault code indicates a problem with interior temperature sensor — circuit fault in your air conditioning system. While A/C faults are not as urgent as engine or brake issues, they can make driving uncomfortable, especially during warmer months. Your car's climate control system uses a network of sensors to monitor interior and exterior temperatures, refrigerant pressure, and compressor operation. When one of these sensors or components develops a fault, the system may not regulate temperature properly, the A/C might blow only warm air, or it might cut out intermittently. Common causes include a faulty temperature sensor, a refrigerant leak, a worn compressor clutch, or a clogged condenser. A garage equipped with A/C diagnostic tools can identify the specific issue quickly. Many A/C repairs are quite affordable — a sensor replacement or a re-gas might be all that is needed. More significant repairs like compressor replacement cost more, but they are still manageable. While this fault will not cause your car to fail its MOT directly, having a properly functioning climate control system makes for much more pleasant driving, particularly during the British summer and winter months.
description.de: Der B1420 zeigt an, dass der Temperatursensor im Fahrzeuginnenraum nicht mehr funktioniert. Dieser Sensor, oft im Armaturenbrett oder in der Naehe des Innenspiegels verbaut, misst die Innenraumtemperatur, damit die automatische Klimaanlage die gewuenschte Temperatur halten kann. Ohne diese Information kann die Klimaanlage die Heiz- oder Kuehlleistung nicht mehr automatisch regeln. Sie kann zufaellig zu heiss oder zu kalt blasen. Der Sensor selbst ist ein kleines, kostenguenstiges Bauteil, aber er ist manchmal schwer zugaenglich. Ein kleiner Ventilator saugt die Innenraumluft an, um sie ueber den Sensor zu fuehren — wenn dieser Ventilator blockiert ist, misst der Sensor nicht die richtige Temperatur.
description.es: El B1420 indica que el sensor de temperatura del interior del habitaculo ya no funciona. Este sensor, a menudo situado en el salpicadero o cerca del retrovisor interior, mide la temperatura del habitaculo para que el aire acondicionado automatico pueda mantener la temperatura deseada. Sin esta informacion, el aire acondicionado no puede regular automaticamente la potencia de calefaccion o refrigeracion. Puede soplar demasiado caliente o demasiado frio de manera aleatoria. El sensor en si es un componente pequeno y poco costoso, pero a veces es dificil de acceder. Un pequeno ventilador aspira el aire del habitaculo para hacerlo pasar por el sensor — si este ventilador esta bloqueado, el sensor no mide la temperatura correcta.
description.pt: O B1420 indica que o sensor de temperatura no interior do habitaculo ja nao funciona. Este sensor, frequentemente situado no painel de instrumentos ou perto do espelho retrovisor interior, mede a temperatura do habitaculo para que o ar condicionado automatico possa manter a temperatura desejada. Sem esta informacao, o ar condicionado nao pode regular automaticamente a potencia de aquecimento ou arrefecimento. Pode soprar demasiado quente ou demasiado frio de forma aleatoria. O sensor em si e um componente pequeno e pouco dispendioso, mas por vezes e dificil de aceder. Um pequeno ventilador aspira o ar do habitaculo para o fazer passar pelo sensor — se este ventilador estiver bloqueado, o sensor nao mede a temperatura correta.

es: Posible codigo de fallo de climatizacion
pt: Possivel codigo de avaria de climatizacao

fr.question: Ma clim souffle tantot chaud tantot froid, est-ce ca ?
fr.answer: C'est probable. Sans la mesure de temperature interieure, la climatisation ne sait pas si elle doit chauffer ou refroidir et fait des corrections erratiques.

fr.question: Le ventilateur du capteur, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est un minuscule ventilateur integre au capteur qui aspire l'air de l'habitacle pour une mesure representative. S'il est bloque par la poussiere, le capteur mesure sa propre temperature au lieu de celle de l'air.

fr.question: Puis-je utiliser la clim en mode manuel ?
fr.answer: Oui, le mode manuel fonctionne independamment du capteur. Vous regler la vitesse de ventilation et la temperature vous-meme. Seul le mode automatique est affecte.

en.question: What does the B1420 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B1420 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with interior temperature sensor — circuit fault. This is a low-severity air conditioning fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B1420 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will B1420 fail my MOT?
en.answer: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

en.question: How much does B1420 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B1420 fault typically range from around £13 to £83, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is cabin temperature sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Meine Klimaanlage blaest mal heiss, mal kalt — liegt es daran?
de.answer: Das ist wahrscheinlich. Ohne die Innenraumtemperaturmessung weiss die Klimaanlage nicht, ob sie heizen oder kuehlen soll, und macht fehlerhafte Korrekturen.

de.question: Was ist der Ventilator des Sensors?
de.answer: Es handelt sich um einen winzigen, in den Sensor integrierten Ventilator, der die Innenraumluft fuer eine repraesentative Messung ansaugt. Wenn er durch Staub blockiert ist, misst der Sensor seine eigene Temperatur statt der Lufttemperatur.

de.question: Kann ich die Klimaanlage im manuellen Modus nutzen?
de.answer: Ja, der manuelle Modus funktioniert unabhaengig vom Sensor. Sie stellen die Geblaesestufe und die Temperatur selbst ein. Nur der Automatik-Modus ist betroffen.

es.question: Mi climatizacion sopla a veces caliente y a veces frio, es esto?
es.answer: Es probable. Sin la medicion de la temperatura interior, el aire acondicionado no sabe si debe calentar o enfriar y hace correcciones erraticas.

es.question: Que es el ventilador del sensor?
es.answer: Es un ventilador diminuto integrado en el sensor que aspira el aire del habitaculo para una medicion representativa. Si esta bloqueado por el polvo, el sensor mide su propia temperatura en lugar de la del aire.

es.question: Puedo usar el aire acondicionado en modo manual?
es.answer: Si, el modo manual funciona independientemente del sensor. Usted ajusta la velocidad de ventilacion y la temperatura por si mismo. Solo el modo automatico esta afectado.

pt.question: O meu ar condicionado sopra ora quente ora frio, e isto?
pt.answer: E provavel. Sem a medicao da temperatura interior, o ar condicionado nao sabe se deve aquecer ou arrefecer e faz correcoes erraticas.

pt.question: O que e o ventilador do sensor?
pt.answer: E um ventilador minusculo integrado no sensor que aspira o ar do habitaculo para uma medicao representativa. Se estiver bloqueado pelo po, o sensor mede a sua propria temperatura em vez da do ar.

pt.question: Posso usar o ar condicionado em modo manual?
pt.answer: Sim, o modo manual funciona independentemente do sensor. Ajusta a velocidade de ventilacao e a temperatura por si mesmo. Apenas o modo automatico e afetado.

motFail: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

name.fr: Capteur de temperature exterieure — circuit defaillant
name.es: Sensor de temperatura exterior — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de temperatura exterior — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B1440 concerne le capteur de temperature exterieure, situe generalement derriere le pare-chocs avant ou pres du retroviseur. Ce capteur indique la temperature de l'air ambiant, information utilisee par la climatisation pour anticiper les besoins de refroidissement ou de chauffage. Il est aussi utilise pour l'affichage de la temperature exterieure au tableau de bord et pour les alertes de verglas. Un capteur defaillant affiche souvent une temperature absurde comme -40 degres ou +80 degres. Le capteur est expose aux projections d'eau et de sel, ce qui accelere sa corrosion. L'impact sur la conduite est nul mais le confort climatique est degrade.
description.en: Your car has logged a B1440 code related to exterior temperature sensor — circuit fault in the climate control system. The air conditioning in modern vehicles is managed by a dedicated module that reads temperature and pressure sensors to maintain your chosen cabin temperature. When one of these sensors sends an abnormal signal, the system may not work correctly — you might find the A/C blowing warm air, the fan behaving oddly, or the system switching itself off. This kind of fault is usually down to a sensor failure, a wiring issue, or a problem with the refrigerant charge. A qualified technician can diagnose the issue using a combination of OBD2 scanning and manual checks on the A/C system pressure and component function. Repairs are typically straightforward and can range from a simple sensor swap to an A/C system re-gas or, in more serious cases, compressor replacement. While an A/C fault will not make your car unsafe to drive or cause an MOT failure, it can be a real nuisance, especially in extreme weather. Getting it fixed will restore your comfort and help keep the windscreen clear during winter, which is important for safe driving.
description.de: Der B1440 betrifft den Aussentemperatursensor, der sich in der Regel hinter dem vorderen Stossfaenger oder in der Naehe des Aussenspiegels befindet. Dieser Sensor zeigt die Umgebungslufttemperatur an, eine Information, die von der Klimaanlage genutzt wird, um den Kuehl- oder Heizbedarf vorherzusehen. Er wird auch fuer die Anzeige der Aussentemperatur am Armaturenbrett und fuer Glatteiswarnungen verwendet. Ein defekter Sensor zeigt oft eine absurde Temperatur wie -40 Grad oder +80 Grad an. Der Sensor ist Wasser- und Salzspritzern ausgesetzt, was seine Korrosion beschleunigt. Die Auswirkung auf das Fahren ist null, aber der Klimakomfort ist beeintraechtigt.
description.es: El B1440 se refiere al sensor de temperatura exterior, generalmente situado detras del parachoques delantero o cerca del retrovisor. Este sensor indica la temperatura del aire ambiente, informacion utilizada por el aire acondicionado para anticipar las necesidades de refrigeracion o calefaccion. Tambien se utiliza para mostrar la temperatura exterior en el salpicadero y para las alertas de hielo. Un sensor defectuoso muestra a menudo una temperatura absurda como -40 grados o +80 grados. El sensor esta expuesto a salpicaduras de agua y sal, lo que acelera su corrosion. El impacto en la conduccion es nulo pero el confort climatico se degrada.
description.pt: O B1440 diz respeito ao sensor de temperatura exterior, geralmente situado atras do para-choques dianteiro ou perto do espelho retrovisor. Este sensor indica a temperatura do ar ambiente, informacao utilizada pelo ar condicionado para antecipar as necessidades de arrefecimento ou aquecimento. Tambem e utilizado para a exibicao da temperatura exterior no painel de instrumentos e para os alertas de gelo. Um sensor defeituoso apresenta frequentemente uma temperatura absurda como -40 graus ou +80 graus. O sensor esta exposto a projecoes de agua e sal, o que acelera a sua corrosao. O impacto na conducao e nulo mas o conforto climatico e degradado.

fr: Temperature exterieure aberrante au tableau de bord
es: Temperatura exterior aberrante en el salpicadero
pt: Temperatura exterior aberrante no painel de instrumentos

fr.question: Mon afficheur indique -40 degres en plein ete, est-ce le capteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est typique d'un capteur ou d'un cablage en circuit ouvert. Le calculateur affiche la valeur par defaut la plus basse.

fr.question: Le capteur est-il derriere le pare-chocs ?
fr.answer: Generalement oui, derriere la grille ou le pare-chocs avant. Il doit etre a l'abri du soleil direct et du rayonnement moteur pour mesurer l'air ambiant reel.

fr.question: L'alerte verglas depend-elle de ce capteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, l'alerte verglas (generalement a 3 degres) utilise ce capteur. Si le capteur est HS, vous ne recevrez pas d'alerte et ne verrez pas la temperature exterieure reelle.

en.question: What does the B1440 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B1440 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with exterior temperature sensor — circuit fault. This is a low-severity air conditioning fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B1440 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will B1440 fail my MOT?
en.answer: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

en.question: How much does B1440 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B1440 fault typically range from around £8 to £87, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is exterior temperature sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Mein Display zeigt -40 Grad im Hochsommer — ist es der Sensor?
de.answer: Ja, das ist typisch fuer einen Sensor oder eine Verkabelung mit offenem Stromkreis. Das Steuergeraet zeigt den niedrigsten Standardwert an.

de.question: Sitzt der Sensor hinter dem Stossfaenger?
de.answer: In der Regel ja, hinter dem Gitter oder dem vorderen Stossfaenger. Er muss vor direkter Sonneneinstrahlung und Motorwaerme geschuetzt sein, um die tatsaechliche Umgebungslufttemperatur zu messen.

de.question: Haengt die Glatteiswarnung von diesem Sensor ab?
de.answer: Ja, die Glatteiswarnung (in der Regel bei 3 Grad) nutzt diesen Sensor. Wenn der Sensor defekt ist, erhalten Sie keine Warnung und sehen nicht die tatsaechliche Aussentemperatur.

es.question: Mi pantalla indica -40 grados en pleno verano, es el sensor?
es.answer: Si, es tipico de un sensor o un cableado en circuito abierto. La centralita muestra el valor por defecto mas bajo.

es.question: El sensor esta detras del parachoques?
es.answer: Generalmente si, detras de la rejilla o del parachoques delantero. Debe estar protegido del sol directo y de la radiacion del motor para medir la temperatura real del aire ambiente.

es.question: La alerta de hielo depende de este sensor?
es.answer: Si, la alerta de hielo (generalmente a 3 grados) utiliza este sensor. Si el sensor esta averiado, no recibira alerta y no vera la temperatura exterior real.

pt.question: O meu ecra indica -40 graus em pleno verao, e o sensor?
pt.answer: Sim, e tipico de um sensor ou de uma cablagem em circuito aberto. A centralina apresenta o valor por defeito mais baixo.

pt.question: O sensor esta atras do para-choques?
pt.answer: Geralmente sim, atras da grelha ou do para-choques dianteiro. Deve estar protegido da exposicao direta ao sol e da radiacao do motor para medir a temperatura real do ar ambiente.

pt.question: O alerta de gelo depende deste sensor?
pt.answer: Sim, o alerta de gelo (geralmente a 3 graus) utiliza este sensor. Se o sensor estiver avariado, nao recebera alerta e nao vera a temperatura exterior real.

motFail: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

name.es: Compresor del aire acondicionado — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Compressor do ar condicionado — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B1450 signale un probleme electrique sur le circuit de commande du compresseur de climatisation. Le compresseur est le coeur du systeme de refroidissement — il comprime le gaz refrigerant pour creer le froid. Si le circuit de commande est defaillant, le compresseur ne s'enclenche pas et la climatisation ne refroidit plus. Les causes electriques incluent un fusible grille, un relais defaillant, un cablage coupe ou l'embrayage electromagnetique du compresseur qui est grille. Le pressostat (capteur de pression du circuit de clim) peut aussi couper le compresseur si la pression est anormale. Une fuite de gaz refrigerant qui fait chuter la pression est une cause indirecte tres frequente.
description.en: The B1450 fault code indicates a problem with a/c compressor — circuit fault in your air conditioning system. While A/C faults are not as urgent as engine or brake issues, they can make driving uncomfortable, especially during warmer months. Your car's climate control system uses a network of sensors to monitor interior and exterior temperatures, refrigerant pressure, and compressor operation. When one of these sensors or components develops a fault, the system may not regulate temperature properly, the A/C might blow only warm air, or it might cut out intermittently. Common causes include a faulty temperature sensor, a refrigerant leak, a worn compressor clutch, or a clogged condenser. A garage equipped with A/C diagnostic tools can identify the specific issue quickly. Many A/C repairs are quite affordable — a sensor replacement or a re-gas might be all that is needed. More significant repairs like compressor replacement cost more, but they are still manageable. While this fault will not cause your car to fail its MOT directly, having a properly functioning climate control system makes for much more pleasant driving, particularly during the British summer and winter months.
description.de: Der B1450 meldet ein elektrisches Problem im Steuerkreis des Klimakompressors. Der Kompressor ist das Herzstueck des Kuehlsystems — er verdichtet das Kaeltemittel, um die Kaelte zu erzeugen. Wenn der Steuerkreis defekt ist, schaltet sich der Kompressor nicht ein und die Klimaanlage kuehlt nicht mehr. Elektrische Ursachen sind eine durchgebrannte Sicherung, ein defektes Relais, ein durchtrennte Verkabelung oder die durchgebrannte elektromagnetische Kupplung des Kompressors. Der Druckschalter (Drucksensor des Klimakreislaufs) kann den Kompressor ebenfalls abschalten, wenn der Druck abnormal ist. Ein Kaeltemittelleck, das den Druck senkt, ist eine sehr haeufige indirekte Ursache.
description.es: El B1450 senala un problema electrico en el circuito de mando del compresor del aire acondicionado. El compresor es el corazon del sistema de refrigeracion — comprime el gas refrigerante para crear el frio. Si el circuito de mando esta defectuoso, el compresor no se activa y el aire acondicionado ya no enfria. Las causas electricas incluyen un fusible fundido, un rele defectuoso, un cableado cortado o el embrague electromagnetico del compresor quemado. El presostato (sensor de presion del circuito de climatizacion) tambien puede cortar el compresor si la presion es anormal. Una fuga de gas refrigerante que hace bajar la presion es una causa indirecta muy frecuente.
description.pt: O B1450 assinala um problema eletrico no circuito de comando do compressor do ar condicionado. O compressor e o coracao do sistema de arrefecimento — comprime o gas refrigerante para criar o frio. Se o circuito de comando estiver defeituoso, o compressor nao se liga e o ar condicionado ja nao arrefece. As causas eletricas incluem um fusivel queimado, um rele defeituoso, uma cablagem cortada ou a embraiagem eletromagnetica do compressor queimada. O pressostato (sensor de pressao do circuito de climatizacao) tambem pode cortar o compressor se a pressao for anormal. Uma fuga de gas refrigerante que faz baixar a pressao e uma causa indireta muito frequente.

es: El aire acondicionado ya no enfria
pt: O ar condicionado ja nao arrefece

fr.question: La clim ne fait plus de froid, est-ce ce code ?
fr.answer: Si le voyant de clim s'allume mais que l'air n'est pas froid et que le compresseur ne s'enclenche pas (pas de clic sous le capot), c'est une piste serieuse.

fr.question: Comment verifier si le compresseur s'enclenche ?
fr.answer: Moteur tournant, activez la climatisation et regardez l'embrayage du compresseur sous le capot. Vous devriez voir le plateau central tourner avec la poulie. Si seule la poulie tourne, l'embrayage ne s'enclenche pas.

fr.question: Le manque de gaz peut-il empecher le compresseur de tourner ?
fr.answer: Oui, le pressostat coupe le compresseur si la pression est trop basse (pas assez de gaz) ou trop haute. C'est une protection pour eviter d'endommager le compresseur.

en.question: What does the B1450 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B1450 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with a/c compressor — circuit fault. This is a low-severity air conditioning fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B1450 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will B1450 fail my MOT?
en.answer: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

en.question: How much does B1450 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B1450 fault typically range from around £9 to £414, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is blown compressor clutch, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Die Klimaanlage macht keinen kalten Wind mehr — ist das dieser Code?
de.answer: Wenn die Klima-Kontrollleuchte aufleuchtet, die Luft aber nicht kalt ist und der Kompressor sich nicht einschaltet (kein Klicken unter der Haube), ist das ein ernsthafter Hinweis.

de.question: Wie pruefe ich, ob der Kompressor sich einschaltet?
de.answer: Bei laufendem Motor die Klimaanlage aktivieren und die Kompressorkupplung unter der Haube beobachten. Sie sollten sehen, wie die Mittelscheibe mit der Riemenscheibe dreht. Wenn nur die Riemenscheibe dreht, schaltet die Kupplung nicht ein.

de.question: Kann Kaeltemittelmangel den Kompressor am Laufen hindern?
de.answer: Ja, der Druckschalter schaltet den Kompressor ab, wenn der Druck zu niedrig (zu wenig Kaeltemittel) oder zu hoch ist. Das ist ein Schutz, um Schaeden am Kompressor zu vermeiden.

es.question: El aire acondicionado ya no enfria, es este codigo?
es.answer: Si el testigo del aire acondicionado se enciende pero el aire no esta frio y el compresor no se activa (sin clic bajo el capo), es una pista seria.

es.question: Como verificar si el compresor se activa?
es.answer: Con el motor en marcha, active el aire acondicionado y observe el embrague del compresor bajo el capo. Deberia ver el plato central girar con la polea. Si solo gira la polea, el embrague no se activa.

es.question: La falta de gas puede impedir que el compresor funcione?
es.answer: Si, el presostato corta el compresor si la presion es demasiado baja (poco gas) o demasiado alta. Es una proteccion para evitar danar el compresor.

pt.question: O ar condicionado ja nao faz frio, e este codigo?
pt.answer: Se a luz de controlo do ar condicionado se acende mas o ar nao esta frio e o compressor nao se liga (sem clique sob o capo), e uma pista seria.

pt.question: Como verificar se o compressor se liga?
pt.answer: Com o motor a trabalhar, ative o ar condicionado e observe a embraiagem do compressor sob o capo. Devera ver o prato central a rodar com a polia. Se apenas a polia rodar, a embraiagem nao se liga.

pt.question: A falta de gas pode impedir o compressor de funcionar?
pt.answer: Sim, o pressostato corta o compressor se a pressao for demasiado baixa (pouco gas) ou demasiado alta. E uma protecao para evitar danificar o compressor.

motFail: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

name.fr: Bus CAN haute vitesse — aucune communication
name.es: Bus CAN de alta velocidad — sin comunicacion
