name.pt: Barramento CAN de alta velocidade — sem comunicacao

description.fr: Le U0001 est un code reseau grave qui indique une perte totale de communication sur le bus CAN haute vitesse. Le bus CAN est le systeme nerveux du vehicule — un reseau qui relie tous les calculateurs entre eux. Sans communication CAN, les calculateurs ne peuvent plus echanger d'informations et de nombreux systemes tombent en panne simultanement. Les causes sont souvent physiques : un fil du bus CAN coupe, un connecteur debranche, ou un calculateur en court-circuit qui tire le bus vers le bas et bloque toutes les communications. Un court-circuit d'un seul calculateur peut bloquer tout le reseau. Le diagnostic necessite un oscilloscope pour visualiser le signal CAN et identifier le noeud defaillant.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a U0001 fault code, indicating high-speed can bus — no communication, a problem on the vehicle's CAN bus communication network. Think of the CAN bus as the nervous system of your car — it allows all the different electronic control units to talk to each other and share vital information. When this communication breaks down, it can affect multiple systems simultaneously. You might notice several warning lights appearing at once, instruments behaving erratically, or certain functions becoming unresponsive. The root cause could be a physical wiring problem — a broken wire, a corroded connector, or water ingress into a plug. It could also be a failed electronic module dragging down the entire network, or a software mismatch between modules. A skilled auto electrician or diagnostic specialist can use an oscilloscope and advanced scanner to examine the CAN bus signals and isolate the fault. Repairs might be as simple as fixing a damaged connector, or they could involve replacing a faulty control module. These issues are best addressed promptly, as a degraded communication network can lead to unpredictable behaviour from safety-critical systems like the ABS or airbag.
description.de: Der U0001 ist ein schwerwiegender Netzwerkfehlercode, der auf einen vollstaendigen Kommunikationsverlust auf dem Hochgeschwindigkeits-CAN-Bus hinweist. Der CAN-Bus ist das Nervensystem des Fahrzeugs — ein Netzwerk, das alle Steuergeraete miteinander verbindet. Ohne CAN-Kommunikation koennen die Steuergeraete keine Informationen mehr austauschen und zahlreiche Systeme fallen gleichzeitig aus. Die Ursachen sind oft physischer Natur: ein durchtrennter CAN-Bus-Draht, ein abgezogener Stecker oder ein kurzgeschlossenes Steuergeraet, das den Bus auf Masse zieht und alle Kommunikationen blockiert. Ein Kurzschluss eines einzigen Steuergeraets kann das gesamte Netzwerk lahmlegen. Die Diagnose erfordert ein Oszilloskop, um das CAN-Signal zu visualisieren und den fehlerhaften Knoten zu identifizieren.
description.es: El U0001 es un codigo de red grave que indica una perdida total de comunicacion en el bus CAN de alta velocidad. El bus CAN es el sistema nervioso del vehiculo — una red que conecta todas las centralitas entre si. Sin comunicacion CAN, las centralitas no pueden intercambiar informacion y numerosos sistemas fallan simultaneamente. Las causas suelen ser fisicas: un cable del bus CAN cortado, un conector desconectado o una centralita en cortocircuito que tira del bus a masa y bloquea todas las comunicaciones. Un cortocircuito de una sola centralita puede bloquear toda la red. El diagnostico requiere un osciloscopio para visualizar la senal CAN e identificar el nodo defectuoso.
description.pt: O U0001 e um codigo de rede grave que indica uma perda total de comunicacao no barramento CAN de alta velocidade. O barramento CAN e o sistema nervoso do veiculo — uma rede que liga todas as centralinas entre si. Sem comunicacao CAN, as centralinas nao conseguem trocar informacoes e numerosos sistemas falham simultaneamente. As causas sao frequentemente fisicas: um fio do barramento CAN cortado, um conector desligado ou uma centralina em curto-circuito que puxa o barramento para a massa e bloqueia todas as comunicacoes. Um curto-circuito de uma unica centralina pode bloquear toda a rede. O diagnostico requer um osciloscopio para visualizar o sinal CAN e identificar o no defeituoso.

name.fr: Fil CAN coupe ou connecteur debranche
name.en: Cut CAN wire or disconnected connector
name.es: Cable CAN cortado o conector desconectado
name.pt: Fio CAN cortado ou conector desligado

fr.question: Tous mes voyants se sont allumes d'un coup, est-ce le CAN ?
fr.answer: C'est une possibilite serieuse. Un probleme de bus CAN provoque la perte de communication entre les calculateurs, ce qui allume des voyants partout car chaque module signale qu'il ne peut plus communiquer.

fr.question: Un seul calculateur peut-il bloquer tout le reseau ?
fr.answer: Oui, le bus CAN est un reseau partage. Si un calculateur a un court-circuit interne et tire le bus a la masse, toutes les communications s'arretent. C'est comme un telephone decroche qui bloque la ligne.

fr.question: Comment diagnostiquer un probleme CAN ?
fr.answer: Il faut un oscilloscope ou un analyseur CAN pour visualiser les signaux. On debranche les calculateurs un par un pour identifier lequel bloque le bus. C'est un diagnostic specialise.

en.question: What does the U0001 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0001 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with high-speed can bus — no communication. This is a critical-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0001 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will U0001 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

en.question: How much does U0001 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a U0001 fault typically range from around £9 to £879, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is cut can wire or disconnected connector, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Alle meine Warnleuchten sind auf einmal angegangen, liegt es am CAN-Bus?
de.answer: Das ist eine ernsthafte Moeglichkeit. Ein CAN-Bus-Problem verursacht den Kommunikationsverlust zwischen den Steuergeraeten, was ueberall Warnleuchten aktiviert, da jedes Modul meldet, dass es nicht mehr kommunizieren kann.

de.question: Kann ein einzelnes Steuergeraet das gesamte Netzwerk blockieren?
de.answer: Ja, der CAN-Bus ist ein gemeinsam genutztes Netzwerk. Wenn ein Steuergeraet einen internen Kurzschluss hat und den Bus auf Masse zieht, stoppen alle Kommunikationen. Es ist wie ein abgehobener Telefonhoerer, der die Leitung blockiert.

de.question: Wie diagnostiziert man ein CAN-Bus-Problem?
de.answer: Man benoetigt ein Oszilloskop oder einen CAN-Analysator, um die Signale zu visualisieren. Die Steuergeraete werden nacheinander abgeklemmt, um herauszufinden, welches den Bus blockiert. Das ist eine spezialisierte Diagnose.

es.question: Todos mis testigos se han encendido de golpe, es el CAN?
es.answer: Es una posibilidad seria. Un problema del bus CAN provoca la perdida de comunicacion entre las centralitas, lo que enciende testigos por todas partes porque cada modulo senala que ya no puede comunicarse.

es.question: Una sola centralita puede bloquear toda la red?
es.answer: Si, el bus CAN es una red compartida. Si una centralita tiene un cortocircuito interno y tira del bus a masa, todas las comunicaciones se detienen. Es como un telefono descolgado que bloquea la linea.

es.question: Como se diagnostica un problema de CAN?
es.answer: Se necesita un osciloscopio o un analizador CAN para visualizar las senales. Se desconectan las centralitas una por una para identificar cual bloquea el bus. Es un diagnostico especializado.

pt.question: Todas as minhas luzes de aviso acenderam de uma vez, sera o CAN?
pt.answer: E uma possibilidade seria. Um problema no barramento CAN provoca a perda de comunicacao entre as centralinas, o que acende luzes de aviso por todo o lado porque cada modulo sinaliza que ja nao consegue comunicar.

pt.question: Uma unica centralina pode bloquear toda a rede?
pt.answer: Sim, o barramento CAN e uma rede partilhada. Se uma centralina tiver um curto-circuito interno e puxar o barramento para a massa, todas as comunicacoes param. E como um telefone fora do gancho que bloqueia a linha.

pt.question: Como se diagnostica um problema de CAN?
pt.answer: E necessario um osciloscopio ou um analisador CAN para visualizar os sinais. Desligam-se as centralinas uma a uma para identificar qual esta a bloquear o barramento. E um diagnostico especializado.

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

name.fr: Perte de communication avec le calculateur moteur
name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con la centralita del motor
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com a centralina do motor

description.fr: Le U0100 signale que le calculateur de bord ne recoit plus de communication du calculateur moteur (ECM) via le bus CAN. Le calculateur moteur est le module le plus important du vehicule et sa perte de communication affecte de nombreux systemes. Le tableau de bord n'affiche plus le regime moteur ni la vitesse, la boite automatique ne change plus correctement les rapports et les systemes de securite peuvent etre degrades. Les causes incluent un probleme d'alimentation du calculateur moteur, un connecteur debranche, un defaut du bus CAN entre le calculateur et le reste du reseau, ou le calculateur moteur lui-meme qui est en panne. C'est un code critique qui necessite un diagnostic professionnel.
description.en: The U0100 fault code relates to lost communication with engine ecu, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.
description.de: Der U0100 zeigt an, dass das Bordsteuergeraet keine Kommunikation mehr vom Motorsteuergeraet (ECM) ueber den CAN-Bus empfaengt. Das Motorsteuergeraet ist das wichtigste Modul des Fahrzeugs und sein Kommunikationsverlust beeintraechtigt zahlreiche Systeme. Das Armaturenbrett zeigt weder Drehzahl noch Geschwindigkeit an, das Automatikgetriebe schaltet nicht mehr korrekt und die Sicherheitssysteme koennen beeintraechtigt sein. Zu den Ursachen gehoeren ein Stromversorgungsproblem des Motorsteuergeraets, ein abgezogener Stecker, ein CAN-Bus-Fehler zwischen dem Steuergeraet und dem restlichen Netzwerk oder das Motorsteuergeraet selbst, das defekt ist. Dies ist ein kritischer Code, der eine professionelle Diagnose erfordert.
description.es: El U0100 indica que la centralita de a bordo ya no recibe comunicacion de la centralita del motor (ECM) a traves del bus CAN. La centralita del motor es el modulo mas importante del vehiculo y su perdida de comunicacion afecta a numerosos sistemas. El cuadro de instrumentos ya no muestra las revoluciones ni la velocidad, la caja automatica ya no cambia correctamente de marcha y los sistemas de seguridad pueden verse degradados. Las causas incluyen un problema de alimentacion de la centralita del motor, un conector desconectado, un defecto del bus CAN entre la centralita y el resto de la red, o la propia centralita del motor que esta averiada. Es un codigo critico que requiere un diagnostico profesional.
description.pt: O U0100 indica que a centralina de bordo ja nao recebe comunicacao da centralina do motor (ECM) atraves do barramento CAN. A centralina do motor e o modulo mais importante do veiculo e a sua perda de comunicacao afeta numerosos sistemas. O painel de instrumentos ja nao mostra as rotacoes nem a velocidade, a caixa automatica ja nao muda correctamente de velocidade e os sistemas de seguranca podem ficar degradados. As causas incluem um problema de alimentacao da centralina do motor, um conector desligado, um defeito no barramento CAN entre a centralina e o resto da rede, ou a propria centralina do motor que esta avariada. E um codigo critico que requer um diagnostico profissional.

name.es: Alimentacion de la centralita del motor

fr: Aucune info moteur au tableau de bord
es: Ninguna informacion del motor en el cuadro de instrumentos
pt: Nenhuma informacao do motor no painel de instrumentos

fr.question: Mon tableau de bord est mort mais le moteur tourne, est-ce le U0100 ?
fr.answer: C'est tres probable. Le tableau de bord recoit les informations du moteur via le bus CAN. Si le calculateur moteur ne communique plus, le tableau de bord n'a rien a afficher.

fr.question: Le moteur peut-il tourner sans communiquer ?
fr.answer: Oui, le calculateur moteur peut fonctionner de maniere autonome pour l'injection et l'allumage. Mais sans communication CAN, il ne peut pas informer les autres modules de ce qu'il fait.

fr.question: Est-ce forcement le calculateur moteur qui est mort ?
fr.answer: Non, ca peut etre un probleme de bus CAN entre le calculateur et le reste du vehicule. Un fil coupe, un connecteur oxyde ou une resistance de terminaison absente sont des causes plus simples et moins couteuses.

en.question: What does the U0100 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0100 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with lost communication with engine ecu. This is a critical-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0100 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will U0100 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

en.question: How much does U0100 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a U0100 fault typically range from around £17 to £1651, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is engine ecu power supply, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Mein Armaturenbrett ist tot, aber der Motor laeuft, ist es der U0100?
de.answer: Das ist sehr wahrscheinlich. Das Armaturenbrett empfaengt die Motorinformationen ueber den CAN-Bus. Wenn das Motorsteuergeraet nicht mehr kommuniziert, hat das Armaturenbrett nichts anzuzeigen.

de.question: Kann der Motor laufen, ohne zu kommunizieren?
de.answer: Ja, das Motorsteuergeraet kann autonom fuer Einspritzung und Zuendung arbeiten. Aber ohne CAN-Kommunikation kann es die anderen Module nicht ueber seine Aktivitaeten informieren.

de.question: Ist zwangslaeufig das Motorsteuergeraet defekt?
de.answer: Nein, es kann ein CAN-Bus-Problem zwischen dem Steuergeraet und dem restlichen Fahrzeug sein. Ein durchtrennter Draht, ein oxidierter Stecker oder ein fehlender Abschlusswiderstand sind einfachere und guenstigere Ursachen.

es.question: Mi cuadro de instrumentos esta muerto pero el motor funciona, es el U0100?
es.answer: Es muy probable. El cuadro de instrumentos recibe la informacion del motor a traves del bus CAN. Si la centralita del motor ya no comunica, el cuadro de instrumentos no tiene nada que mostrar.

es.question: El motor puede funcionar sin comunicarse?
es.answer: Si, la centralita del motor puede funcionar de forma autonoma para la inyeccion y el encendido. Pero sin comunicacion CAN, no puede informar a los demas modulos de lo que esta haciendo.

es.question: Es necesariamente la centralita del motor la que esta averiada?
es.answer: No, puede ser un problema del bus CAN entre la centralita y el resto del vehiculo. Un cable cortado, un conector oxidado o una resistencia de terminacion ausente son causas mas sencillas y menos costosas.

pt.question: O meu painel de instrumentos esta morto mas o motor funciona, sera o U0100?
pt.answer: E muito provavel. O painel de instrumentos recebe as informacoes do motor atraves do barramento CAN. Se a centralina do motor ja nao comunica, o painel de instrumentos nao tem nada para mostrar.

pt.question: O motor pode funcionar sem comunicar?
pt.answer: Sim, a centralina do motor pode funcionar de forma autonoma para a injecao e a ignicao. Mas sem comunicacao CAN, nao pode informar os outros modulos sobre o que esta a fazer.

pt.question: E necessariamente a centralina do motor que esta avariada?
pt.answer: Nao, pode ser um problema no barramento CAN entre a centralina e o resto do veiculo. Um fio cortado, um conector oxidado ou uma resistencia de terminacao ausente sao causas mais simples e menos dispendiosas.

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

name.fr: Perte de communication avec le calculateur de transmission
name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con la centralita de transmision
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com a centralina da transmissao

description.fr: Le U0101 indique une perte de communication entre le reseau CAN et le calculateur de transmission automatique. Sans cette communication, le calculateur moteur ne peut pas coordonner les changements de rapport avec le couple moteur, ce qui provoque des a-coups. La transmission passe en mode degrade, typiquement bloquee en un seul rapport. Les causes sont similaires au U0100 : alimentation du calculateur de transmission coupee, connecteur defaillant, ou module de transmission HS. Sur certains vehicules, le calculateur de transmission est integre au calculateur moteur, auquel cas ce code pourrait indiquer un probleme de communication interne au module combine.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a U0101 fault code, indicating lost communication with gearbox ecu, a problem on the vehicle's CAN bus communication network. Think of the CAN bus as the nervous system of your car — it allows all the different electronic control units to talk to each other and share vital information. When this communication breaks down, it can affect multiple systems simultaneously. You might notice several warning lights appearing at once, instruments behaving erratically, or certain functions becoming unresponsive. The root cause could be a physical wiring problem — a broken wire, a corroded connector, or water ingress into a plug. It could also be a failed electronic module dragging down the entire network, or a software mismatch between modules. A skilled auto electrician or diagnostic specialist can use an oscilloscope and advanced scanner to examine the CAN bus signals and isolate the fault. Repairs might be as simple as fixing a damaged connector, or they could involve replacing a faulty control module. These issues are best addressed promptly, as a degraded communication network can lead to unpredictable behaviour from safety-critical systems like the ABS or airbag.
description.de: Der U0101 zeigt einen Kommunikationsverlust zwischen dem CAN-Netzwerk und dem Steuergeraet des Automatikgetriebes an. Ohne diese Kommunikation kann das Motorsteuergeraet die Gangwechsel nicht mit dem Motordrehmoment koordinieren, was Ruckler verursacht. Das Getriebe geht in den Notlauf, typischerweise blockiert in einem einzigen Gang. Die Ursachen aehneln dem U0100: unterbrochene Stromversorgung des Getriebesteuergeraets, defekter Stecker oder defektes Getriebemodul. Bei einigen Fahrzeugen ist das Getriebesteuergeraet in das Motorsteuergeraet integriert, in diesem Fall koennte dieser Code auf ein internes Kommunikationsproblem des kombinierten Moduls hinweisen.
description.es: El U0101 indica una perdida de comunicacion entre la red CAN y la centralita de la transmision automatica. Sin esta comunicacion, la centralita del motor no puede coordinar los cambios de marcha con el par motor, lo que provoca tirones. La transmision pasa a modo degradado, tipicamente bloqueada en una sola marcha. Las causas son similares al U0100: alimentacion de la centralita de transmision cortada, conector defectuoso o modulo de transmision averiado. En algunos vehiculos, la centralita de transmision esta integrada en la centralita del motor, en cuyo caso este codigo podria indicar un problema de comunicacion interno del modulo combinado.
description.pt: O U0101 indica uma perda de comunicacao entre a rede CAN e a centralina da transmissao automatica. Sem esta comunicacao, a centralina do motor nao consegue coordenar as mudancas de velocidade com o binario do motor, o que provoca solavancos. A transmissao passa a modo degradado, tipicamente bloqueada numa unica velocidade. As causas sao semelhantes ao U0100: alimentacao da centralina da transmissao cortada, conector defeituoso ou modulo da transmissao avariado. Em alguns veiculos, a centralina da transmissao esta integrada na centralina do motor, caso em que este codigo pode indicar um problema de comunicacao interno do modulo combinado.

name.es: Alimentacion de la centralita de transmision

es: Tirones en los cambios de marcha

fr.question: Ma boite est bloquee en 3e, est-ce le U0101 ?
fr.answer: C'est une cause possible. Quand le calculateur de transmission perd la communication CAN, il met la boite en mode degrade pour proteger la mecanique.

fr.question: Peut-on rouler en mode degrade longtemps ?
fr.answer: C'est prevu pour le depannage uniquement. Le rapport unique n'est pas adapte a toutes les conditions et la boite chauffe plus. Rendez-vous au garage rapidement.

fr.question: Le probleme est-il dans la boite ou dans le reseau ?
fr.answer: Le U0101 est un code de communication, pas un code mecanique. Le probleme est dans le reseau CAN, l'alimentation ou le calculateur, pas dans les engrenages de la boite.

en.question: What does the U0101 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0101 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with lost communication with gearbox ecu. This is a high-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0101 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will U0101 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

en.question: How much does U0101 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a U0101 fault typically range from around £16 to £1258, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is gearbox ecu power supply, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Mein Getriebe haengt im 3. Gang fest, ist es der U0101?
de.answer: Das ist eine moegliche Ursache. Wenn das Getriebesteuergeraet die CAN-Kommunikation verliert, versetzt es das Getriebe in den Notlauf, um die Mechanik zu schuetzen.

de.question: Kann man lange im Notlauf fahren?
de.answer: Das ist nur fuer den Notfall vorgesehen. Der einzelne Gang ist nicht fuer alle Bedingungen geeignet und das Getriebe erwaermt sich staerker. Fahren Sie schnell in die Werkstatt.

de.question: Liegt das Problem im Getriebe oder im Netzwerk?
de.answer: Der U0101 ist ein Kommunikationscode, kein mechanischer Code. Das Problem liegt im CAN-Netzwerk, der Stromversorgung oder dem Steuergeraet, nicht in den Zahnraedern des Getriebes.

es.question: Mi caja esta bloqueada en 3a, es el U0101?
es.answer: Es una causa posible. Cuando la centralita de transmision pierde la comunicacion CAN, pone la caja en modo degradado para proteger la mecanica.

es.question: Se puede circular en modo degradado mucho tiempo?
es.answer: Esta previsto solo para emergencias. La marcha unica no es adecuada para todas las condiciones y la caja se calienta mas. Acuda al taller rapidamente.

es.question: El problema esta en la caja o en la red?
es.answer: El U0101 es un codigo de comunicacion, no un codigo mecanico. El problema esta en la red CAN, la alimentacion o la centralita, no en los engranajes de la caja.

pt.question: A minha caixa esta bloqueada em 3a, sera o U0101?
pt.answer: E uma causa possivel. Quando a centralina da transmissao perde a comunicacao CAN, coloca a caixa em modo degradado para proteger a mecanica.

pt.question: Pode-se circular em modo degradado muito tempo?
pt.answer: Esta previsto apenas para emergencias. A velocidade unica nao e adequada para todas as condicoes e a caixa aquece mais. Dirija-se a oficina rapidamente.

pt.question: O problema esta na caixa ou na rede?
pt.answer: O U0101 e um codigo de comunicacao, nao um codigo mecanico. O problema esta na rede CAN, na alimentacao ou na centralina, nao nas engrenagens da caixa.

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

name.fr: Perte de communication avec le calculateur ABS
name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con la centralita de ABS
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com a centralina do ABS

description.fr: Le U0121 signale que le calculateur ABS/ESP ne communique plus sur le bus CAN. L'ABS et l'ESP sont completement desactives car ils ne peuvent plus echanger d'informations avec les autres modules. Le calculateur moteur ne peut plus reduire le couple en cas de patinage detecte par l'ESP, et le calculateur de bord ne peut plus afficher les informations de freinage. Le module ABS est generalement situe dans le compartiment moteur, pres du maitre-cylindre de frein. Un connecteur corrode ou un probleme d'alimentation du module sont les causes les plus frequentes avant d'envisager un defaut du module lui-meme.
description.en: The U0121 fault code relates to lost communication with abs ecu, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.
description.de: Der U0121 zeigt an, dass das ABS/ESP-Steuergeraet nicht mehr auf dem CAN-Bus kommuniziert. ABS und ESP sind vollstaendig deaktiviert, da sie keine Informationen mehr mit den anderen Modulen austauschen koennen. Das Motorsteuergeraet kann das Drehmoment bei vom ESP erkanntem Schlupf nicht mehr reduzieren, und das Bordsteuergeraet kann keine Bremsinformationen mehr anzeigen. Das ABS-Modul befindet sich in der Regel im Motorraum, nahe dem Hauptbremszylinder. Ein korrodierter Stecker oder ein Stromversorgungsproblem des Moduls sind die haeufigsten Ursachen, bevor ein Defekt des Moduls selbst in Betracht gezogen wird.
description.es: El U0121 indica que la centralita ABS/ESP ya no comunica en el bus CAN. El ABS y el ESP estan completamente desactivados porque ya no pueden intercambiar informacion con los demas modulos. La centralita del motor ya no puede reducir el par en caso de patinaje detectado por el ESP, y la centralita de a bordo ya no puede mostrar la informacion de frenado. El modulo ABS esta generalmente situado en el compartimento del motor, cerca del cilindro maestro de freno. Un conector corroido o un problema de alimentacion del modulo son las causas mas frecuentes antes de considerar un defecto del propio modulo.
description.pt: O U0121 indica que a centralina ABS/ESP ja nao comunica no barramento CAN. O ABS e o ESP estao completamente desativados porque ja nao conseguem trocar informacoes com os outros modulos. A centralina do motor ja nao consegue reduzir o binario em caso de patinagem detetada pelo ESP, e a centralina de bordo ja nao consegue mostrar as informacoes de travagem. O modulo ABS esta geralmente situado no compartimento do motor, perto do cilindro mestre do travao. Um conector corroido ou um problema de alimentacao do modulo sao as causas mais frequentes antes de considerar um defeito do proprio modulo.

en: ABS and ESP warning lights on
pt: Luzes de aviso ABS e ESP
Possivel luz de aviso de travao

fr.question: L'ABS et l'ESP sont tous les deux desactives, pourquoi ?
fr.answer: Parce qu'ils sont geres par le meme calculateur. Si ce calculateur perd la communication CAN, les deux systemes tombent simultanement.

fr.question: Le frein fonctionne-t-il encore ?
fr.answer: Oui, le systeme de freinage hydraulique classique est independant de l'electronique. Vous pouvez freiner normalement, mais sans l'assistance de l'ABS et de l'ESP.

fr.question: L'eau peut-elle atteindre le module ABS ?
fr.answer: Le module est concu pour resister aux projections, mais une fuite de liquide de frein ou une infiltration d'eau exceptionnelle peut corroder les connecteurs. Inspectez visuellement le module et ses connexions.

en.question: What does the U0121 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0121 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with lost communication with abs ecu. This is a high-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0121 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will U0121 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

en.question: How much does U0121 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a U0121 fault typically range from around £17 to £1048, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is abs/esp module power supply, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: ABS und ESP sind beide deaktiviert, warum?
de.answer: Weil sie vom selben Steuergeraet verwaltet werden. Wenn dieses Steuergeraet die CAN-Kommunikation verliert, fallen beide Systeme gleichzeitig aus.

de.question: Funktioniert die Bremse noch?
de.answer: Ja, das klassische hydraulische Bremssystem ist unabhaengig von der Elektronik. Sie koennen normal bremsen, aber ohne die Unterstuetzung von ABS und ESP.

de.question: Kann Wasser das ABS-Modul erreichen?
de.answer: Das Modul ist gegen Spritzwasser ausgelegt, aber ein Bremsflueuessigkeitsleck oder ein aussergewoehnlicher Wassereintritt kann die Stecker korrodieren. Untersuchen Sie das Modul und seine Anschluesse visuell.

es.question: El ABS y el ESP estan ambos desactivados, por que?
es.answer: Porque estan gestionados por la misma centralita. Si esta centralita pierde la comunicacion CAN, ambos sistemas fallan simultaneamente.

es.question: El freno sigue funcionando?
es.answer: Si, el sistema de frenado hidraulico clasico es independiente de la electronica. Puede frenar normalmente, pero sin la asistencia del ABS y del ESP.

es.question: El agua puede alcanzar el modulo ABS?
es.answer: El modulo esta disenado para resistir las salpicaduras, pero una fuga de liquido de frenos o una infiltracion de agua excepcional puede corroer los conectores. Inspeccione visualmente el modulo y sus conexiones.

pt.question: O ABS e o ESP estao ambos desativados, porque?
pt.answer: Porque sao geridos pela mesma centralina. Se esta centralina perder a comunicacao CAN, ambos os sistemas falham simultaneamente.

pt.question: O travao continua a funcionar?
pt.answer: Sim, o sistema de travagem hidraulico classico e independente da eletronica. Pode travar normalmente, mas sem a assistencia do ABS e do ESP.

pt.question: A agua pode atingir o modulo ABS?
pt.answer: O modulo esta concebido para resistir a salpicos, mas uma fuga de liquido de travoes ou uma infiltracao de agua excecional pode corroer os conectores. Inspecione visualmente o modulo e as suas ligacoes.

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

name.fr: Perte de communication avec le calculateur carrosserie (BCM)
name.en: Lost communication with body control module (BCM)
name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con la centralita de carroceria (BCM)
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com a centralina de carroceria (BCM)

description.fr: Le U0140 indique une perte de communication avec le Body Control Module (BCM), le calculateur qui gere les fonctions de confort et d'eclairage : phares, clignotants, vitres electriques, verrouillage central, essuie-glaces et parfois la climatisation. Sans le BCM, de nombreuses fonctions de confort cessent de fonctionner. Le vehicule roule normalement au niveau moteur et transmission, mais les accessoires sont perturbes. Le BCM est generalement situe sous le tableau de bord ou dans la boite a fusibles interieure. Un fusible grille, un connecteur defaillant ou un probleme de bus CAN basse vitesse sont les causes habituelles.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a U0140 fault code, indicating lost communication with body control module (bcm), a problem on the vehicle's CAN bus communication network. Think of the CAN bus as the nervous system of your car — it allows all the different electronic control units to talk to each other and share vital information. When this communication breaks down, it can affect multiple systems simultaneously. You might notice several warning lights appearing at once, instruments behaving erratically, or certain functions becoming unresponsive. The root cause could be a physical wiring problem — a broken wire, a corroded connector, or water ingress into a plug. It could also be a failed electronic module dragging down the entire network, or a software mismatch between modules. A skilled auto electrician or diagnostic specialist can use an oscilloscope and advanced scanner to examine the CAN bus signals and isolate the fault. Repairs might be as simple as fixing a damaged connector, or they could involve replacing a faulty control module. These issues are best addressed promptly, as a degraded communication network can lead to unpredictable behaviour from safety-critical systems like the ABS or airbag.
description.de: Der U0140 zeigt einen Kommunikationsverlust mit dem Body Control Module (BCM) an, dem Steuergeraet, das die Komfort- und Beleuchtungsfunktionen verwaltet: Scheinwerfer, Blinker, elektrische Fensterheber, Zentralverriegelung, Scheibenwischer und manchmal die Klimaanlage. Ohne das BCM fallen zahlreiche Komfortfunktionen aus. Das Fahrzeug faehrt auf Motor- und Getriebeebene normal, aber die Zubehoerteile sind gestoert. Das BCM befindet sich in der Regel unter dem Armaturenbrett oder im Innensicherungskasten. Eine durchgebrannte Sicherung, ein defekter Stecker oder ein Problem mit dem Niedriggeschwindigkeits-CAN-Bus sind die ueblichen Ursachen.
description.es: El U0140 indica una perdida de comunicacion con el Body Control Module (BCM), la centralita que gestiona las funciones de confort e iluminacion: faros, intermitentes, elevalunas electricos, cierre centralizado, limpiaparabrisas y a veces la climatizacion. Sin el BCM, numerosas funciones de confort dejan de funcionar. El vehiculo circula normalmente a nivel de motor y transmision, pero los accesorios estan perturbados. El BCM esta generalmente situado bajo el salpicadero o en la caja de fusibles interior. Un fusible fundido, un conector defectuoso o un problema del bus CAN de baja velocidad son las causas habituales.
description.pt: O U0140 indica uma perda de comunicacao com o Body Control Module (BCM), a centralina que gere as funcoes de conforto e iluminacao: farois, piscas, vidros eletricos, fecho centralizado, limpa-para-brisas e por vezes a climatizacao. Sem o BCM, numerosas funcoes de conforto deixam de funcionar. O veiculo circula normalmente ao nivel do motor e da transmissao, mas os acessorios ficam perturbados. O BCM esta geralmente situado sob o painel de instrumentos ou na caixa de fusiveis interior. Um fusivel queimado, um conector defeituoso ou um problema no barramento CAN de baixa velocidade sao as causas habituais.

fr.question: Mes phares et clignotants ne marchent plus, est-ce le BCM ?
fr.answer: C'est une piste si de multiples fonctions de confort et d'eclairage tombent en panne simultanement. Un probleme de BCM affecte tout ce qu'il gere d'un coup.

fr.question: Le BCM est-il necessaire pour rouler ?
fr.answer: Le moteur et la transmission fonctionnent sans le BCM. Mais l'eclairage, les clignotants et les essuie-glaces sont indispensables pour la securite. Rouler de nuit ou sous la pluie sans ces equipements est dangereux et illegal.

fr.question: Le BCM est-il reparable ?
fr.answer: Parfois. Un specialiste en electronique peut reparer certaines pannes de BCM. Le reflashage est aussi possible si le probleme est logiciel. Un remplacement necessite souvent une programmation chez le concessionnaire.

en.question: What does the U0140 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0140 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with lost communication with body control module (bcm). This is a medium-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0140 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will U0140 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

en.question: How much does U0140 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a U0140 fault typically range from around £9 to £668, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is bcm fuse or power supply, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Meine Scheinwerfer und Blinker funktionieren nicht mehr, ist es das BCM?
de.answer: Das ist eine Moeglichkeit, wenn mehrere Komfort- und Beleuchtungsfunktionen gleichzeitig ausfallen. Ein BCM-Problem beeintraechtigt alles, was es verwaltet, auf einmal.

de.question: Ist das BCM zum Fahren notwendig?
de.answer: Motor und Getriebe funktionieren ohne das BCM. Aber Beleuchtung, Blinker und Scheibenwischer sind fuer die Sicherheit unverzichtbar. Nachts oder bei Regen ohne diese Ausstattung zu fahren ist gefaehrlich und illegal.

de.question: Ist das BCM reparierbar?
de.answer: Manchmal. Ein Elektronikfachmann kann bestimmte BCM-Defekte reparieren. Ein Neuprogrammieren ist auch moeglich, wenn das Problem softwarebedingt ist. Ein Austausch erfordert oft eine Programmierung beim Haendler.

es.question: Mis faros e intermitentes no funcionan, es el BCM?
es.answer: Es una pista si multiples funciones de confort e iluminacion fallan simultaneamente. Un problema de BCM afecta todo lo que gestiona de golpe.

es.question: El BCM es necesario para circular?
es.answer: El motor y la transmision funcionan sin el BCM. Pero la iluminacion, los intermitentes y los limpiaparabrisas son indispensables para la seguridad. Circular de noche o bajo la lluvia sin estos equipos es peligroso e ilegal.

es.question: El BCM es reparable?
es.answer: A veces. Un especialista en electronica puede reparar ciertas averias del BCM. La reprogramacion tambien es posible si el problema es de software. Un reemplazo suele necesitar una programacion en el concesionario.

pt.question: Os meus farois e piscas nao funcionam, sera o BCM?
pt.answer: E uma pista se multiplas funcoes de conforto e iluminacao falham simultaneamente. Um problema de BCM afeta tudo o que ele gere de uma so vez.

pt.question: O BCM e necessario para circular?
pt.answer: O motor e a transmissao funcionam sem o BCM. Mas a iluminacao, os piscas e os limpa-para-brisas sao indispensaveis para a seguranca. Circular de noite ou a chuva sem estes equipamentos e perigoso e ilegal.

pt.question: O BCM e reparavel?
pt.answer: Por vezes. Um especialista em eletronica pode reparar certas avarias do BCM. A reprogramacao tambem e possivel se o problema for de software. Uma substituicao requer frequentemente uma programacao no concessionario.

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

name.fr: Perte de communication avec le combiné d'instruments
name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con el cuadro de instrumentos
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com o quadro de instrumentos

description.fr: Le U0155 signale que le tableau de bord (combine d'instruments) ne communique plus sur le bus CAN. Le tableau de bord est a la fois un recepteur d'informations (il affiche les donnees des autres modules) et un emetteur (il envoie les informations de certains boutons et contacteurs). Sans communication, tous les indicateurs restent a zero ou affichent des valeurs figees. Le compteur de vitesse, le compte-tours, la jauge d'essence et tous les temoins lumineux sont potentiellement non fonctionnels. C'est un probleme serieux pour la securite car le conducteur n'a plus aucune information sur l'etat de son vehicule. Le combine d'instruments lui-meme ou son alimentation est generalement en cause.
description.en: The U0155 fault code relates to lost communication with instrument cluster, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.
description.de: Der U0155 zeigt an, dass das Armaturenbrett (Kombiinstrument) nicht mehr auf dem CAN-Bus kommuniziert. Das Armaturenbrett ist sowohl ein Informationsempfaenger (es zeigt die Daten anderer Module an) als auch ein Sender (es sendet Informationen bestimmter Tasten und Schalter). Ohne Kommunikation bleiben alle Anzeigen auf Null oder zeigen eingefrorene Werte an. Tachometer, Drehzahlmesser, Tankanzeige und alle Kontrollleuchten sind potenziell nicht funktionsfaehig. Dies ist ein ernstes Sicherheitsproblem, da der Fahrer keine Informationen mehr ueber den Zustand seines Fahrzeugs hat. Das Kombiinstrument selbst oder seine Stromversorgung ist in der Regel die Ursache.
description.es: El U0155 indica que el cuadro de instrumentos ya no comunica en el bus CAN. El cuadro de instrumentos es a la vez un receptor de informacion (muestra los datos de los demas modulos) y un emisor (envia la informacion de ciertos botones e interruptores). Sin comunicacion, todos los indicadores se quedan a cero o muestran valores congelados. El velocimetro, el cuentarrevoluciones, el indicador de combustible y todos los testigos luminosos son potencialmente no funcionales. Es un problema serio para la seguridad ya que el conductor no tiene ninguna informacion sobre el estado de su vehiculo. El propio cuadro de instrumentos o su alimentacion suele ser la causa.
description.pt: O U0155 indica que o painel de instrumentos (quadro de instrumentos) ja nao comunica no barramento CAN. O painel de instrumentos e simultaneamente um recetor de informacoes (mostra os dados dos outros modulos) e um emissor (envia as informacoes de certos botoes e interruptores). Sem comunicacao, todos os indicadores ficam a zero ou mostram valores congelados. O velocimetro, o conta-rotacoes, o indicador de combustivel e todas as luzes de aviso sao potencialmente nao funcionais. E um problema serio para a seguranca pois o condutor nao tem qualquer informacao sobre o estado do seu veiculo. O proprio quadro de instrumentos ou a sua alimentacao e geralmente a causa.

name.es: Conector trasero del cuadro de instrumentos
name.pt: Conector traseiro do quadro de instrumentos

fr.question: Mon tableau de bord est completement eteint, est-ce grave ?
fr.answer: Oui, vous roulez sans compteur de vitesse, sans jauge de temperature, sans temoins. Vous ne savez pas si un autre probleme se developpe. C'est dangereux et illegal.

fr.question: Le combine peut-il etre repare ?
fr.answer: Oui, de nombreux specialistes reparent les combines d'instruments. Les problemes courants sont des soudures seches, des composants grilles ou des retro-eclairages defaillants.

fr.question: Comment rouler sans compteur de vitesse ?
fr.answer: En theorie, vous ne devriez pas. Si vous devez vous rendre au garage, utilisez une application GPS sur votre telephone pour connaitre votre vitesse. Mais faites reparer rapidement.

en.question: What does the U0155 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0155 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with lost communication with instrument cluster. This is a high-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0155 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will U0155 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

en.question: How much does U0155 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a U0155 fault typically range from around £17 to £666, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty instrument cluster, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Mein Armaturenbrett ist komplett aus, ist das schlimm?
de.answer: Ja, Sie fahren ohne Tachometer, ohne Temperaturanzeige, ohne Kontrollleuchten. Sie wissen nicht, ob sich ein anderes Problem entwickelt. Das ist gefaehrlich und illegal.

de.question: Kann das Kombiinstrument repariert werden?
de.answer: Ja, zahlreiche Fachbetriebe reparieren Kombiinstrumente. Haeufige Probleme sind kalte Loetstellen, defekte Bauteile oder ausgefallene Hintergrundbeleuchtungen.

de.question: Wie faehrt man ohne Tachometer?
de.answer: Theoretisch sollten Sie nicht fahren. Wenn Sie zur Werkstatt muessen, verwenden Sie eine GPS-App auf Ihrem Telefon, um Ihre Geschwindigkeit zu kennen. Aber lassen Sie es schnell reparieren.

es.question: Mi cuadro de instrumentos esta completamente apagado, es grave?
es.answer: Si, circula sin velocimetro, sin indicador de temperatura, sin testigos. No sabe si otro problema se esta desarrollando. Es peligroso e ilegal.

es.question: El cuadro de instrumentos se puede reparar?
es.answer: Si, numerosos especialistas reparan cuadros de instrumentos. Los problemas habituales son soldaduras secas, componentes quemados o retroiluminaciones defectuosas.

es.question: Como circular sin velocimetro?
es.answer: En teoria, no deberia. Si tiene que ir al taller, use una aplicacion GPS en su telefono para conocer su velocidad. Pero hagalo reparar rapidamente.

pt.question: O meu painel de instrumentos esta completamente apagado, e grave?
pt.answer: Sim, circula sem velocimetro, sem indicador de temperatura, sem luzes de aviso. Nao sabe se outro problema se esta a desenvolver. E perigoso e ilegal.

pt.question: O quadro de instrumentos pode ser reparado?
pt.answer: Sim, numerosos especialistas reparam quadros de instrumentos. Os problemas habituais sao soldaduras frias, componentes queimados ou retroiluminacoes defeituosas.

pt.question: Como circular sem velocimetro?
pt.answer: Em teoria, nao deveria. Se tiver de ir a oficina, use uma aplicacao GPS no seu telefone para conhecer a sua velocidade. Mas faca reparar rapidamente.

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

name.fr: Actuateur position arbre a cames A — circuit (banque 1)
name.es: Actuador de posición del árbol de levas A – circuito (banco 1)
name.pt: Atuador de posição da árvore de cames A – circuito (banco 1)

description.fr: Le P0010 concerne l'actuateur de calage variable de l'arbre a cames d'admission (VVT, VANOS, VTC selon les constructeurs). Ce systeme ajuste le moment d'ouverture des soupapes d'admission pour optimiser les performances et la consommation a differents regimes. Le calculateur commande une electrovanne qui envoie de l'huile sous pression vers l'actuateur pour modifier la position de l'arbre a cames. Un defaut de circuit signifie que cette commande ne fonctionne pas — l'electrovanne est grillee, le cablage est coupe, ou le connecteur est defaillant. Le moteur fonctionne avec un calage fixe qui n'est pas optimal, ce qui reduit les performances et augmente la consommation.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0010 relates to camshaft position actuator a — circuit (bank 1), which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0010 betrifft den Versteller der variablen Ventilsteuerung der Einlassnockenwelle (VVT, VANOS, VTC je nach Hersteller). Dieses System passt den Öffnungszeitpunkt der Einlassventile an, um Leistung und Verbrauch bei verschiedenen Drehzahlen zu optimieren. Das Steuergerät steuert ein Magnetventil, das Drucköl zum Versteller sendet, um die Position der Nockenwelle zu ändern. Ein Stromkreisfehler bedeutet, dass diese Steuerung nicht funktioniert – das Magnetventil ist durchgebrannt, die Verkabelung ist unterbrochen oder der Stecker ist defekt. Der Motor läuft mit einer festen Steuerzeit, die nicht optimal ist, was die Leistung reduziert und den Verbrauch erhöht.
description.es: El P0010 concierne al actuador de distribución variable del árbol de levas de admisión (VVT, VANOS, VTC según los fabricantes). Este sistema ajusta el momento de apertura de las válvulas de admisión para optimizar las prestaciones y el consumo a diferentes regímenes. La centralita controla una electroválvula que envía aceite a presión hacia el actuador para modificar la posición del árbol de levas. Un defecto de circuito significa que este mando no funciona – la electroválvula está quemada, el cableado está cortado, o el conector está defectuoso. El motor funciona con una distribución fija que no es óptima, lo que reduce las prestaciones y aumenta el consumo.
description.pt: O P0010 diz respeito ao atuador da distribuição variável da árvore de cames de admissão (VVT, VANOS, VTC conforme os fabricantes). Este sistema ajusta o momento de abertura das válvulas de admissão para otimizar o desempenho e o consumo a diferentes regimes. A centralina comanda uma eletroválvula que envia óleo sob pressão para o atuador para modificar a posição da árvore de cames. Um defeito de circuito significa que este comando não funciona – a eletroválvula está queimada, a cablagem está cortada, ou o conector está avariado. O motor funciona com uma distribuição fixa que não é ótima, o que reduz o desempenho e aumenta o consumo.

fr.question: Le VVT, c'est quoi exactement ?
fr.answer: Le Variable Valve Timing est un systeme qui avance ou retarde l'ouverture des soupapes selon le regime moteur. A bas regime, un calage retarde est meilleur pour le couple. A haut regime, un calage avance donne plus de puissance.

fr.question: L'huile moteur est-elle liee au VVT ?
fr.answer: Oui, le systeme VVT fonctionne avec l'huile moteur sous pression. Une huile sale ou un niveau trop bas peut bloquer l'electrovanne ou l'actuateur. Commencez par une vidange si l'huile est vieille.

fr.question: Toutes les voitures ont-elles le VVT ?
fr.answer: La plupart des moteurs modernes oui, sous differentes appellations : VVT-i (Toyota), VANOS (BMW), VTC (Honda), VarioCam (Porsche), etc. Seuls les moteurs tres simples ou anciens en sont depourvus.

en.question: What does the P0010 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0010 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft position actuator a — circuit (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0010 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0010 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0010 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0010 fault typically range from around £17 to £507, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is clogged or blown vvt solenoid, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was ist VVT genau?
de.answer: Variable Valve Timing ist ein System, das das Öffnen der Ventile je nach Motordrehzahl vor- oder zurückstellt. Bei niedriger Drehzahl ist eine verzögerte Steuerzeit besser für das Drehmoment. Bei hoher Drehzahl gibt eine vorgestellte Steuerzeit mehr Leistung.

de.question: Hängt das Motoröl mit VVT zusammen?
de.answer: Ja, das VVT-System arbeitet mit Motoröl unter Druck. Ein verschmutztes Öl oder ein zu niedriger Ölstand kann das Magnetventil oder den Versteller blockieren. Beginnen Sie mit einem Ölwechsel, wenn das Öl alt ist.

de.question: Haben alle Autos VVT?
de.answer: Die meisten modernen Motoren ja, unter verschiedenen Bezeichnungen: VVT-i (Toyota), VANOS (BMW), VTC (Honda), VarioCam (Porsche) usw. Nur sehr einfache oder alte Motoren verzichten darauf.

es.question: El VVT, ¿qué es exactamente?
es.answer: El Variable Valve Timing es un sistema que avanza o retarda la apertura de las válvulas según el régimen motor. A bajo régimen, una distribución retardada es mejor para el par. A alto régimen, una distribución avanzada da más potencia.

es.question: ¿Está el aceite motor vinculado al VVT?
es.answer: Sí, el sistema VVT funciona con aceite motor a presión. Un aceite sucio o un nivel demasiado bajo puede bloquear la electroválvula o el actuador. Empiece por un cambio de aceite si el aceite es viejo.

es.question: ¿Todos los coches tienen VVT?
es.answer: La mayoría de los motores modernos sí, bajo diferentes denominaciones: VVT-i (Toyota), VANOS (BMW), VTC (Honda), VarioCam (Porsche), etc. Solo los motores muy simples o antiguos carecen de él.

pt.question: O VVT, o que é exatamente?
pt.answer: O Variable Valve Timing é um sistema que avança ou atrasa a abertura das válvulas consoante o regime do motor. A baixo regime, uma distribuição atrasada é melhor para o binário. A alto regime, uma distribuição avançada dá mais potência.

pt.question: O óleo do motor está ligado ao VVT?
pt.answer: Sim, o sistema VVT funciona com óleo do motor sob pressão. Um óleo sujo ou um nível demasiado baixo pode bloquear a eletroválvula ou o atuador. Comece por uma mudança de óleo se o óleo for velho.

pt.question: Todos os carros têm VVT?
pt.answer: A maioria dos motores modernos sim, sob diferentes denominações: VVT-i (Toyota), VANOS (BMW), VTC (Honda), VarioCam (Porsche), etc. Só os motores muito simples ou antigos é que não têm.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Calage arbre a cames A — en avance ou performance (banque 1)
name.en: Camshaft timing A — over-advanced or performance (bank 1)
name.de: Nockenwellen-Steuerzeit A – zu früh oder Leistung (Bank 1)
name.es: Distribución árbol de levas A – adelantada o rendimiento (banco 1)
name.pt: Distribuição da árvore de cames A – adiantada ou desempenho (banco 1)

description.fr: Le P0011 indique que la position de l'arbre a cames d'admission est trop avancee par rapport a ce que commande le calculateur, ou que le systeme ne repond pas assez vite. L'huile moteur est le fluide hydraulique qui actionne le systeme VVT. Si l'huile est trop epaisse (a froid), trop sale, ou si la pompe a huile ne fournit pas assez de pression, le systeme repond mal ou reste bloque en position avancee. Ce code est tres frequent apres un intervalle de vidange trop long. Un moteur avec un calage trop avance peut avoir un ralenti instable, des a-coups a bas regime et une consommation en hausse. Parfois, une simple vidange avec de l'huile de qualite resout le probleme.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0011 code, it is telling you there is a problem with camshaft timing a — over-advanced or performance (bank 1). This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0011 zeigt an, dass die Position der Einlassnockenwelle im Vergleich zu dem, was das Steuergerät befiehlt, zu weit vorgestellt ist, oder dass das System nicht schnell genug reagiert. Das Motoröl ist die Hydraulikflüssigkeit, die das VVT-System betätigt. Ist das Öl zu dick (kalt), zu schmutzig oder liefert die Ölpumpe nicht genug Druck, reagiert das System schlecht oder bleibt in vorgestellter Position blockiert. Dieser Code ist sehr häufig nach einem zu langen Ölwechselintervall. Ein Motor mit zu weit vorgestellter Steuerzeit kann einen unruhigen Leerlauf, Ruckeln bei niedriger Drehzahl und einen steigenden Verbrauch haben. Manchmal löst ein einfacher Ölwechsel mit Qualitätsöl das Problem.
description.es: El P0011 indica que la posición del árbol de levas de admisión está demasiado adelantada respecto a lo que ordena la centralita, o que el sistema no responde lo suficientemente rápido. El aceite motor es el fluido hidráulico que acciona el sistema VVT. Si el aceite es demasiado espeso (en frío), demasiado sucio, o si la bomba de aceite no suministra suficiente presión, el sistema responde mal o queda bloqueado en posición adelantada. Este código es muy frecuente después de un intervalo de cambio de aceite demasiado largo. Un motor con una distribución demasiado adelantada puede tener un ralentí inestable, tirones a bajo régimen y un consumo en alza. A veces, un simple cambio de aceite con aceite de calidad resuelve el problema.
description.pt: O P0011 indica que a posição da árvore de cames de admissão está demasiado adiantada em relação ao que a centralina comanda, ou que o sistema não responde suficientemente depressa. O óleo do motor é o fluido hidráulico que aciona o sistema VVT. Se o óleo for demasiado espesso (a frio), demasiado sujo, ou se a bomba de óleo não fornecer pressão suficiente, o sistema responde mal ou fica bloqueado em posição adiantada. Este código é muito frequente após um intervalo de mudança de óleo demasiado longo. Um motor com uma distribuição demasiado adiantada pode ter um ralenti instável, solavancos a baixo regime e um consumo em alta. Por vezes, uma simples mudança de óleo com óleo de qualidade resolve o problema.

fr.question: Une vidange peut-elle resoudre le P0011 ?
fr.answer: Oui, dans un nombre surprenant de cas. L'huile degradee laisse des depots qui bloquent l'electrovanne VVT. Une vidange avec une huile de qualite et le bon grade peut deboucher le systeme.

fr.question: L'huile a-t-elle vraiment autant d'importance ?
fr.answer: Pour le systeme VVT, oui absolument. C'est un mecanisme hydraulique de precision qui depend de la qualite et de la proprete de l'huile. Respectez les intervalles de vidange et utilisez l'huile recommandee.

fr.question: Le pignon de calage variable est-il cher ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est un composant de precision qui coute entre 100 et 400 euros pour la piece. Avec la main d'oeuvre (souvent il faut deposer la courroie ou chaine de distribution), comptez 200 a 700 euros.

en.question: What does the P0011 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0011 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft timing a — over-advanced or performance (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0011 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0011 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0011 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0011 fault typically range from around £34 to £601, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is degraded engine oil (needs change), but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann ein Ölwechsel den P0011 beheben?
de.answer: Ja, in einer überraschend hohen Anzahl von Fällen. Verschlechtertes Öl hinterlässt Ablagerungen, die das VVT-Magnetventil blockieren. Ein Ölwechsel mit Qualitätsöl und der richtigen Spezifikation kann das System befreien.

de.question: Ist das Öl wirklich so wichtig?
de.answer: Für das VVT-System, ja absolut. Es ist ein hydraulischer Präzisionsmechanismus, der von der Qualität und Sauberkeit des Öls abhängt. Halten Sie die Ölwechselintervalle ein und verwenden Sie das empfohlene Öl.

de.question: Ist das Verstellritzel teuer?
de.answer: Ja, es ist ein Präzisionsbauteil, das zwischen 100 und 400 Euro pro Stück kostet. Mit Arbeitszeit (oft muss der Zahnriemen oder die Steuerkette abgebaut werden) rechnen Sie mit 200 bis 700 Euro.

es.question: ¿Puede un cambio de aceite resolver el P0011?
es.answer: Sí, en un número sorprendente de casos. El aceite degradado deja depósitos que bloquean la electroválvula VVT. Un cambio de aceite con aceite de calidad y el grado correcto puede desatascar el sistema.

es.question: ¿Tiene el aceite realmente tanta importancia?
es.answer: Para el sistema VVT, sí absolutamente. Es un mecanismo hidráulico de precisión que depende de la calidad y de la limpieza del aceite. Respete los intervalos de cambio y use el aceite recomendado.

es.question: ¿Es caro el piñón de distribución variable?
es.answer: Sí, es un componente de precisión que cuesta entre 100 y 400 euros la pieza. Con la mano de obra (a menudo hay que desmontar la correa o cadena de distribución), cuente 200 a 700 euros.

pt.question: Uma mudança de óleo pode resolver o P0011?
pt.answer: Sim, num número surpreendente de casos. O óleo degradado deixa depósitos que bloqueiam a eletroválvula VVT. Uma mudança de óleo com óleo de qualidade e a especificação correta pode desentupir o sistema.

pt.question: O óleo tem realmente tanta importância?
pt.answer: Para o sistema VVT, sim absolutamente. É um mecanismo hidráulico de precisão que depende da qualidade e da limpeza do óleo. Respeite os intervalos de mudança e use o óleo recomendado.

pt.question: O pinhão de distribuição variável é caro?
pt.answer: Sim, é um componente de precisão que custa entre 100 e 400 euros a peça. Com a mão de obra (muitas vezes é preciso desmontar a correia ou corrente de distribuição), conte 200 a 700 euros.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Calage arbre a cames A — en retard ou performance (banque 1)
name.en: Camshaft timing A — retarded or performance (bank 1)
name.de: Nockenwellen-Steuerzeit A – zu spät oder Leistung (Bank 1)
name.es: Distribución árbol de levas A – retrasada o rendimiento (banco 1)
name.pt: Distribuição da árvore de cames A – atrasada ou desempenho (banco 1)

description.fr: Le P0012 est l'inverse du P0011 : l'arbre a cames d'admission est trop retarde ou le systeme VVT est trop lent. Le calage retarde reduit la puissance a haut regime et peut causer un ralenti irregulier. Les memes causes que le P0011 s'appliquent : huile degradee, electrovanne encrassee ou actuateur bloque. Le systeme VVT est particulierement sensible a l'encrassement car les passages hydrauliques sont tres fins, de l'ordre du dixieme de millimetre. Des particules minuscules dans l'huile peuvent bloquer ces passages. Les moteurs turbo sont plus affectes car l'huile travaille plus dur et se degrade plus vite. Un decalaminage moteur peut aussi aider a nettoyer le circuit d'huile.
description.en: A P0012 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with camshaft timing a — retarded or performance (bank 1). The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0012 ist die Umkehrung des P0011: die Einlassnockenwelle ist zu weit zurückgestellt oder das VVT-System ist zu langsam. Die verzögerte Steuerzeit reduziert die Leistung bei hoher Drehzahl und kann einen unregelmäßigen Leerlauf verursachen. Die gleichen Ursachen wie beim P0011 gelten: verschlechtertes Öl, verschmutztes Magnetventil oder blockierter Versteller. Das VVT-System ist besonders empfindlich gegen Verschmutzung, da die Hydraulikkanäle sehr eng sind, in der Größenordnung von Zehntelmillimetern. Winzige Partikel im Öl können diese Kanäle blockieren. Turbomotoren sind stärker betroffen, da das Öl härter arbeitet und sich schneller verschlechtert. Eine Motor-Entkohlung kann auch helfen, den Ölkreislauf zu reinigen.
description.es: El P0012 es el inverso del P0011: el árbol de levas de admisión está demasiado retrasado o el sistema VVT es demasiado lento. La distribución retrasada reduce la potencia a alto régimen y puede causar un ralentí irregular. Las mismas causas que el P0011 se aplican: aceite degradado, electroválvula sucia o actuador bloqueado. El sistema VVT es particularmente sensible al ensuciamiento porque los pasos hidráulicos son muy finos, del orden de la décima de milímetro. Partículas minúsculas en el aceite pueden bloquear estos pasos. Los motores turbo están más afectados porque el aceite trabaja más duro y se degrada más rápidamente. Una descarbonización del motor también puede ayudar a limpiar el circuito de aceite.
description.pt: O P0012 é o inverso do P0011: a árvore de cames de admissão está demasiado atrasada ou o sistema VVT é demasiado lento. A distribuição atrasada reduz a potência a alto regime e pode causar um ralenti irregular. As mesmas causas que o P0011 aplicam-se: óleo degradado, eletroválvula suja ou atuador bloqueado. O sistema VVT é particularmente sensível ao entupimento pois as passagens hidráulicas são muito finas, da ordem do décimo de milímetro. Partículas minúsculas no óleo podem bloquear estas passagens. Os motores turbo são mais afetados pois o óleo trabalha mais e degrada-se mais depressa. Uma descarbonização do motor também pode ajudar a limpar o circuito de óleo.

fr: Perte de puissance a haut regime
en: Loss of power at high RPM
es: Pérdida de potencia a alto régimen
pt: Perda de potência a alto regime

fr.question: Mon moteur manque de puissance en haut, est-ce le P0012 ?
fr.answer: C'est possible. Un calage retarde reduit specifiquement la puissance a haut regime car les soupapes ne s'ouvrent pas au bon moment pour le remplissage des cylindres.

fr.question: Le decalaminage aide-t-il pour le VVT ?
fr.answer: Oui, un decalaminage a l'hydrogene ou chimique peut nettoyer les depots dans le circuit d'huile et les passages hydrauliques du VVT. C'est une bonne prevention.

fr.question: Faut-il utiliser une huile speciale ?
fr.answer: Utilisez exactement le grade et la specification recommandes par le constructeur. Par exemple, si le manuel dit 5W30 ACEA C3, ne mettez pas une 10W40. Le systeme VVT est concu pour une viscosite precise.

en.question: What does the P0012 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0012 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft timing a — retarded or performance (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0012 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0012 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0012 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0012 fault typically range from around £33 to £349, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is engine oil needs changing, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Meinem Motor fehlt Leistung oben, ist es der P0012?
de.answer: Es ist möglich. Eine verzögerte Steuerzeit reduziert speziell die Leistung bei hoher Drehzahl, da sich die Ventile nicht zum richtigen Zeitpunkt für die Zylinderfüllung öffnen.

de.question: Hilft eine Entkohlung für das VVT?
de.answer: Ja, eine Wasserstoff- oder chemische Entkohlung kann die Ablagerungen im Ölkreislauf und den Hydraulikkanälen des VVT reinigen. Es ist eine gute Vorbeugung.

de.question: Muss man ein Spezialöl verwenden?
de.answer: Verwenden Sie genau die vom Hersteller empfohlene Spezifikation und den Grad. Wenn das Handbuch z.B. 5W30 ACEA C3 sagt, verwenden Sie kein 10W40. Das VVT-System ist für eine präzise Viskosität ausgelegt.

es.question: Mi motor carece de potencia en alto, ¿es el P0012?
es.answer: Es posible. Una distribución retrasada reduce específicamente la potencia a alto régimen porque las válvulas no se abren en el momento correcto para el llenado de los cilindros.

es.question: ¿Ayuda la descarbonización para el VVT?
es.answer: Sí, una descarbonización por hidrógeno o química puede limpiar los depósitos en el circuito de aceite y los pasos hidráulicos del VVT. Es una buena prevención.

es.question: ¿Hay que usar un aceite especial?
