es.answer: Use exactamente el grado y la especificación recomendados por el fabricante. Por ejemplo, si el manual dice 5W30 ACEA C3, no ponga un 10W40. El sistema VVT está concebido para una viscosidad precisa.

pt.question: O meu motor falta potência em cima, é o P0012?
pt.answer: É possível. Uma distribuição atrasada reduz especificamente a potência a alto regime pois as válvulas não se abrem no momento correto para o enchimento dos cilindros.

pt.question: A descarbonização ajuda para o VVT?
pt.answer: Sim, uma descarbonização por hidrogénio ou química pode limpar os depósitos no circuito de óleo e as passagens hidráulicas do VVT. É uma boa prevenção.

pt.question: Há que usar um óleo especial?
pt.answer: Use exatamente a especificação e o grau recomendados pelo fabricante. Por exemplo, se o manual disser 5W30 ACEA C3, não ponha um 10W40. O sistema VVT foi concebido para uma viscosidade precisa.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Actuateur position arbre a cames B — circuit (banque 1)
name.es: Actuador de posición del árbol de levas B – circuito (banco 1)
name.pt: Atuador de posição da árvore de cames B – circuito (banco 1)

description.fr: Le P0013 est similaire au P0010 mais concerne l'arbre a cames d'echappement (B) au lieu de l'admission (A). Les moteurs equipes d'un double calage variable (comme le Dual VANOS de BMW ou le Dual VVT-i de Toyota) ont un actuateur sur chaque arbre a cames. Le calage variable a l'echappement permet d'optimiser le chevauchement des soupapes et de reduire les emissions. Un defaut sur le circuit de l'actuateur B empeche le controle du calage d'echappement. Les consequences sont similaires au P0010 mais avec un impact plus marque sur les emissions. Les memes verifications s'appliquent : etat de l'huile, electrovanne, cablage et actuateur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0013 relates to camshaft position actuator b — circuit (bank 1), which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0013 ähnelt dem P0010, betrifft aber die Auslassnockenwelle (B) statt der Einlassnockenwelle (A). Motoren mit doppelter variabler Ventilsteuerung (wie Dual VANOS von BMW oder Dual VVT-i von Toyota) haben einen Versteller an jeder Nockenwelle. Die variable Steuerzeit am Auspuff ermöglicht es, die Ventilüberschneidung zu optimieren und die Emissionen zu reduzieren. Ein Fehler im Stromkreis des Verstellers B verhindert die Steuerung der Auslass-Steuerzeit. Die Folgen ähneln dem P0010, aber mit einer stärkeren Auswirkung auf die Emissionen. Die gleichen Prüfungen gelten: Ölzustand, Magnetventil, Verkabelung und Versteller.
description.es: El P0013 es similar al P0010 pero concierne al árbol de levas de escape (B) en lugar del de admisión (A). Los motores equipados con doble distribución variable (como el Dual VANOS de BMW o el Dual VVT-i de Toyota) tienen un actuador en cada árbol de levas. La distribución variable en el escape permite optimizar el solape de válvulas y reducir las emisiones. Un defecto en el circuito del actuador B impide el control de la distribución de escape. Las consecuencias son similares al P0010 pero con un impacto más marcado en las emisiones. Las mismas verificaciones se aplican: estado del aceite, electroválvula, cableado y actuador.
description.pt: O P0013 é semelhante ao P0010 mas diz respeito à árvore de cames de escape (B) em vez da de admissão (A). Os motores equipados com dupla distribuição variável (como o Dual VANOS da BMW ou o Dual VVT-i da Toyota) têm um atuador em cada árvore de cames. A distribuição variável no escape permite otimizar a sobreposição de válvulas e reduzir as emissões. Um defeito no circuito do atuador B impede o controlo da distribuição de escape. As consequências são semelhantes ao P0010 mas com um impacto mais marcado nas emissões. As mesmas verificações aplicam-se: estado do óleo, eletroválvula, cablagem e atuador.

fr.question: Mon moteur a-t-il deux arbres a cames variables ?
fr.answer: Pas tous. Les moteurs simples n'ont le VVT que sur l'admission. Les moteurs plus evolues ont le double VVT sur admission ET echappement. Consultez les specs de votre moteur.

fr.question: Le calage variable echappement est-il aussi important que l'admission ?
fr.answer: Il a moins d'impact sur les performances ressenties mais plus d'impact sur les emissions. Le controle technique peut detecter des emissions anormales liees a un calage echappement defaillant.

fr.question: Les electrovannes admission et echappement sont-elles identiques ?
fr.answer: Parfois oui, parfois non. Elles peuvent avoir des debits differents. Verifiez la reference exacte avant de commander.

en.question: What does the P0013 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0013 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft position actuator b — circuit (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0013 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0013 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0013 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0013 fault typically range from around £17 to £495, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is exhaust vvt solenoid, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Hat mein Motor zwei variable Nockenwellen?
de.answer: Nicht alle. Einfache Motoren haben VVT nur am Einlass. Fortschrittlichere Motoren haben Dual-VVT an Einlass UND Auslass. Konsultieren Sie die Spezifikationen Ihres Motors.

de.question: Ist die variable Auslass-Steuerzeit so wichtig wie die Einlass?
de.answer: Sie hat weniger Einfluss auf die spürbare Leistung, aber mehr Einfluss auf die Emissionen. Die Hauptuntersuchung kann ungewöhnliche Emissionen erkennen, die mit einer defekten Auslass-Steuerzeit zusammenhängen.

de.question: Sind die Magnetventile für Einlass und Auslass identisch?
de.answer: Manchmal ja, manchmal nein. Sie können unterschiedliche Durchsätze haben. Prüfen Sie die exakte Referenz, bevor Sie bestellen.

es.question: ¿Tiene mi motor dos árboles de levas variables?
es.answer: No todos. Los motores simples solo tienen el VVT en la admisión. Los motores más evolucionados tienen el doble VVT en admisión Y escape. Consulte las especificaciones de su motor.

es.question: ¿Es la distribución variable de escape tan importante como la de admisión?
es.answer: Tiene menos impacto en las prestaciones percibidas pero más impacto en las emisiones. La inspección técnica puede detectar emisiones anormales vinculadas a una distribución de escape defectuosa.

es.question: ¿Son idénticas las electroválvulas de admisión y de escape?
es.answer: A veces sí, a veces no. Pueden tener caudales diferentes. Verifique la referencia exacta antes de pedir.

pt.question: O meu motor tem duas árvores de cames variáveis?
pt.answer: Nem todos. Os motores simples só têm o VVT na admissão. Os motores mais evoluídos têm o duplo VVT em admissão E escape. Consulte as especificações do seu motor.

pt.question: A distribuição variável de escape é tão importante como a de admissão?
pt.answer: Tem menos impacto no desempenho percebido mas mais impacto nas emissões. A inspeção pode detetar emissões anormais ligadas a uma distribuição de escape avariada.

pt.question: As eletroválvulas de admissão e de escape são idênticas?
pt.answer: Por vezes sim, por vezes não. Podem ter caudais diferentes. Verifique a referência exata antes de encomendar.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Calage arbre a cames B — en avance (banque 1)
name.es: Distribución árbol de levas B – adelantada (banco 1)
name.pt: Distribuição da árvore de cames B – adiantada (banco 1)

description.fr: Le P0014 signale que l'arbre a cames d'echappement est positionne trop en avance par rapport a la consigne du calculateur. Un calage d'echappement en avance ouvre les soupapes d'echappement plus tot, ce qui peut reduire la puissance et modifier la recirculation interne des gaz. Comme pour le P0011, l'huile moteur degradee et l'encrassement de l'electrovanne sont les premieres pistes a investiguer. Le symptome le plus perceptible est souvent un ralenti instable a chaud car le chevauchement soupapes admission-echappement est modifie. Ce code est moins courant que le P0011 car le calage d'echappement est moins sollicite.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0014 code, it is telling you there is a problem with camshaft timing b — over-advanced (bank 1). This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0014 signalisiert, dass die Auslassnockenwelle im Vergleich zum Sollwert des Steuergeräts zu weit vorgestellt positioniert ist. Eine vorgestellte Auslass-Steuerzeit öffnet die Auslassventile früher, was die Leistung reduzieren und die interne Gasrückführung verändern kann. Wie beim P0011 sind verschlechtertes Motoröl und Verschmutzung des Magnetventils die ersten zu untersuchenden Spuren. Das auffälligste Symptom ist oft ein unruhiger Leerlauf im warmen Zustand, da die Ventilüberschneidung von Einlass und Auslass verändert ist. Dieser Code ist weniger häufig als der P0011, da die Auslass-Steuerzeit weniger beansprucht wird.
description.es: El P0014 señala que el árbol de levas de escape está posicionado demasiado adelantado respecto a la consigna de la centralita. Una distribución de escape adelantada abre las válvulas de escape más temprano, lo que puede reducir la potencia y modificar la recirculación interna de los gases. Como con el P0011, el aceite motor degradado y el ensuciamiento de la electroválvula son las primeras pistas a investigar. El síntoma más perceptible suele ser un ralentí inestable en caliente porque el solape de válvulas admisión-escape está modificado. Este código es menos frecuente que el P0011 porque la distribución de escape está menos solicitada.
description.pt: O P0014 sinaliza que a árvore de cames de escape está posicionada demasiado adiantada em relação à referência da centralina. Uma distribuição de escape adiantada abre as válvulas de escape mais cedo, o que pode reduzir a potência e modificar a recirculação interna dos gases. Como com o P0011, o óleo do motor degradado e o entupimento da eletroválvula são as primeiras pistas a investigar. O sintoma mais percetível é muitas vezes um ralenti instável a quente pois a sobreposição de válvulas admissão-escape está modificada. Este código é menos frequente que o P0011 pois a distribuição de escape é menos solicitada.

fr.question: Le P0014 est-il lie a la vidange ?
fr.answer: Souvent oui. Le systeme VVT echappement fonctionne avec la meme huile que le VVT admission. Une huile sale affecte les deux systemes.

fr.question: Mon moteur est instable uniquement a chaud, pourquoi ?
fr.answer: A froid, le VVT est generalement en position par defaut. A chaud, le systeme tente d'ajuster le calage et si l'actuateur est bloque en position avancee, le ralenti en souffre.

fr.question: Combien de codes VVT puis-je avoir en meme temps ?
fr.answer: Jusqu'a 8 sur un moteur V avec double VVT : P0010 a P0017 couvrent les 4 combinaisons (admission/echappement x banque 1/banque 2 x actuateur/calage).

en.question: What does the P0014 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0014 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft timing b — over-advanced (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0014 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0014 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0014 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0014 fault typically range from around £34 to £503, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is degraded engine oil, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der P0014 mit dem Ölwechsel verbunden?
de.answer: Oft ja. Das Auslass-VVT-System arbeitet mit dem gleichen Öl wie das Einlass-VVT. Ein verschmutztes Öl beeinträchtigt beide Systeme.

de.question: Mein Motor ist nur im warmen Zustand unruhig, warum?
de.answer: Im kalten Zustand befindet sich das VVT in der Regel in Standardposition. Im warmen Zustand versucht das System, die Steuerzeit anzupassen, und wenn der Versteller in vorgestellter Position blockiert ist, leidet der Leerlauf darunter.

de.question: Wie viele VVT-Codes kann ich gleichzeitig haben?
de.answer: Bis zu 8 bei einem V-Motor mit Dual-VVT: P0010 bis P0017 decken die 4 Kombinationen ab (Einlass/Auslass x Bank 1/Bank 2 x Versteller/Steuerzeit).

es.question: ¿Está el P0014 vinculado al cambio de aceite?
es.answer: A menudo sí. El sistema VVT de escape funciona con el mismo aceite que el VVT de admisión. Un aceite sucio afecta a los dos sistemas.

es.question: Mi motor es inestable solo en caliente, ¿por qué?
es.answer: En frío, el VVT está generalmente en posición por defecto. En caliente, el sistema intenta ajustar la distribución y si el actuador está bloqueado en posición adelantada, el ralentí sufre.

es.question: ¿Cuántos códigos VVT puedo tener al mismo tiempo?
es.answer: Hasta 8 en un motor V con doble VVT: P0010 a P0017 cubren las 4 combinaciones (admisión/escape x banco 1/banco 2 x actuador/distribución).

pt.question: O P0014 está ligado à mudança de óleo?
pt.answer: Frequentemente sim. O sistema VVT de escape funciona com o mesmo óleo que o VVT de admissão. Um óleo sujo afeta os dois sistemas.

pt.question: O meu motor é instável só a quente, porquê?
pt.answer: A frio, o VVT está geralmente em posição por defeito. A quente, o sistema tenta ajustar a distribuição e se o atuador estiver bloqueado em posição adiantada, o ralenti sofre.

pt.question: Quantos códigos VVT posso ter ao mesmo tempo?
pt.answer: Até 8 num motor V com duplo VVT: P0010 a P0017 cobrem as 4 combinações (admissão/escape x banco 1/banco 2 x atuador/distribuição).

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Calage arbre a cames B — en retard (banque 1)
name.es: Distribución del árbol de levas B — retrasada (banco 1)
name.pt: Sincronização da árvore de cames B — atrasada (banco 1)

description.fr: Le P0015 indique que l'arbre a cames d'echappement est en retard par rapport a la consigne. Les soupapes d'echappement restent ouvertes plus longtemps que prevu, ce qui modifie l'evacuation des gaz brules et le remplissage des cylindres. Le moteur peut hesiter, consommer plus et produire des emissions anormales. C'est un code qui accompagne souvent un P0012 si l'huile degradee affecte les deux circuits VVT en meme temps. La solution est la meme : commencer par une vidange, puis verifier les electrovannes si le code persiste. Sur les moteurs BMW avec VANOS, ce type de code est particulierement frequent et bien documente.
description.en: A P0015 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with camshaft timing b — retarded (bank 1). The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0015 zeigt an, dass die Auslassnockenwelle gegenüber dem Sollwert verzögert ist. Die Auslassventile bleiben länger offen als vorgesehen, was die Abgasausleitung und die Zylinderfüllung verändert. Der Motor kann zögern, mehr verbrauchen und unnormale Emissionen produzieren. Dieser Code tritt oft zusammen mit einem P0012 auf, wenn degradiertes Öl beide VVT-Kreise gleichzeitig beeinträchtigt. Die Lösung ist dieselbe: zuerst ein Ölwechsel, dann die Magnetventile prüfen, falls der Code bestehen bleibt. Bei BMW-Motoren mit VANOS ist dieser Code besonders häufig und gut dokumentiert.
description.es: El P0015 indica que el árbol de levas de escape está retrasado respecto al valor de consigna. Las válvulas de escape permanecen abiertas más tiempo del previsto, lo que modifica la evacuación de los gases quemados y el llenado de los cilindros. El motor puede titubear, consumir más y producir emisiones anormales. Es un código que suele acompañar a un P0012 si el aceite degradado afecta a los dos circuitos VVT al mismo tiempo. La solución es la misma: empezar por un cambio de aceite y después comprobar las electroválvulas si el código persiste. En los motores BMW con VANOS, este tipo de código es especialmente frecuente y está bien documentado.
description.pt: O P0015 indica que a árvore de cames de escape está atrasada em relação ao valor pretendido. As válvulas de escape permanecem abertas mais tempo do que o previsto, o que altera a evacuação dos gases queimados e o enchimento dos cilindros. O motor pode hesitar, consumir mais e produzir emissões anormais. É um código que acompanha frequentemente um P0012 se o óleo degradado afectar os dois circuitos VVT ao mesmo tempo. A solução é a mesma: começar por uma mudança de óleo e depois verificar as electroválvulas se o código persistir. Nos motores BMW com VANOS, este tipo de código é particularmente frequente e bem documentado.

fr.question: J'ai P0012 et P0015, les deux arbres sont en retard ?
fr.answer: Oui, ca suggere un probleme commun aux deux systemes VVT, tres probablement une huile degradee ou un manque de pression d'huile. Commencez par la vidange.

fr.question: C'est frequent sur les BMW ?
fr.answer: Oui, le systeme VANOS de BMW est connu pour ces codes, surtout sur les moteurs 6 cylindres. Des kits de renovation des joints VANOS existent pour un cout raisonnable.

fr.question: La pompe a huile peut-elle etre en cause ?
fr.answer: Si la pompe a huile ne fournit pas assez de pression, les deux actuateurs VVT repondent mal. C'est plus rare mais possible, surtout sur les moteurs avec beaucoup de kilometres.

en.question: What does the P0015 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0015 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft timing b — retarded (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0015 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0015 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0015 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0015 fault typically range from around £34 to £511, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is engine oil needs replacing, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ich habe P0012 und P0015, sind beide Nockenwellen verzögert?
de.answer: Ja, das deutet auf ein gemeinsames Problem beider VVT-Systeme hin, sehr wahrscheinlich degradiertes Öl oder mangelnder Öldruck. Beginnen Sie mit einem Ölwechsel.

de.question: Kommt das bei BMW häufig vor?
de.answer: Ja, das VANOS-System von BMW ist für diese Codes bekannt, vor allem bei 6-Zylinder-Motoren. Es gibt Dichtungssätze zur VANOS-Überholung zu einem vernünftigen Preis.

de.question: Kann die Ölpumpe die Ursache sein?
de.answer: Wenn die Ölpumpe nicht genug Druck liefert, reagieren beide VVT-Aktuatoren schlecht. Das ist seltener, aber möglich, besonders bei Motoren mit hoher Laufleistung.

es.question: Tengo P0012 y P0015, ¿los dos árboles están retrasados?
es.answer: Sí, eso sugiere un problema común a ambos sistemas VVT, muy probablemente aceite degradado o falta de presión de aceite. Empiece por el cambio de aceite.

es.question: ¿Es frecuente en los BMW?
es.answer: Sí, el sistema VANOS de BMW es conocido por estos códigos, sobre todo en motores de 6 cilindros. Existen kits de renovación de juntas VANOS por un coste razonable.

es.question: ¿Puede estar implicada la bomba de aceite?
es.answer: Si la bomba de aceite no proporciona suficiente presión, los dos actuadores VVT responden mal. Es más raro pero posible, sobre todo en motores con muchos kilómetros.

pt.question: Tenho P0012 e P0015, as duas árvores de cames estão atrasadas?
pt.answer: Sim, isso sugere um problema comum aos dois sistemas VVT, muito provavelmente óleo degradado ou falta de pressão de óleo. Comece pela mudança de óleo.

pt.question: É frequente nos BMW?
pt.answer: Sim, o sistema VANOS da BMW é conhecido por estes códigos, sobretudo nos motores de 6 cilindros. Existem kits de recuperação das juntas VANOS por um custo razoável.

pt.question: A bomba de óleo pode ser a causa?
pt.answer: Se a bomba de óleo não fornece pressão suficiente, os dois actuadores VVT respondem mal. É mais raro mas possível, sobretudo em motores com muitos quilómetros.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Correlation vilebrequin/arbre a cames — banque 1 capteur A
name.es: Correlación cigüeñal/árbol de levas — banco 1 sensor A
name.pt: Correlação cambota/árvore de cames — banco 1 sensor A

description.fr: Le P0016 indique que les signaux du capteur de vilebrequin et du capteur d'arbre a cames ne sont pas synchronises comme prevu. Le calculateur compare la position du vilebrequin avec celle de l'arbre a cames pour verifier que la distribution est correctement calee. Si les signaux ne correspondent pas, soit la chaine ou courroie de distribution a saute d'un cran, soit un des capteurs est defaillant, soit le systeme VVT est bloque dans une position incorrecte. C'est un code a prendre au serieux car une distribution decalee peut endommager les soupapes sur les moteurs a interference. Verifiez d'abord le VVT et les capteurs avant de suspecter la distribution elle-meme.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0016 relates to crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 1 sensor a, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0016 zeigt an, dass die Signale des Kurbelwellensensors und des Nockenwellensensors nicht wie vorgesehen synchronisiert sind. Das Steuergerät vergleicht die Position der Kurbelwelle mit der der Nockenwelle, um zu prüfen, ob die Steuerzeit korrekt eingestellt ist. Wenn die Signale nicht übereinstimmen, ist entweder die Steuerkette oder der Zahnriemen um einen Zahn übergesprungen, einer der Sensoren ist defekt, oder das VVT-System ist in einer falschen Position blockiert. Das ist ein ernst zu nehmender Code, denn eine verstellte Steuerzeit kann bei Interferenz-Motoren die Ventile beschädigen. Prüfen Sie zuerst VVT und Sensoren, bevor Sie die Steuerzeit selbst verdächtigen.
description.es: El P0016 indica que las señales del sensor de cigüeñal y del sensor de árbol de levas no están sincronizadas como se espera. La centralita compara la posición del cigüeñal con la del árbol de levas para verificar que la distribución está correctamente calada. Si las señales no coinciden, o bien la cadena o correa de distribución ha saltado un diente, o uno de los sensores está averiado, o el sistema VVT está bloqueado en una posición incorrecta. Es un código a tomar en serio porque una distribución desfasada puede dañar las válvulas en motores de interferencia. Verifique primero el VVT y los sensores antes de sospechar de la propia distribución.
description.pt: O P0016 indica que os sinais do sensor de cambota e do sensor da árvore de cames não estão sincronizados como previsto. A centralina compara a posição da cambota com a da árvore de cames para verificar se a distribuição está correctamente sincronizada. Se os sinais não corresponderem, ou a corrente ou correia de distribuição saltou um dente, ou um dos sensores está avariado, ou o sistema VVT está bloqueado numa posição incorrecta. É um código a levar a sério porque uma distribuição desalinhada pode danificar as válvulas em motores de interferência. Verifique primeiro o VVT e os sensores antes de suspeitar da própria distribuição.

fr.question: Une chaine de distribution peut-elle s'etirer ?
fr.answer: Oui, avec le temps et les kilometres, les maillons s'usent et la chaine s'allonge. Cela decale la synchronisation moteur et peut provoquer le P0016. Un bruit de ferraille au demarrage a froid est souvent le premier signe.

fr.question: Mon moteur est-il a interference ?
fr.answer: La plupart des moteurs modernes sont a interference, ce qui signifie que les soupapes et les pistons partagent le meme espace a des moments differents. Si la distribution saute, les pistons frappent les soupapes — c'est un moteur casse.

fr.question: Est-ce que ca peut etre juste le VVT ?
fr.answer: Oui, un VVT bloque en mauvaise position donne un signal d'arbre a cames decale par rapport au vilebrequin. C'est la cause la plus frequente de ce code et la moins couteuse a reparer.

en.question: What does the P0016 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0016 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 1 sensor a. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0016 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0016 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0016 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0016 fault typically range from around £42 to £1010, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is vvt system stuck, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann sich eine Steuerkette dehnen?
de.answer: Ja, mit der Zeit und den Kilometern verschleißen die Kettenglieder und die Kette längt sich. Das verschiebt die Motorsynchronisation und kann den P0016 verursachen. Ein klapperndes Geräusch beim Kaltstart ist oft das erste Anzeichen.

de.question: Ist mein Motor ein Interferenz-Motor?
de.answer: Die meisten modernen Motoren sind Interferenz-Motoren, das heißt Ventile und Kolben teilen sich denselben Raum zu unterschiedlichen Zeiten. Wenn die Steuerzeit überspringt, schlagen die Kolben auf die Ventile — das bedeutet einen Motorschaden.

de.question: Kann es nur am VVT liegen?
de.answer: Ja, ein in einer falschen Position blockiertes VVT liefert ein gegenüber der Kurbelwelle verschobenes Nockenwellensignal. Das ist die häufigste Ursache dieses Codes und die am wenigsten kostspielige Reparatur.

es.question: ¿Puede estirarse una cadena de distribución?
es.answer: Sí, con el tiempo y los kilómetros los eslabones se desgastan y la cadena se alarga. Esto desfasa la sincronización del motor y puede provocar el P0016. Un ruido metálico en el arranque en frío suele ser el primer síntoma.

es.question: ¿Mi motor es de interferencia?
es.answer: La mayoría de los motores modernos son de interferencia, lo que significa que las válvulas y los pistones comparten el mismo espacio en momentos diferentes. Si la distribución salta, los pistones golpean las válvulas — es un motor roto.

es.question: ¿Puede ser solo el VVT?
es.answer: Sí, un VVT bloqueado en mala posición da una señal de árbol de levas desfasada respecto al cigüeñal. Es la causa más frecuente de este código y la menos costosa de reparar.

pt.question: Uma corrente de distribuição pode esticar?
pt.answer: Sim, com o tempo e os quilómetros, os elos desgastam-se e a corrente alonga. Isto desloca a sincronização do motor e pode provocar o P0016. Um ruído metálico no arranque a frio é frequentemente o primeiro sinal.

pt.question: O meu motor é de interferência?
pt.answer: A maioria dos motores modernos é de interferência, o que significa que as válvulas e os pistões partilham o mesmo espaço em momentos diferentes. Se a distribuição saltar, os pistões batem nas válvulas — é um motor destruído.

pt.question: Pode ser apenas o VVT?
pt.answer: Sim, um VVT bloqueado em má posição dá um sinal de árvore de cames desfasado em relação à cambota. É a causa mais frequente deste código e a menos dispendiosa de reparar.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

name.fr: Correlation vilebrequin/arbre a cames — banque 1 capteur B
name.es: Correlación cigüeñal/árbol de levas — banco 1 sensor B
name.pt: Correlação cambota/árvore de cames — banco 1 sensor B

description.fr: Le P0017 est l'equivalent du P0016 mais pour l'arbre a cames d'echappement (B). La correlation entre la position du vilebrequin et de l'arbre a cames d'echappement ne correspond pas aux attentes du calculateur. Les causes sont identiques : distribution decalee, capteur defaillant ou VVT echappement bloque. Si les codes P0016 et P0017 apparaissent ensemble, c'est un indicateur fort que la chaine ou la courroie de distribution est en cause car les deux arbres a cames sont decales simultanement. Si un seul code est present, le VVT ou le capteur du cote concerne est plus probablement en cause.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0017 code, it is telling you there is a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 1 sensor b. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0017 ist das Äquivalent zum P0016, aber für die Auslassnockenwelle (B). Die Korrelation zwischen der Position der Kurbelwelle und der Auslassnockenwelle entspricht nicht den Erwartungen des Steuergeräts. Die Ursachen sind identisch: verstellte Steuerzeit, defekter Sensor oder blockiertes Auslass-VVT. Wenn die Codes P0016 und P0017 zusammen erscheinen, ist das ein starker Hinweis darauf, dass die Steuerkette oder der Zahnriemen die Ursache ist, da beide Nockenwellen gleichzeitig verschoben sind. Wenn nur ein Code vorliegt, ist eher das VVT oder der Sensor auf der betroffenen Seite die Ursache.
description.es: El P0017 es el equivalente del P0016 pero para el árbol de levas de escape (B). La correlación entre la posición del cigüeñal y del árbol de levas de escape no coincide con las expectativas de la centralita. Las causas son idénticas: distribución desfasada, sensor averiado o VVT de escape bloqueado. Si los códigos P0016 y P0017 aparecen juntos, es un fuerte indicador de que la cadena o correa de distribución está implicada, ya que los dos árboles de levas están desfasados simultáneamente. Si solo hay un código presente, el VVT o el sensor del lado afectado es la causa más probable.
description.pt: O P0017 é o equivalente do P0016 mas para a árvore de cames de escape (B). A correlação entre a posição da cambota e da árvore de cames de escape não corresponde às expectativas da centralina. As causas são idênticas: distribuição desalinhada, sensor avariado ou VVT de escape bloqueado. Se os códigos P0016 e P0017 aparecem em conjunto, é um forte indicador de que a corrente ou correia de distribuição está em causa, uma vez que as duas árvores de cames estão desalinhadas simultaneamente. Se apenas um código está presente, o VVT ou o sensor do lado afectado é mais provavelmente a causa.

name.es: Sensor de árbol de levas B
name.pt: Sensor de árvore de cames B

fr.question: J'ai P0016 et P0017 ensemble, c'est grave ?
fr.answer: C'est un indicateur serieux. Si les deux arbres a cames sont decales par rapport au vilebrequin, la distribution est probablement la cause. Faites verifier rapidement avant de continuer a rouler.

fr.question: Le tendeur de chaine peut-il etre la cause ?
fr.answer: Oui, un tendeur de chaine use ne maintient plus la tension correcte. La chaine prend du jeu et peut sauter d'un cran. Le tendeur et les patins s'usent avec le temps.

fr.question: Combien coute un remplacement de chaine de distribution ?
fr.answer: Entre 300 et 1200 euros selon le moteur. Les moteurs avec la chaine a l'arriere (certains Audi, VW) sont plus chers car l'acces est plus complexe.

en.question: What does the P0017 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0017 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 1 sensor b. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0017 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0017 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0017 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0017 fault typically range from around £43 to £1043, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is exhaust vvt stuck, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ich habe P0016 und P0017 zusammen, ist das schlimm?
de.answer: Das ist ein ernstes Zeichen. Wenn beide Nockenwellen gegenüber der Kurbelwelle verschoben sind, ist wahrscheinlich die Steuerzeit die Ursache. Lassen Sie es schnell prüfen, bevor Sie weiterfahren.

de.question: Kann der Kettenspanner die Ursache sein?
de.answer: Ja, ein verschlissener Kettenspanner hält die korrekte Spannung nicht mehr aufrecht. Die Kette bekommt Spiel und kann einen Zahn überspringen. Spanner und Gleitschienen verschleißen mit der Zeit.

de.question: Wie viel kostet ein Steuerkettenwechsel?
de.answer: Zwischen 300 und 1200 Euro je nach Motor. Motoren mit der Kette auf der Getriebeseite (einige Audi, VW) sind teurer, weil der Zugang komplexer ist.

es.question: Tengo P0016 y P0017 juntos, ¿es grave?
es.answer: Es un indicador serio. Si los dos árboles de levas están desfasados respecto al cigüeñal, la distribución es probablemente la causa. Haga revisar rápidamente antes de seguir conduciendo.

es.question: ¿Puede ser el tensor de cadena la causa?
es.answer: Sí, un tensor de cadena desgastado ya no mantiene la tensión correcta. La cadena adquiere holgura y puede saltar un diente. El tensor y los patines se desgastan con el tiempo.

es.question: ¿Cuánto cuesta sustituir una cadena de distribución?
es.answer: Entre 300 y 1200 euros según el motor. Los motores con la cadena trasera (algunos Audi, VW) son más caros porque el acceso es más complejo.

pt.question: Tenho P0016 e P0017 juntos, é grave?
pt.answer: É um indicador sério. Se as duas árvores de cames estão desalinhadas em relação à cambota, a distribuição é provavelmente a causa. Mande verificar rapidamente antes de continuar a conduzir.

pt.question: O tensor da corrente pode ser a causa?
pt.answer: Sim, um tensor de corrente gasto já não mantém a tensão correcta. A corrente ganha folga e pode saltar um dente. O tensor e os patins desgastam-se com o tempo.

pt.question: Quanto custa a substituição de uma corrente de distribuição?
pt.answer: Entre 300 e 1200 euros conforme o motor. Os motores com a corrente na parte traseira (alguns Audi, VW) são mais caros porque o acesso é mais complexo.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

name.fr: Pression de rampe carburant trop basse
name.es: Presión del raíl de combustible demasiado baja
name.pt: Pressão da rampa de combustível demasiado baixa

description.fr: Le P0087 signale que la pression dans la rampe d'injection est en dessous de la valeur minimale demandee par le calculateur. Sur les moteurs diesel common rail et les moteurs essence a injection directe, la pression de rampe est critique pour une bonne pulverisation du carburant. Une pression trop basse degrade la combustion, provoque des rates d'allumage et une perte de puissance. La pompe haute pression qui s'use, un filtre a carburant bouche, un regulateur de pression defaillant ou un retour d'injecteur excessif sont les causes principales. Ce code met souvent le moteur en mode degrade pour proteger les composants d'injection.
description.en: A P0087 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with fuel rail pressure too low. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0087 meldet, dass der Druck in der Einspritzleiste unter dem vom Steuergerät geforderten Mindestwert liegt. Bei Common-Rail-Dieselmotoren und Benzinmotoren mit Direkteinspritzung ist der Raildruck für eine gute Kraftstoffzerstäubung entscheidend. Ein zu niedriger Druck verschlechtert die Verbrennung, verursacht Zündaussetzer und Leistungsverlust. Die Hauptursachen sind eine verschlissene Hochdruckpumpe, ein verstopfter Kraftstofffilter, ein defekter Druckregler oder ein übermäßiger Einspritzventil-Rücklauf. Dieser Code versetzt den Motor oft in den Notlauf, um die Einspritzkomponenten zu schützen.
description.es: El P0087 señala que la presión en el raíl de inyección está por debajo del valor mínimo solicitado por la centralita. En los motores diésel common rail y los motores de gasolina de inyección directa, la presión del raíl es crítica para una buena pulverización del combustible. Una presión demasiado baja degrada la combustión, provoca fallos de encendido y pérdida de potencia. Las causas principales son una bomba de alta presión desgastada, un filtro de combustible obstruido, un regulador de presión averiado o un retorno de inyector excesivo. Este código suele poner el motor en modo de emergencia para proteger los componentes de inyección.
description.pt: O P0087 assinala que a pressão na rampa de injecção está abaixo do valor mínimo exigido pela centralina. Nos motores diesel common rail e motores a gasolina de injecção directa, a pressão da rampa é crítica para uma boa pulverização do combustível. Uma pressão demasiado baixa degrada a combustão, provoca falhas de ignição e perda de potência. As causas principais são uma bomba de alta pressão gasta, um filtro de combustível obstruído, um regulador de pressão avariado ou um retorno de injector excessivo. Este código põe frequentemente o motor em modo de emergência para proteger os componentes de injecção.

fr.question: Le filtre a carburant peut-il causer une baisse de pression ?
fr.answer: Absolument. Un filtre bouche restreint le debit de carburant vers la pompe HP. C'est la premiere chose a verifier et la moins chere. Changez le filtre si vous ne savez pas quand il a ete fait.

fr.question: La pompe haute pression est-elle fiable ?
fr.answer: Elle est concue pour durer la vie du moteur, mais les conditions d'utilisation (qualite du gasoil, entretien du filtre) influencent beaucoup sa longevite. Les pompes Bosch CP1 et Delphi sont reputees fiables.

fr.question: Un carburant de mauvaise qualite peut-il causer ce probleme ?
fr.answer: Oui, du gasoil contamine ou de l'eau dans le reservoir peut endommager la pompe HP et les injecteurs. Evitez les stations douteuses et changez votre filtre a eau regulierement.

en.question: What does the P0087 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0087 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel rail pressure too low. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0087 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0087 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0087 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0087 fault typically range from around £17 to £1261, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is blocked fuel filter, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann der Kraftstofffilter einen Druckabfall verursachen?
de.answer: Absolut. Ein verstopfter Filter drosselt den Kraftstoffdurchfluss zur HD-Pumpe. Das ist das Erste, was man prüfen sollte, und die günstigste Lösung. Wechseln Sie den Filter, wenn Sie nicht wissen, wann er zuletzt erneuert wurde.

de.question: Ist die Hochdruckpumpe zuverlässig?
de.answer: Sie ist für die gesamte Motorlebensdauer ausgelegt, aber die Einsatzbedingungen (Dieselqualität, Filterwartung) beeinflussen ihre Lebensdauer stark. Bosch CP1- und Delphi-Pumpen gelten als zuverlässig.

de.question: Kann schlechter Kraftstoff dieses Problem verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, verunreinigter Diesel oder Wasser im Tank kann die HD-Pumpe und die Einspritzventile beschädigen. Meiden Sie zweifelhafte Tankstellen und wechseln Sie regelmäßig den Wasserabscheider.

es.question: ¿Puede el filtro de combustible causar una bajada de presión?
es.answer: Absolutamente. Un filtro obstruido restringe el caudal de combustible hacia la bomba de alta presión. Es lo primero que hay que comprobar y lo más barato. Cambie el filtro si no sabe cuándo se hizo.

es.question: ¿Es fiable la bomba de alta presión?
es.answer: Está diseñada para durar la vida del motor, pero las condiciones de uso (calidad del gasóleo, mantenimiento del filtro) influyen mucho en su longevidad. Las bombas Bosch CP1 y Delphi tienen fama de fiables.

es.question: ¿Puede un combustible de mala calidad causar este problema?
es.answer: Sí, gasóleo contaminado o agua en el depósito puede dañar la bomba de alta presión y los inyectores. Evite las estaciones dudosas y cambie su filtro separador de agua regularmente.

pt.question: O filtro de combustível pode causar uma descida de pressão?
pt.answer: Absolutamente. Um filtro obstruído restringe o caudal de combustível para a bomba de alta pressão. É a primeira coisa a verificar e a mais barata. Mude o filtro se não souber quando foi feito.

pt.question: A bomba de alta pressão é fiável?
pt.answer: É concebida para durar a vida do motor, mas as condições de utilização (qualidade do gasóleo, manutenção do filtro) influenciam muito a sua longevidade. As bombas Bosch CP1 e Delphi têm fama de fiáveis.

pt.question: Um combustível de má qualidade pode causar este problema?
pt.answer: Sim, gasóleo contaminado ou água no depósito pode danificar a bomba de alta pressão e os injectores. Evite estações duvidosas e mude regularmente o seu filtro separador de água.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

name.fr: Pression de rampe carburant trop haute
name.es: Presión del raíl de combustible demasiado alta
name.pt: Pressão da rampa de combustível demasiado alta

description.fr: Le P0088 est l'inverse du P0087 : la pression dans la rampe d'injection depasse la valeur maximale autorisee. C'est potentiellement dangereux car une surpression peut endommager les injecteurs, faire eclater un tuyau haute pression ou provoquer une fuite de carburant. Le regulateur de pression, qui est cense limiter la pression en laissant le carburant retourner au reservoir, est generalement bloque ferme. Un capteur de pression defaillant qui envoie une valeur trop basse au calculateur peut aussi pousser celui-ci a augmenter la pression au-dela de la normale. Le calculateur coupe normalement l'injection si la pression depasse un seuil critique pour proteger le systeme.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0088 relates to fuel rail pressure too high, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0088 ist das Gegenteil des P0087: Der Druck in der Einspritzleiste überschreitet den maximal zulässigen Wert. Das ist potenziell gefährlich, da ein Überdruck die Einspritzventile beschädigen, eine Hochdruckleitung platzen lassen oder ein Kraftstoffleck verursachen kann. Der Druckregler, der den Druck begrenzen soll, indem er Kraftstoff zum Tank zurückfließen lässt, ist meistens in geschlossener Stellung festgefahren. Ein defekter Drucksensor, der einen zu niedrigen Wert an das Steuergerät sendet, kann dieses ebenfalls dazu bringen, den Druck über das Normale hinaus zu erhöhen. Das Steuergerät schaltet normalerweise die Einspritzung ab, wenn der Druck einen kritischen Schwellenwert überschreitet, um das System zu schützen.
description.es: El P0088 es el inverso del P0087: la presión en el raíl de inyección supera el valor máximo autorizado. Es potencialmente peligroso porque una sobrepresión puede dañar los inyectores, hacer estallar un tubo de alta presión o provocar una fuga de combustible. El regulador de presión, que se supone debe limitar la presión dejando volver el combustible al depósito, suele estar bloqueado en posición cerrada. Un sensor de presión averiado que envíe un valor demasiado bajo a la centralita también puede empujarla a aumentar la presión por encima de lo normal. La centralita corta normalmente la inyección si la presión supera un umbral crítico para proteger el sistema.
description.pt: O P0088 é o inverso do P0087: a pressão na rampa de injecção ultrapassa o valor máximo autorizado. É potencialmente perigoso porque uma sobrepressão pode danificar os injectores, rebentar um tubo de alta pressão ou provocar uma fuga de combustível. O regulador de pressão, que deve limitar a pressão deixando o combustível voltar ao depósito, está geralmente bloqueado na posição fechada. Um sensor de pressão avariado que envie um valor demasiado baixo para a centralina também pode levá-la a aumentar a pressão acima do normal. A centralina corta normalmente a injecção se a pressão ultrapassar um limiar crítico para proteger o sistema.

fr.question: Une surpression peut-elle etre dangereuse ?
fr.answer: Oui, sur les diesels common rail les pressions atteignent 2000 bars. Un tuyau qui eclate projette du carburant a haute pression, ce qui est un risque d'incendie et de blessure.

fr.question: Le moteur s'arrete-t-il automatiquement ?
fr.answer: Le calculateur coupe l'injection si la pression depasse le seuil critique. C'est un dispositif de securite integre pour eviter les dommages.

fr.question: Peut-on rouler apres la coupure ?
fr.answer: Si le moteur s'est arrete pour surpression, ne le redemarrez pas sans avoir diagnostique la cause. Faire tourner le moteur avec un regulateur bloque peut endommager des composants couteux.

en.question: What does the P0088 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0088 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel rail pressure too high. This is a critical-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0088 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0088 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0088 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0088 fault typically range from around £44 to £349, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is pressure regulator stuck closed, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann ein Überdruck gefährlich sein?
de.answer: Ja, bei Common-Rail-Dieselmotoren erreichen die Drücke 2000 bar. Eine platzende Leitung sprüht Kraftstoff unter Hochdruck, was Brand- und Verletzungsgefahr bedeutet.

de.question: Schaltet sich der Motor automatisch ab?
de.answer: Das Steuergerät schaltet die Einspritzung ab, wenn der Druck den kritischen Schwellenwert überschreitet. Das ist ein integrierter Sicherheitsmechanismus, um Schäden zu vermeiden.

de.question: Kann man nach der Abschaltung weiterfahren?
de.answer: Wenn der Motor wegen Überdruck gestoppt ist, starten Sie ihn nicht wieder, ohne die Ursache diagnostiziert zu haben. Den Motor mit einem blockierten Regler laufen zu lassen, kann teure Komponenten beschädigen.

es.question: ¿Puede ser peligrosa una sobrepresión?
es.answer: Sí, en los diésel common rail las presiones alcanzan 2000 bares. Un tubo que estalla proyecta combustible a alta presión, lo que supone riesgo de incendio y lesiones.

es.question: ¿El motor se detiene automáticamente?
es.answer: La centralita corta la inyección si la presión supera el umbral crítico. Es un dispositivo de seguridad integrado para evitar daños.

es.question: ¿Se puede conducir tras el corte?
es.answer: Si el motor se ha detenido por sobrepresión, no lo vuelva a arrancar sin haber diagnosticado la causa. Hacer funcionar el motor con un regulador bloqueado puede dañar componentes costosos.

pt.question: Uma sobrepressão pode ser perigosa?
pt.answer: Sim, nos diesel common rail as pressões atingem 2000 bar. Um tubo que rebenta projecta combustível a alta pressão, o que representa risco de incêndio e ferimentos.

pt.question: O motor pára-se automaticamente?
pt.answer: A centralina corta a injecção se a pressão ultrapassar o limiar crítico. É um dispositivo de segurança integrado para evitar danos.

pt.question: Pode-se conduzir após o corte?
pt.answer: Se o motor se desligou por sobrepressão, não volte a arrancá-lo sem ter diagnosticado a causa. Fazer funcionar o motor com um regulador bloqueado pode danificar componentes caros.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

name.en: Mass air flow sensor (MAF) — circuit fault
name.es: Caudalímetro de aire (MAF) — fallo de circuito
name.pt: Caudalímetro de ar (MAF) — falha de circuito

description.fr: Le P0100 signale un probleme sur le circuit du debitmetre d'air massique (MAF). Ce capteur mesure la quantite d'air qui entre dans le moteur, information essentielle pour doser le carburant. Le capteur utilise un fil chaud ou un film chaud dont la temperature change en fonction du debit d'air. Si le circuit est defaillant — signal absent, court-circuit ou tension hors plage — le calculateur utilise une valeur estimee basee sur la position du papillon et le regime moteur. Cette estimation est moins precise que la mesure reelle, ce qui degrade le dosage et augmente la consommation. Le debitmetre est souvent situe entre le filtre a air et le papillon des gaz.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0100 code, it is telling you there is a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — circuit fault. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0100 signalisiert ein Problem im Schaltkreis des Luftmassenmessers (MAF). Dieser Sensor misst die in den Motor eintretende Luftmenge, eine wesentliche Information für die Kraftstoffdosierung. Der Sensor verwendet einen Heißdraht oder Heißfilm, dessen Temperatur sich je nach Luftdurchsatz ändert. Ist der Schaltkreis defekt — fehlendes Signal, Kurzschluss oder Spannung außerhalb des Bereichs — verwendet das Steuergerät einen geschätzten Wert auf Basis von Drosselklappenstellung und Drehzahl. Diese Schätzung ist weniger genau als die tatsächliche Messung, was die Dosierung verschlechtert und den Verbrauch erhöht. Der Luftmassenmesser sitzt oft zwischen Luftfilter und Drosselklappe.
description.es: El P0100 señala un problema en el circuito del caudalímetro de masa de aire (MAF). Este sensor mide la cantidad de aire que entra en el motor, información esencial para dosificar el combustible. El sensor utiliza un hilo caliente o una película caliente cuya temperatura cambia en función del caudal de aire. Si el circuito está averiado — señal ausente, cortocircuito o tensión fuera de rango — la centralita utiliza un valor estimado basado en la posición de la mariposa y el régimen del motor. Esta estimación es menos precisa que la medición real, lo que degrada la dosificación y aumenta el consumo. El caudalímetro suele estar situado entre el filtro de aire y la mariposa del acelerador.
description.pt: O P0100 assinala um problema no circuito do caudalímetro de massa de ar (MAF). Este sensor mede a quantidade de ar que entra no motor, informação essencial para dosear o combustível. O sensor utiliza um fio quente ou uma película quente cuja temperatura muda em função do caudal de ar. Se o circuito está avariado — sinal ausente, curto-circuito ou tensão fora do intervalo — a centralina utiliza um valor estimado baseado na posição da borboleta e no regime do motor. Esta estimativa é menos precisa do que a medição real, o que degrada a dosagem e aumenta o consumo. O caudalímetro está frequentemente situado entre o filtro de ar e a borboleta de aceleração.

pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

fr.question: Peut-on nettoyer le debitmetre ?
fr.answer: Oui, avec un spray nettoyant specifique MAF. Pulverisez sur le fil ou film chaud et laissez secher. Ne touchez jamais l'element sensible avec les doigts ou un chiffon.

fr.question: Un filtre a air sale peut-il endommager le MAF ?
fr.answer: Oui, un filtre a air use laisse passer des particules qui se deposent sur l'element sensible du debitmetre. C'est pourquoi il faut changer le filtre regulierement.

fr.question: Les filtres a air sport affectent-ils le MAF ?
fr.answer: Certains filtres sport huilés peuvent contaminer le fil chaud du debitmetre avec des residus d'huile. Preferez les filtres sport secs ou les filtres d'origine.

en.question: What does the P0100 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0100 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0100 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0100 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0100 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0100 fault typically range from around £13 to £300, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty maf sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann man den Luftmassenmesser reinigen?
de.answer: Ja, mit einem speziellen MAF-Reinigungsspray. Auf den Heißdraht oder Heißfilm sprühen und trocknen lassen. Das empfindliche Element niemals mit den Fingern oder einem Tuch berühren.

de.question: Kann ein schmutziger Luftfilter den MAF beschädigen?
de.answer: Ja, ein verschlissener Luftfilter lässt Partikel durch, die sich auf dem empfindlichen Element des Sensors ablagern. Deshalb muss der Filter regelmäßig gewechselt werden.

de.question: Beeinträchtigen Sportluftfilter den MAF?
de.answer: Einige geölte Sportluftfilter können den Heißdraht des Sensors mit Ölrückständen verunreinigen. Bevorzugen Sie trockene Sportfilter oder Originalfilter.

es.question: ¿Se puede limpiar el caudalímetro?
es.answer: Sí, con un spray limpiador específico para MAF. Pulverice sobre el hilo o película caliente y deje secar. Nunca toque el elemento sensible con los dedos o un trapo.

es.question: ¿Puede un filtro de aire sucio dañar el MAF?
es.answer: Sí, un filtro de aire desgastado deja pasar partículas que se depositan sobre el elemento sensible del caudalímetro. Por eso hay que cambiar el filtro regularmente.

es.question: ¿Afectan los filtros sport al MAF?
es.answer: Algunos filtros sport engrasados pueden contaminar el hilo caliente del caudalímetro con residuos de aceite. Prefiera filtros sport secos o filtros originales.

pt.question: Pode-se limpar o caudalímetro?
pt.answer: Sim, com um spray de limpeza específico para MAF. Pulverize sobre o fio ou película quente e deixe secar. Nunca toque no elemento sensível com os dedos ou um pano.

pt.question: Um filtro de ar sujo pode danificar o MAF?
pt.answer: Sim, um filtro de ar gasto deixa passar partículas que se depositam no elemento sensível do caudalímetro. Por isso é preciso mudar o filtro regularmente.

pt.question: Os filtros desportivos afectam o MAF?
pt.answer: Alguns filtros desportivos lubrificados podem contaminar o fio quente do caudalímetro com resíduos de óleo. Prefira filtros desportivos secos ou filtros de origem.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0101 est plus subtil que le P0100 : le debitmetre fonctionne mais ses valeurs sont incoherentes avec les autres parametres du moteur. Le calculateur compare le debit d'air mesure avec ce qu'il attend en fonction du regime, de la charge et de la position du papillon. Si les valeurs ne collent pas, ce code est enregistre. Un debitmetre encrasse qui sous-estime le debit d'air est la cause la plus frequente. Une prise d'air entre le debitmetre et le papillon fausse aussi la mesure car de l'air non mesure entre dans le moteur. Le conduit d'air entre le filtre et le papillon peut avoir une fissure que l'on ne voit pas facilement.
description.en: A P0101 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — range/performance. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0101 ist subtiler als der P0100: Der Luftmassenmesser funktioniert, aber seine Werte stimmen nicht mit den anderen Motorparametern überein. Das Steuergerät vergleicht den gemessenen Luftdurchsatz mit dem, was es aufgrund von Drehzahl, Last und Drosselklappenstellung erwartet. Wenn die Werte nicht passen, wird dieser Code gespeichert. Ein verschmutzter Luftmassenmesser, der den Luftdurchsatz unterschätzt, ist die häufigste Ursache. Ein Luftleck zwischen Luftmassenmesser und Drosselklappe verfälscht ebenfalls die Messung, da ungemessene Luft in den Motor gelangt. Der Luftkanal zwischen Filter und Drosselklappe kann einen Riss haben, der nicht leicht zu erkennen ist.
description.es: El P0101 es más sutil que el P0100: el caudalímetro funciona pero sus valores son incoherentes con los demás parámetros del motor. La centralita compara el caudal de aire medido con lo que espera en función del régimen, la carga y la posición de la mariposa. Si los valores no coinciden, se registra este código. Un caudalímetro sucio que subestima el caudal de aire es la causa más frecuente. Una entrada de aire entre el caudalímetro y la mariposa también falsea la medición porque entra aire no medido en el motor. El conducto de aire entre el filtro y la mariposa puede tener una fisura que no se ve fácilmente.
description.pt: O P0101 é mais subtil do que o P0100: o caudalímetro funciona mas os seus valores são incoerentes com os outros parâmetros do motor. A centralina compara o caudal de ar medido com o que espera em função do regime, da carga e da posição da borboleta. Se os valores não baterem certo, este código é registado. Um caudalímetro sujo que subestima o caudal de ar é a causa mais frequente. Uma entrada de ar entre o caudalímetro e a borboleta também falseia a medição porque entra ar não medido no motor. A conduta de ar entre o filtro e a borboleta pode ter uma fissura que não se vê facilmente.

name.es: Entrada de aire después del MAF
name.pt: Entrada de ar depois do MAF

fr.question: Comment detecter une prise d'air apres le debitmetre ?
fr.answer: Pulverisez du nettoyant frein (moteur tournant au ralenti) le long du conduit d'air et des raccords. Si le regime change quand vous pulverisez a un endroit, c'est la que l'air entre.

fr.question: Le debitmetre peut-il etre encrasse sans etre en panne ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est meme tres courant. Le fil chaud se couvre progressivement de depots qui faussent la mesure. Un nettoyage peut restaurer 95% de la precision.

fr.question: Quel est l'impact reel sur la consommation ?
fr.answer: Un debitmetre qui sous-estime le debit de 10% fait injecter 10% de carburant en trop. Sur un plein de 50 litres, ca fait 5 litres gaspilles. A 1.80 euro le litre, ca chiffre vite.

en.question: What does the P0101 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0101 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — range/performance. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0101 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0101 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0101 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0101 fault typically range from around £17 to £293, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is dirty maf sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Wie erkenne ich ein Luftleck nach dem Luftmassenmesser?
de.answer: Sprühen Sie Bremsenreiniger (bei laufendem Motor im Leerlauf) entlang des Luftkanals und der Verbindungen. Wenn sich die Drehzahl ändert, wenn Sie an einer Stelle sprühen, dringt dort Luft ein.

de.question: Kann der Luftmassenmesser verschmutzt sein, ohne defekt zu sein?
de.answer: Ja, das ist sogar sehr verbreitet. Der Heißdraht bedeckt sich nach und nach mit Ablagerungen, die die Messung verfälschen. Eine Reinigung kann 95 % der Genauigkeit wiederherstellen.

de.question: Wie groß ist die tatsächliche Auswirkung auf den Verbrauch?
de.answer: Ein Luftmassenmesser, der den Durchsatz um 10 % unterschätzt, lässt 10 % zu viel Kraftstoff einspritzen. Bei einer Tankfüllung von 50 Litern sind das 5 verschwendete Liter. Bei 1,80 Euro pro Liter summiert sich das schnell.

es.question: ¿Cómo detectar una entrada de aire después del caudalímetro?
es.answer: Pulverice limpiador de frenos (con el motor al ralentí) a lo largo del conducto de aire y las uniones. Si el régimen cambia al pulverizar en un punto, es ahí donde entra el aire.

es.question: ¿Puede estar sucio el caudalímetro sin estar averiado?
es.answer: Sí, es incluso muy común. El hilo caliente se cubre progresivamente de depósitos que falsean la medición. Una limpieza puede restaurar el 95% de la precisión.

es.question: ¿Cuál es el impacto real en el consumo?
es.answer: Un caudalímetro que subestima el caudal en un 10% hace inyectar un 10% más de combustible. En un depósito de 50 litros, son 5 litros desperdiciados. A 1,80 euros el litro, la cuenta sube rápido.

pt.question: Como detectar uma entrada de ar depois do caudalímetro?
pt.answer: Pulverize limpa-travões (com o motor ao ralenti) ao longo da conduta de ar e das ligações. Se o regime mudar quando pulveriza num ponto, é aí que o ar está a entrar.

pt.question: O caudalímetro pode estar sujo sem estar avariado?
pt.answer: Sim, é mesmo muito comum. O fio quente cobre-se progressivamente de depósitos que falseiam a medição. Uma limpeza pode restaurar 95% da precisão.

pt.question: Qual é o impacto real no consumo?
pt.answer: Um caudalímetro que subestima o caudal em 10% faz injectar 10% de combustível a mais. Num depósito de 50 litros, são 5 litros desperdiçados. A 1,80 euro o litro, a conta sobe depressa.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.en: Mass air flow sensor (MAF) — low voltage

description.fr: Le P0102 signale une tension de sortie trop basse du debitmetre, ce que le calculateur interprete comme un debit d'air anormalement faible. Si le debitmetre lit un debit faible, le calculateur injecte moins de carburant, ce qui cree un melange pauvre et provoque des hesitations. Un court-circuit a la masse dans le cablage, un debitmetre defaillant ou un filtre a air completement bouche peuvent provoquer ce code. Sur certains vehicules, un conduit d'air debranche entre le filtre et le debitmetre permet a l'air de contourner le capteur, donnant une lecture basse. Verifiez l'integrite de tout le circuit d'admission entre le filtre et le papillon des gaz.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0102 relates to mass air flow sensor (maf) — low voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0102 meldet eine zu niedrige Ausgangsspannung des Luftmassenmessers, die das Steuergerät als unnormal niedrigen Luftdurchsatz interpretiert. Wenn der Luftmassenmesser einen niedrigen Durchsatz liest, spritzt das Steuergerät weniger Kraftstoff ein, was ein mageres Gemisch erzeugt und Zögern verursacht. Ein Kurzschluss gegen Masse in der Verkabelung, ein defekter Luftmassenmesser oder ein völlig verstopfter Luftfilter können diesen Code auslösen. Bei manchen Fahrzeugen lässt ein abgezogener Luftkanal zwischen Filter und Luftmassenmesser die Luft am Sensor vorbeiströmen, was zu einer niedrigen Anzeige führt.
