Prüfen Sie die Integrität des gesamten Ansaugkreises zwischen Luftfilter und Drosselklappe.
description.es: El P0102 señala una tensión de salida demasiado baja del caudalímetro, lo que la centralita interpreta como un caudal de aire anormalmente reducido. Si el caudalímetro lee un caudal bajo, la centralita inyecta menos combustible, lo que crea una mezcla pobre y provoca titubeos. Un cortocircuito a masa en el cableado, un caudalímetro averiado o un filtro de aire completamente obstruido pueden provocar este código. En algunos vehículos, un conducto de aire desconectado entre el filtro y el caudalímetro permite que el aire esquive el sensor, dando una lectura baja. Verifique la integridad de todo el circuito de admisión entre el filtro de aire y la mariposa del acelerador.
description.pt: O P0102 assinala uma tensão de saída demasiado baixa do caudalímetro, o que a centralina interpreta como um caudal de ar anormalmente fraco. Se o caudalímetro lê um caudal baixo, a centralina injecta menos combustível, o que cria uma mistura pobre e provoca hesitações. Um curto-circuito à massa na cablagem, um caudalímetro avariado ou um filtro de ar completamente obstruído podem provocar este código. Em alguns veículos, uma conduta de ar desligada entre o filtro e o caudalímetro permite que o ar contorne o sensor, dando uma leitura baixa. Verifique a integridade de todo o circuito de admissão entre o filtro de ar e a borboleta de aceleração.

fr.question: Un filtre a air bouche peut-il causer un P0102 ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le filtre est tellement bouche que le debit d'air est anormalement faible, la tension du debitmetre sera en bas de sa plage. C'est la cause la plus simple et la moins chere.

fr.question: Quel est le cout d'un debitmetre neuf ?
fr.answer: Entre 50 et 300 euros selon la marque et le type. Les debitmetres Bosch d'origine sont chers mais fiables. Il existe des alternatives de qualite equivalente pour moins cher.

fr.question: Peut-on rouler sans debitmetre ?
fr.answer: Le moteur fonctionne mais mal. Le calculateur utilise une estimation grossiere qui n'est pas adaptee a toutes les conditions. La consommation et les performances sont degradees.

en.question: What does the P0102 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0102 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — low voltage. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0102 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0102 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0102 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0102 fault typically range from around £13 to £306, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty maf sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann ein verstopfter Luftfilter einen P0102 verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, wenn der Filter so verstopft ist, dass der Luftdurchsatz unnormal niedrig ist, liegt die Spannung des Luftmassenmessers am unteren Ende des Bereichs. Das ist die einfachste und günstigste Ursache.

de.question: Wie viel kostet ein neuer Luftmassenmesser?
de.answer: Zwischen 50 und 300 Euro je nach Marke und Typ. Original-Bosch-Luftmassenmesser sind teuer, aber zuverlässig. Es gibt Alternativen gleichwertiger Qualität zu günstigeren Preisen.

de.question: Kann man ohne Luftmassenmesser fahren?
de.answer: Der Motor läuft, aber schlecht. Das Steuergerät verwendet eine grobe Schätzung, die nicht für alle Bedingungen geeignet ist. Verbrauch und Leistung sind beeinträchtigt.

es.question: ¿Puede un filtro de aire obstruido causar un P0102?
es.answer: Sí, si el filtro está tan obstruido que el caudal de aire es anormalmente bajo, la tensión del caudalímetro estará en la parte baja de su rango. Es la causa más simple y barata.

es.question: ¿Cuánto cuesta un caudalímetro nuevo?
es.answer: Entre 50 y 300 euros según la marca y el tipo. Los caudalímetros Bosch originales son caros pero fiables. Existen alternativas de calidad equivalente por menos dinero.

es.question: ¿Se puede conducir sin caudalímetro?
es.answer: El motor funciona pero mal. La centralita utiliza una estimación burda que no se adapta a todas las condiciones. El consumo y las prestaciones se degradan.

pt.question: Um filtro de ar obstruído pode causar um P0102?
pt.answer: Sim, se o filtro está tão obstruído que o caudal de ar é anormalmente baixo, a tensão do caudalímetro estará na parte baixa do intervalo. É a causa mais simples e barata.

pt.question: Quanto custa um caudalímetro novo?
pt.answer: Entre 50 e 300 euros conforme a marca e o tipo. Os caudalímetros Bosch de origem são caros mas fiáveis. Existem alternativas de qualidade equivalente por menos dinheiro.

pt.question: Pode-se conduzir sem caudalímetro?
pt.answer: O motor funciona mas mal. A centralina utiliza uma estimativa grosseira que não se adapta a todas as condições. O consumo e o desempenho degradam-se.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.en: Mass air flow sensor (MAF) — high voltage

description.fr: Le P0103 est l'inverse du P0102 : la tension du debitmetre est trop haute, signalant un debit d'air impossiblement eleve. Le calculateur reagit en injectant plus de carburant, ce qui cree un melange trop riche avec fumee noire et surconsommation. Un circuit ouvert dans le cablage du debitmetre ou un court-circuit a la tension d'alimentation peut provoquer cette lecture haute. Un debitmetre qui a ete remplace par un modele incompatible peut aussi donner des valeurs hors plage. Sur les vehicules turbo, un tuyau d'admission qui a eclate peut creer un debit d'air anormal qui depasse la plage du capteur.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0103 code, it is telling you there is a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0103 ist das Gegenteil des P0102: Die Spannung des Luftmassenmessers ist zu hoch und signalisiert einen unmöglich hohen Luftdurchsatz. Das Steuergerät reagiert mit der Einspritzung von mehr Kraftstoff, was ein zu fettes Gemisch mit Schwarzrauch und erhöhtem Verbrauch erzeugt. Ein unterbrochener Stromkreis in der Verkabelung des Luftmassenmessers oder ein Kurzschluss zur Versorgungsspannung können diese hohe Anzeige verursachen. Ein Luftmassenmesser, der durch ein inkompatibles Modell ersetzt wurde, kann ebenfalls Werte außerhalb des Bereichs liefern. Bei Turbofahrzeugen kann ein geplatzter Ansaugschlauch einen unnormalen Luftdurchsatz erzeugen, der den Messbereich des Sensors überschreitet.
description.es: El P0103 es el inverso del P0102: la tensión del caudalímetro es demasiado alta, señalando un caudal de aire imposiblemente elevado. La centralita reacciona inyectando más combustible, lo que crea una mezcla demasiado rica con humo negro y sobreconsumo. Un circuito abierto en el cableado del caudalímetro o un cortocircuito a la tensión de alimentación puede provocar esta lectura alta. Un caudalímetro sustituido por un modelo incompatible también puede dar valores fuera de rango. En los vehículos turbo, un tubo de admisión reventado puede crear un caudal de aire anormal que supera el rango del sensor.
description.pt: O P0103 é o inverso do P0102: a tensão do caudalímetro é demasiado alta, sinalizando um caudal de ar impossivelmente elevado. A centralina reage injectando mais combustível, o que cria uma mistura demasiado rica com fumo preto e sobreconsumo. Um circuito aberto na cablagem do caudalímetro ou um curto-circuito à tensão de alimentação pode provocar esta leitura alta. Um caudalímetro substituído por um modelo incompatível também pode dar valores fora do intervalo. Nos veículos turbo, um tubo de admissão rebentado pode criar um caudal de ar anormal que ultrapassa o intervalo do sensor.

pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

fr.question: Un tuyau d'admission eclate peut-il causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, surtout sur les moteurs turbo. Si le tuyau entre le turbo et l'intercooler eclate, le debit d'air devient anormal et peut depasser la plage de mesure du debitmetre.

fr.question: La fumee noire est-elle liee a ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, le calculateur pense que beaucoup d'air entre et injecte le carburant en consequence. Mais le debit reel est normal, donc il y a trop de carburant. L'exces brule mal et produit de la fumee noire.

fr.question: Un debitmetre universel est-il compatible ?
fr.answer: Il faut absolument un debitmetre avec la meme courbe de tension. Un modele incompatible peut donner des valeurs hors plage. Utilisez la reference exacte du constructeur ou un equivalent certifie.

en.question: What does the P0103 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0103 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with mass air flow sensor (maf) — high voltage. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0103 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0103 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0103 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0103 fault typically range from around £26 to £287, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is maf sensor open circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann ein geplatzter Ansaugschlauch diesen Code verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, besonders bei Turbomotoren. Wenn der Schlauch zwischen Turbo und Ladeluftkühler platzt, wird der Luftdurchsatz unnormal und kann den Messbereich des Luftmassenmessers überschreiten.

de.question: Steht der schwarze Rauch im Zusammenhang mit diesem Code?
de.answer: Ja, das Steuergerät denkt, dass viel Luft eintritt, und spritzt den Kraftstoff entsprechend ein. Aber der tatsächliche Durchsatz ist normal, also ist zu viel Kraftstoff da. Der Überschuss verbrennt schlecht und erzeugt Schwarzrauch.

de.question: Ist ein Universal-Luftmassenmesser kompatibel?
de.answer: Es muss unbedingt ein Luftmassenmesser mit derselben Spannungskurve sein. Ein inkompatibles Modell kann Werte außerhalb des Bereichs liefern. Verwenden Sie die genaue Herstellerreferenz oder ein zertifiziertes Äquivalent.

es.question: ¿Puede un tubo de admisión reventado causar este código?
es.answer: Sí, sobre todo en motores turbo. Si el tubo entre el turbo y el intercooler revienta, el caudal de aire se vuelve anormal y puede superar el rango de medición del caudalímetro.

es.question: ¿Está relacionado el humo negro con este código?
es.answer: Sí, la centralita piensa que entra mucho aire e inyecta combustible en consecuencia. Pero el caudal real es normal, así que hay demasiado combustible. El exceso quema mal y produce humo negro.

es.question: ¿Es compatible un caudalímetro universal?
es.answer: Hace falta sin duda un caudalímetro con la misma curva de tensión. Un modelo incompatible puede dar valores fuera de rango. Utilice la referencia exacta del fabricante o un equivalente certificado.

pt.question: Um tubo de admissão rebentado pode causar este código?
pt.answer: Sim, sobretudo nos motores turbo. Se o tubo entre o turbo e o intercooler rebenta, o caudal de ar torna-se anormal e pode ultrapassar o intervalo de medição do caudalímetro.

pt.question: O fumo preto está ligado a este código?
pt.answer: Sim, a centralina pensa que entra muito ar e injecta o combustível em conformidade. Mas o caudal real é normal, logo há combustível a mais. O excesso queima mal e produz fumo preto.

pt.question: Um caudalímetro universal é compatível?
pt.answer: É preciso absolutamente um caudalímetro com a mesma curva de tensão. Um modelo incompatível pode dar valores fora do intervalo. Utilize a referência exacta do fabricante ou um equivalente certificado.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0106 concerne le capteur de pression absolue du collecteur d'admission (MAP). Ce capteur mesure la depression dans le collecteur pour que le calculateur puisse determiner la charge du moteur. Les valeurs lues ne correspondent pas aux attentes du calculateur en fonction du regime et de la position du papillon. Un capteur fatigue, un tuyau de depression fissure entre le capteur et le collecteur, ou une prise d'air sur le collecteur sont les causes habituelles. Sur les moteurs turbo, le capteur MAP mesure aussi la surpression et un probleme peut fausser le controle du turbo. L'impact se ressent surtout comme une hesitation en acceleration et une reponse moteur approximative.
description.en: A P0106 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with map sensor — range/performance. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0106 betrifft den Saugrohrdrucksensor (MAP). Dieser Sensor misst den Unterdruck im Ansaugkrümmer, damit das Steuergerät die Motorlast bestimmen kann. Die gelesenen Werte entsprechen nicht den Erwartungen des Steuergeräts je nach Drehzahl und Drosselklappenstellung. Ein verschlissener Sensor, ein gerissener Unterdruckschlauch zwischen Sensor und Krümmer oder ein Luftleck am Krümmer sind die üblichen Ursachen. Bei Turbomotoren misst der MAP-Sensor auch den Ladedruck, und ein Problem kann die Turbosteuerung verfälschen. Die Auswirkung zeigt sich vor allem als Zögern beim Beschleunigen und ungenaues Motoransprechen.
description.es: El P0106 concierne al sensor de presión absoluta del colector de admisión (MAP). Este sensor mide la depresión en el colector para que la centralita pueda determinar la carga del motor. Los valores leídos no coinciden con las expectativas de la centralita en función del régimen y la posición de la mariposa. Un sensor cansado, un tubo de vacío fisurado entre el sensor y el colector, o una entrada de aire en el colector son las causas habituales. En los motores turbo, el sensor MAP también mide la sobrepresión y un problema puede falsear el control del turbo. El impacto se nota sobre todo como un titubeo en aceleración y una respuesta del motor imprecisa.
description.pt: O P0106 diz respeito ao sensor de pressão absoluta do colector de admissão (MAP). Este sensor mede a depressão no colector para que a centralina possa determinar a carga do motor. Os valores lidos não correspondem às expectativas da centralina em função do regime e da posição da borboleta. Um sensor cansado, um tubo de vácuo fissurado entre o sensor e o colector, ou uma entrada de ar no colector são as causas habituais. Nos motores turbo, o sensor MAP também mede a sobrepressão e um problema pode falsear o controlo do turbo. O impacto sente-se sobretudo como uma hesitação na aceleração e uma resposta do motor aproximativa.

name.es: Entrada de aire en el colector

fr.question: Le capteur MAP et le debitmetre sont-ils la meme chose ?
fr.answer: Non, le MAP mesure la pression dans le collecteur, le MAF mesure le debit d'air a l'entree. Certains moteurs utilisent l'un ou l'autre, d'autres les deux pour plus de precision.

fr.question: Un tuyau de depression a 5 euros peut-il causer tous ces problemes ?
fr.answer: Oui, un simple tuyau en caoutchouc fissure fausse completement la mesure du capteur MAP. C'est la premiere chose a verifier car c'est quasi gratuit a reparer.

fr.question: Le capteur MAP est-il sur le collecteur ?
fr.answer: Il est soit directement visse sur le collecteur, soit relie par un petit tuyau en caoutchouc. Verifiez l'etat de ce tuyau en priorite.

en.question: What does the P0106 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0106 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with map sensor — range/performance. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0106 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0106 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0106 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0106 fault typically range from around £4 to £168, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty map sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Sind der MAP-Sensor und der Luftmassenmesser dasselbe?
de.answer: Nein, der MAP misst den Druck im Krümmer, der MAF misst den Luftdurchsatz am Einlass. Manche Motoren verwenden den einen oder den anderen, andere beide für mehr Genauigkeit.

de.question: Kann ein 5-Euro-Unterdruckschlauch all diese Probleme verursachen?
de.answer: Ja, ein einfacher gerissener Gummischlauch verfälscht die Messung des MAP-Sensors vollständig. Das ist das Erste, was man prüfen sollte, denn die Reparatur ist fast kostenlos.

de.question: Sitzt der MAP-Sensor am Ansaugkrümmer?
de.answer: Er ist entweder direkt in den Krümmer geschraubt oder über einen kleinen Gummischlauch verbunden. Prüfen Sie den Zustand dieses Schlauchs vorrangig.

es.question: ¿Son lo mismo el sensor MAP y el caudalímetro?
es.answer: No, el MAP mide la presión en el colector, el MAF mide el caudal de aire en la entrada. Algunos motores usan uno u otro, otros ambos para mayor precisión.

es.question: ¿Puede un tubo de vacío de 5 euros causar todos estos problemas?
es.answer: Sí, un simple tubo de goma fisurado falsea completamente la medición del sensor MAP. Es lo primero que hay que verificar porque la reparación es casi gratuita.

es.question: ¿El sensor MAP está en el colector?
es.answer: O bien está directamente roscado en el colector, o conectado mediante un pequeño tubo de goma. Compruebe el estado de ese tubo como prioridad.

pt.question: O sensor MAP e o caudalímetro são a mesma coisa?
pt.answer: Não, o MAP mede a pressão no colector, o MAF mede o caudal de ar à entrada. Alguns motores usam um ou outro, outros ambos para maior precisão.

pt.question: Um tubo de vácuo de 5 euros pode causar todos estes problemas?
pt.answer: Sim, um simples tubo de borracha fissurado falseia completamente a medição do sensor MAP. É a primeira coisa a verificar porque a reparação é quase gratuita.

pt.question: O sensor MAP está no colector?
pt.answer: Ou está directamente aparafusado no colector, ou ligado por um pequeno tubo de borracha. Verifique o estado desse tubo como prioridade.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0107 indique que la tension du capteur MAP est trop basse, ce que le calculateur interprete comme une depression tres forte ou une pression tres basse dans le collecteur. Une tension constamment basse signifie generalement un court-circuit dans le cablage ou un capteur defaillant dont le signal est a la masse. Le calculateur reagit en enrichissant le melange car il pense que le moteur est en faible charge. Cela augmente la consommation et peut provoquer un riche excessif avec fumee noire. Verifiez le connecteur du capteur, le cablage et la tension de reference de 5 volts qui doit etre presente sur le capteur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0107 relates to map sensor — low voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0107 zeigt an, dass die Spannung des MAP-Sensors zu niedrig ist, was das Steuergerät als sehr starken Unterdruck oder sehr niedrigen Druck im Krümmer interpretiert. Eine konstant niedrige Spannung bedeutet in der Regel einen Kurzschluss in der Verkabelung oder einen defekten Sensor, dessen Signal auf Masse liegt. Das Steuergerät reagiert, indem es das Gemisch anreichert, weil es denkt, der Motor sei in niedriger Last. Das erhöht den Verbrauch und kann ein zu fettes Gemisch mit Schwarzrauch verursachen. Prüfen Sie den Steckverbinder des Sensors, die Verkabelung und die Referenzspannung von 5 Volt, die am Sensor anliegen muss.
description.es: El P0107 indica que la tensión del sensor MAP es demasiado baja, lo que la centralita interpreta como una depresión muy fuerte o una presión muy baja en el colector. Una tensión constantemente baja suele significar un cortocircuito en el cableado o un sensor averiado cuya señal está a masa. La centralita reacciona enriqueciendo la mezcla porque piensa que el motor está en baja carga. Esto aumenta el consumo y puede provocar una riqueza excesiva con humo negro. Verifique el conector del sensor, el cableado y la tensión de referencia de 5 voltios que debe estar presente en el sensor.
description.pt: O P0107 indica que a tensão do sensor MAP é demasiado baixa, o que a centralina interpreta como uma depressão muito forte ou uma pressão muito baixa no colector. Uma tensão constantemente baixa significa geralmente um curto-circuito na cablagem ou um sensor avariado cujo sinal está à massa. A centralina reage enriquecendo a mistura porque pensa que o motor está em baixa carga. Isto aumenta o consumo e pode provocar uma riqueza excessiva com fumo preto. Verifique o conector do sensor, a cablagem e a tensão de referência de 5 volts que deve estar presente no sensor.

fr.question: Tension basse signifie-t-elle haute pression ou basse pression ?
fr.answer: Cela depend du type de capteur. La plupart des capteurs MAP envoient une tension haute quand la pression est haute. Donc une tension basse correspond a une basse pression (forte depression).

fr.question: Comment verifier la tension de reference 5V ?
fr.answer: Avec un multimetre, mesurez entre le fil de reference et la masse du connecteur, cle de contact mise. Vous devez lire environ 5 volts. Si cette tension est absente, le calculateur ne fournit pas l'alimentation.

fr.question: Un capteur MAP peut-il etre nettoyé ?
fr.answer: Oui, de la condensation ou des depots dans le port de pression peuvent fausser la mesure. Un nettoyage delicat avec du nettoyant contacts peut aider.

en.question: What does the P0107 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0107 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with map sensor — low voltage. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0107 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0107 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0107 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0107 fault typically range from around £8 to £102, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is short-circuited map sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Bedeutet niedrige Spannung hoher oder niedriger Druck?
de.answer: Das hängt vom Sensortyp ab. Die meisten MAP-Sensoren senden eine hohe Spannung bei hohem Druck. Eine niedrige Spannung entspricht also einem niedrigen Druck (starker Unterdruck).

de.question: Wie prüft man die 5V-Referenzspannung?
de.answer: Mit einem Multimeter messen Sie zwischen dem Referenzdraht und der Masse des Steckverbinders bei eingeschalteter Zündung. Sie sollten etwa 5 Volt lesen. Fehlt diese Spannung, liefert das Steuergerät die Versorgung nicht.

de.question: Kann man einen MAP-Sensor reinigen?
de.answer: Ja, Kondensation oder Ablagerungen im Druckanschluss können die Messung verfälschen. Eine sanfte Reinigung mit Kontaktreiniger kann helfen.

es.question: ¿Tensión baja significa alta presión o baja presión?
es.answer: Depende del tipo de sensor. La mayoría de los sensores MAP envían una tensión alta cuando la presión es alta. Por lo tanto, una tensión baja corresponde a una presión baja (depresión fuerte).

es.question: ¿Cómo verificar la tensión de referencia 5V?
es.answer: Con un multímetro, mida entre el hilo de referencia y la masa del conector, con el contacto dado. Debe leer unos 5 voltios. Si esa tensión no está, la centralita no suministra la alimentación.

es.question: ¿Se puede limpiar un sensor MAP?
es.answer: Sí, condensación o depósitos en el puerto de presión pueden falsear la medición. Una limpieza delicada con limpiador de contactos puede ayudar.

pt.question: Tensão baixa significa alta pressão ou baixa pressão?
pt.answer: Depende do tipo de sensor. A maioria dos sensores MAP envia uma tensão alta quando a pressão é alta. Portanto, uma tensão baixa corresponde a uma pressão baixa (forte depressão).

pt.question: Como verificar a tensão de referência 5V?
pt.answer: Com um multímetro, meça entre o fio de referência e a massa do conector, com o contacto ligado. Deve ler cerca de 5 volts. Se essa tensão está ausente, a centralina não fornece a alimentação.

pt.question: Um sensor MAP pode ser limpo?
pt.answer: Sim, condensação ou depósitos na porta de pressão podem falsear a medição. Uma limpeza delicada com limpa-contactos pode ajudar.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0108 signale une tension trop elevee sur le capteur MAP, correspondant a une pression anormalement haute dans le collecteur d'admission. Sur un moteur atmospherique, cela ne devrait pas depasser la pression atmospherique au ralenti. Sur un turbo, la pression peut monter mais pas au-dela de la consigne. Un circuit ouvert dans le cablage (fil coupe) donne une tension haute. Un capteur defaillant ou une vraie surpression du turbo non controlee sont aussi des causes possibles. Le calculateur reagit en reduisant le carburant car il pense que le moteur est en pleine charge, ce qui peut creer un melange pauvre et dangereux pour le moteur.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0108 code, it is telling you there is a problem with map sensor — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0108 meldet eine zu hohe Spannung am MAP-Sensor, die einem unnormal hohen Druck im Ansaugkrümmer entspricht. Bei einem Saugmotor darf das im Leerlauf den Atmosphärendruck nicht überschreiten. Bei einem Turbo kann der Druck steigen, aber nicht über den Sollwert hinaus. Ein unterbrochener Stromkreis in der Verkabelung (abgeschnittenes Kabel) liefert eine hohe Spannung. Ein defekter Sensor oder eine echte unkontrollierte Turboüberdrucksituation sind ebenfalls mögliche Ursachen. Das Steuergerät reagiert mit einer Kraftstoffreduzierung, weil es denkt, der Motor sei unter Volllast, was ein mageres und für den Motor gefährliches Gemisch erzeugen kann.
description.es: El P0108 señala una tensión demasiado elevada en el sensor MAP, correspondiente a una presión anormalmente alta en el colector de admisión. En un motor atmosférico, esto no debería superar la presión atmosférica al ralentí. En un turbo, la presión puede subir pero no más allá de la consigna. Un circuito abierto en el cableado (hilo cortado) da una tensión alta. Un sensor averiado o una verdadera sobrepresión del turbo no controlada son también causas posibles. La centralita reacciona reduciendo el combustible porque piensa que el motor está a plena carga, lo que puede crear una mezcla pobre y peligrosa para el motor.
description.pt: O P0108 assinala uma tensão demasiado elevada no sensor MAP, correspondente a uma pressão anormalmente alta no colector de admissão. Num motor atmosférico, isto não deve ultrapassar a pressão atmosférica ao ralenti. Num turbo, a pressão pode subir mas não para além do valor de referência. Um circuito aberto na cablagem (fio cortado) dá uma tensão alta. Um sensor avariado ou uma verdadeira sobrepressão do turbo não controlada são também causas possíveis. A centralina reage reduzindo o combustível porque pensa que o motor está a plena carga, o que pode criar uma mistura pobre e perigosa para o motor.

name.fr: Cablage capteur MAP en circuit ouvert
name.en: Wiring MAP sensor in open circuit
name.es: Cableado del sensor MAP en circuito abierto
name.pt: Cablagem sensor MAP em circuito aberto

pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

fr.question: Une surpression turbo est-elle dangereuse ?
fr.answer: Oui, une surpression non controlee peut endommager le moteur : joints de culasse, pistons, soupapes. Le calculateur coupe normalement l'injection en cas de surpression extreme.

fr.question: Comment differencier un faux signal d'une vraie surpression ?
fr.answer: Comparez la pression MAP en temps reel avec un manometre externe. Si le capteur affiche 2 bars mais le manometre montre 1 bar, c'est le capteur. Si les deux concordent, c'est une vraie surpression.

fr.question: Le circuit ouvert donne-t-il une tension haute ?
fr.answer: Sur la plupart des capteurs MAP, oui. Le calculateur voit la tension monter a sa valeur de reference (5V) quand le fil de signal est coupe, ce qu'il interprete comme une pression maximale.

en.question: What does the P0108 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0108 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with map sensor — high voltage. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0108 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0108 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0108 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0108 fault typically range from around £17 to £434, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is wiring map sensor in open circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist ein Turbo-Überdruck gefährlich?
de.answer: Ja, ein unkontrollierter Überdruck kann den Motor beschädigen: Zylinderkopfdichtung, Kolben, Ventile. Das Steuergerät schaltet normalerweise bei extremem Überdruck die Einspritzung ab.

de.question: Wie unterscheidet man ein falsches Signal von einem echten Überdruck?
de.answer: Vergleichen Sie den MAP-Druck in Echtzeit mit einem externen Manometer. Wenn der Sensor 2 bar anzeigt, aber das Manometer 1 bar, liegt es am Sensor. Stimmen beide überein, ist es ein echter Überdruck.

de.question: Erzeugt ein unterbrochener Stromkreis eine hohe Spannung?
de.answer: Bei den meisten MAP-Sensoren ja. Das Steuergerät sieht die Spannung auf den Referenzwert (5V) steigen, wenn das Signalkabel unterbrochen ist, was es als maximalen Druck interpretiert.

es.question: ¿Es peligrosa una sobrepresión del turbo?
es.answer: Sí, una sobrepresión no controlada puede dañar el motor: juntas de culata, pistones, válvulas. La centralita corta normalmente la inyección en caso de sobrepresión extrema.

es.question: ¿Cómo diferenciar una señal falsa de una sobrepresión real?
es.answer: Compare la presión MAP en tiempo real con un manómetro externo. Si el sensor muestra 2 bares pero el manómetro muestra 1 bar, es el sensor. Si los dos coinciden, es una sobrepresión real.

es.question: ¿Un circuito abierto da una tensión alta?
es.answer: En la mayoría de los sensores MAP, sí. La centralita ve la tensión subir a su valor de referencia (5V) cuando el hilo de señal está cortado, lo que interpreta como una presión máxima.

pt.question: Uma sobrepressão do turbo é perigosa?
pt.answer: Sim, uma sobrepressão não controlada pode danificar o motor: juntas de cabeça, pistões, válvulas. A centralina corta normalmente a injecção em caso de sobrepressão extrema.

pt.question: Como diferenciar um sinal falso de uma sobrepressão real?
pt.answer: Compare a pressão MAP em tempo real com um manómetro externo. Se o sensor mostra 2 bar mas o manómetro mostra 1 bar, é o sensor. Se os dois coincidem, é uma sobrepressão real.

pt.question: O circuito aberto dá uma tensão alta?
pt.answer: Na maioria dos sensores MAP, sim. A centralina vê a tensão subir ao seu valor de referência (5V) quando o fio de sinal está cortado, o que interpreta como uma pressão máxima.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Capteur de temperature d'air d'admission — circuit defaillant
name.en: Intake air temperature sensor — circuit fault
name.es: Sensor de temperatura del aire de admisión — fallo de circuito
name.pt: Sensor de temperatura do ar de admissão — falha de circuito

description.fr: Le P0110 est le code general du capteur IAT (Intake Air Temperature) signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Ce code englobe les problemes de tension haute, basse et d'absence de signal. Le capteur mesure la temperature de l'air entrant dans le moteur pour ajuster le dosage carburant. L'air froid est plus dense que l'air chaud, donc le moteur a besoin de plus de carburant quand l'air est froid. Sans ce capteur, le calculateur utilise une valeur par defaut qui n'est pas optimale en toutes circonstances. Le capteur est souvent integre au debitmetre ou monte seul sur le conduit d'admission.
description.en: A P0110 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with intake air temperature sensor — circuit fault. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0110 ist der allgemeine Code des IAT-Sensors (Intake Air Temperature), der eine Schaltkreisstörung meldet. Dieser Code umfasst Probleme mit hoher, niedriger Spannung und fehlendem Signal. Der Sensor misst die Temperatur der in den Motor eintretenden Luft, um die Kraftstoffdosierung anzupassen. Kalte Luft ist dichter als warme Luft, daher braucht der Motor mehr Kraftstoff, wenn die Luft kalt ist. Ohne diesen Sensor verwendet das Steuergerät einen Standardwert, der nicht unter allen Bedingungen optimal ist. Der Sensor ist oft in den Luftmassenmesser integriert oder allein am Ansaugkanal montiert.
description.es: El P0110 es el código general del sensor IAT (Intake Air Temperature) que señala un fallo de circuito. Este código engloba los problemas de tensión alta, baja y ausencia de señal. El sensor mide la temperatura del aire que entra en el motor para ajustar la dosificación de combustible. El aire frío es más denso que el aire caliente, por lo que el motor necesita más combustible cuando el aire está frío. Sin este sensor, la centralita utiliza un valor por defecto que no es óptimo en todas las circunstancias. El sensor suele estar integrado en el caudalímetro o montado solo en el conducto de admisión.
description.pt: O P0110 é o código geral do sensor IAT (Intake Air Temperature) que assinala uma falha de circuito. Este código engloba os problemas de tensão alta, baixa e ausência de sinal. O sensor mede a temperatura do ar que entra no motor para ajustar a dosagem de combustível. O ar frio é mais denso do que o ar quente, por isso o motor precisa de mais combustível quando o ar está frio. Sem este sensor, a centralina utiliza um valor predefinido que não é óptimo em todas as circunstâncias. O sensor está frequentemente integrado no caudalímetro ou montado sozinho na conduta de admissão.

name.fr: Capteur integre au MAF (MAF a remplacer)
name.en: Sensor integrated in MAF (MAF needs replacing)
name.de: In MAF integrierter Sensor (MAF muss ersetzt werden)
name.es: Sensor integrado en el MAF (MAF a sustituir)
name.pt: Sensor integrado no MAF (MAF a substituir)

pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

fr.question: L'IAT est-il integre au debitmetre sur ma voiture ?
fr.answer: Sur beaucoup de vehicules modernes, oui. Le capteur IAT est integre au boitier du debitmetre MAF. Si l'IAT est defaillant, il faut parfois remplacer le MAF complet.

fr.question: Le dosage est-il vraiment affecte ?
fr.answer: Oui, mais moderement. La variation de temperature entre ete et hiver fait varier la densite de l'air d'environ 10-15%. Sans correction, le dosage est decale d'autant.

fr.question: Ce capteur est-il le meme que celui de temperature exterieure ?
fr.answer: Non, le capteur IAT mesure l'air dans le conduit d'admission (qui peut etre chauffe par le turbo ou le moteur). Le capteur de temperature exterieure est dans le pare-chocs.

en.question: What does the P0110 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0110 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with intake air temperature sensor — circuit fault. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0110 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0110 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0110 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0110 fault typically range from around £9 to £305, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty intake air temperature sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der IAT bei meinem Auto in den Luftmassenmesser integriert?
de.answer: Bei vielen modernen Fahrzeugen ja. Der IAT-Sensor ist in das Gehäuse des Luftmassenmessers integriert. Wenn der IAT defekt ist, muss manchmal der komplette MAF ersetzt werden.

de.question: Ist die Dosierung wirklich betroffen?
de.answer: Ja, aber moderat. Die Temperaturvariation zwischen Sommer und Winter ändert die Luftdichte um etwa 10-15 %. Ohne Korrektur ist die Dosierung entsprechend verschoben.

de.question: Ist das derselbe Sensor wie der Außentemperatursensor?
de.answer: Nein, der IAT-Sensor misst die Luft im Ansaugkanal (die durch Turbo oder Motor erwärmt sein kann). Der Außentemperatursensor sitzt im Stoßfänger.

es.question: ¿Está integrado el IAT en el caudalímetro de mi coche?
es.answer: En muchos vehículos modernos, sí. El sensor IAT está integrado en el cuerpo del caudalímetro MAF. Si el IAT está averiado, a veces hay que sustituir el MAF completo.

es.question: ¿Está realmente afectada la dosificación?
es.answer: Sí, pero moderadamente. La variación de temperatura entre verano e invierno hace variar la densidad del aire en torno al 10-15%. Sin corrección, la dosificación se desfasa en esa cantidad.

es.question: ¿Es el mismo sensor que el de temperatura exterior?
es.answer: No, el sensor IAT mide el aire en el conducto de admisión (que puede estar calentado por el turbo o el motor). El sensor de temperatura exterior está en el paragolpes.

pt.question: O IAT está integrado no caudalímetro do meu carro?
pt.answer: Em muitos veículos modernos, sim. O sensor IAT está integrado no corpo do caudalímetro MAF. Se o IAT está avariado, por vezes é preciso substituir o MAF completo.

pt.question: A dosagem é realmente afectada?
pt.answer: Sim, mas moderadamente. A variação de temperatura entre Verão e Inverno faz variar a densidade do ar em cerca de 10-15%. Sem correcção, a dosagem fica desfasada nesse valor.

pt.question: É o mesmo sensor que o da temperatura exterior?
pt.answer: Não, o sensor IAT mede o ar na conduta de admissão (que pode estar aquecido pelo turbo ou pelo motor). O sensor de temperatura exterior está no pára-choques.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.es: Sensor de temperatura del refrigerante — rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de temperatura do líquido de arrefecimento — intervalo/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0116 signale que le capteur de temperature du liquide de refroidissement (ECT) donne des valeurs incoherentes avec les conditions de fonctionnement. Par exemple, le capteur peut indiquer que le moteur est encore froid apres 20 minutes de conduite, ou que la temperature change trop brusquement. Le calculateur compare la temperature ECT avec d'autres informations comme la temperature d'air, le temps de fonctionnement et la charge moteur. Si la courbe de temperature ne correspond pas au modele attendu, ce code est enregistre. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive avec l'age est la cause la plus frequente. Un thermostat partiellement bloque peut aussi provoquer une courbe de temperature anormale.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0116 relates to coolant temperature sensor — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0116 meldet, dass der Kühlmitteltemperatursensor (ECT) Werte liefert, die mit den Betriebsbedingungen nicht übereinstimmen. Zum Beispiel kann der Sensor nach 20 Minuten Fahrt noch einen kalten Motor anzeigen oder die Temperatur ändert sich zu abrupt. Das Steuergerät vergleicht die ECT-Temperatur mit anderen Informationen wie Lufttemperatur, Betriebszeit und Motorlast. Wenn die Temperaturkurve nicht dem erwarteten Modell entspricht, wird dieser Code gespeichert. Ein Sensor, dessen Kennlinie mit dem Alter gedriftet ist, ist die häufigste Ursache. Ein teilweise blockierter Thermostat kann ebenfalls eine unnormale Temperaturkurve verursachen.
description.es: El P0116 señala que el sensor de temperatura del líquido de refrigeración (ECT) da valores incoherentes con las condiciones de funcionamiento. Por ejemplo, el sensor puede indicar que el motor sigue frío tras 20 minutos de conducción, o que la temperatura cambia demasiado bruscamente. La centralita compara la temperatura ECT con otras informaciones como la temperatura del aire, el tiempo de funcionamiento y la carga del motor. Si la curva de temperatura no coincide con el modelo esperado, se registra este código. Un sensor cuya característica ha derivado con la edad es la causa más frecuente. Un termostato parcialmente bloqueado también puede provocar una curva de temperatura anormal.
description.pt: O P0116 assinala que o sensor de temperatura do líquido de arrefecimento (ECT) dá valores incoerentes com as condições de funcionamento. Por exemplo, o sensor pode indicar que o motor ainda está frio após 20 minutos de condução, ou que a temperatura muda demasiado bruscamente. A centralina compara a temperatura ECT com outras informações como a temperatura do ar, o tempo de funcionamento e a carga do motor. Se a curva de temperatura não corresponde ao modelo esperado, este código é registado. Um sensor cuja característica derivou com a idade é a causa mais frequente. Um termóstato parcialmente bloqueado também pode provocar uma curva de temperatura anormal.

name.fr: Bulle d'air dans le circuit de refroidissement
name.es: Burbuja de aire en el circuito de refrigeración
name.pt: Bolha de ar no circuito de arrefecimento

fr.question: La temperature varie bizarrement sur mon tableau de bord, c'est ca ?
fr.answer: C'est possible. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive peut envoyer des valeurs qui montent et descendent de maniere illogique.

fr.question: Une bulle d'air peut-elle fausser la temperature ?
fr.answer: Oui, si une bulle d'air passe devant le capteur ECT, la temperature chute brutalement puis remonte. C'est frequent apres un remplissage de liquide de refroidissement mal purge.

fr.question: Le thermostat et le capteur ECT sont-ils au meme endroit ?
fr.answer: Souvent oui, le capteur ECT est visse dans le boitier de thermostat ou a proximite. Quand vous remplacez le thermostat, c'est l'occasion de verifier le capteur aussi.

en.question: What does the P0116 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0116 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with coolant temperature sensor — range/performance. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0116 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0116 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0116 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0116 fault typically range from around £13 to £149, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is ageing coolant temperature sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Die Temperatur schwankt seltsam auf meinem Armaturenbrett, ist das es?
de.answer: Das ist möglich. Ein Sensor, dessen Kennlinie gedriftet ist, kann Werte senden, die unlogisch auf und ab gehen.

de.question: Kann eine Luftblase die Temperatur verfälschen?
de.answer: Ja, wenn eine Luftblase am ECT-Sensor vorbeikommt, fällt die Temperatur abrupt und steigt dann wieder. Das passiert häufig nach einem schlecht entlüfteten Kühlmittelwechsel.

de.question: Sind Thermostat und ECT-Sensor am selben Ort?
de.answer: Oft ja, der ECT-Sensor ist im Thermostatgehäuse oder in dessen Nähe verschraubt. Wenn Sie den Thermostat wechseln, ist das die Gelegenheit, auch den Sensor zu prüfen.

es.question: La temperatura varía de forma extraña en mi cuadro de instrumentos, ¿es esto?
es.answer: Es posible. Un sensor cuya característica ha derivado puede enviar valores que suben y bajan de manera ilógica.

es.question: ¿Puede una burbuja de aire falsear la temperatura?
es.answer: Sí, si una burbuja de aire pasa ante el sensor ECT, la temperatura cae bruscamente y luego sube. Es frecuente tras un rellenado de líquido refrigerante mal purgado.

es.question: ¿Están el termostato y el sensor ECT en el mismo lugar?
es.answer: A menudo sí, el sensor ECT está roscado en el cuerpo del termostato o cerca. Cuando sustituye el termostato, es la ocasión de comprobar también el sensor.

pt.question: A temperatura varia estranhamente no meu painel, é isto?
pt.answer: É possível. Um sensor cuja característica derivou pode enviar valores que sobem e descem de maneira ilógica.

pt.question: Uma bolha de ar pode falsear a temperatura?
pt.answer: Sim, se uma bolha de ar passa à frente do sensor ECT, a temperatura cai bruscamente e depois sobe. É frequente após um reabastecimento de líquido de arrefecimento mal purgado.

pt.question: O termóstato e o sensor ECT estão no mesmo sítio?
pt.answer: Frequentemente sim, o sensor ECT está aparafusado no corpo do termóstato ou perto dele. Quando substitui o termóstato, é a ocasião de verificar também o sensor.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Temperature liquide de refroidissement insuffisante pour boucle fermee
name.en: Insufficient coolant temperature for closed-loop operation
name.es: Temperatura del refrigerante insuficiente para bucle cerrado
name.pt: Temperatura do líquido de arrefecimento insuficiente para circuito fechado

description.fr: Le P0125 indique que la temperature du moteur ne monte pas assez vite pour que le calculateur passe en boucle fermee dans un delai raisonnable. Apres le demarrage a froid, le calculateur attend que la temperature atteigne environ 60-70 degres pour activer la regulation fine du melange par la sonde lambda. Si cette temperature n'est pas atteinte dans les 5 a 10 minutes prevues, le P0125 est stocke. C'est un code tres similaire au P0128 mais specifique a la transition vers la boucle fermee. Le thermostat bloque ouvert reste la cause principale. L'impact est une surconsommation prolongee au demarrage et des emissions elevees.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0125 code, it is telling you there is a problem with insufficient coolant temperature for closed-loop operation. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0125 zeigt an, dass die Motortemperatur nicht schnell genug steigt, damit das Steuergerät innerhalb einer angemessenen Zeit in den geschlossenen Regelkreis wechseln kann. Nach dem Kaltstart wartet das Steuergerät, bis die Temperatur etwa 60-70 Grad erreicht, um die Feinregelung des Gemischs über die Lambdasonde zu aktivieren. Wird diese Temperatur nicht innerhalb der vorgesehenen 5 bis 10 Minuten erreicht, wird der P0125 gespeichert. Das ist ein dem P0128 sehr ähnlicher Code, aber spezifisch für den Übergang in den geschlossenen Regelkreis. Der offen festsitzende Thermostat bleibt die Hauptursache. Die Auswirkung ist ein verlängerter Mehrverbrauch nach dem Start und erhöhte Emissionen.
description.es: El P0125 indica que la temperatura del motor no sube lo bastante rápido para que la centralita pase a bucle cerrado en un plazo razonable. Tras el arranque en frío, la centralita espera a que la temperatura alcance unos 60-70 grados para activar la regulación fina de la mezcla mediante la sonda lambda. Si esa temperatura no se alcanza en los 5 a 10 minutos previstos, se almacena el P0125. Es un código muy similar al P0128 pero específico a la transición hacia el bucle cerrado. El termostato bloqueado abierto sigue siendo la causa principal. El impacto es un sobreconsumo prolongado tras el arranque y unas emisiones elevadas.
description.pt: O P0125 indica que a temperatura do motor não sobe suficientemente depressa para que a centralina passe a circuito fechado num prazo razoável. Após o arranque a frio, a centralina espera que a temperatura atinja cerca de 60-70 graus para activar a regulação fina da mistura através da sonda lambda. Se essa temperatura não for atingida nos 5 a 10 minutos previstos, o P0125 é armazenado. É um código muito semelhante ao P0128 mas específico da transição para o circuito fechado. O termóstato bloqueado aberto continua a ser a causa principal. O impacto é um sobreconsumo prolongado após o arranque e emissões elevadas.

en: Prolonged fuel consumption increase after starting
pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

fr.question: Quelle difference entre P0125 et P0128 ?
fr.answer: Le P0125 concerne specifiquement le delai pour atteindre la temperature de boucle fermee. Le P0128 est plus general et concerne la temperature globale du moteur. Les causes sont souvent les memes.

fr.question: Qu'est-ce que la boucle fermee ?
fr.answer: En boucle fermee, le calculateur ajuste le melange en temps reel grace a la sonde lambda. Avant d'atteindre cette temperature, il fonctionne avec des valeurs pre-programmees moins precises.

fr.question: Le chauffage qui ne chauffe pas est-il lie ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le moteur ne monte pas en temperature, le liquide de refroidissement qui passe dans le radiateur de chauffage est tiede au lieu d'etre chaud. Le chauffage ne donne pas son plein rendement.

en.question: What does the P0125 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0125 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with insufficient coolant temperature for closed-loop operation. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0125 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0125 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0125 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0125 fault typically range from around £13 to £216, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is thermostat stuck open, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Was ist der Unterschied zwischen P0125 und P0128?
de.answer: Der P0125 betrifft speziell die Verzögerung, bis die Temperatur für den geschlossenen Regelkreis erreicht wird. Der P0128 ist allgemeiner und betrifft die globale Motortemperatur. Die Ursachen sind oft dieselben.

de.question: Was ist der geschlossene Regelkreis?
de.answer: Im geschlossenen Regelkreis passt das Steuergerät das Gemisch in Echtzeit über die Lambdasonde an. Bevor diese Temperatur erreicht ist, arbeitet es mit weniger präzisen vorprogrammierten Werten.

de.question: Hängt die nicht heizende Heizung damit zusammen?
de.answer: Ja, wenn der Motor nicht auf Temperatur kommt, ist das Kühlmittel, das durch den Heizungswärmetauscher fließt, lauwarm statt heiß. Die Heizung gibt nicht ihre volle Leistung.

es.question: ¿Qué diferencia hay entre P0125 y P0128?
es.answer: El P0125 concierne específicamente al tiempo para alcanzar la temperatura de bucle cerrado. El P0128 es más general y concierne a la temperatura global del motor. Las causas suelen ser las mismas.

es.question: ¿Qué es el bucle cerrado?
es.answer: En bucle cerrado, la centralita ajusta la mezcla en tiempo real gracias a la sonda lambda. Antes de alcanzar esa temperatura, funciona con valores preprogramados menos precisos.

es.question: ¿La calefacción que no calienta está relacionada?
es.answer: Sí, si el motor no sube de temperatura, el líquido refrigerante que pasa por el radiador de calefacción está tibio en lugar de caliente. La calefacción no da su pleno rendimiento.

pt.question: Qual é a diferença entre P0125 e P0128?
pt.answer: O P0125 diz respeito especificamente ao tempo para atingir a temperatura do circuito fechado. O P0128 é mais geral e diz respeito à temperatura global do motor. As causas são frequentemente as mesmas.

pt.question: O que é o circuito fechado?
pt.answer: Em circuito fechado, a centralina ajusta a mistura em tempo real graças à sonda lambda. Antes de atingir essa temperatura, funciona com valores pré-programados menos precisos.

pt.question: O aquecimento que não aquece está relacionado?
pt.answer: Sim, se o motor não sobe de temperatura, o líquido de arrefecimento que passa no radiador de aquecimento está morno em vez de quente. O aquecimento não dá o seu pleno rendimento.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0217 est un code d'urgence qui signifie que le moteur a atteint une temperature dangereusement elevee, au-dela du seuil critique defini par le constructeur (generalement 120-130 degres pour le liquide de refroidissement). A cette temperature, les joints, les segments et meme le bloc moteur commencent a souffrir. Le calculateur peut reduire la puissance ou couper certains cylindres pour tenter de faire baisser la temperature. Si vous voyez ce code ou si votre jauge de temperature est dans le rouge, arretez-vous immediatement et coupez le moteur. Les causes sont un manque de liquide de refroidissement, un thermostat bloque ferme, des ventilateurs qui ne fonctionnent pas, une pompe a eau defaillante ou un joint de culasse qui commence a lacher.
description.en: A P0217 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with engine overheating detected. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0217 ist ein Notfallcode, der bedeutet, dass der Motor eine gefährlich hohe Temperatur erreicht hat, jenseits des vom Hersteller festgelegten kritischen Schwellenwerts (in der Regel 120-130 Grad beim Kühlmittel). Bei dieser Temperatur beginnen die Dichtungen, die Kolbenringe und sogar der Motorblock zu leiden. Das Steuergerät kann die Leistung reduzieren oder einige Zylinder abschalten, um die Temperatur zu senken. Wenn Sie diesen Code sehen oder Ihre Temperaturanzeige im roten Bereich ist, halten Sie sofort an und schalten Sie den Motor aus. Die Ursachen sind Kühlmittelmangel, ein geschlossen blockierter Thermostat, nicht funktionierende Lüfter, eine defekte Wasserpumpe oder eine Zylinderkopfdichtung, die anfängt nachzugeben.
description.es: El P0217 es un código de emergencia que significa que el motor ha alcanzado una temperatura peligrosamente elevada, más allá del umbral crítico definido por el fabricante (generalmente 120-130 grados para el líquido refrigerante). A esta temperatura, las juntas, los segmentos e incluso el bloque motor empiezan a sufrir. La centralita puede reducir la potencia o cortar algunos cilindros para intentar bajar la temperatura. Si ve este código o si su indicador de temperatura está en el rojo, deténgase inmediatamente y apague el motor. Las causas son una falta de líquido refrigerante, un termostato bloqueado cerrado, ventiladores que no funcionan, una bomba de agua averiada o una junta de culata que empieza a ceder.
description.pt: O P0217 é um código de emergência que significa que o motor atingiu uma temperatura perigosamente elevada, para além do limiar crítico definido pelo fabricante (geralmente 120-130 graus para o líquido de arrefecimento). A esta temperatura, as juntas, os segmentos e mesmo o bloco do motor começam a sofrer. A centralina pode reduzir a potência ou cortar alguns cilindros para tentar baixar a temperatura. Se vir este código ou se o seu indicador de temperatura está no vermelho, pare imediatamente e desligue o motor. As causas são falta de líquido de arrefecimento, um termóstato bloqueado fechado, ventoinhas que não funcionam, uma bomba de água avariada ou uma junta da cabeça do motor que começa a ceder.

fr.question: Je vois de la vapeur sous le capot, que faire ?
fr.answer: Arretez-vous immediatement de maniere securisee. Ne tentez PAS d'ouvrir le bouchon de radiateur — le liquide est sous pression et brulant. Attendez au moins 30 minutes que le moteur refroidisse.

fr.question: La surchauffe peut-elle casser le moteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, une surchauffe prolongee deforme la culasse, detruit le joint de culasse et peut gripper les pistons. Un seul episode de surchauffe severe peut condamner un moteur.

fr.question: Comment prevenir la surchauffe ?
fr.answer: Verifiez regulierement le niveau de liquide de refroidissement. Faites remplacer le thermostat et la pompe a eau selon les preconisations du constructeur. En cas de montee de temperature anormale, arretez-vous avant que le voyant ne passe au rouge.

en.question: What does the P0217 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0217 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine overheating detected. This is a critical-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0217 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0217 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0217 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0217 fault typically range from around £9 to £434, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is low coolant level, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ich sehe Dampf unter der Motorhaube, was soll ich tun?
de.answer: Halten Sie sofort sicher an. Versuchen Sie NICHT, den Kühlerdeckel zu öffnen — die Flüssigkeit steht unter Druck und ist brühend heiß. Warten Sie mindestens 30 Minuten, bis der Motor abgekühlt ist.

de.question: Kann eine Überhitzung den Motor zerstören?
de.answer: Ja, eine längere Überhitzung verformt den Zylinderkopf, zerstört die Kopfdichtung und kann die Kolben festfressen. Eine einzige schwere Überhitzung kann einen Motor erledigen.

de.question: Wie beugt man Überhitzung vor?
de.answer: Prüfen Sie regelmäßig den Kühlmittelstand. Lassen Sie Thermostat und Wasserpumpe nach den Herstellervorgaben ersetzen. Bei einem unnormalen Temperaturanstieg halten Sie an, bevor die Leuchte rot wird.

es.question: Veo vapor bajo el capó, ¿qué hago?
es.answer: Deténgase inmediatamente de forma segura. NO intente abrir el tapón del radiador — el líquido está a presión y ardiendo. Espere al menos 30 minutos a que el motor se enfríe.

es.question: ¿Puede el sobrecalentamiento romper el motor?
es.answer: Sí, un sobrecalentamiento prolongado deforma la culata, destruye la junta de culata y puede agarrotar los pistones. Un solo episodio de sobrecalentamiento severo puede condenar un motor.

es.question: ¿Cómo prevenir el sobrecalentamiento?
es.answer: Compruebe regularmente el nivel de líquido refrigerante. Cambie el termostato y la bomba de agua según las indicaciones del fabricante. Ante una subida anormal de temperatura, deténgase antes de que el testigo pase al rojo.

pt.question: Vejo vapor debaixo do capot, o que faço?
pt.answer: Pare imediatamente de forma segura. NÃO tente abrir o tampão do radiador — o líquido está sob pressão e a ferver. Espere pelo menos 30 minutos até o motor arrefecer.

pt.question: O sobreaquecimento pode partir o motor?
pt.answer: Sim, um sobreaquecimento prolongado deforma a cabeça do motor, destrói a junta de cabeça e pode gripar os pistões. Um único episódio de sobreaquecimento severo pode condenar um motor.

pt.question: Como prevenir o sobreaquecimento?
pt.answer: Verifique regularmente o nível de líquido de arrefecimento. Mande substituir o termóstato e a bomba de água conforme as recomendações do fabricante. Em caso de subida anormal de temperatura, pare antes de a luz passar ao vermelho.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0234 signale que la pression du turbo a depasse la consigne maximale definie par le constructeur. C'est un code de protection critique car une surpression peut endommager gravement le moteur. Les causes sont souvent mecaniques : wastegate bloquee fermee, electrovanne de commande de wastegate defaillante, ou conduit de depression fissure. Sur les turbos a geometrie variable, les ailettes peuvent se bloquer en position fermee a cause de la calamine. Le calculateur reagit en coupant l'injection ou en ouvrant le papillon pour limiter la puissance. Si le code apparait regulierement, ne continuez pas a solliciter le moteur en attendant la reparation.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0234 relates to turbocharger over-boost detected, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0234 meldet, dass der Ladedruck den vom Hersteller festgelegten maximalen Sollwert überschritten hat. Das ist ein kritischer Schutzcode, denn ein Überdruck kann den Motor schwer beschädigen. Die Ursachen sind oft mechanisch: geschlossen blockiertes Wastegate, defektes Wastegate-Steuerventil oder gerissener Unterdruckschlauch. Bei Turbos mit variabler Geometrie können die Leitschaufeln aufgrund von Verkokung in geschlossener Position blockieren. Das Steuergerät reagiert, indem es die Einspritzung abschaltet oder die Drosselklappe öffnet, um die Leistung zu begrenzen. Wenn der Code regelmäßig auftritt, fahren Sie den Motor nicht weiter stark belastet, bis er repariert ist.
description.es: El P0234 señala que la presión del turbo ha superado la consigna máxima definida por el fabricante. Es un código de protección crítico porque una sobrepresión puede dañar gravemente el motor. Las causas suelen ser mecánicas: wastegate bloqueada cerrada, electroválvula de mando de la wastegate averiada, o tubo de vacío fisurado. En los turbos de geometría variable, los álabes pueden bloquearse en posición cerrada debido a la carbonilla. La centralita reacciona cortando la inyección o abriendo la mariposa para limitar la potencia. Si el código aparece regularmente, no continúe exigiendo al motor mientras espera la reparación.
description.pt: O P0234 assinala que a pressão do turbo ultrapassou o valor máximo de consigna definido pelo fabricante. É um código de protecção crítico porque uma sobrepressão pode danificar gravemente o motor. As causas são frequentemente mecânicas: wastegate bloqueada fechada, electroválvula de comando da wastegate avariada, ou tubo de vácuo fissurado. Nos turbos de geometria variável, as palhetas podem bloquear em posição fechada devido ao coque. A centralina reage cortando a injecção ou abrindo a borboleta para limitar a potência. Se o código aparecer regularmente, não continue a solicitar o motor enquanto espera a reparação.

pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

fr.question: La coupure de puissance est-elle normale ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est une mesure de protection du calculateur. Il coupe l'injection pour empecher le turbo de monter plus en pression. C'est frustrant mais ca sauve le moteur.

fr.question: La geometrie variable peut-elle se debloquer ?
fr.answer: Parfois avec un bon decalaminage ou en faisant varier les regimes sur autoroute. Mais si les ailettes sont serieusement encrassees, un demontage du turbo est necessaire.

fr.question: Le turbo peut-il exploser en surpression ?
fr.answer: Le turbo lui-meme resiste generalement, mais le moteur en dessous peut subir des dommages : joints, pistons, bielles. Le moteur est le maillon faible dans l'equation.

en.question: What does the P0234 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0234 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with turbocharger over-boost detected. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0234 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0234 fail my MOT?
