en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0234 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0234 fault typically range from around £35 to £690, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is wastegate stuck closed, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist der Leistungsabbruch normal?
de.answer: Ja, es ist eine Schutzmaßnahme des Steuergeräts. Es schaltet die Einspritzung ab, um den Turbo am weiteren Druckaufbau zu hindern. Frustrierend, aber es rettet den Motor.

de.question: Kann sich eine variable Geometrie wieder lösen?
de.answer: Manchmal mit einer guten Entkohlung oder durch Drehzahlvariationen auf der Autobahn. Aber wenn die Leitschaufeln ernsthaft verschmutzt sind, ist eine Demontage des Turbos nötig.

de.question: Kann der Turbo bei Überdruck explodieren?
de.answer: Der Turbo selbst hält in der Regel stand, aber der Motor darunter kann Schäden erleiden: Dichtungen, Kolben, Pleuel. Der Motor ist das schwache Glied in der Kette.

es.question: ¿Es normal el corte de potencia?
es.answer: Sí, es una medida de protección de la centralita. Corta la inyección para impedir que el turbo siga subiendo presión. Es frustrante pero salva el motor.

es.question: ¿Puede desbloquearse la geometría variable?
es.answer: A veces con una buena descarbonización o variando los regímenes en autopista. Pero si los álabes están seriamente sucios, hace falta desmontar el turbo.

es.question: ¿Puede explotar el turbo por sobrepresión?
es.answer: El turbo en sí suele resistir, pero el motor bajo él puede sufrir daños: juntas, pistones, bielas. El motor es el eslabón débil de la ecuación.

pt.question: O corte de potência é normal?
pt.answer: Sim, é uma medida de protecção da centralina. Corta a injecção para impedir que o turbo continue a subir pressão. É frustrante mas salva o motor.

pt.question: A geometria variável pode desbloquear-se?
pt.answer: Por vezes com uma boa descarbonização ou variando os regimes em auto-estrada. Mas se as palhetas estão seriamente sujas, é necessário desmontar o turbo.

pt.question: O turbo pode explodir em sobrepressão?
pt.answer: O próprio turbo geralmente resiste, mas o motor por baixo dele pode sofrer danos: juntas, pistões, bielas. O motor é o elo fraco da equação.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0299 est l'inverse du P0234 : le turbo ne produit pas assez de pression. Le calculateur commande un certain niveau de suralimentation mais la pression mesuree dans le collecteur est inferieure a la consigne. Les causes les plus frequentes sont une wastegate qui reste ouverte, une fuite sur le circuit de surpression (tuyau d'intercooler debranche, collier desserre) ou un turbo dont les ailettes sont usees et ne compriment plus efficacement l'air. Un mode degrade limite la puissance pour proteger le turbo. La perte de puissance est le symptome principal : le vehicule peine dans les cotes et les accelerations sont molles.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0299 code, it is telling you there is a problem with turbocharger under-boost detected. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0299 ist das Gegenteil des P0234: Der Turbo erzeugt nicht genug Druck. Das Steuergerät fordert eine bestimmte Aufladung an, aber der im Krümmer gemessene Druck liegt unter dem Sollwert. Die häufigsten Ursachen sind ein offen bleibendes Wastegate, ein Leck am Ladedruckkreis (abgezogener Ladeluftkühlerschlauch, lose Schelle) oder ein Turbo, dessen Leitschaufeln verschlissen sind und die Luft nicht mehr effektiv verdichten. Ein Notlaufmodus begrenzt die Leistung zum Schutz des Turbos. Der Leistungsverlust ist das Hauptsymptom: Das Fahrzeug quält sich an Steigungen und die Beschleunigung ist weich.
description.es: El P0299 es el inverso del P0234: el turbo no produce suficiente presión. La centralita comanda un cierto nivel de sobrealimentación pero la presión medida en el colector es inferior a la consigna. Las causas más frecuentes son una wastegate que permanece abierta, una fuga en el circuito de sobrepresión (tubo del intercooler desconectado, brida floja) o un turbo cuyos álabes están desgastados y ya no comprimen eficazmente el aire. Un modo de emergencia limita la potencia para proteger el turbo. La pérdida de potencia es el síntoma principal: el vehículo sufre en las cuestas y las aceleraciones son flojas.
description.pt: O P0299 é o inverso do P0234: o turbo não produz pressão suficiente. A centralina comanda um certo nível de sobrealimentação mas a pressão medida no colector é inferior ao valor de consigna. As causas mais frequentes são uma wastegate que permanece aberta, uma fuga no circuito de sobrepressão (tubo do intercooler desligado, braçadeira solta) ou um turbo cujas palhetas estão gastas e já não comprimem eficazmente o ar. Um modo de emergência limita a potência para proteger o turbo. A perda de potência é o sintoma principal: o veículo penaliza-se nas subidas e as acelerações são moles.

name.es: Fuga en el circuito de sobrepresión (tubos)

fr.question: J'entends un sifflement sous le capot, est-ce une fuite ?
fr.answer: Tres probablement. Un tuyau d'intercooler qui s'est debranche ou un collier desserre laisse s'echapper l'air sous pression avec un sifflement caractéristique. C'est la cause la plus simple et la moins chere.

fr.question: Comment verifier si le turbo est use ?
fr.answer: Demontez le tuyau d'admission et verifiez le jeu de l'arbre du turbo en le faisant bouger lateralement. Un jeu visible signifie que les paliers sont uses. Les aubes ne doivent pas toucher le carter.

fr.question: Un tuyau debranche peut-il vraiment faire perdre autant de puissance ?
fr.answer: Absolument. L'air comprime par le turbo s'echappe au lieu d'entrer dans le moteur. Le turbo tourne pour rien et le moteur ne recoit pas la surpression. L'impact est immediat et tres perceptible.

en.question: What does the P0299 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0299 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with turbocharger under-boost detected. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0299 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0299 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0299 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0299 fault typically range from around £17 to £1705, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is boost pressure circuit leak (hoses), but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ich höre ein Pfeifen unter der Motorhaube, ist das ein Leck?
de.answer: Sehr wahrscheinlich. Ein abgezogener Ladeluftkühlerschlauch oder eine lose Schelle lässt die Druckluft mit einem charakteristischen Pfeifen entweichen. Das ist die einfachste und günstigste Ursache.

de.question: Wie prüft man, ob der Turbo verschlissen ist?
de.answer: Demontieren Sie den Ansaugschlauch und prüfen Sie das Spiel der Turbowelle durch seitliches Bewegen. Ein sichtbares Spiel bedeutet, dass die Lager verschlissen sind. Die Schaufeln dürfen das Gehäuse nicht berühren.

de.question: Kann ein abgezogener Schlauch wirklich so viel Leistung kosten?
de.answer: Absolut. Die vom Turbo komprimierte Luft entweicht, statt in den Motor zu gelangen. Der Turbo dreht umsonst und der Motor bekommt keinen Ladedruck. Die Auswirkung ist sofort und sehr spürbar.

es.question: Oigo un silbido bajo el capó, ¿es una fuga?
es.answer: Muy probablemente. Un tubo del intercooler desconectado o una brida floja deja escapar el aire a presión con un silbido característico. Es la causa más simple y barata.

es.question: ¿Cómo comprobar si el turbo está desgastado?
es.answer: Desmonte el tubo de admisión y verifique la holgura del eje del turbo moviéndolo lateralmente. Una holgura visible significa que los cojinetes están gastados. Los álabes no deben tocar la carcasa.

es.question: ¿Un tubo desconectado puede realmente hacer perder tanta potencia?
es.answer: Absolutamente. El aire comprimido por el turbo se escapa en lugar de entrar en el motor. El turbo gira en vano y el motor no recibe la sobrepresión. El impacto es inmediato y muy perceptible.

pt.question: Oiço um assobio debaixo do capot, é uma fuga?
pt.answer: Muito provavelmente. Um tubo do intercooler desligado ou uma braçadeira solta deixa escapar o ar sob pressão com um assobio característico. É a causa mais simples e barata.

pt.question: Como verificar se o turbo está gasto?
pt.answer: Desmonte o tubo de admissão e verifique a folga do eixo do turbo movendo-o lateralmente. Uma folga visível significa que os rolamentos estão gastos. As pás não devem tocar na carcaça.

pt.question: Um tubo desligado pode realmente fazer perder tanta potência?
pt.answer: Absolutamente. O ar comprimido pelo turbo escapa-se em vez de entrar no motor. O turbo gira em vão e o motor não recebe a sobrepressão. O impacto é imediato e muito perceptível.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0305 pointe le cylindre 5, present uniquement sur les moteurs 5, 6, 8 cylindres ou plus. Ce cylindre ne brule pas correctement le melange air-carburant, causant des vibrations et une perte de puissance. Sur un V6 ou V8, le cylindre 5 fait partie de la banque 2. Les causes sont les memes que pour les cylindres 1 a 4 : bougie, bobine, injecteur ou probleme de compression. Sur les moteurs en V, l'acces aux bougies et bobines du cote arriere peut etre plus difficile, ce qui rend les interventions plus couteuses en main d'oeuvre. Le diagnostic par permutation reste la methode la plus efficace pour identifier le composant defaillant.
description.en: A P0305 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 5. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0305 zeigt auf Zylinder 5, der nur bei Motoren mit 5, 6, 8 oder mehr Zylindern vorhanden ist. Dieser Zylinder verbrennt das Luft-Kraftstoff-Gemisch nicht richtig, was Vibrationen und Leistungsverlust verursacht. Bei einem V6 oder V8 gehört Zylinder 5 zu Bank 2. Die Ursachen sind dieselben wie bei den Zylindern 1 bis 4: Zündkerze, Zündspule, Einspritzventil oder Kompressionsproblem. Bei V-Motoren kann der Zugang zu Zündkerzen und Zündspulen auf der hinteren Seite schwieriger sein, was die Arbeitszeit teurer macht. Die Diagnose durch Vertauschen bleibt die effektivste Methode, um die defekte Komponente zu identifizieren.
description.es: El P0305 apunta al cilindro 5, presente únicamente en motores de 5, 6, 8 cilindros o más. Este cilindro no quema correctamente la mezcla aire-combustible, causando vibraciones y pérdida de potencia. En un V6 o V8, el cilindro 5 forma parte del banco 2. Las causas son las mismas que para los cilindros 1 a 4: bujía, bobina, inyector o problema de compresión. En motores en V, el acceso a las bujías y bobinas del lado trasero puede ser más difícil, lo que encarece la mano de obra. El diagnóstico por permutación sigue siendo el método más eficaz para identificar el componente averiado.
description.pt: O P0305 aponta para o cilindro 5, presente apenas nos motores de 5, 6, 8 cilindros ou mais. Este cilindro não queima correctamente a mistura ar-combustível, causando vibrações e perda de potência. Num V6 ou V8, o cilindro 5 faz parte do banco 2. As causas são as mesmas que para os cilindros 1 a 4: vela, bobina, injector ou problema de compressão. Nos motores em V, o acesso às velas e bobinas do lado traseiro pode ser mais difícil, o que torna as intervenções mais caras em mão-de-obra. O diagnóstico por permutação continua a ser o método mais eficaz para identificar o componente avariado.

fr.question: Le cylindre 5 est-il plus cher a reparer ?
fr.answer: Sur les moteurs en V, les cylindres cote cloison de feu (arriere) sont plus difficiles d'acces. La main d'oeuvre peut etre plus elevee meme si les pieces sont au meme prix.

fr.question: Mon V6 vibre, est-ce normal ?
fr.answer: Un V6 vibre naturellement un peu plus qu'un 4 cylindres a cause de son architecture. Mais des vibrations excessives ou un changement soudain indiquent un probleme comme un rate d'allumage.

fr.question: Faut-il changer toutes les bougies d'un V6 en meme temps ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est recommande. Sur un V6, changer les 6 bougies en meme temps assure un equilibre de combustion et evite de refaire la meme intervention 6 mois plus tard pour les autres.

en.question: What does the P0305 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0305 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 5. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0305 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0305 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0305 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0305 fault typically range from around £9 to £308, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 5, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist Zylinder 5 teurer zu reparieren?
de.answer: Bei V-Motoren sind die Zylinder auf der Spritzwandseite (hinten) schwerer zugänglich. Die Arbeitszeit kann höher ausfallen, auch wenn die Teile denselben Preis haben.

de.question: Mein V6 vibriert, ist das normal?
de.answer: Ein V6 vibriert aufgrund seiner Bauweise naturgemäß etwas mehr als ein 4-Zylinder. Aber übermäßige Vibrationen oder eine plötzliche Veränderung deuten auf ein Problem wie einen Zündaussetzer hin.

de.question: Sollte man alle Zündkerzen eines V6 gleichzeitig wechseln?
de.answer: Ja, das wird empfohlen. Bei einem V6 sorgt der gleichzeitige Wechsel aller 6 Zündkerzen für ausgeglichene Verbrennung und vermeidet eine erneute Intervention 6 Monate später für die anderen.

es.question: ¿El cilindro 5 es más caro de reparar?
es.answer: En motores en V, los cilindros del lado del cortafuegos (trasero) son más difíciles de acceder. La mano de obra puede ser más elevada aunque las piezas cuesten lo mismo.

es.question: Mi V6 vibra, ¿es normal?
es.answer: Un V6 vibra naturalmente algo más que un 4 cilindros por su arquitectura. Pero unas vibraciones excesivas o un cambio repentino indican un problema como un fallo de encendido.

es.question: ¿Hay que cambiar todas las bujías de un V6 a la vez?
es.answer: Sí, es recomendable. En un V6, cambiar las 6 bujías a la vez asegura un equilibrio de combustión y evita repetir la misma intervención 6 meses después con las demás.

pt.question: O cilindro 5 é mais caro de reparar?
pt.answer: Nos motores em V, os cilindros do lado da parede de fogo (traseira) são mais difíceis de aceder. A mão-de-obra pode ser mais elevada mesmo que as peças tenham o mesmo preço.

pt.question: O meu V6 vibra, é normal?
pt.answer: Um V6 vibra naturalmente um pouco mais do que um 4 cilindros devido à sua arquitectura. Mas vibrações excessivas ou uma mudança súbita indicam um problema como uma falha de ignição.

pt.question: É preciso mudar todas as velas de um V6 ao mesmo tempo?
pt.answer: Sim, é recomendado. Num V6, mudar as 6 velas ao mesmo tempo assegura um equilíbrio de combustão e evita repetir a mesma intervenção 6 meses depois para as outras.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0306 concerne le cylindre 6, typiquement le dernier cylindre sur un moteur 6 cylindres en ligne ou le troisieme de la banque 2 sur un V6. Ce cylindre est souvent le plus eloigne du capteur de temperature d'eau et peut etre le plus expose a la chaleur. Sur les moteurs en ligne 6 cylindres, c'est le cylindre le plus pres du volant moteur. Les vibrations du rate d'allumage sur ce cylindre sont transmises directement au volant moteur et a la boite de vitesses, ce qui peut les rendre plus perceptibles dans la pedale d'embrayage ou le levier de vitesses. Le diagnostic est identique aux autres cylindres : bougie, bobine, injecteur puis compression.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0306 relates to misfire detected — cylinder 6, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0306 betrifft Zylinder 6, typischerweise den letzten Zylinder eines Reihen-6-Zylinders oder den dritten von Bank 2 bei einem V6. Dieser Zylinder ist oft am weitesten vom Kühlmitteltemperatursensor entfernt und kann der Hitze am stärksten ausgesetzt sein. Bei Reihen-6-Zylindern ist es der Zylinder, der dem Schwungrad am nächsten liegt. Die Vibrationen des Zündaussetzers an diesem Zylinder übertragen sich direkt auf Schwungrad und Getriebe, was sie im Kupplungspedal oder Schalthebel deutlicher spürbar machen kann. Die Diagnose ist identisch mit den anderen Zylindern: Zündkerze, Zündspule, Einspritzventil, dann Kompression.
description.es: El P0306 concierne al cilindro 6, típicamente el último cilindro de un motor de 6 cilindros en línea o el tercero del banco 2 en un V6. Este cilindro suele ser el más alejado del sensor de temperatura del agua y puede estar el más expuesto al calor. En los motores de 6 cilindros en línea, es el cilindro más cercano al volante de inercia. Las vibraciones del fallo de encendido en este cilindro se transmiten directamente al volante motor y a la caja de cambios, lo que puede hacerlas más perceptibles en el pedal de embrague o la palanca de cambios. El diagnóstico es idéntico a los demás cilindros: bujía, bobina, inyector, después compresión.
description.pt: O P0306 diz respeito ao cilindro 6, tipicamente o último cilindro num motor de 6 cilindros em linha ou o terceiro do banco 2 num V6. Este cilindro é frequentemente o mais afastado do sensor de temperatura da água e pode ser o mais exposto ao calor. Nos motores de 6 cilindros em linha, é o cilindro mais próximo do volante motor. As vibrações da falha de ignição neste cilindro são transmitidas directamente ao volante motor e à caixa de velocidades, o que pode torná-las mais perceptíveis no pedal de embraiagem ou na alavanca de velocidades. O diagnóstico é idêntico aos outros cilindros: vela, bobina, injector e depois compressão.

es: Vibración en el pedal de embrague

fr.question: Les vibrations dans la pedale sont-elles liees au rate ?
fr.answer: Sur un 6 cylindres en ligne, le cylindre 6 est pres de la boite de vitesses. Un rate sur ce cylindre transmet ses vibrations directement via le volant moteur et l'embrayage.

fr.question: Un rate sur un seul cylindre d'un 6 est-il plus discret que sur un 4 ?
fr.answer: Oui, perdre un cylindre sur six represente 17% de perte de puissance, contre 25% sur un 4 cylindres. Les vibrations sont aussi moins prononcees car les 5 cylindres restants compensent mieux.

fr.question: Comment identifier le cylindre 6 sur un V6 ?
fr.answer: L'ordre de numerotation varie selon les constructeurs. Generalement, banque 1 = cylindres 1-3 et banque 2 = cylindres 4-6. Consultez le manuel de votre vehicule pour l'ordre exact.

en.question: What does the P0306 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0306 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 6. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0306 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0306 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0306 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0306 fault typically range from around £9 to £1249, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 6, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Hängen die Vibrationen im Pedal mit dem Aussetzer zusammen?
de.answer: Bei einem Reihen-6-Zylinder sitzt Zylinder 6 in der Nähe des Getriebes. Ein Aussetzer an diesem Zylinder überträgt seine Vibrationen direkt über Schwungrad und Kupplung.

de.question: Ist ein Aussetzer an einem Zylinder eines 6-Zylinders unauffälliger als an einem 4-Zylinder?
de.answer: Ja, ein Zylinderausfall von sechs entspricht 17 % Leistungsverlust, gegenüber 25 % bei einem 4-Zylinder. Die Vibrationen sind auch weniger ausgeprägt, da die verbleibenden 5 Zylinder besser kompensieren.

de.question: Wie identifiziert man Zylinder 6 bei einem V6?
de.answer: Die Nummerierungsreihenfolge variiert je nach Hersteller. Im Allgemeinen: Bank 1 = Zylinder 1-3 und Bank 2 = Zylinder 4-6. Konsultieren Sie das Handbuch Ihres Fahrzeugs für die genaue Reihenfolge.

es.question: ¿Están las vibraciones en el pedal relacionadas con el fallo?
es.answer: En un 6 cilindros en línea, el cilindro 6 está cerca de la caja de cambios. Un fallo en este cilindro transmite sus vibraciones directamente a través del volante motor y el embrague.

es.question: ¿Un fallo en un solo cilindro de un 6 es más discreto que en un 4?
es.answer: Sí, perder un cilindro de seis representa un 17% de pérdida de potencia, frente al 25% en un 4 cilindros. Las vibraciones también son menos pronunciadas porque los 5 cilindros restantes compensan mejor.

es.question: ¿Cómo identificar el cilindro 6 en un V6?
es.answer: El orden de numeración varía según los fabricantes. Generalmente, banco 1 = cilindros 1-3 y banco 2 = cilindros 4-6. Consulte el manual de su vehículo para conocer el orden exacto.

pt.question: As vibrações no pedal estão ligadas à falha?
pt.answer: Num 6 cilindros em linha, o cilindro 6 fica perto da caixa de velocidades. Uma falha neste cilindro transmite as suas vibrações directamente através do volante motor e da embraiagem.

pt.question: Uma falha num único cilindro de um 6 é mais discreta do que num 4?
pt.answer: Sim, perder um cilindro em seis representa 17% de perda de potência, contra 25% num 4 cilindros. As vibrações também são menos pronunciadas porque os 5 cilindros restantes compensam melhor.

pt.question: Como identificar o cilindro 6 num V6?
pt.answer: A ordem de numeração varia conforme os fabricantes. Geralmente, banco 1 = cilindros 1-3 e banco 2 = cilindros 4-6. Consulte o manual do seu veículo para saber a ordem exacta.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0336 signale que le signal du capteur de vilebrequin est present mais de qualite degradee. Le calculateur detecte des irregularites dans le signal : dents manquantes mal lues, amplitude insuffisante ou signal erratique. Cela peut etre du a un entrefer trop grand entre le capteur et la roue dentee, un capteur dont le signal s'affaiblit ou une roue dentee partiellement endommagee. Le moteur peut presenter des hesitations, des a-coups ou des difficult-es a maintenir un regime stable. Ce code est souvent intermittent au debut et peut preceder un P0335 complet si le capteur continue a se degrader. Remplacez le capteur preventivellement si vous observez ce code.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0336 code, it is telling you there is a problem with crankshaft position sensor — range/performance. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0336 meldet, dass das Signal des Kurbelwellensensors vorhanden, aber in seiner Qualität beeinträchtigt ist. Das Steuergerät erkennt Unregelmäßigkeiten im Signal: schlecht gelesene fehlende Zähne, unzureichende Amplitude oder erratisches Signal. Das kann auf einen zu großen Luftspalt zwischen Sensor und Impulsrad, einen Sensor mit nachlassendem Signal oder ein teilweise beschädigtes Impulsrad zurückzuführen sein. Der Motor kann zögern, ruckeln oder Schwierigkeiten haben, eine stabile Drehzahl zu halten. Dieser Code ist anfangs oft intermittierend und kann einem vollständigen P0335 vorausgehen, wenn sich der Sensor weiter verschlechtert. Ersetzen Sie den Sensor vorbeugend, wenn Sie diesen Code beobachten.
description.es: El P0336 señala que la señal del sensor de cigüeñal está presente pero con calidad degradada. La centralita detecta irregularidades en la señal: dientes ausentes mal leídos, amplitud insuficiente o señal errática. Esto puede deberse a un entrehierro demasiado grande entre el sensor y la rueda dentada, un sensor cuya señal se debilita o una rueda dentada parcialmente dañada. El motor puede presentar titubeos, tirones o dificultades para mantener un régimen estable. Este código suele ser intermitente al principio y puede preceder a un P0335 completo si el sensor continúa degradándose. Sustituya el sensor preventivamente si observa este código.
description.pt: O P0336 assinala que o sinal do sensor de cambota está presente mas com qualidade degradada. A centralina detecta irregularidades no sinal: dentes em falta mal lidos, amplitude insuficiente ou sinal errático. Isto pode dever-se a um entreferro demasiado grande entre o sensor e a roda dentada, um sensor cujo sinal enfraquece ou uma roda dentada parcialmente danificada. O motor pode apresentar hesitações, solavancos ou dificuldades em manter um regime estável. Este código é frequentemente intermitente no início e pode preceder um P0335 completo se o sensor continuar a degradar-se. Substitua o sensor preventivamente se observar este código.

fr.question: Ce code peut-il etre intermittent ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est meme frequent. Le capteur peut fonctionner a froid mais perdre le signal a chaud, ou inversement. L'intermittence rend le diagnostic plus complexe.

fr.question: L'entrefer du capteur peut-il se regler ?
fr.answer: Sur certains vehicules, le capteur est reglable avec des cales. Sur d'autres, l'entrefer est determine par le logement du capteur. Verifiez que le capteur est bien enfonce et correctement fixe.

fr.question: Dois-je remplacer le capteur meme si le probleme est intermittent ?
fr.answer: Oui, un capteur qui commence a donner des signes de faiblesse finira par lacher completement. Mieux vaut le remplacer preventivellement que de tomber en panne sur l'autoroute.

en.question: What does the P0336 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0336 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with crankshaft position sensor — range/performance. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0336 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0336 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0336 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0336 fault typically range from around £17 to £342, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn crankshaft position sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Kann dieser Code intermittierend sein?
de.answer: Ja, das ist sogar häufig. Der Sensor kann kalt funktionieren, aber warm das Signal verlieren, oder umgekehrt. Die Intermittenz macht die Diagnose komplexer.

de.question: Kann man den Luftspalt des Sensors einstellen?
de.answer: Bei manchen Fahrzeugen ist der Sensor mit Distanzscheiben einstellbar. Bei anderen wird der Luftspalt durch die Sensoraufnahme bestimmt. Prüfen Sie, ob der Sensor richtig eingesteckt und korrekt befestigt ist.

de.question: Muss ich den Sensor ersetzen, auch wenn das Problem intermittierend ist?
de.answer: Ja, ein Sensor, der Schwächezeichen zeigt, wird irgendwann komplett versagen. Besser vorbeugend ersetzen als auf der Autobahn liegen bleiben.

es.question: ¿Puede este código ser intermitente?
es.answer: Sí, incluso es frecuente. El sensor puede funcionar en frío pero perder la señal en caliente, o a la inversa. La intermitencia hace el diagnóstico más complejo.

es.question: ¿Se puede ajustar el entrehierro del sensor?
es.answer: En algunos vehículos, el sensor es ajustable mediante calas. En otros, el entrehierro lo determina el alojamiento del sensor. Verifique que el sensor esté bien encajado y correctamente fijado.

es.question: ¿Debo sustituir el sensor aunque el problema sea intermitente?
es.answer: Sí, un sensor que empieza a dar señales de debilidad terminará fallando completamente. Mejor sustituirlo preventivamente que quedarse tirado en la autopista.

pt.question: Este código pode ser intermitente?
pt.answer: Sim, até é frequente. O sensor pode funcionar a frio mas perder o sinal a quente, ou vice-versa. A intermitência torna o diagnóstico mais complexo.

pt.question: O entreferro do sensor pode ser ajustado?
pt.answer: Em alguns veículos, o sensor é ajustável com calços. Noutros, o entreferro é determinado pelo alojamento do sensor. Verifique se o sensor está bem encaixado e correctamente fixado.

pt.question: Devo substituir o sensor mesmo que o problema seja intermitente?
pt.answer: Sim, um sensor que começa a dar sinais de fraqueza acabará por falhar completamente. Mais vale substituí-lo preventivamente do que ficar em pane na auto-estrada.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Correlation vilebrequin/arbre cames banque 2 capteur A
name.es: Correlación cigüeñal/árbol de levas banco 2 sensor A
name.pt: Correlação cambota/árvore de cames banco 2 sensor A

description.fr: Le P0018 detecte un decalage entre la position du vilebrequin et l'arbre a cames d'admission cote banque 2, specifique aux moteurs en V. Cela indique un calage variable bloque, une chaine etiree ou un capteur defaillant sur la banque 2. Le VVT utilise la pression d'huile pour ajuster la position de l'arbre a cames. Une huile degradee ou un niveau insuffisant sont des causes frequentes. Sur certains V6, les chaines de distribution arrivent en fin de vie autour de 150 000 km et commencent a s'etirer.
description.en: A P0018 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 2 sensor a. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0018 erkennt einen Versatz zwischen der Position der Kurbelwelle und der Einlassnockenwelle auf der Bank-2-Seite, spezifisch für V-Motoren. Das deutet auf ein blockiertes VVT, eine gedehnte Kette oder einen defekten Sensor auf Bank 2 hin. Das VVT nutzt den Öldruck, um die Position der Nockenwelle anzupassen. Degradiertes Öl oder unzureichender Ölstand sind häufige Ursachen. Bei manchen V6 erreichen die Steuerketten bei etwa 150 000 km das Ende ihrer Lebensdauer und beginnen sich zu dehnen.
description.es: El P0018 detecta un desfase entre la posición del cigüeñal y el árbol de levas de admisión del lado del banco 2, específico de motores en V. Esto indica una distribución variable bloqueada, una cadena estirada o un sensor averiado en el banco 2. El VVT utiliza la presión de aceite para ajustar la posición del árbol de levas. Un aceite degradado o un nivel insuficiente son causas frecuentes. En algunos V6, las cadenas de distribución llegan al final de su vida en torno a los 150 000 km y empiezan a estirarse.
description.pt: O P0018 detecta um desfasamento entre a posição da cambota e a árvore de cames de admissão do lado do banco 2, específico dos motores em V. Isto indica uma distribuição variável bloqueada, uma corrente esticada ou um sensor avariado no banco 2. O VVT utiliza a pressão do óleo para ajustar a posição da árvore de cames. Um óleo degradado ou um nível insuficiente são causas frequentes. Em alguns V6, as correntes de distribuição chegam ao fim de vida por volta dos 150 000 km e começam a esticar.

name.es: Sensor de árbol de levas banco 2
name.pt: Sensor de árvore de cames banco 2

fr.question: Ce code est-il grave ?
fr.answer: La gravite depend du contexte. Un diagnostic professionnel avec lecture des donnees en temps reel est recommande pour evaluer la situation exacte de votre vehicule.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation ?
fr.answer: Les couts varient selon la cause exacte et le vehicule. Consultez les fourchettes de prix indiquees pour chaque cause possible, et demandez plusieurs devis.

fr.question: Puis-je rouler avec ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, la conduite reste possible mais faites diagnostiquer et reparer dans un delai raisonnable pour eviter que le probleme ne s'aggrave.

en.question: What does the P0018 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0018 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 2 sensor a. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0018 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0018 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0018 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0018 fault typically range from around £42 to £1255, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is bank 2 vvt stuck, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist dieser Code schlimm?
de.answer: Der Schweregrad hängt vom Kontext ab. Eine professionelle Diagnose mit Echtzeitdatenauslesung wird empfohlen, um die genaue Situation Ihres Fahrzeugs zu beurteilen.

de.question: Wie viel kostet die Reparatur?
de.answer: Die Kosten variieren je nach genauer Ursache und Fahrzeug. Konsultieren Sie die angegebenen Preisspannen für jede mögliche Ursache und holen Sie mehrere Kostenvoranschläge ein.

de.question: Kann ich mit diesem Code fahren?
de.answer: Ja, das Fahren bleibt möglich, aber lassen Sie innerhalb einer angemessenen Frist diagnostizieren und reparieren, damit sich das Problem nicht verschlimmert.

name.fr: Correlation vilebrequin/arbre cames banque 2 capteur B
name.es: Correlación cigüeñal/árbol de levas banco 2 sensor B
name.pt: Correlação cambota/árvore de cames banco 2 sensor B

description.fr: Le P0019 concerne la correlation entre le vilebrequin et l'arbre a cames d'echappement de la banque 2. Ce code est specifique aux moteurs V6/V8 equipes de double VVT. Si ce code accompagne un P0018, les deux arbres a cames de la banque 2 sont decales, ce qui pointe fortement vers un probleme de distribution (chaine ou tendeur) plutot que vers les actuateurs VVT individuels. Le diagnostic requiert la verification du calage de la distribution et de l'etat des chaines. Un tendeur de chaine use peut provoquer un decalage sans que la chaine soit etiree.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0019 relates to crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 2 sensor b, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0019 betrifft die Korrelation zwischen Kurbelwelle und Auslassnockenwelle auf Bank 2. Dieser Code ist spezifisch für V6/V8-Motoren mit doppeltem VVT. Wenn dieser Code zusammen mit einem P0018 auftritt, sind beide Nockenwellen von Bank 2 verschoben, was stark auf ein Steuerzeitenproblem (Kette oder Spanner) hinweist, statt auf einzelne VVT-Aktuatoren. Die Diagnose erfordert die Überprüfung der Steuerzeiten und des Zustands der Ketten. Ein verschlissener Kettenspanner kann einen Versatz verursachen, ohne dass die Kette gedehnt ist.
description.es: El P0019 concierne a la correlación entre el cigüeñal y el árbol de levas de escape del banco 2. Este código es específico de motores V6/V8 equipados con doble VVT. Si este código acompaña a un P0018, los dos árboles de levas del banco 2 están desfasados, lo que apunta fuertemente a un problema de distribución (cadena o tensor) más que a los actuadores VVT individuales. El diagnóstico requiere la comprobación del calado de la distribución y el estado de las cadenas. Un tensor de cadena desgastado puede provocar un desfase sin que la cadena esté estirada.
description.pt: O P0019 diz respeito à correlação entre a cambota e a árvore de cames de escape do banco 2. Este código é específico de motores V6/V8 equipados com duplo VVT. Se este código acompanha um P0018, as duas árvores de cames do banco 2 estão desfasadas, o que aponta fortemente para um problema de distribuição (corrente ou tensor) em vez dos actuadores VVT individuais. O diagnóstico requer a verificação da sincronização da distribuição e do estado das correntes. Um tensor de corrente gasto pode provocar um desfasamento sem que a corrente esteja esticada.

en.question: What does the P0019 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0019 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 2 sensor b. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0019 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0019 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0019 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0019 fault typically range from around £87 to £1296, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is bank 2 chain tensioner, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Actuateur position arbre cames A circuit banque 2
name.es: Actuador de posición del árbol de levas A — circuito (banco 2)
name.pt: Actuador de posição da árvore de cames A — circuito (banco 2)

description.fr: Le P0020 est l'equivalent du P0010 pour la banque 2. L'actuateur de calage variable de l'arbre a cames d'admission du cote banque 2 a un probleme de circuit electrique. L'electrovanne qui controle le calage ne recoit pas la commande correctement. Verifiez d'abord le connecteur et le cablage qui peuvent etre endommages par la chaleur ou les vibrations du moteur. Sur les moteurs en V, l'acces aux composants de la banque 2 (cote cloison pare-feu) est souvent plus difficile, ce qui augmente le temps de main d'oeuvre.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0020 code, it is telling you there is a problem with camshaft position actuator a — circuit (bank 2). This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0020 ist das Äquivalent zum P0010 für Bank 2. Der variable Steuerzeitenaktuator der Einlassnockenwelle auf der Bank-2-Seite hat ein elektrisches Schaltkreisproblem. Das Magnetventil, das die Steuerzeit regelt, empfängt den Befehl nicht korrekt. Prüfen Sie zuerst den Steckverbinder und die Verkabelung, die durch Hitze oder Motorvibrationen beschädigt sein können. Bei V-Motoren ist der Zugang zu den Komponenten von Bank 2 (Spritzwandseite) oft schwieriger, was die Arbeitszeit erhöht.
description.es: El P0020 es el equivalente del P0010 para el banco 2. El actuador de distribución variable del árbol de levas de admisión del lado del banco 2 tiene un problema de circuito eléctrico. La electroválvula que controla la distribución no recibe correctamente el comando. Compruebe primero el conector y el cableado, que pueden estar dañados por el calor o las vibraciones del motor. En motores en V, el acceso a los componentes del banco 2 (lado del cortafuegos) suele ser más difícil, lo que aumenta el tiempo de mano de obra.
description.pt: O P0020 é o equivalente do P0010 para o banco 2. O actuador de distribuição variável da árvore de cames de admissão do lado do banco 2 tem um problema de circuito eléctrico. A electroválvula que controla a distribuição não recebe correctamente o comando. Verifique primeiro o conector e a cablagem, que podem estar danificados pelo calor ou pelas vibrações do motor. Nos motores em V, o acesso aos componentes do banco 2 (lado da parede de fogo) é frequentemente mais difícil, o que aumenta o tempo de mão-de-obra.

name.fr: Calage arbre cames A en avance banque 2
name.es: Distribución del árbol de levas A — adelantada banco 2
name.pt: Sincronização da árvore de cames A — avançada banco 2

description.fr: Le P0021 signale un calage d'arbre a cames d'admission trop avance sur la banque 2. Les causes et symptomes sont symetriques au P0011 mais localises sur l'autre banque du moteur en V. L'huile moteur degradee affecte les deux banques simultanement, donc si vous avez P0011 et P0021 ensemble, une vidange est la premiere intervention. Si un seul des deux codes est present, le probleme est localise sur la banque concernee : electrovanne, actuateur ou passage hydraulique bouche. Verifiez aussi que l'huile est au bon niveau.
description.en: A P0021 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with camshaft timing a — over-advanced (bank 2). The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0021 meldet eine zu früh eingestellte Steuerzeit der Einlassnockenwelle auf Bank 2. Die Ursachen und Symptome sind symmetrisch zum P0011, aber auf der anderen Bank des V-Motors lokalisiert. Degradiertes Motoröl betrifft beide Bänke gleichzeitig, wenn Sie also P0011 und P0021 zusammen haben, ist ein Ölwechsel die erste Maßnahme. Wenn nur einer der beiden Codes vorliegt, ist das Problem auf die betroffene Bank beschränkt: Magnetventil, Aktuator oder verstopfter Hydraulikkanal. Prüfen Sie auch, ob das Öl auf dem richtigen Stand ist.
description.es: El P0021 señala una distribución del árbol de levas de admisión demasiado adelantada en el banco 2. Las causas y síntomas son simétricos al P0011 pero localizados en el otro banco del motor en V. El aceite de motor degradado afecta a los dos bancos simultáneamente, por lo que si tiene P0011 y P0021 juntos, un cambio de aceite es la primera intervención. Si solo uno de los dos códigos está presente, el problema está localizado en el banco afectado: electroválvula, actuador o conducto hidráulico obstruido. Verifique también que el aceite esté en el nivel correcto.
description.pt: O P0021 assinala uma sincronização da árvore de cames de admissão demasiado avançada no banco 2. As causas e sintomas são simétricos ao P0011 mas localizados no outro banco do motor em V. O óleo do motor degradado afecta os dois bancos simultaneamente, por isso se tiver P0011 e P0021 juntos, uma mudança de óleo é a primeira intervenção. Se apenas um dos dois códigos está presente, o problema está localizado no banco afectado: electroválvula, actuador ou passagem hidráulica obstruída. Verifique também se o óleo está no nível correcto.

name.fr: Calage arbre cames A en retard banque 2
name.es: Distribución del árbol de levas A — retrasada banco 2
name.pt: Sincronização da árvore de cames A — atrasada banco 2

description.fr: Le P0022 indique que l'arbre a cames d'admission de la banque 2 est en retard par rapport a la consigne. Un calage retarde reduit le remplissage des cylindres et diminue la puissance, surtout a haut regime. Combine au P0012, ce code pointe vers un probleme d'huile generalise. Seul, il indique un probleme specifique a la banque 2 du moteur. Le decalaminage et une vidange avec huile de qualite constituent la premiere approche. Si le probleme persiste, l'electrovanne et l'actuateur de la banque 2 doivent etre testes individuellement.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0022 relates to camshaft timing a — retarded (bank 2), which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0022 zeigt an, dass die Einlassnockenwelle von Bank 2 gegenüber dem Sollwert verzögert ist. Eine verzögerte Steuerzeit verringert die Zylinderfüllung und reduziert die Leistung, besonders bei hoher Drehzahl. Kombiniert mit einem P0012 deutet dieser Code auf ein generalisiertes Ölproblem hin. Allein zeigt er ein Problem an, das spezifisch für Bank 2 des Motors ist. Eine Entkohlung und ein Ölwechsel mit Qualitätsöl sind der erste Ansatz. Wenn das Problem bestehen bleibt, müssen Magnetventil und Aktuator von Bank 2 einzeln getestet werden.
description.es: El P0022 indica que el árbol de levas de admisión del banco 2 está retrasado respecto a la consigna. Una distribución retrasada reduce el llenado de los cilindros y disminuye la potencia, sobre todo a alto régimen. Combinado con el P0012, este código apunta a un problema de aceite generalizado. Solo, indica un problema específico del banco 2 del motor. La descarbonización y un cambio de aceite con aceite de calidad constituyen el primer enfoque. Si el problema persiste, la electroválvula y el actuador del banco 2 deben probarse individualmente.
description.pt: O P0022 indica que a árvore de cames de admissão do banco 2 está atrasada em relação ao valor de referência. Uma distribuição atrasada reduz o enchimento dos cilindros e diminui a potência, sobretudo a alto regime. Combinado com o P0012, este código aponta para um problema de óleo generalizado. Sozinho, indica um problema específico do banco 2 do motor. A descarbonização e uma mudança de óleo com óleo de qualidade constituem a primeira abordagem. Se o problema persistir, a electroválvula e o actuador do banco 2 devem ser testados individualmente.

en: Loss of power at high RPM
es: Pérdida de potencia en alto régimen
pt: Perda de potência a alto regime

en.question: What does the P0022 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0022 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with camshaft timing a — retarded (bank 2). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0022 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0022 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0022 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0022 fault typically range from around £34 to £344, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is degraded oil, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist dieser Code schlimm?
de.answer: Der Schweregrad hängt vom Kontext ab. Eine professionelle Diagnose mit Echtzeitdatenauslesung wird empfohlen, um die genaue Situation Ihres Fahrzeugs zu beurteilen.

de.question: Wie viel kostet die Reparatur?
de.answer: Die Kosten variieren je nach genauer Ursache und Fahrzeug. Konsultieren Sie die angegebenen Preisspannen für jede mögliche Ursache und holen Sie mehrere Kostenvoranschläge ein.

de.answer: Ja, das Fahren bleibt möglich, aber lassen Sie innerhalb einer angemessenen Frist diagnostizieren und reparieren, damit sich das Problem nicht verschlimmert.

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda amont circuit banque 1 capteur 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 1
name.de: Heizung der Vorkatsonde Schaltkreis Bank 1 Sensor 1
name.es: Calentamiento sonda lambda anterior circuito banco 1 sensor 1
name.pt: Aquecimento sonda lambda anterior circuito banco 1 sensor 1

description.fr: Le P0030 signale un probleme sur le circuit de chauffage de la sonde lambda amont banque 1. Le chauffage permet a la sonde d'atteindre rapidement sa temperature de fonctionnement de 300 degres. Ce code est similaire au P0135 mais provient d'un constructeur utilisant un systeme de codification different. L'element chauffant integre a la sonde peut etre grille, ou le circuit d'alimentation est coupe. Le fusible, le relais et le cablage sont a verifier avant de remplacer la sonde. L'impact est une boucle ouverte prolongee au demarrage avec surconsommation.
description.en: When your car shows a P0030 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to upstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 1. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0030 meldet ein Problem am Heizschaltkreis der Vorkatsonde Bank 1. Die Heizung ermöglicht es der Sonde, schnell ihre Betriebstemperatur von 300 Grad zu erreichen. Dieser Code ähnelt dem P0135, kommt jedoch von einem Hersteller, der ein anderes Codierungssystem verwendet. Das in die Sonde integrierte Heizelement kann durchgebrannt sein oder der Versorgungsstromkreis ist unterbrochen. Sicherung, Relais und Verkabelung sollten vor dem Austausch der Sonde überprüft werden. Die Auswirkung ist ein verlängerter offener Regelkreis beim Starten mit Mehrverbrauch.
description.es: El P0030 señala un problema en el circuito de calentamiento de la sonda lambda anterior banco 1. El calentamiento permite a la sonda alcanzar rápidamente su temperatura de funcionamiento de 300 grados. Este código es similar al P0135 pero proviene de un fabricante que usa un sistema de codificación diferente. El elemento calentador integrado en la sonda puede estar quemado, o el circuito de alimentación está cortado. Hay que verificar el fusible, el relé y el cableado antes de reemplazar la sonda. El impacto es un bucle abierto prolongado en el arranque con sobreconsumo.
description.pt: O P0030 assinala um problema no circuito de aquecimento da sonda lambda anterior banco 1. O aquecimento permite à sonda atingir rapidamente a sua temperatura de funcionamento de 300 graus. Este código é semelhante ao P0135 mas provém de um fabricante que usa um sistema de codificação diferente. O elemento aquecedor integrado na sonda pode estar queimado, ou o circuito de alimentação está cortado. Há que verificar o fusível, o relé e a cablagem antes de substituir a sonda. O impacto é um ciclo aberto prolongado no arranque com consumo excessivo.

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda aval circuit banque 1 capteur 2
name.en: Downstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 2
name.de: Heizung der Nachkatsonde Schaltkreis Bank 1 Sensor 2
name.es: Calentamiento sonda lambda posterior circuito banco 1 sensor 2
name.pt: Aquecimento sonda lambda posterior circuito banco 1 sensor 2

description.fr: Le P0036 concerne le chauffage de la sonde lambda aval banque 1 (apres le catalyseur). L'element chauffant de cette sonde est defaillant, ce qui l'empeche d'atteindre sa temperature de fonctionnement rapidement. La sonde aval surveille l'efficacite du catalyseur. Sans chauffage, cette surveillance est retardee apres chaque demarrage. L'impact sur la conduite est negligeable puisque la sonde aval ne participe pas au reglage du melange. Le remplacement de la sonde complete est la solution standard car l'element chauffant n'est pas reparable separement.
description.en: A P0036 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 2. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0036 betrifft die Heizung der Nachkatsonde Bank 1 (nach dem Katalysator). Das Heizelement dieser Sonde ist defekt, was sie daran hindert, ihre Betriebstemperatur schnell zu erreichen. Die Nachkatsonde überwacht die Katalysatoreffizienz. Ohne Heizung ist diese Überwachung nach jedem Start verzögert. Die Auswirkung auf das Fahren ist vernachlässigbar, da die Nachkatsonde nicht an der Gemischregelung beteiligt ist. Der Austausch der kompletten Sonde ist die Standardlösung, da das Heizelement nicht separat reparierbar ist.
description.es: El P0036 concierne al calentamiento de la sonda lambda posterior banco 1 (después del catalizador). El elemento calentador de esta sonda es defectuoso, lo que le impide alcanzar su temperatura de funcionamiento rápidamente. La sonda posterior vigila la eficiencia del catalizador. Sin calentamiento, esta vigilancia se retrasa tras cada arranque. El impacto en la conducción es insignificante ya que la sonda posterior no participa en el ajuste de la mezcla. El reemplazo de la sonda completa es la solución estándar porque el elemento calentador no es reparable por separado.
description.pt: O P0036 diz respeito ao aquecimento da sonda lambda posterior banco 1 (depois do catalisador). O elemento aquecedor desta sonda é defeituoso, o que a impede de atingir a sua temperatura de funcionamento rapidamente. A sonda posterior vigia a eficiência do catalisador. Sem aquecimento, esta vigilância é atrasada após cada arranque. O impacto na condução é negligenciável já que a sonda posterior não participa no ajuste da mistura. A substituição da sonda completa é a solução padrão porque o elemento aquecedor não é reparável separadamente.

name.es: Calentamiento de sonda lambda posterior averiado
name.pt: Aquecimento de sonda lambda posterior avariado

name.es: Sensor de posición de la mariposa A — circuito
name.pt: Sensor de posição da borboleta A — circuito

description.fr: Le P0120 est le code general du capteur de position du papillon des gaz (TPS) signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Ce capteur indique au calculateur l'ouverture du papillon, c'est-a-dire la demande de puissance du conducteur. Un defaut de circuit peut provenir d'une tension de reference absente, d'un signal hors plage, ou d'une incoherence avec le capteur de pedale d'accelerateur. Le papillon electronique utilise deux capteurs redondants pour la securite. Si un seul est defaillant, le second prend le relais. Si les deux sont incoherents, le mode degrade s'active avec puissance tres reduite.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0120 relates to throttle position sensor a — circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0120 ist der allgemeine Code des Drosselklappenpositionssensors (TPS), der eine Schaltkreisstörung meldet. Dieser Sensor teilt dem Steuergerät die Öffnung der Drosselklappe mit, also die Leistungsanforderung des Fahrers. Ein Schaltkreisfehler kann durch eine fehlende Referenzspannung, ein Signal außerhalb des Bereichs oder eine Inkonsistenz mit dem Gaspedalsensor verursacht werden. Die elektronische Drosselklappe verwendet aus Sicherheitsgründen zwei redundante Sensoren. Ist nur einer defekt, übernimmt der zweite. Sind beide inkonsistent, wird der Notlauf mit stark reduzierter Leistung aktiviert.
description.es: El P0120 es el código general del sensor de posición de la mariposa del acelerador (TPS) que señala un fallo de circuito. Este sensor indica a la centralita la apertura de la mariposa, es decir, la demanda de potencia del conductor. Un fallo de circuito puede provenir de una tensión de referencia ausente, una señal fuera de rango o una incoherencia con el sensor del pedal del acelerador. La mariposa electrónica utiliza dos sensores redundantes por seguridad. Si solo uno está averiado, el segundo toma el relevo. Si los dos son incoherentes, se activa el modo de emergencia con potencia muy reducida.
description.pt: O P0120 é o código geral do sensor de posição da borboleta de aceleração (TPS) que assinala uma falha de circuito. Este sensor indica à centralina a abertura da borboleta, ou seja, o pedido de potência do condutor. Uma falha de circuito pode provir de uma tensão de referência ausente, de um sinal fora do intervalo ou de uma incoerência com o sensor do pedal do acelerador. A borboleta electrónica utiliza dois sensores redundantes por segurança. Se apenas um está avariado, o segundo assume. Se os dois são incoerentes, é activado o modo de emergência com potência muito reduzida.

pt: Luz de avaria do motor acesa

name.fr: Capteur position papillon A tension haute
name.en: Throttle position sensor A — high voltage
name.es: Sensor de posición de la mariposa A — tensión alta
name.pt: Sensor de posição da borboleta A — tensão alta

description.fr: Le P0123 indique que le capteur A du papillon des gaz envoie une tension anormalement haute, au-dessus de 4.5 volts environ. Le calculateur interprete cela comme un papillon grand ouvert en permanence, ce qui est evidemment incorrect au ralenti. Un circuit ouvert dans le fil de masse du capteur, un court-circuit vers la tension de reference, ou un capteur dont la piste resistive est coupee sont les causes typiques. Le mode degrade limite la puissance pour eviter une acceleration incontrole. La situation est consideree comme potentiellement dangereuse car une acceleration involontaire est possible si le calculateur ne compense pas.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0123 code, it is telling you there is a problem with throttle position sensor a — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0123 zeigt an, dass der Sensor A der Drosselklappe eine unnormal hohe Spannung, etwa über 4,5 Volt, sendet. Das Steuergerät interpretiert dies als dauerhaft weit geöffnete Drosselklappe, was im Leerlauf offensichtlich falsch ist. Ein unterbrochener Stromkreis im Massekabel des Sensors, ein Kurzschluss zur Referenzspannung oder ein Sensor mit unterbrochener Widerstandsbahn sind typische Ursachen. Der Notlauf begrenzt die Leistung, um eine unkontrollierte Beschleunigung zu vermeiden. Die Situation gilt als potenziell gefährlich, da eine ungewollte Beschleunigung möglich ist, wenn das Steuergerät nicht kompensiert.
description.es: El P0123 indica que el sensor A de la mariposa del acelerador envía una tensión anormalmente alta, por encima de unos 4,5 voltios. La centralita interpreta esto como una mariposa abierta al máximo de forma permanente, lo que obviamente es incorrecto al ralentí. Un circuito abierto en el hilo de masa del sensor, un cortocircuito hacia la tensión de referencia, o un sensor cuya pista resistiva está cortada son las causas típicas. El modo de emergencia limita la potencia para evitar una aceleración incontrolada. La situación se considera potencialmente peligrosa porque una aceleración involuntaria es posible si la centralita no compensa.
description.pt: O P0123 indica que o sensor A da borboleta de aceleração envia uma tensão anormalmente alta, acima dos 4,5 volts aproximadamente. A centralina interpreta isto como uma borboleta totalmente aberta em permanência, o que é obviamente incorrecto ao ralenti. Um circuito aberto no fio de massa do sensor, um curto-circuito para a tensão de referência, ou um sensor cuja pista resistiva está cortada são as causas típicas. O modo de emergência limita a potência para evitar uma aceleração descontrolada. A situação é considerada potencialmente perigosa porque uma aceleração involuntária é possível se a centralina não compensar.

en.question: What does the P0123 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0123 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with throttle position sensor a — high voltage. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0123 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0123 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0123 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0123 fault typically range from around £17 to £502, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is throttle position sensor open circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.
