motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

name.fr: Sonde lambda amont tension haute banque 1
name.es: Sonda lambda anterior tensión alta banco 1
name.pt: Sonda lambda anterior tensão alta banco 1

description.fr: Le P0132 signale que la sonde lambda amont envoie une tension constamment haute, au-dessus de 0.9V. Cela indique soit un melange reellement trop riche que la sonde detecte correctement, soit une sonde en court-circuit qui renvoie toujours une tension elevee. Le calculateur essaie de compenser en appauvrissant le melange, mais si la sonde est defaillante, cette correction est inutile et degrade la combustion. Verifiez les corrections carburant : si elles sont tres negatives et que le moteur tourne bien, c'est la sonde qui ment. Si le melange est vraiment riche, cherchez un injecteur qui fuit ou un regulateur de pression defaillant.
description.en: A P0132 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with upstream lambda sensor — high voltage (bank 1). This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0132 meldet, dass die Vorkatsonde eine konstant hohe Spannung über 0,9 V sendet. Das deutet entweder auf ein tatsächlich zu fettes Gemisch hin, das die Sonde korrekt erkennt, oder auf eine kurzgeschlossene Sonde, die immer eine hohe Spannung zurückgibt. Das Steuergerät versucht durch Abmagerung des Gemisches zu kompensieren, aber wenn die Sonde defekt ist, ist diese Korrektur nutzlos und verschlechtert die Verbrennung. Prüfen Sie die Kraftstoffkorrekturen: Wenn sie sehr negativ sind und der Motor gut läuft, lügt die Sonde. Wenn das Gemisch wirklich fett ist, suchen Sie nach einer undichten Einspritzdüse oder einem defekten Druckregler.
description.es: El P0132 señala que la sonda lambda anterior envía una tensión constantemente alta, por encima de 0,9 V. Esto indica o bien una mezcla realmente demasiado rica que la sonda detecta correctamente, o bien una sonda en cortocircuito que devuelve siempre una tensión elevada. La ECU intenta compensar empobreciendo la mezcla, pero si la sonda es defectuosa, esta corrección es inútil y degrada la combustión. Verifica las correcciones de combustible: si son muy negativas y el motor gira bien, es la sonda la que miente. Si la mezcla es realmente rica, busca un inyector que fugue o un regulador de presión defectuoso.
description.pt: O P0132 assinala que a sonda lambda anterior envia uma tensão constantemente alta, acima de 0,9 V. Isto indica ou uma mistura realmente demasiado rica que a sonda deteta corretamente, ou uma sonda em curto-circuito que devolve sempre uma tensão elevada. A ECU tenta compensar empobrecendo a mistura, mas se a sonda estiver defeituosa, esta correção é inútil e degrada a combustão. Verifique as correções de combustível: se forem muito negativas e o motor andar bem, é a sonda que mente. Se a mistura for realmente rica, procure um injetor que fugue ou um regulador de pressão defeituoso.

description.fr: Le P0150 est l'equivalent du P0130 pour la banque 2 du moteur. La sonde lambda qui controle le melange air-carburant de la banque 2 presente un defaut de circuit. Sur les V6 et V8, chaque banque a sa propre sonde amont pour regler independamment le melange. Un defaut sur cette sonde met la banque 2 en boucle ouverte, augmentant la consommation et les emissions de ce cote du moteur. Le diagnostic est identique : verifier cablage, connecteur et resistance de la sonde. Le remplacement est souvent la solution la plus fiable pour un composant de plus de 100 000 km.
description.en: The P0150 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with upstream lambda sensor — circuit (bank 2). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0150 ist das Äquivalent des P0130 für Bank 2 des Motors. Die Lambdasonde, die das Luft-Kraftstoff-Gemisch von Bank 2 steuert, weist einen Schaltkreisfehler auf. Bei V6 und V8 hat jede Bank ihre eigene Vorkatsonde, um das Gemisch unabhängig zu regeln. Ein Fehler an dieser Sonde versetzt Bank 2 in den offenen Regelkreis und erhöht Verbrauch und Emissionen auf dieser Motorseite. Die Diagnose ist identisch: Verkabelung, Stecker und Widerstand der Sonde prüfen. Der Austausch ist oft die zuverlässigste Lösung für ein Bauteil mit über 100.000 km.
description.es: El P0150 es el equivalente del P0130 para el banco 2 del motor. La sonda lambda que controla la mezcla aire-combustible del banco 2 presenta un fallo de circuito. En los V6 y V8, cada banco tiene su propia sonda anterior para ajustar independientemente la mezcla. Un fallo en esta sonda pone el banco 2 en bucle abierto, aumentando el consumo y las emisiones de ese lado del motor. El diagnóstico es idéntico: verificar cableado, conector y resistencia de la sonda. El reemplazo es a menudo la solución más fiable para un componente de más de 100.000 km.
description.pt: O P0150 é o equivalente do P0130 para o banco 2 do motor. A sonda lambda que controla a mistura ar-combustível do banco 2 apresenta um defeito de circuito. Nos V6 e V8, cada banco tem a sua própria sonda anterior para ajustar independentemente a mistura. Um defeito nesta sonda põe o banco 2 em ciclo aberto, aumentando o consumo e as emissões desse lado do motor. O diagnóstico é idêntico: verificar cablagem, conector e resistência da sonda. A substituição é muitas vezes a solução mais fiável para um componente com mais de 100.000 km.

description.fr: Le P0155 concerne le chauffage de la sonde lambda amont de la banque 2. L'element chauffant est defaillant, empechant la sonde d'atteindre rapidement sa temperature de fonctionnement apres un demarrage a froid. La banque 2 du moteur fonctionne en boucle ouverte plus longtemps que prevu, augmentant la consommation et les emissions de ce cote. Le fusible de chauffage est parfois commun aux sondes de la banque 2 — verifiez-le en priorite. Le remplacement de la sonde complete est la solution standard, comme pour le P0135 sur la banque 1.
description.en: When your car shows a P0155 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to upstream lambda sensor heater — circuit (bank 2). Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0155 betrifft die Heizung der Vorkatsonde von Bank 2. Das Heizelement ist defekt und verhindert, dass die Sonde nach einem Kaltstart schnell ihre Betriebstemperatur erreicht. Bank 2 des Motors läuft länger als vorgesehen im offenen Regelkreis, was Verbrauch und Emissionen auf dieser Seite erhöht. Die Heizungssicherung ist manchmal gemeinsam für die Sonden von Bank 2 — prüfen Sie sie prioritär. Der Austausch der kompletten Sonde ist die Standardlösung, wie beim P0135 auf Bank 1.
description.es: El P0155 concierne al calentamiento de la sonda lambda anterior del banco 2. El elemento calentador es defectuoso, impidiendo que la sonda alcance rápidamente su temperatura de funcionamiento tras un arranque en frío. El banco 2 del motor funciona en bucle abierto más tiempo del previsto, aumentando el consumo y las emisiones de ese lado. El fusible de calentamiento a veces es común a las sondas del banco 2 — verifícalo prioritariamente. El reemplazo de la sonda completa es la solución estándar, como con el P0135 en el banco 1.
description.pt: O P0155 diz respeito ao aquecimento da sonda lambda anterior do banco 2. O elemento aquecedor está defeituoso, impedindo a sonda de atingir rapidamente a sua temperatura de funcionamento após um arranque a frio. O banco 2 do motor funciona em ciclo aberto mais tempo que o previsto, aumentando o consumo e as emissões desse lado. O fusível de aquecimento por vezes é comum às sondas do banco 2 — verifique-o prioritariamente. A substituição da sonda completa é a solução padrão, como com o P0135 no banco 1.

description.fr: Le P0156 signale un defaut de circuit sur la sonde lambda aval de la banque 2, celle qui surveille le catalyseur cote banque 2. Cette sonde n'influence pas le reglage du melange mais verifie que le catalyseur de la banque 2 convertit correctement les polluants. Un defaut empeche cette surveillance et peut masquer un probleme de catalyseur. Le remplacement est similaire a celui de la sonde aval banque 1. Verifiez qu'il n'y a pas de fuite d'echappement entre le catalyseur et la sonde qui fausserait la mesure.
description.en: A P0156 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor — circuit (bank 2). This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0156 meldet einen Schaltkreisfehler an der Nachkatsonde von Bank 2, derjenigen, die den Katalysator auf der Seite von Bank 2 überwacht. Diese Sonde beeinflusst nicht die Gemischregelung, überprüft aber, dass der Katalysator von Bank 2 die Schadstoffe korrekt umwandelt. Ein Fehler verhindert diese Überwachung und kann ein Katalysatorproblem maskieren. Der Austausch ist ähnlich dem der Nachkatsonde Bank 1. Prüfen Sie, dass keine Abgasleckage zwischen Katalysator und Sonde die Messung verfälscht.
description.es: El P0156 señala un fallo de circuito en la sonda lambda posterior del banco 2, la que vigila el catalizador del lado banco 2. Esta sonda no influye en el ajuste de la mezcla pero verifica que el catalizador del banco 2 convierte correctamente los contaminantes. Un fallo impide esta vigilancia y puede enmascarar un problema de catalizador. El reemplazo es similar al de la sonda posterior banco 1. Verifica que no hay fuga de escape entre el catalizador y la sonda que falsearía la medida.
description.pt: O P0156 assinala um defeito de circuito na sonda lambda posterior do banco 2, aquela que vigia o catalisador do lado banco 2. Esta sonda não influencia o ajuste da mistura mas verifica que o catalisador do banco 2 converte corretamente os poluentes. Um defeito impede esta vigilância e pode mascarar um problema de catalisador. A substituição é semelhante à da sonda posterior banco 1. Verifique que não há fuga de escape entre o catalisador e a sonda que falsearia a medição.

en.question: What does the P0156 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0156 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor — circuit (bank 2). This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0156 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0156 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0156 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0156 fault typically range from around £8 to £217, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is bank 2 downstream lambda sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

description.fr: Le P0161 concerne l'element chauffant de la sonde lambda aval banque 2. Ce code est l'equivalent du P0141 pour l'autre cote du moteur en V. L'element chauffant grille empeche la sonde d'atteindre sa temperature de fonctionnement rapidement. L'impact sur la conduite est negligeable car cette sonde surveille uniquement le catalyseur de la banque 2. Le remplacement de la sonde complete est la seule solution car le chauffage est integre. Profitez-en pour verifier l'etat du catalyseur banque 2 avec un outil de diagnostic.
description.en: The P0161 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with downstream lambda sensor heater — circuit (bank 2). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0161 betrifft das Heizelement der Nachkatsonde Bank 2. Dieser Code ist das Äquivalent zum P0141 für die andere Seite des V-Motors. Das durchgebrannte Heizelement verhindert, dass die Sonde ihre Betriebstemperatur schnell erreicht. Die Auswirkung auf das Fahren ist vernachlässigbar, da diese Sonde nur den Katalysator von Bank 2 überwacht. Der Austausch der kompletten Sonde ist die einzige Lösung, weil die Heizung integriert ist. Nutzen Sie die Gelegenheit, um den Zustand des Katalysators Bank 2 mit einem Diagnosegerät zu prüfen.
description.es: El P0161 concierne al elemento calentador de la sonda lambda posterior banco 2. Este código es el equivalente del P0141 para el otro lado del motor en V. El elemento calentador quemado impide que la sonda alcance rápidamente su temperatura de funcionamiento. El impacto en la conducción es insignificante porque esta sonda solo vigila el catalizador del banco 2. El reemplazo de la sonda completa es la única solución porque el calentamiento está integrado. Aprovecha para verificar el estado del catalizador banco 2 con una herramienta de diagnóstico.
description.pt: O P0161 diz respeito ao elemento aquecedor da sonda lambda posterior banco 2. Este código é o equivalente do P0141 para o outro lado do motor em V. O elemento aquecedor queimado impede a sonda de atingir rapidamente a sua temperatura de funcionamento. O impacto na condução é negligenciável porque esta sonda apenas vigia o catalisador do banco 2. A substituição da sonda completa é a única solução porque o aquecimento está integrado. Aproveite para verificar o estado do catalisador banco 2 com uma ferramenta de diagnóstico.

name.es: Fallo del solenoide de parada del motor
name.pt: Avaria do solenoide de paragem do motor

description.fr: Le P0215 concerne l'electrovanne d'arret du moteur, principalement sur les vehicules diesel. Cette vanne coupe l'alimentation en carburant pour arreter le moteur quand vous tournez la cle. Si elle est defaillante, le moteur peut refuser de s'arreter ou au contraire s'arreter inopinement. Sur les diesels anciens avec pompe mecanique, cette vanne est la seule facon d'arreter le moteur. Un defaut est donc potentiellement dangereux. Verifiez le circuit electrique de la vanne et son fonctionnement mecanique. Le remplacement est relativement simple.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0215 code, it is telling you there is a problem with engine shut-off solenoid — malfunction. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der Code P0215 zeigt einen Fehler am Motorabstellmagneten an. Dieses Bauteil schneidet die Kraftstoffzufuhr ab, um den Motor beim Ausschalten der Zündung zu stoppen. Ein Defekt kann verhindern, dass der Motor startet oder korrekt abgestellt wird. Eine fachgerechte Diagnose ist erforderlich, um die genaue Ursache zu ermitteln und eine dauerhafte Reparatur durchzuführen.
description.es: El código P0215 indica un fallo del solenoide de parada del motor. Este componente corta el suministro de combustible para detener el motor al apagar el contacto. Un defecto puede impedir que el motor arranque o se apague correctamente. Se necesita un diagnóstico profesional para determinar la causa exacta y realizar una reparación duradera.
description.pt: O código P0215 indica uma avaria do solenoide de paragem do motor. Este componente corta o fornecimento de combustível para parar o motor ao desligar a ignição. Um defeito pode impedir que o motor arranque ou pare corretamente. É necessário um diagnóstico profissional para determinar a causa exacta e efectuar uma reparação duradoura.

es: El motor no se detiene al apagar
pt: O motor não pára ao desligar

en.question: What does the P0215 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0215 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine shut-off solenoid — malfunction. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0215 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0215 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0215 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0215 fault typically range from around £13 to £173, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is failed fuel shut-off solenoid, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Fallo del control de tiempo de inyección
name.pt: Avaria do controlo de tempo de injecção

description.fr: Le P0216 signale que l'avance a l'injection est en dehors des limites definies par le constructeur. Sur les moteurs diesel, le moment precis ou le carburant est injecte est crucial pour l'efficacite et les emissions. Une avance trop precoce provoque du cliquetis diesel et des contraintes mecaniques, trop tardive reduit la puissance et augmente la fumee. Sur les moteurs a pompe distributrice, l'avance est mecaniquement controlee et peut se deregler. Sur les common rail, c'est un probleme de capteur, de calculateur ou d'injecteur. Ce code necessite un diagnostic professionnel avec un outil capable de mesurer l'avance en temps reel.
description.en: A P0216 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with injection timing out of specification. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der Code P0216 weist auf ein Problem mit der Einspritzzeitsteuerung hin. Dieses System steuert den genauen Zeitpunkt der Kraftstoffeinspritzung im Motor. Ein Fehler kann zu Leistungsverlust, schwarzem Rauch und erhöhtem Kraftstoffverbrauch führen. Eine fachgerechte Diagnose ist notwendig.
description.es: El código P0216 señala un problema con el control de tiempo de inyección. Este sistema gestiona el momento preciso de la inyección de combustible en el motor. Un fallo puede provocar pérdida de potencia, humo negro y aumento del consumo. Se requiere un diagnóstico profesional.
description.pt: O código P0216 assinala um problema com o controlo de tempo de injecção. Este sistema gere o momento preciso da injecção de combustível no motor. Uma avaria pode provocar perda de potência, fumo negro e aumento do consumo. É necessário um diagnóstico profissional.

name.es: Sensor de posición del acelerador B problema de rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de posição do acelerador B problema de gama/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0221 signale que les performances du capteur de position du papillon B sont degradees. Le signal est present mais ses valeurs sont incoherentes avec le capteur A ou avec d'autres parametres moteur. Un encrassement du boitier papillon peut causer une friction qui perturbe le mouvement du volet et les lectures des capteurs. Sur les vehicules avec papillon electronique, une discordance prolongee entre les capteurs A et B declenche le mode degrade par securite. Un nettoyage du papillon suivi d'un reapprentissage du ralenti est souvent la premiere etape. Si le probleme persiste, le boitier papillon complet doit etre remplace.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0221 relates to throttle position sensor b — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der Code P0221 zeigt ein Bereichs- oder Leistungsproblem am Drosselklappenpositionssensor B an. Dieser Sensor informiert das Steuergerät über die Stellung der Drosselklappe, um die Einspritzung und Luftzufuhr zu steuern. Ein Fehler kann zu unregelmäßigem Motorlauf und Leistungsverlust führen.
description.es: El código P0221 indica un problema de rango o rendimiento del sensor de posición del acelerador B. Este sensor informa a la unidad de control sobre la posición del acelerador para gestionar la inyección y la admisión de aire. Un fallo puede provocar funcionamiento irregular y pérdida de potencia.
description.pt: O código P0221 indica um problema de gama ou desempenho do sensor de posição do acelerador B. Este sensor informa a unidade de controlo sobre a posição do acelerador para gerir a injecção e a admissão de ar. Uma avaria pode provocar funcionamento irregular e perda de potência.

name.es: Sensor de posición del acelerador defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de posição do acelerador defeituoso

en.question: What does the P0221 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0221 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with throttle position sensor b — range/performance. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0221 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0221 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0221 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0221 fault typically range from around £26 to £502, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is dirty throttle body, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Capteur position papillon B tension haute
name.en: Throttle position sensor B — high voltage
name.es: Sensor de posición del acelerador B entrada alta
name.pt: Sensor de posição do acelerador B entrada alta

description.fr: Le P0223 indique une tension trop elevee sur le capteur B du papillon des gaz. Le calculateur recoit un signal qui suggere que le papillon est grand ouvert alors que ce n'est pas le cas. C'est souvent un probleme de cablage en circuit ouvert ou un capteur dont la piste resistive est endommagee. Le mode degrade s'active immediatement car une discordance entre les capteurs represente un risque de securite. Si les deux capteurs A et B montrent des tensions elevees, le boitier papillon est tres probablement en cause. Si seul le B est haut, verifiez le cablage de ce capteur specifique.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0223 code, it is telling you there is a problem with throttle position sensor b — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der Code P0223 zeigt an, dass das Signal des Drosselklappenpositionssensors B zu hoch ist. Dies kann auf einen Kurzschluss, einen defekten Sensor oder ein Verkabelungsproblem hinweisen. Der Motor kann in den Notlaufmodus schalten, um Schäden zu vermeiden.
description.es: El código P0223 indica que la señal del sensor de posición del acelerador B es demasiado alta. Esto puede deberse a un cortocircuito, un sensor defectuoso o un problema de cableado. El motor puede entrar en modo de emergencia para evitar daños.
description.pt: O código P0223 indica que o sinal do sensor de posição do acelerador B é demasiado alto. Isto pode dever-se a um curto-circuito, um sensor defeituoso ou um problema de cablagem. O motor pode entrar em modo de emergência para evitar danos.

name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — circuit
name.es: Fallo del sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo
name.pt: Avaria do sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo

description.fr: Le P0235 signale un defaut sur le circuit du capteur de pression du turbocompresseur. Ce capteur mesure la pression de suralimentation dans le collecteur d'admission pour que le calculateur puisse controler la wastegate ou la geometrie variable. Sans ce signal, le calculateur ne peut pas regler correctement la pression du turbo et passe en mode degrade avec pression fixe reduite. Le capteur peut etre monte directement sur le collecteur ou relie par un tuyau de depression. Les causes incluent un capteur defaillant, un connecteur corrode ou un tuyau de reference bouche par de l'huile ou de la condensation.
description.en: A P0235 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with turbo boost pressure sensor a — circuit. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der Code P0235 zeigt eine Fehlfunktion des Turbolader-Boost-Sensors A an. Dieser Sensor misst den Ladedruck des Turboladers und sendet die Daten an das Steuergerät. Ein Fehler kann zu Leistungsverlust und erhöhtem Kraftstoffverbrauch führen. Eine Diagnose ist erforderlich.
description.es: El código P0235 indica un fallo del sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo. Este sensor mide la presión de soplado del turbocompresor y envía los datos a la unidad de control. Un fallo puede provocar pérdida de potencia y mayor consumo. Se requiere un diagnóstico.
description.pt: O código P0235 indica uma avaria do sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo. Este sensor mede a pressão de sopragem do turbocompressor e envia os dados à unidade de controlo. Uma avaria pode provocar perda de potência e maior consumo. É necessário um diagnóstico.

description.fr: Le P0236 indique que le capteur de pression turbo fonctionne mais donne des valeurs incoherentes. Le calculateur compare la pression mesuree avec la pression commandee et detecte des ecarts anormaux. Cela peut signifier que le capteur derive, que la pression reelle n'est pas celle attendue, ou qu'une fuite dans le circuit de surpression fausse la mesure. Avant de remplacer le capteur, verifiez l'integrite des tuyaux d'intercooler et les colliers de serrage. Une fuite d'air comprime donne une pression mesuree inferieure a la pression produite par le turbo, provoquant un ecart avec la consigne.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0236 relates to turbo boost pressure sensor a — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. description.de: Der Code P0236 zeigt ein Bereichs- oder Leistungsproblem am Turbolader-Boost-Sensor A an. Die vom Sensor gelieferten Werte entsprechen nicht den vom Steuergerät erwarteten Werten. Dies kann auf einen driftenden Sensor, ein Dichtheitsproblem oder einen Turboladerdefekt hindeuten.
description.es: El código P0236 indica un problema de rango o rendimiento del sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo. Los valores proporcionados por el sensor no corresponden a los esperados por la unidad de control. Esto puede indicar un sensor desviado, un problema de estanqueidad o un defecto del turbo.
description.pt: O código P0236 indica um problema de gama ou desempenho do sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo. motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Capteur pression turbo A tension basse
name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — low voltage
name.es: Sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo entrada baja
name.pt: Sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo entrada baixa

description.fr: Le P0237 signale une tension basse du capteur de pression turbo, interpretee comme une pression tres faible dans le collecteur. Un court-circuit dans le cablage ou un capteur en defaut interne sont les causes electricques principales. Si la pression reelle est normale mais le capteur lit bas, le calculateur augmentera la consigne de turbo pour compenser, risquant une surpression reelle. C'est pourquoi ce code met souvent le turbo en mode degrade par precaution. Verifiez le connecteur, le cablage et mesurez la tension de reference de 5V avant de remplacer le capteur.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0237 code, it is telling you there is a problem with turbo boost pressure sensor a — low voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der Code P0237 zeigt ein zu niedriges Signal vom Turbolader-Boost-Sensor A an. Dies kann auf einen defekten Sensor, einen Kurzschluss zu Masse oder eine unterbrochene Verkabelung hinweisen. Das Steuergerät kann den Motor in den Notlaufmodus versetzen.
description.es: El código P0237 indica una señal demasiado baja del sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo. Esto puede deberse a un sensor defectuoso, un cortocircuito a masa o un cableado interrumpido. La unidad de control puede poner el motor en modo de emergencia.
description.pt: O código P0237 indica um sinal demasiado baixo do sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo. Isto pode dever-se a um sensor defeituoso, um curto-circuito à massa ou uma cablagem interrompida. A unidade de controlo pode colocar o motor em modo de emergência.

name.es: Sensor de presión de sobrealimentación defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de pressão de sobrealimentação defeituoso

en.question: What does the P0237 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0237 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with turbo boost pressure sensor a — low voltage. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0237 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0237 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0237 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0237 fault typically range from around £9 to £125, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is short-circuited turbo boost pressure sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Capteur pression turbo A tension haute
name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — high voltage
name.es: Sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo entrada alta
name.pt: Sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo entrada alta

description.fr: Le P0238 indique une tension haute du capteur de pression turbo, correspondant a une pression anormalement elevee. Si c'est un faux signal, le calculateur reduce la commande de turbo, limitant la puissance. Si c'est une vraie surpression, c'est un probleme mecanique du turbo a traiter en urgence. Un cablage en circuit ouvert donne une tension maximale que le calculateur interprete comme une pression extreme. Differencier un probleme electrique d'une vraie surpression est essentiel pour le diagnostic. Un manometre externe en parallele du capteur electronique permet de trancher.
description.en: A P0238 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with turbo boost pressure sensor a — high voltage. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der Code P0238 zeigt ein zu hohes Signal vom Turbolader-Boost-Sensor A an. Dies kann auf einen Überdruck, einen defekten Sensor oder einen Kurzschluss zur Versorgungsspannung hinweisen. Ein dauerhafter Überdruck kann den Turbolader und den Motor beschädigen.
description.es: El código P0238 indica una señal demasiado alta del sensor A de presión de sobrealimentación del turbo. Esto puede deberse a una sobrepresión, un sensor defectuoso o un cortocircuito a la tensión de alimentación. Una sobrepresión persistente puede dañar el turbo y el motor.
description.pt: O código P0238 indica um sinal demasiado alto do sensor A de pressão de sobrealimentação do turbo. Isto pode dever-se a uma sobrepressão, um sensor defeituoso ou um curto-circuito à tensão de alimentação. Uma sobrepressão persistente pode danificar o turbo e o motor.

name.es: Sensor de presión de sobrealimentación defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de pressão de sobrealimentação defeituoso

name.en: Fuel injector cylinder 1 — low voltage circuit

description.fr: Le P0261 indique une tension de commande trop basse sur l'injecteur du cylindre 1. Le calculateur detecte un court-circuit dans le circuit de l'injecteur, ce qui empeche une injection correcte. L'injecteur peut etre en court-circuit interne, le cablage peut toucher la masse, ou le connecteur peut etre infiltre par de l'eau ou de l'huile. Ce code est plus specifique que le P0201 car il precise la nature du defaut electrique. Debranchez le connecteur et mesurez la resistance de l'injecteur. Un court-circuit donne une resistance proche de zero ohm, confirmant le diagnostic.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0261 relates to fuel injector cylinder 1 — low voltage circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der Code P0261 zeigt ein niedriges Signal im Einspritzdüsenkreis von Zylinder 1 an. Das Steuergerät erkennt eine unzureichende Spannung oder Stromstärke an diesem Einspritzventil. Dies kann zu Fehlzündungen, unrundem Motorlauf und Leistungsverlust führen.
description.es: El código P0261 indica una señal baja en el circuito del inyector del cilindro 1. La unidad de control detecta una tensión o corriente insuficiente en este inyector. Esto puede provocar fallos de encendido, funcionamiento irregular y pérdida de potencia.
description.pt: O código P0261 indica um sinal baixo no circuito do injector do cilindro 1. A unidade de controlo detecta uma tensão ou corrente insuficiente neste injector. Isto pode provocar falhas de ignição, funcionamento irregular e perda de potência.

name.en: Fuel injector cylinder 1 — high voltage circuit

description.fr: Le P0262 signale une tension trop haute sur le circuit de l'injecteur du cylindre 1, typiquement un circuit ouvert. L'injecteur ne recoit pas de courant car le fil est coupe ou le connecteur est debranche. Le cylindre 1 ne recoit aucun carburant et le moteur tourne sur les cylindres restants. Verifiez le connecteur de l'injecteur en premier — il peut s'etre debranche par les vibrations. Ensuite testez la resistance de l'injecteur : une valeur infinie confirme un circuit ouvert interne. Le remplacement de l'injecteur ou la reparation du cablage resolvent le probleme.

name.es: Circuito del sensor de picado 1 entrada baja
name.pt: Circuito do sensor de detonação 1 entrada baixa

description.fr: Le P0327 indique que le signal du capteur de cliquetis est trop faible. Le capteur piezoelectrique ne genere pas assez de tension pour que le calculateur puisse detecter les vibrations de detonation. Un mauvais serrage du capteur sur le bloc, un capteur fatigue ou un cablage avec resistance elevee sont les causes typiques. Le calculateur retarde l'avance d'allumage par precaution, ce qui reduit les performances. Le couple de serrage du capteur est critique : trop serre, il est ecrase ; pas assez, il ne capte pas les vibrations. Consultez les specifications pour le couple exact.
description.en: A P0327 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with knock sensor bank 1 — low voltage. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. description.es: El código P0327 indica una señal demasiado baja del sensor de picado 1. Este sensor detecta los ruidos de detonación en el motor para ajustar el encendido y evitar daños. Un fallo puede hacer que la unidad de control retrase el encendido por precaución, perdiendo así potencia.

en.answer: The P0327 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with knock sensor bank 1 — low voltage. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0327 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0327 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0328 signale une tension anormalement elevee du capteur de cliquetis. Cela peut indiquer un vrai cliquetis severe (detonation) ou un capteur qui genere un signal parasite. Un support moteur casse qui transmet des vibrations mecaniques au capteur peut aussi produire un faux signal. Des bougies non adaptees, un indice d'octane trop bas ou une avance d'allumage incorrecte sont des causes reelles de cliquetis. Le calculateur retarde fortement l'avance d'allumage, reduisant significativement les performances. Verifiez d'abord l'octane du carburant et l'etat des bougies.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0328 relates to knock sensor bank 1 — high voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der Code P0328 zeigt ein zu hohes Signal am Klopfsensor 1 an. Dies kann auf einen Kurzschluss, einen defekten Sensor oder tatsächliches übermäßiges Klopfen im Motor hinweisen. Das Steuergerät passt die Zündung an, um den Motor zu schützen.
description.es: El código P0328 indica una señal demasiado alta del sensor de picado 1. Esto puede deberse a un cortocircuito, un sensor defectuoso o un picado real excesivo en el motor. La unidad de control ajusta el encendido para proteger el motor.
description.pt: O código P0328 indica um sinal demasiado alto do sensor de detonação 1. Isto pode dever-se a um curto-circuito, um sensor defeituoso ou uma detonação real excessiva no motor. A unidade de controlo ajusta a ignição para proteger o motor.

name.pt: Avaria do circuito do sensor de detonação 2

description.fr: Le P0330 concerne le capteur de cliquetis de la banque 2, present uniquement sur les moteurs en V ou boxer. Ce capteur surveille les detonations du cote de la banque 2 de maniere independante. Un defaut sur ce capteur desactive la protection antidetonation de cette banque, exposant les cylindres concernes a des dommages potentiels si du cliquetis se produit. Les causes et le diagnostic sont identiques au P0325 mais localises sur l'autre cote du moteur. Le couple de serrage et la position du capteur sur le bloc sont les premiers points a verifier.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0330 code, it is telling you there is a problem with knock sensor circuit — bank 2. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der Code P0330 zeigt eine Fehlfunktion im Kreis des Klopfsensors 2 an. Bei V-Motoren überwacht dieser zweite Sensor die zweite Zylinderbank. Ein Fehler kann die Klopfregelung beeinträchtigen und zu Leistungsverlust sowie erhöhtem Kraftstoffverbrauch führen.
description.es: El código P0330 indica un fallo en el circuito del sensor de picado 2. En los motores en V, este segundo sensor supervisa la segunda bancada de cilindros. Un fallo puede afectar la gestión del picado y provocar pérdida de potencia y mayor consumo.
description.pt: O código P0330 indica uma avaria no circuito do sensor de detonação 2. Nos motores em V, este segundo sensor supervisiona a segunda bancada de cilindros. Uma avaria pode afectar a gestão da detonação e provocar perda de potência e maior consumo.

description.fr: Le P0341 signale que le capteur d'arbre a cames fonctionne mais son signal est degradé ou decale par rapport aux attentes. Le calculateur detecte des irregularites dans le timing du signal par rapport au capteur de vilebrequin. Cela peut indiquer un systeme VVT qui repond mal, une chaine de distribution qui commence a s'etirer, ou un capteur dont le signal s'affaiblit. Ce code est souvent intermittent au debut et peut ne se manifester qu'a froid ou qu'a chaud. Surveillez l'evolution car il peut preceder des codes plus graves comme le P0016.
description.en: A P0341 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with camshaft position sensor — range/performance. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der Code P0341 zeigt ein Bereichs- oder Leistungsproblem am Nockenwellenpositionssensor A (Bank 1) an. Dieser Sensor informiert das Steuergerät über die Position der Nockenwelle, um Einspritzung und Zündung zu synchronisieren. Ein Fehler kann zu Startproblemen und unrundem Motorlauf führen.
description.es: El código P0341 indica un problema de rango o rendimiento del sensor de posición del árbol de levas A (bancada 1). Este sensor informa a la unidad de control sobre la posición del árbol de levas para sincronizar la inyección y el encendido. Un fallo puede provocar problemas de arranque y funcionamiento irregular.
description.pt: O código P0341 indica um problema de gama ou desempenho do sensor de posição do veio de cames A (bancada 1). Este sensor informa a unidade de controlo sobre a posição do veio de cames para sincronizar a injecção e a ignição. Uma avaria pode provocar problemas de arranque e funcionamento irregular.

name.es: Sensor de árbol de levas defectuoso

description.fr: Le P0342 indique une tension basse sur le capteur d'arbre a cames, generalement un court-circuit dans le cablage ou le capteur. Le calculateur ne recoit qu'un signal bas permanent au lieu des impulsions attendues. Sur certains moteurs, le demarrage devient impossible car le calculateur a besoin de ce signal pour synchroniser l'injection. Sur d'autres, le moteur demarre en utilisant uniquement le capteur de vilebrequin mais avec un allumage moins precis. Verifiez le connecteur du capteur, le cablage et l'alimentation avant de remplacer le capteur lui-meme.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0342 relates to camshaft position sensor — low voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. description.de: Der Code P0342 zeigt ein zu niedriges Signal am Nockenwellenpositionssensor A (Bank 1) an. Ohne verlässliches Signal kann das Steuergerät Einspritzung und Zündung nicht korrekt steuern. Der Motor kann schwer starten oder in den Notlaufmodus schalten.
description.es: El código P0342 indica una señal demasiado baja del sensor de posición del árbol de levas A (bancada 1). Sin una señal fiable, la unidad de control no puede gestionar correctamente la inyección y el encendido. El motor puede costar arrancar o entrar en modo de emergencia.
description.pt: O código P0342 indica um sinal demasiado baixo do sensor de posição do veio de cames A (bancada 1). Sem um sinal fiável, a unidade de controlo não consegue gerir correctamente a injecção e a ignição. O motor pode ter dificuldade em arrancar ou entrar em modo de emergência.

name.es: Sensor de árbol de levas defectuoso
name.pt: Sensor de veio de cames defeituoso

name.fr: Capteur arbre a cames tension haute
name.de: Nockenwellenpositionssensor A Kreis hoher Eingang Bank 1
name.es: Sensor de posición del árbol de levas A bancada 1 entrada alta
name.pt: Sensor de posição do veio de cames A bancada 1 entrada alta

description.fr: Le P0343 signale une tension haute sur le capteur d'arbre a cames, correspondant a un circuit ouvert. Le fil de signal est coupe ou le connecteur est debranche. Le calculateur ne recoit aucun signal valide et le moteur peut refuser de demarrer sur certains vehicules. Sur d'autres, il fonctionne en mode degrade avec le seul capteur de vilebrequin. Un rongeur qui a grignote un fil, un connecteur arrache lors d'un entretien, ou un capteur dont la connexion interne est coupee sont les causes typiques. L'inspection visuelle du cablage est la premiere etape.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0343 code, it is telling you there is a problem with camshaft position sensor — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der Code P0343 zeigt ein zu hohes Signal am Nockenwellenpositionssensor A (Bank 1) an. Dies kann auf einen Kurzschluss zur Versorgungsspannung, einen defekten Sensor oder ein Verkabelungsproblem hinweisen. Der Motor kann Start- und Laufprobleme haben.
description.es: El código P0343 indica una señal demasiado alta del sensor de posición del árbol de levas A (bancada 1). Esto puede deberse a un cortocircuito a la tensión de alimentación, un sensor defectuoso o un problema de cableado. El motor puede presentar problemas de arranque y funcionamiento.
description.pt: O código P0343 indica um sinal demasiado alto do sensor de posição do veio de cames A (bancada 1). Isto pode dever-se a um curto-circuito à tensão de alimentação, um sensor defeituoso ou um problema de cablagem. O motor pode apresentar problemas de arranque e funcionamento.

name.es: Sensor de árbol de levas defectuoso

name.es: Bobina de encendido A — circuito primario
name.pt: Bobina de ignição A — circuito primário

description.fr: Le P0351 signale un defaut sur le circuit primaire de la bobine d'allumage A (cylindre 1 sur la plupart des moteurs). Le calculateur detecte que le courant dans le circuit primaire de la bobine n'est pas conforme aux attentes. La bobine peut etre en court-circuit ou en circuit ouvert, le connecteur peut etre defaillant, ou le driver de commande dans le calculateur est endommage. Ce code est plus precis que le P0301 car il pointe directement la bobine plutot que le cylindre. Le remplacement de la bobine est la solution la plus courante et la moins couteuse.
description.en: A P0351 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with ignition coil a — primary circuit. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0351 weist auf einen Fehler im Primärkreis der Zündspule A hin (Zylinder 1 bei den meisten Motoren). Das Steuergerät erkennt, dass der Strom im Primärkreis der Spule nicht den Erwartungen entspricht. Die Spule kann einen Kurzschluss oder eine Unterbrechung haben, der Stecker kann defekt sein, oder der Ansteuerungstreiber im Steuergerät ist beschädigt. Dieser Code ist genauer als der P0301, da er direkt auf die Spule und nicht auf den Zylinder hinweist. Der Austausch der Spule ist die häufigste und kostengünstigste Lösung.
description.es: El P0351 indica un fallo en el circuito primario de la bobina de encendido A (cilindro 1 en la mayoría de los motores). La centralita detecta que la corriente en el circuito primario de la bobina no es la esperada. La bobina puede estar en cortocircuito o en circuito abierto, el conector puede estar defectuoso o el driver de mando en la centralita está dañado. Este código es más preciso que el P0301 porque apunta directamente a la bobina y no al cilindro. La sustitución de la bobina es la solución más habitual y menos costosa.
description.pt: O P0351 indica uma avaria no circuito primário da bobina de ignição A (cilindro 1 na maioria dos motores). A centralina detecta que a corrente no circuito primário da bobina não corresponde ao esperado. A bobina pode estar em curto-circuito ou em circuito aberto, o conector pode estar com defeito, ou o driver de comando na centralina está danificado. Este código é mais preciso que o P0301, pois aponta diretamente para a bobina e não para o cilindro. A substituição da bobina é a solução mais comum e mais económica.

name.es: Bobina de encendido B — circuito primario
name.pt: Bobina de ignição B — circuito primário

description.fr: Le P0352 concerne la bobine d'allumage B, generalement celle du cylindre 2. Le circuit primaire de cette bobine presente un defaut electrique. Les bobines d'allumage modernes sont des composants individuels montes directement sur la bougie (bobine crayon). Elles chauffent beaucoup et les chocs thermiques repetitifs les usent avec le temps. Si une bobine est en panne, le cylindre correspondant ne recoit plus d'etincelle et le carburant non brule finit dans le catalyseur. Remplacez la bobine defaillante et verifiez l'etat de la bougie correspondante qui a pu souffrir de l'absence d'etincelle.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0352 relates to ignition coil b — primary circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0352 betrifft die Zündspule B, in der Regel die des Zylinders 2. Der Primärkreis dieser Spule weist einen elektrischen Fehler auf. Moderne Zündspulen sind einzelne Bauteile, die direkt auf der Zündkerze montiert werden (Stabzündspule). Sie werden stark erhitzt und wiederholte Temperaturwechsel verschleißen sie mit der Zeit. Wenn eine Spule ausfällt, erhält der entsprechende Zylinder keinen Funken mehr, und der unverbrannte Kraftstoff landet im Katalysator. Tauschen Sie die defekte Spule aus und prüfen Sie die zugehörige Zündkerze, die unter dem fehlenden Funken gelitten haben kann.
description.es: El P0352 afecta a la bobina de encendido B, generalmente la del cilindro 2. El circuito primario de esta bobina presenta un fallo eléctrico. Las bobinas de encendido modernas son componentes individuales montados directamente sobre la bujía (bobina tipo lápiz). Se calientan mucho y los choques térmicos repetitivos las desgastan con el tiempo. Si una bobina falla, el cilindro correspondiente deja de recibir chispa y el combustible sin quemar acaba en el catalizador. Sustituya la bobina defectuosa y compruebe el estado de la bujía correspondiente, que puede haber sufrido por la ausencia de chispa.
description.pt: O P0352 diz respeito à bobina de ignição B, geralmente a do cilindro 2. O circuito primário desta bobina apresenta um defeito elétrico. As bobinas de ignição modernas são componentes individuais montados diretamente na vela de ignição (bobina lápis). Aquecem bastante e os choques térmicos repetitivos desgastam-nas com o tempo. Se uma bobina avaria, o cilindro correspondente deixa de receber faísca e o combustível não queimado acaba no catalisador. Substitua a bobina avariada e verifique o estado da vela correspondente, que pode ter sofrido com a ausência de faísca.

name.es: Bobina de encendido C — circuito primario
name.pt: Bobina de ignição C — circuito primário

description.fr: Le P0353 signale un defaut du circuit primaire de la bobine C, cylindre 3. Sur un moteur 4 cylindres, les bobines sont generalement numerotees de A a D correspondant aux cylindres 1 a 4. La bobine C alimente le cylindre 3 en haute tension pour creer l'etincelle. Un defaut peut etre confirme en permutant la bobine C avec une autre. Si le defaut se deplace vers le cylindre de destination, la bobine est confirmee defaillante. Les bobines d'origine ont une duree de vie variable selon les constructeurs mais generalement superieure a 100 000 km.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0353 code, it is telling you there is a problem with ignition coil c — primary circuit. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0353 weist auf einen Fehler im Primärkreis der Spule C, Zylinder 3, hin. Bei einem 4-Zylinder-Motor sind die Spulen in der Regel von A bis D nummeriert, entsprechend den Zylindern 1 bis 4. Die Spule C versorgt den Zylinder 3 mit Hochspannung für den Funken. Ein Fehler kann bestätigt werden, indem man die Spule C mit einer anderen tauscht. Wenn der Fehler zum Zielzylinder mitwandert, ist die Spule als defekt bestätigt. Originalspulen haben je nach Hersteller eine unterschiedliche Lebensdauer, in der Regel aber über 100.000 km.
description.es: El P0353 indica un fallo en el circuito primario de la bobina C, cilindro 3. En un motor de 4 cilindros, las bobinas suelen estar numeradas de la A a la D, correspondiendo a los cilindros 1 a 4. La bobina C alimenta el cilindro 3 con alta tensión para crear la chispa. El fallo puede confirmarse permutando la bobina C con otra. Si el fallo se desplaza al cilindro de destino, se confirma que la bobina está defectuosa. Las bobinas originales tienen una vida útil variable según el fabricante, pero generalmente superior a 100.000 km.
description.pt: O P0353 indica uma avaria no circuito primário da bobina C, cilindro 3. Num motor de 4 cilindros, as bobinas são geralmente numeradas de A a D, correspondendo aos cilindros 1 a 4. A bobina C fornece alta tensão ao cilindro 3 para criar a faísca. A avaria pode ser confirmada trocando a bobina C com outra. Se o defeito se deslocar para o cilindro de destino, confirma-se que a bobina está avariada. As bobinas originais têm uma vida útil variável consoante o fabricante, mas geralmente superior a 100.000 km.

en.question: What does the P0353 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0353 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with ignition coil c — primary circuit. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0353 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0353 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0353 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0353 fault typically range from around £9 to £100, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is ignition coil c faulty, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.es: Bobina de encendido D — circuito primario
name.pt: Bobina de ignição D — circuito primário

description.fr: Le P0354 concerne la bobine D, celle du cylindre 4. Sur les moteurs turbo, le cylindre 4 est souvent le plus chaud, ce qui accelere l'usure de la bobine. Les puits de bougies peuvent aussi accumuler de l'humidite ou de l'huile si le joint de couvre-culasse fuit, provoquant des arcs electriques parasites qui detruisent la bobine. Si vous remplacez frequemment la bobine du cylindre 4, verifiez l'etat des joints du couvre-culasse et la presence d'huile ou d'eau dans le puits de bougie. Un puits sec et propre est essentiel pour la longevite de la bobine.
description.en: A P0354 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with ignition coil d — primary circuit. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0354 betrifft die Spule D, die des Zylinders 4. Bei Turbomotoren ist Zylinder 4 oft der heißeste, was den Verschleiß der Spule beschleunigt. Die Zündkerzenschächte können außerdem Feuchtigkeit oder Öl ansammeln, wenn die Ventildeckeldichtung undicht ist, was parasitäre Lichtbögen verursacht und die Spule zerstört. Wenn Sie die Spule von Zylinder 4 häufig wechseln müssen, prüfen Sie den Zustand der Ventildeckeldichtungen und ob Öl oder Wasser im Zündkerzenschacht vorhanden ist. Ein trockener und sauberer Schacht ist für die Langlebigkeit der Spule unerlässlich.
description.es: El P0354 afecta a la bobina D, la del cilindro 4. En los motores turbo, el cilindro 4 suele ser el más caliente, lo que acelera el desgaste de la bobina. Los pozos de bujías también pueden acumular humedad o aceite si la junta de la tapa de balancines pierde, provocando arcos eléctricos parásitos que destruyen la bobina. Si sustituye con frecuencia la bobina del cilindro 4, compruebe el estado de las juntas de la tapa de balancines y la presencia de aceite o agua en el pozo de la bujía. Un pozo seco y limpio es esencial para la longevidad de la bobina.
description.pt: O P0354 diz respeito à bobina D, a do cilindro 4. Nos motores turbo, o cilindro 4 é frequentemente o mais quente, o que acelera o desgaste da bobina. Os poços das velas também podem acumular humidade ou óleo se a junta da tampa de balancins tiver fugas, provocando arcos elétricos parasitas que destroem a bobina. Se substituir frequentemente a bobina do cilindro 4, verifique o estado das juntas da tampa de balancins e a presença de óleo ou água no poço da vela. Um poço seco e limpo é essencial para a longevidade da bobina.

name.es: Junta de tapa de balancines con fuga
name.pt: Junta da tampa de balancins com fuga
