motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.es: Circuito de inyección de aire secundario
name.pt: Circuito de injeção de ar secundário

description.fr: Le P0410 signale un probleme dans le systeme d'injection d'air secondaire (SAI). Ce systeme injecte de l'air frais dans le collecteur d'echappement pendant le demarrage a froid pour aider le catalyseur a monter en temperature plus rapidement et a bruler les hydrocarbures non consumes. La pompe a air, le clapet anti-retour, la vanne de commutation ou les tuyaux peuvent etre defaillants. Sur les vehicules allemands (VW, BMW, Porsche), ce systeme est frequent et source reguliere de codes defauts. Le moteur fonctionne normalement mais les emissions a froid sont augmentees. Un bruit de soufflerie au demarrage qui a disparu peut indiquer une pompe HS.
description.en: The P0410 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with secondary air injection circuit. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0410 meldet ein Problem im Sekundärlufteinblassystem (SAI). Dieses System bläst Frischluft in den Abgaskrümmer während des Kaltstarts ein, um dem Katalysator zu helfen, schneller auf Temperatur zu kommen und unverbrannte Kohlenwasserstoffe zu verbrennen. Luftpumpe, Rückschlagventil, Umschaltventil oder Schläuche können defekt sein. Bei deutschen Fahrzeugen (VW, BMW, Porsche) ist dieses System häufig und eine regelmäßige Quelle von Fehlercodes. Der Motor funktioniert normal, aber die Kaltstartemissionen sind erhöht. Ein Gebläsegeräusch beim Start, das verschwunden ist, kann auf eine defekte Pumpe hinweisen.
description.es: El P0410 señala un problema en el sistema de inyección de aire secundario (SAI). Este sistema inyecta aire fresco en el colector de escape durante el arranque en frío para ayudar al catalizador a subir de temperatura más rápido y quemar los hidrocarburos no consumidos. La bomba de aire, la válvula antirretorno, la válvula de conmutación o los tubos pueden estar defectuosos. En los vehículos alemanes (VW, BMW, Porsche), este sistema es frecuente y fuente regular de códigos de fallo. El motor funciona normalmente pero las emisiones en frío aumentan. Un ruido de soplador al arrancar que ha desaparecido puede indicar una bomba averiada.
description.pt: O P0410 assinala um problema no sistema de injeção de ar secundário (SAI). Este sistema injeta ar fresco no coletor de escape durante o arranque a frio para ajudar o catalisador a subir em temperatura mais rápido e a queimar os hidrocarbonetos não consumidos. A bomba de ar, a válvula antirretorno, a válvula de comutação ou os tubos podem estar defeituosos. Nos veículos alemães (VW, BMW, Porsche), este sistema é frequente e fonte regular de códigos de falha. O motor funciona normalmente mas as emissões a frio aumentam. Um ruído de soprador no arranque que desapareceu pode indicar uma bomba avariada.

fr.question: Ce code est-il grave ?
fr.answer: La gravite depend du contexte. Un diagnostic professionnel avec lecture des donnees en temps reel est recommande pour evaluer la situation exacte de votre vehicule.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation ?
fr.answer: Les couts varient selon la cause exacte et le vehicule. Consultez les fourchettes de prix indiquees pour chaque cause possible, et demandez plusieurs devis.

en.answer: The P0410 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with secondary air injection circuit. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0410 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0410 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0410 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0410 fault typically range from around £25 to £350, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty secondary air pump, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Caudal de inyección de aire secundario incorrecto
name.pt: Caudal de injeção de ar secundário incorreto

description.fr: Le P0411 indique que le debit d'air du systeme d'injection d'air secondaire n'est pas conforme aux attentes. La pompe fonctionne mais le debit est insuffisant — soit la pompe faiblit, soit les tuyaux sont partiellement bouches, soit le clapet ne s'ouvre pas completement. Le calculateur verifie le fonctionnement du systeme SAI en observant la reaction de la sonde lambda quand la pompe est activee. Si la sonde ne detecte pas assez d'oxygene supplementaire, le debit est juge insuffisant. Ce code est souvent precurseur d'un P0410 complet si le systeme continue a se degrader.
description.en: When your car shows a P0411 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to secondary air injection — incorrect flow. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0411 zeigt an, dass der Luftdurchfluss des Sekundärlufteinblassystems nicht den Erwartungen entspricht. Die Pumpe funktioniert, aber der Durchfluss ist unzureichend — entweder schwächelt die Pumpe, die Schläuche sind teilweise verstopft oder das Ventil öffnet sich nicht vollständig. Das Steuergerät überprüft den Betrieb des SAI-Systems, indem es die Reaktion der Lambdasonde beobachtet, wenn die Pumpe aktiviert ist. Wenn die Sonde nicht genügend zusätzlichen Sauerstoff erkennt, wird der Durchfluss als unzureichend beurteilt. Dieser Code ist oft Vorbote eines vollständigen P0410, wenn sich das System weiter verschlechtert.
description.es: El P0411 indica que el caudal de aire del sistema de inyección de aire secundario no se corresponde con las expectativas. La bomba funciona pero el caudal es insuficiente — o bien la bomba se debilita, o los tubos están parcialmente obstruidos, o la válvula no se abre del todo. La ECU verifica el funcionamiento del sistema SAI observando la reacción de la sonda lambda cuando la bomba está activada. Si la sonda no detecta suficiente oxígeno adicional, el caudal se considera insuficiente. Este código es a menudo precursor de un P0410 completo si el sistema sigue degradándose.
description.pt: O P0411 indica que o caudal de ar do sistema de injeção de ar secundário não está conforme as expectativas. A bomba funciona mas o caudal é insuficiente — quer a bomba esteja a enfraquecer, quer os tubos estejam parcialmente obstruídos, quer a válvula não se abra completamente. A ECU verifica o funcionamento do sistema SAI observando a reação da sonda lambda quando a bomba está ativada. Se a sonda não detetar oxigénio adicional suficiente, o caudal é considerado insuficiente. Este código é muitas vezes precursor de um P0410 completo se o sistema continuar a degradar-se.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.es: Circuito del sensor de nivel de combustible
name.pt: Circuito do sensor de nivel de combustivel

description.fr: Le P0460 signale un probleme sur le circuit du capteur de niveau de carburant dans le reservoir. Ce capteur, compose d'un flotteur et d'une resistance variable, indique la quantite de carburant restante. Un defaut de circuit rend la jauge d'essence au tableau de bord non fiable — elle peut indiquer plein en permanence, vide, ou ne plus bouger du tout. Le capteur est souvent integre au module de pompe a carburant dans le reservoir. Avec le temps, la piste resistive s'use, surtout dans la zone ou le flotteur passe le plus de temps. Le remplacement necessite de demonter le module de pompe a carburant.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0460 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with fuel level sensor circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0460 signalisiert ein Problem im Schaltkreis des Kraftstoffstandgebers im Tank. Dieser Sensor, bestehend aus einem Schwimmer und einem variablen Widerstand, zeigt die verbleibende Kraftstoffmenge an. Ein Schaltkreisdefekt macht die Tankanzeige im Armaturenbrett unzuverlaessig — sie kann dauerhaft voll, leer oder gar nicht mehr reagieren. Der Tankgeber ist oft in das Kraftstoffpumpenmodul im Tank integriert. Mit der Zeit verschleisst die Widerstandsbahn, besonders in dem Bereich, in dem sich der Schwimmer am haeufigsten befindet. Der Austausch erfordert den Ausbau des Kraftstoffpumpenmoduls.
description.es: El P0460 senala un problema en el circuito del sensor de nivel de combustible en el deposito. Este sensor, compuesto por un flotador y una resistencia variable, indica la cantidad de combustible restante. Un fallo del circuito hace que el indicador de combustible del salpicadero no sea fiable — puede indicar lleno permanentemente, vacio, o dejar de moverse. El sensor suele estar integrado en el modulo de la bomba de combustible dentro del deposito. Con el tiempo, la pista resistiva se desgasta, especialmente en la zona donde el flotador pasa mas tiempo. El reemplazo requiere desmontar el modulo de la bomba de combustible.
description.pt: O P0460 sinaliza um problema no circuito do sensor de nivel de combustivel no deposito. Este sensor, composto por um flutuador e uma resistencia variavel, indica a quantidade de combustivel restante. Um defeito no circuito torna o indicador de combustivel no painel de instrumentos pouco fiavel — pode indicar cheio permanentemente, vazio, ou deixar de se mover. O sensor esta frequentemente integrado no modulo da bomba de combustivel dentro do deposito. Com o tempo, a pista resistiva desgasta-se, especialmente na zona onde o flutuador passa mais tempo. A substituicao requer a desmontagem do modulo da bomba de combustivel.

description.fr: Le P0461 indique que le capteur de niveau de carburant donne des valeurs incoherentes. La jauge peut monter et descendre de maniere erratique ou rester figee a une certaine position malgre la consommation de carburant. La piste resistive du capteur presente probablement une zone morte ou la resistance saute brusquement, causant des lectures incorrectes. C'est un defaut de vieillissement classique. Le capteur ne peut pas etre repare et doit etre remplace. En attendant, reperage du kilometrage au plein pour estimer le niveau restant est la solution provisoire.
description.en: The P0461 code indicates an electrical system fault related to fuel level sensor — range/performance. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0461 zeigt an, dass der Kraftstoffstandgeber inkonsistente Werte liefert. Die Tankanzeige kann unberechenbar steigen und fallen oder trotz Kraftstoffverbrauch in einer bestimmten Position verharren. Die Widerstandsbahn des Sensors weist wahrscheinlich eine tote Zone auf, in der der Widerstand abrupt springt, was zu falschen Messwerten fuehrt. Es ist ein typischer Alterungsdefekt. Der Sensor kann nicht repariert werden und muss ausgetauscht werden. In der Zwischenzeit ist das Notieren des Kilometerstands bei jeder Tankfuellung zur Schaetzung des Restbestands die provisorische Loesung.
description.es: El P0461 indica que el sensor de nivel de combustible proporciona valores incoherentes. El indicador puede subir y bajar de manera erratica o quedarse fijo en una posicion a pesar del consumo de combustible. La pista resistiva del sensor probablemente presenta una zona muerta donde la resistencia salta bruscamente, causando lecturas incorrectas. Es un defecto clasico de envejecimiento. El sensor no se puede reparar y debe ser reemplazado. Mientras tanto, anotar el kilometraje en cada repostaje para estimar el nivel restante es la solucion provisional.
description.pt: O P0461 indica que o sensor de nivel de combustivel fornece valores incoerentes. O indicador pode subir e descer de forma erratica ou ficar preso numa posicao apesar do consumo de combustivel. A pista resistiva do sensor apresenta provavelmente uma zona morta onde a resistencia salta bruscamente, causando leituras incorretas. E um defeito classico de envelhecimento. O sensor nao pode ser reparado e deve ser substituido. Entretanto, anotar a quilometragem a cada abastecimento para estimar o nivel restante e a solucao provisoria.

description.fr: Le P0480 signale un probleme sur le circuit du ventilateur de refroidissement principal. Ce ventilateur electrique est essentiel pour maintenir la temperature moteur dans la plage normale, surtout en circulation urbaine ou le flux d'air naturel est insuffisant. Sans ventilateur, le moteur peut surchauffer dans les embouteillages. Les causes incluent un moteur de ventilateur grille, un relais defaillant, un fusible grille ou un capteur de temperature qui ne commande pas correctement l'activation. Le fusible du ventilateur est souvent de forte puissance (30A ou plus) et se trouve dans la boite a fusibles sous le capot.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0480 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with cooling fan 1 circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0480 signalisiert ein Problem im Schaltkreis des Hauptkuehlerluefters. Dieser elektrische Luefter ist wesentlich, um die Motortemperatur im normalen Bereich zu halten, insbesondere im Stadtverkehr, wo der natuerliche Luftstrom nicht ausreicht. Ohne Luefter kann der Motor im Stau ueberhitzen. Zu den Ursachen gehoeren ein durchgebrannter Lueftermotor, ein defektes Relais, eine durchgebrannte Sicherung oder ein Temperatursensor, der die Aktivierung nicht korrekt steuert. Die Sicherung des Luefters hat oft eine hohe Amperezahl (30A oder mehr) und befindet sich im Sicherungskasten unter der Motorhaube.
description.es: El P0480 senala un problema en el circuito del ventilador de refrigeracion principal. Este ventilador electrico es esencial para mantener la temperatura del motor en el rango normal, especialmente en circulacion urbana donde el flujo de aire natural es insuficiente. Sin ventilador, el motor puede sobrecalentarse en los atascos. Las causas incluyen un motor de ventilador quemado, un rele defectuoso, un fusible fundido o un sensor de temperatura que no controla correctamente la activacion. El fusible del ventilador suele ser de alta potencia (30A o mas) y se encuentra en la caja de fusibles bajo el capo.
description.pt: O P0480 sinaliza um problema no circuito do ventilador de arrefecimento principal. Este ventilador eletrico e essencial para manter a temperatura do motor na faixa normal, especialmente em circulacao urbana onde o fluxo de ar natural e insuficiente. Sem ventilador, o motor pode sobreaquecer nos engarrafamentos. As causas incluem um motor de ventilador queimado, um rele defeituoso, um fusivel queimado ou um sensor de temperatura que nao comanda corretamente a ativacao. O fusivel do ventilador e frequentemente de alta potencia (30A ou mais) e encontra-se na caixa de fusiveis sob o capo.

description.fr: Le P0481 concerne le deuxieme ventilateur de refroidissement, present sur les vehicules equipes de deux motoventilateurs ou d'un ventilateur a deux vitesses. Ce second ventilateur s'active a une temperature plus elevee que le premier ou quand la climatisation est en marche pour aider a refroidir le condenseur. Un defaut sur ce circuit signifie que le refroidissement a haute charge est compromis. En conduite urbaine avec la climatisation en ete, le risque de surchauffe augmente significativement. Les causes sont les memes que pour le P0480 : moteur, relais ou fusible.
description.en: The P0481 code indicates an electrical system fault related to cooling fan 2 circuit. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0481 betrifft den zweiten Kuehlerluefter, der bei Fahrzeugen mit zwei Lueftern oder einem zweistufigen Luefter vorhanden ist. Dieser zweite Luefter schaltet sich bei einer hoeheren Temperatur als der erste ein oder wenn die Klimaanlage laeuft, um den Kondensator zu kuehlen. Ein Defekt in diesem Schaltkreis bedeutet, dass die Kuehlung bei hoher Last beeintraechtigt ist. Im Stadtverkehr mit eingeschalteter Klimaanlage im Sommer steigt das Ueberhitzungsrisiko erheblich. Die Ursachen sind die gleichen wie beim P0480: Motor, Relais oder Sicherung.
description.es: El P0481 se refiere al segundo ventilador de refrigeracion, presente en vehiculos equipados con dos motoventiladores o un ventilador de dos velocidades. Este segundo ventilador se activa a una temperatura mas alta que el primero o cuando el aire acondicionado esta en marcha para ayudar a refrigerar el condensador. Un fallo en este circuito significa que la refrigeracion a alta carga esta comprometida. En conduccion urbana con el aire acondicionado en verano, el riesgo de sobrecalentamiento aumenta significativamente. Las causas son las mismas que para el P0480: motor, rele o fusible.
description.pt: O P0481 diz respeito ao segundo ventilador de arrefecimento, presente nos veiculos equipados com dois motoventiladores ou um ventilador de duas velocidades. Este segundo ventilador ativa-se a uma temperatura mais elevada que o primeiro ou quando o ar condicionado esta ligado para ajudar a arrefecer o condensador. Um defeito neste circuito significa que o arrefecimento em alta carga esta comprometido. Em conducao urbana com ar condicionado no verao, o risco de sobreaquecimento aumenta significativamente. As causas sao as mesmas que para o P0480: motor, rele ou fusivel.

name.fr: Circuit air secondaire banque 1 debit insuffisant
name.en: Secondary air injection bank 1 — insufficient flow
name.es: Circuito de aire secundario banco 1 — caudal insuficiente
name.pt: Circuito de ar secundário banco 1 — caudal insuficiente

description.fr: Le P0491 est specifique aux moteurs en V et indique un debit d'air secondaire insuffisant du cote de la banque 1. Le systeme d'injection d'air secondaire envoie de l'air frais dans l'echappement de chaque banque independamment. Si le debit est insuffisant cote banque 1, un tuyau bouche, un clapet bloque ou une derivation du debit vers la banque 2 peut etre en cause. Le catalyseur de la banque 1 met plus longtemps a monter en temperature a froid, augmentant les emissions pendant les premieres minutes. Ce code est souvent visible sur les VW/Audi et BMW a moteur en V.
description.en: The P0491 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with secondary air injection bank 1 — insufficient flow. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0491 ist spezifisch für V-Motoren und zeigt einen unzureichenden Sekundärluftdurchfluss auf der Seite von Bank 1 an. Das Sekundärlufteinblassystem sendet Frischluft unabhängig in den Auspuff jeder Bank. Wenn der Durchfluss auf der Seite von Bank 1 unzureichend ist, kann ein verstopfter Schlauch, ein blockiertes Ventil oder eine Umleitung des Durchflusses zu Bank 2 die Ursache sein. Der Katalysator von Bank 1 braucht länger, um im Kaltstart auf Temperatur zu kommen, was die Emissionen während der ersten Minuten erhöht. Dieser Code ist oft bei VW/Audi und BMW mit V-Motor sichtbar.
description.es: El P0491 es específico de los motores en V e indica un caudal de aire secundario insuficiente del lado del banco 1. El sistema de inyección de aire secundario envía aire fresco al escape de cada banco independientemente. Si el caudal es insuficiente del lado banco 1, un tubo obstruido, una válvula bloqueada o una derivación del caudal hacia el banco 2 puede estar en causa. El catalizador del banco 1 tarda más en subir de temperatura en frío, aumentando las emisiones durante los primeros minutos. Este código es a menudo visible en los VW/Audi y BMW con motor en V.
description.pt: O P0491 é específico dos motores em V e indica um caudal de ar secundário insuficiente do lado do banco 1. O sistema de injeção de ar secundário envia ar fresco ao escape de cada banco independentemente. Se o caudal for insuficiente do lado banco 1, um tubo obstruído, uma válvula bloqueada ou uma derivação do caudal para o banco 2 pode estar em causa. O catalisador do banco 1 demora mais a subir em temperatura a frio, aumentando as emissões durante os primeiros minutos. Este código é muitas vezes visível nos VW/Audi e BMW com motor em V.

en.question: What does the P0491 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0491 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with secondary air injection bank 1 — insufficient flow. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0491 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0491 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0491 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0491 fault typically range from around £17 to £343, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is blocked bank 1 secondary air hose, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Circuit air secondaire banque 2 debit insuffisant
name.en: Secondary air injection bank 2 — insufficient flow
name.es: Circuito de aire secundario banco 2 — caudal insuficiente
name.pt: Circuito de ar secundário banco 2 — caudal insuficiente

description.fr: Le P0492 est le symetrique du P0491 pour la banque 2. Le debit d'air secondaire est insuffisant du cote banque 2. Si les deux codes P0491 et P0492 sont presents, la pompe SAI commune est probablement en cause. Si seul le P0492 apparait, cherchez du cote du clapet anti-retour ou du tuyau specifique a la banque 2. Sur les moteurs boxer (Subaru, Porsche), les tuyaux SAI sont longs et traversent le compartiment moteur, ce qui les expose aux fuites et aux obstructions. Un controle visuel de l'integrite des tuyaux est la premiere etape.
description.en: When your car shows a P0492 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to secondary air injection bank 2 — insufficient flow. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0492 ist das Gegenstück zum P0491 für Bank 2. Der Sekundärluftdurchfluss ist auf der Seite von Bank 2 unzureichend. Wenn beide Codes P0491 und P0492 vorhanden sind, ist wahrscheinlich die gemeinsame SAI-Pumpe die Ursache. Wenn nur der P0492 erscheint, suchen Sie auf der Seite des Rückschlagventils oder des für Bank 2 spezifischen Schlauchs. Bei Boxermotoren (Subaru, Porsche) sind die SAI-Schläuche lang und durchqueren den Motorraum, was sie Lecks und Verstopfungen aussetzt. Eine Sichtkontrolle der Schlauchintegrität ist der erste Schritt.
description.es: El P0492 es el simétrico del P0491 para el banco 2. El caudal de aire secundario es insuficiente del lado banco 2. Si ambos códigos P0491 y P0492 están presentes, la bomba SAI común probablemente está en causa. Si solo aparece el P0492, busca del lado de la válvula antirretorno o del tubo específico del banco 2. En los motores bóxer (Subaru, Porsche), los tubos SAI son largos y atraviesan el compartimento motor, lo que los expone a fugas y obstrucciones. Un control visual de la integridad de los tubos es el primer paso.
description.pt: O P0492 é o simétrico do P0491 para o banco 2. O caudal de ar secundário é insuficiente do lado banco 2. Se ambos os códigos P0491 e P0492 estiverem presentes, a bomba SAI comum está provavelmente em causa. Se só aparecer o P0492, procure do lado da válvula antirretorno ou do tubo específico do banco 2. Nos motores boxer (Subaru, Porsche), os tubos SAI são longos e atravessam o compartimento do motor, o que os expõe a fugas e obstruções. Um controlo visual da integridade dos tubos é o primeiro passo.

name.es: Sensor de presión de aceite del motor — circuito
name.pt: Sensor de pressão do óleo do motor — circuito

description.fr: Le P0520 signale un probleme sur le circuit du capteur de pression d'huile moteur. Ce capteur est essentiel pour surveiller que l'huile circule correctement et sous une pression suffisante pour lubrifier le moteur. Un defaut de circuit peut signifier que le capteur lui-meme est HS, que le cablage est coupe, ou que le connecteur est corrode. ATTENTION : ce code peut aussi masquer un vrai probleme de pression d'huile. Si le voyant d'huile s'allume en roulant, arretez-vous immediatement et verifiez le niveau d'huile. Ne prenez pas le risque de rouler sans pression d'huile, meme si vous pensez que c'est le capteur.
description.en: A P0520 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with engine oil pressure sensor circuit. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0520 weist auf ein Problem im Schaltkreis des Öldrucksensors hin. Dieser Sensor ist entscheidend, um sicherzustellen, dass das Öl ordnungsgemäß und mit ausreichendem Druck zirkuliert, um den Motor zu schmieren. Ein Schaltkreisfehler kann bedeuten, dass der Sensor selbst defekt ist, die Verkabelung unterbrochen oder der Stecker korrodiert ist. ACHTUNG: Dieser Code kann auch ein echtes Öldruckproblem verbergen. Wenn die Ölwarnleuchte während der Fahrt aufleuchtet, halten Sie sofort an und prüfen Sie den Ölstand. Fahren Sie nicht ohne Öldruck weiter, selbst wenn Sie vermuten, dass es am Sensor liegt.
description.es: El P0520 indica un problema en el circuito del sensor de presión de aceite del motor. Este sensor es esencial para vigilar que el aceite circule correctamente y con presión suficiente para lubricar el motor. Un fallo de circuito puede significar que el propio sensor está averiado, que el cableado está cortado o que el conector está corroído. ATENCIÓN: este código también puede enmascarar un problema real de presión de aceite. Si el testigo de aceite se enciende mientras conduce, deténgase inmediatamente y compruebe el nivel de aceite. No se arriesgue a circular sin presión de aceite, aunque piense que es el sensor.
description.pt: O P0520 indica um problema no circuito do sensor de pressão do óleo do motor. Este sensor é essencial para vigiar que o óleo circula corretamente e com pressão suficiente para lubrificar o motor. Um defeito de circuito pode significar que o próprio sensor está avariado, que a cablagem está cortada ou que o conector está corroído. ATENÇÃO: este código pode também mascarar um verdadeiro problema de pressão de óleo. Se a luz de aviso do óleo se acender enquanto conduz, pare imediatamente e verifique o nível de óleo. Não arrisque conduzir sem pressão de óleo, mesmo que pense que é o sensor.

name.pt: Sensor de pressão do óleo avariado

en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

name.es: Sensor de presion del refrigerante del aire acondicionado
name.pt: Sensor de pressao do refrigerante do ar condicionado

description.fr: Le P0530 concerne le capteur de pression du circuit de climatisation (pressostat). Ce capteur mesure la pression du gaz refrigerant et empeche le compresseur de fonctionner si la pression est trop haute ou trop basse. Un defaut de circuit signifie que le calculateur ne peut pas lire la pression et desactive le compresseur par securite. Le capteur est monte sur la ligne haute pression du circuit de climatisation, generalement pres du condenseur. Un connecteur corrode ou un capteur defaillant sont les causes habituelles. Sans ce capteur, la climatisation ne refroidit plus car le compresseur refuse de s'enclencher.
description.en: The P0530 fault code indicates a problem with a/c refrigerant pressure sensor in your air conditioning system. While A/C faults are not as urgent as engine or brake issues, they can make driving uncomfortable, especially during warmer months. Your car's climate control system uses a network of sensors to monitor interior and exterior temperatures, refrigerant pressure, and compressor operation. When one of these sensors or components develops a fault, the system may not regulate temperature properly, the A/C might blow only warm air, or it might cut out intermittently. Common causes include a faulty temperature sensor, a refrigerant leak, a worn compressor clutch, or a clogged condenser. A garage equipped with A/C diagnostic tools can identify the specific issue quickly. Many A/C repairs are quite affordable — a sensor replacement or a re-gas might be all that is needed. More significant repairs like compressor replacement cost more, but they are still manageable. While this fault will not cause your car to fail its MOT directly, having a properly functioning climate control system makes for much more pleasant driving, particularly during the British summer and winter months.
description.de: Der P0530 betrifft den Drucksensor des Klimakreislaufs (Druckschalter). Dieser Sensor misst den Druck des Kaeltemittels und verhindert, dass der Kompressor laeuft, wenn der Druck zu hoch oder zu niedrig ist. Ein Stromkreisfehler bedeutet, dass das Steuergeraet den Druck nicht lesen kann und den Kompressor aus Sicherheitsgruenden deaktiviert. Der Sensor befindet sich an der Hochdruckleitung des Klimakreislaufs, in der Regel in der Naehe des Kondensators. Ein korrodierter Stecker oder ein defekter Sensor sind die ueblichen Ursachen. Ohne diesen Sensor kuehlt die Klimaanlage nicht mehr, da der Kompressor sich nicht einschalten will.
description.es: El P0530 se refiere al sensor de presion del circuito de climatizacion (presostato). Este sensor mide la presion del gas refrigerante e impide que el compresor funcione si la presion es demasiado alta o demasiado baja. Un defecto del circuito significa que la centralita no puede leer la presion y desactiva el compresor por seguridad. El sensor esta montado en la linea de alta presion del circuito de climatizacion, generalmente cerca del condensador. Un conector corroido o un sensor defectuoso son las causas habituales. Sin este sensor, el aire acondicionado ya no enfria ya que el compresor no acepta activarse.
description.pt: O P0530 diz respeito ao sensor de pressao do circuito de climatizacao (pressostato). Este sensor mede a pressao do gas refrigerante e impede o compressor de funcionar se a pressao for demasiado alta ou demasiado baixa. Um defeito de circuito significa que a centralina nao pode ler a pressao e desativa o compressor por seguranca. O sensor esta montado na linha de alta pressao do circuito de climatizacao, geralmente perto do condensador. Um conector corroido ou um sensor defeituoso sao as causas habituais. Sem este sensor, o ar condicionado ja nao arrefece pois o compressor recusa ligar-se.

fr.question: Ce code est-il grave ?
fr.answer: La gravite depend du contexte. Un diagnostic professionnel avec lecture des donnees en temps reel est recommande pour evaluer la situation exacte de votre vehicule.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation ?
fr.answer: Les couts varient selon la cause exacte et le vehicule. Consultez les fourchettes de prix indiquees pour chaque cause possible, et demandez plusieurs devis.

fr.answer: Oui, la conduite reste possible mais faites diagnostiquer et reparer dans un delai raisonnable pour eviter que le probleme ne s'aggrave.

en.question: What does the P0530 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0530 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with a/c refrigerant pressure sensor. This is a low-severity air conditioning fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0530 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0530 fail my MOT?
en.answer: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

en.question: How much does P0530 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0530 fault typically range from around £8 to £165, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is failed a/c pressure switch, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

de.question: Ist dieser Code schwerwiegend?
de.answer: Die Schwere haengt vom Kontext ab. Eine professionelle Diagnose mit Echtzeit-Datenauswertung wird empfohlen, um die genaue Situation Ihres Fahrzeugs zu beurteilen.

de.answer: Ja, das Fahren ist weiterhin moeglich, aber lassen Sie innerhalb einer angemessenen Frist eine Diagnose und Reparatur durchfuehren, um eine Verschlechterung des Problems zu vermeiden.

motFail: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

description.fr: Le P0560 est un code general signalant une anomalie de la tension du systeme electrique vehicule. Le calculateur surveille en permanence la tension d'alimentation et si elle fluctue de maniere anormale ou sort des limites acceptables, ce code est enregistre. Des variations de tension peuvent affecter le fonctionnement de tous les capteurs et actuateurs. Les connexions de batterie corrodees, un alternateur avec un regulateur instable, ou une masse vehicule defaillante sont les causes frequentes. Un cable de masse mal serre entre le moteur et la carrosserie peut causer des problemes electriques multiples et erratiques.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0560 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with system voltage. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0560 ist ein allgemeiner Code, der eine Anomalie der Bordspannung signalisiert. Das Steuergeraet ueberwacht staendig die Versorgungsspannung, und wenn sie ungewoehnlich schwankt oder die akzeptablen Grenzen ueberschreitet, wird dieser Code gespeichert. Spannungsschwankungen koennen den Betrieb aller Sensoren und Aktoren beeintraechtigen. Korrodierte Batterieanschluesse, eine Lichtmaschine mit instabilem Regler oder ein defektes Massekabel am Fahrzeug sind die haeufigen Ursachen. Ein loses Massekabel zwischen Motor und Karosserie kann multiple und unberechenbare elektrische Probleme verursachen.
description.es: El P0560 es un codigo general que senala una anomalia del voltaje del sistema electrico del vehiculo. La centralita supervisa permanentemente el voltaje de alimentacion y si fluctua de manera anormal o sale de los limites aceptables, se registra este codigo. Las variaciones de voltaje pueden afectar el funcionamiento de todos los sensores y actuadores. Las conexiones de bateria corroidas, un alternador con un regulador inestable o un cable de masa del vehiculo defectuoso son las causas frecuentes. Un cable de masa mal apretado entre el motor y la carroceria puede causar problemas electricos multiples y erraticos.
description.pt: O P0560 e um codigo geral que sinaliza uma anomalia da voltagem do sistema eletrico do veiculo. A centralina monitoriza permanentemente a voltagem de alimentacao e se ela flutua de forma anormal ou sai dos limites aceitaveis, este codigo e registado. Variacoes de voltagem podem afetar o funcionamento de todos os sensores e atuadores. As ligacoes da bateria corroidas, um alternador com um regulador instavel ou um cabo de massa do veiculo defeituoso sao as causas frequentes. Um cabo de massa mal apertado entre o motor e a carrocaria pode causar problemas eletricos multiplos e erraticos.

name.es: Centralita del motor — error de programacion
name.pt: Centralina do motor — erro de programacao

description.fr: Le P0602 indique que la programmation du calculateur moteur ne correspond pas au vehicule ou est corrompue. Cela peut survenir apres une tentative de reprogrammation avortee, un remplacement de calculateur sans codage correct, ou une perte de memoire due a un debranchement prolonge de la batterie. Le calculateur fonctionne mais avec des parametres qui ne sont pas optimaux pour votre moteur specifique. Un passage chez le concessionnaire pour verification et reprogrammation eventuelle est necessaire. Les ateliers independants equipes de l'outil constructeur peuvent aussi effectuer cette operation.
description.en: The P0602 code indicates an electrical system fault related to engine ecu — programming error. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0602 zeigt an, dass die Programmierung des Motorsteuergeraets nicht zum Fahrzeug passt oder beschaedigt ist. Dies kann nach einem abgebrochenen Reprogrammierungsversuch, einem Steuergeraet-Austausch ohne korrekte Codierung oder einem Speicherverlust durch langes Abklemmen der Batterie auftreten. Das Steuergeraet funktioniert, aber mit Parametern, die nicht optimal fuer Ihren spezifischen Motor sind. Ein Besuch beim Haendler zur Ueberpruefung und eventuellen Neuprogrammierung ist erforderlich. Unabhaengige Werkstaetten mit dem Herstellerwerkzeug koennen diese Operation ebenfalls durchfuehren.
description.es: El P0602 indica que la programacion de la centralita del motor no corresponde al vehiculo o esta corrupta. Esto puede ocurrir tras un intento de reprogramacion fallido, un reemplazo de centralita sin codificacion correcta, o una perdida de memoria debida a una desconexion prolongada de la bateria. La centralita funciona pero con parametros que no son optimos para su motor especifico. Es necesaria una visita al concesionario para verificacion y posible reprogramacion. Los talleres independientes equipados con la herramienta del fabricante tambien pueden realizar esta operacion.
description.pt: O P0602 indica que a programacao da centralina do motor nao corresponde ao veiculo ou esta corrompida. Isto pode ocorrer apos uma tentativa de reprogramacao falhada, uma substituicao de centralina sem codificacao correta, ou uma perda de memoria devida a uma desconexao prolongada da bateria. A centralina funciona mas com parametros que nao sao ideais para o seu motor especifico. Uma visita ao concessionario para verificacao e eventual reprogramacao e necessaria. As oficinas independentes equipadas com a ferramenta do fabricante tambem podem realizar esta operacao.

fr.answer: Non, il est recommande de ne pas rouler avec ce code actif. Faites remorquer votre vehicule jusqu'au garage le plus proche.

en.answer: The P0602 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine ecu — programming error. This is a high-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0602 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0602 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0602 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0602 fault typically range from around £70 to £685, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is reprogramming required, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Centralita del motor — error de memoria KAM
name.pt: Centralina do motor — erro de memoria KAM

description.fr: Le P0603 signale une erreur dans la memoire KAM (Keep Alive Memory) du calculateur moteur. La KAM stocke les valeurs apprises comme les corrections carburant a long terme, la position de ralenti et les adaptations diverses. Ces donnees se perdent quand la batterie est debranchee ou quand la memoire est corrompue. Le calculateur doit alors reapprendre toutes ces valeurs, ce qui peut prendre plusieurs cycles de conduite. Pendant ce reapprentissage, le ralenti peut etre instable et la consommation legerement plus elevee. Ce code se resout souvent seul apres quelques jours de conduite normale.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0603 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with engine ecu — kam memory error. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0603 signalisiert einen Fehler im KAM-Speicher (Keep Alive Memory) des Motorsteuergeraets. Der KAM speichert erlernte Werte wie langfristige Kraftstoffkorrekturen, die Leerlaufdrehzahl und verschiedene Adaptionen. Diese Daten gehen verloren, wenn die Batterie abgeklemmt wird oder der Speicher beschaedigt ist. Das Steuergeraet muss dann alle diese Werte neu erlernen, was mehrere Fahrzyklen dauern kann. Waehrend dieses Anlernvorgangs kann der Leerlauf instabil und der Verbrauch leicht erhoeht sein. Dieser Code loest sich oft von selbst nach einigen Tagen normaler Fahrweise.
description.es: El P0603 senala un error en la memoria KAM (Keep Alive Memory) de la centralita del motor. La KAM almacena los valores aprendidos como las correcciones de combustible a largo plazo, la posicion de ralenti y las diversas adaptaciones. Estos datos se pierden cuando se desconecta la bateria o cuando la memoria esta corrupta. La centralita debe entonces reaprender todos estos valores, lo que puede llevar varios ciclos de conduccion. Durante este reaprendizaje, el ralenti puede ser inestable y el consumo ligeramente mas elevado. Este codigo se resuelve a menudo por si solo despues de unos dias de conduccion normal.
description.pt: O P0603 sinaliza um erro na memoria KAM (Keep Alive Memory) da centralina do motor. A KAM armazena os valores aprendidos como as correcoes de combustivel a longo prazo, a posicao de ralenti e as diversas adaptacoes. Estes dados perdem-se quando a bateria e desconectada ou quando a memoria esta corrompida. A centralina deve entao reaprender todos estes valores, o que pode levar varios ciclos de conducao. Durante esta reaprendizagem, o ralenti pode ser instavel e o consumo ligeiramente mais elevado. Este codigo resolve-se frequentemente sozinho apos alguns dias de conducao normal.

description.fr: Le P0604 indique une erreur dans la memoire vive (RAM) du calculateur moteur. La RAM est utilisee pour les calculs en temps reel du dosage carburant, de l'avance d'allumage et de toutes les fonctions moteur. Une erreur RAM est plus grave qu'une erreur KAM car elle affecte le fonctionnement en cours du moteur. Les causes incluent une surtension qui a endommage les puces memoire, un vieillissement naturel du composant electronique, ou un defaut de fabrication. Le calculateur doit etre diagnostique en profondeur et probablement remplace ou repare par un specialiste.
description.en: The P0604 code indicates an electrical system fault related to engine ecu — ram memory error. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0604 zeigt einen Fehler im Arbeitsspeicher (RAM) des Motorsteuergeraets an. Der RAM wird fuer Echtzeitberechnungen der Kraftstoffdosierung, der Zuendzeitpunktverstellung und aller Motorfunktionen verwendet. Ein RAM-Fehler ist schwerwiegender als ein KAM-Fehler, da er den laufenden Motorbetrieb beeintraechtigt. Zu den Ursachen gehoeren eine Ueberspannung, die die Speicherchips beschaedigt hat, eine natuerliche Alterung des elektronischen Bauteils oder ein Fertigungsfehler. Das Steuergeraet muss eingehend diagnostiziert und wahrscheinlich von einem Spezialisten ersetzt oder repariert werden.
description.es: El P0604 indica un error en la memoria viva (RAM) de la centralita del motor. La RAM se utiliza para los calculos en tiempo real de la dosificacion de combustible, del avance de encendido y de todas las funciones del motor. Un error de RAM es mas grave que un error de KAM ya que afecta al funcionamiento en curso del motor. Las causas incluyen una sobretension que ha danado los chips de memoria, un envejecimiento natural del componente electronico, o un defecto de fabricacion. La centralita debe ser diagnosticada en profundidad y probablemente reemplazada o reparada por un especialista.
description.pt: O P0604 indica um erro na memoria viva (RAM) da centralina do motor. A RAM e utilizada para os calculos em tempo real da dosagem de combustivel, do avanco de ignicao e de todas as funcoes do motor. Um erro de RAM e mais grave do que um erro de KAM pois afeta o funcionamento em curso do motor. As causas incluem uma sobretensao que danificou os chips de memoria, um envelhecimento natural do componente eletronico, ou um defeito de fabrico. A centralina deve ser diagnosticada em profundidade e provavelmente substituida ou reparada por um especialista.

en.question: What does the P0604 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0604 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine ecu — ram memory error. This is a critical-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0604 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0604 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0604 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0604 fault typically range from around £34 to £1736, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is ecu needs repairing, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Circuito de voltaje de campo del alternador
name.pt: Circuito de voltagem de campo do alternador

description.fr: Le P0625 signale un probleme sur le circuit de regulation de l'alternateur. Le calculateur moteur surveille la tension de champ (excitation) de l'alternateur pour verifier qu'il charge correctement. Un defaut sur ce circuit empeche le calculateur de communiquer avec l'alternateur pour ajuster la charge en fonction des besoins. L'alternateur peut continuer a fonctionner mais sans regulation fine, ce qui peut causer des fluctuations de tension. Sur les vehicules modernes, le calculateur reduit la charge de l'alternateur au ralenti pour economiser du carburant et l'augmente quand la batterie en a besoin.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0625 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with alternator field voltage circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0625 signalisiert ein Problem im Regulierungsschaltkreis der Lichtmaschine. Das Motorsteuergeraet ueberwacht die Erregerspannung der Lichtmaschine, um zu pruefen, ob sie korrekt laedt. Ein Defekt in diesem Schaltkreis verhindert, dass das Steuergeraet mit der Lichtmaschine kommuniziert, um die Ladung an den Bedarf anzupassen. Die Lichtmaschine kann weiterhin funktionieren, aber ohne Feinregulierung, was zu Spannungsschwankungen fuehren kann. Bei modernen Fahrzeugen reduziert das Steuergeraet die Lichtmaschinenladung im Leerlauf, um Kraftstoff zu sparen, und erhoeht sie, wenn die Batterie es braucht.
description.es: El P0625 senala un problema en el circuito de regulacion del alternador. La centralita del motor supervisa el voltaje de campo (excitacion) del alternador para verificar que carga correctamente. Un fallo en este circuito impide que la centralita se comunique con el alternador para ajustar la carga segun las necesidades. El alternador puede seguir funcionando pero sin regulacion fina, lo que puede causar fluctuaciones de voltaje. En los vehiculos modernos, la centralita reduce la carga del alternador en ralenti para ahorrar combustible y la aumenta cuando la bateria lo necesita.
description.pt: O P0625 sinaliza um problema no circuito de regulacao do alternador. A centralina do motor monitoriza a voltagem de campo (excitacao) do alternador para verificar que carrega corretamente. Um defeito neste circuito impede a centralina de comunicar com o alternador para ajustar a carga conforme as necessidades. O alternador pode continuar a funcionar mas sem regulacao fina, o que pode causar flutuacoes de voltagem. Nos veiculos modernos, a centralina reduz a carga do alternador em ralenti para poupar combustivel e aumenta-a quando a bateria precisa.

name.es: Circuito del testigo de averia del motor
name.pt: Circuito da luz de avaria do motor

description.fr: Le P0650 indique un probleme sur le circuit de commande du voyant moteur (MIL - Malfunction Indicator Lamp) au tableau de bord. Le calculateur ne parvient pas a allumer ou eteindre le voyant comme il le devrait. Cela peut sembler anodin mais c'est en fait un probleme de securite : si le voyant ne peut pas s'allumer, aucun code defaut ne sera visible pour le conducteur. Les causes sont un voyant grille, un cablage coupe entre le calculateur et le tableau de bord, ou un defaut de communication avec le combine d'instruments. Verifiez que le voyant s'allume bien a la mise du contact (test d'ampoule) puis s'eteint.
description.en: The P0650 code indicates an electrical system fault related to engine warning light circuit. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0650 zeigt ein Problem im Steuerschaltkreis der Motorkontrollleuchte (MIL - Malfunction Indicator Lamp) im Armaturenbrett an. Das Steuergeraet kann die Kontrollleuchte nicht wie vorgesehen ein- oder ausschalten. Das mag harmlos erscheinen, ist aber tatsaechlich ein Sicherheitsproblem: Wenn die Leuchte nicht eingeschaltet werden kann, sind keine Fehlercodes fuer den Fahrer sichtbar. Die Ursachen sind eine durchgebrannte Lampe, ein unterbrochenes Kabel zwischen Steuergeraet und Armaturenbrett oder ein Kommunikationsfehler mit dem Kombiinstrument. Pruefen Sie, ob die Leuchte beim Einschalten der Zuendung aufleuchtet (Lampentest) und dann erlischt.
description.es: El P0650 indica un problema en el circuito de control del testigo del motor (MIL - Malfunction Indicator Lamp) en el salpicadero. La centralita no consigue encender o apagar el testigo como deberia. Esto puede parecer insignificante pero es en realidad un problema de seguridad: si el testigo no puede encenderse, ningun codigo de fallo sera visible para el conductor. Las causas son una bombilla fundida, un cableado cortado entre la centralita y el salpicadero, o un fallo de comunicacion con el cuadro de instrumentos. Verifique que el testigo se enciende al dar contacto (test de bombilla) y luego se apaga.
description.pt: O P0650 indica um problema no circuito de comando da luz do motor (MIL - Malfunction Indicator Lamp) no painel de instrumentos. A centralina nao consegue acender ou apagar a luz como deveria. Isto pode parecer insignificante mas e na verdade um problema de seguranca: se a luz nao se consegue acender, nenhum codigo de avaria sera visivel para o condutor. As causas sao uma lampada fundida, uma cablagem cortada entre a centralina e o painel de instrumentos, ou um defeito de comunicacao com o quadro de instrumentos. Verifique que a luz se acende ao ligar a ignicao (teste de lampada) e depois se apaga.

name.es: Bombilla del testigo del motor fundida
name.pt: Lampada da luz do motor fundida

name.es: Cableado hacia el cuadro de instrumentos
name.pt: Cablagem para o quadro de instrumentos

name.es: Circuito del rele principal de la centralita del motor
name.pt: Circuito do rele principal da centralina do motor

description.fr: Le P0685 signale un probleme sur le circuit du relais principal qui alimente le calculateur moteur. Ce relais est la porte d'entree de l'alimentation electrique du calculateur. Si le relais est defaillant, le calculateur peut perdre son alimentation de maniere intermittente, provoquant des calages inopines et des demarrages impossibles. Le relais principal s'active quand vous mettez le contact et reste alimente tant que le moteur tourne. Un contact oxyde dans le relais, un fusible affaibli ou un cablage endommage peuvent tous provoquer ce code. Le relais est generalement dans la boite a fusibles.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0685 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with main ecu relay circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0685 signalisiert ein Problem im Schaltkreis des Hauptrelais, das das Motorsteuergeraet versorgt. Dieses Relais ist der Zugang zur Stromversorgung des Steuergeraets. Wenn das Relais defekt ist, kann das Steuergeraet intermittierend seine Stromversorgung verlieren, was zu unerwarteten Motorstillstaenden und Startunmoeglichkeiten fuehrt. Das Hauptrelais wird aktiviert, wenn Sie die Zuendung einschalten, und bleibt bestromt, solange der Motor laeuft. Ein oxidierter Kontakt im Relais, eine schwache Sicherung oder eine beschaedigte Verkabelung koennen alle diesen Code ausloesen. Das Relais befindet sich in der Regel im Sicherungskasten.
description.es: El P0685 senala un problema en el circuito del rele principal que alimenta la centralita del motor. Este rele es la puerta de entrada de la alimentacion electrica de la centralita. Si el rele esta defectuoso, la centralita puede perder su alimentacion de manera intermitente, provocando calados inesperados y arranques imposibles. El rele principal se activa cuando se da contacto y permanece alimentado mientras el motor funciona. Un contacto oxidado en el rele, un fusible debilitado o un cableado danado pueden provocar este codigo. El rele se encuentra generalmente en la caja de fusibles.
description.pt: O P0685 sinaliza um problema no circuito do rele principal que alimenta a centralina do motor. Este rele e a porta de entrada da alimentacao eletrica da centralina. Se o rele estiver defeituoso, a centralina pode perder a sua alimentacao de forma intermitente, provocando paragens inesperadas e arranques impossiveis. O rele principal ativa-se quando se liga a ignicao e permanece alimentado enquanto o motor funciona. Um contacto oxidado no rele, um fusivel enfraquecido ou uma cablagem danificada podem todos provocar este codigo. O rele encontra-se geralmente na caixa de fusiveis.

name.es: Fusible de alimentacion de la centralita

motFail: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

name.es: Embrague del convertidor de par — rendimiento del circuito
name.pt: Embraiagem do conversor de binario — desempenho do circuito

description.fr: Le P0741 indique que l'embrayage de pontage du convertisseur de couple patine au lieu de se verrouiller fermement. Le calculateur commande le verrouillage mais detecte un ecart entre les vitesses d'entree et de sortie du convertisseur, signe de patinage. L'electrovanne TCC dans le corps de vanne peut etre fatiguee, l'embrayage lui-meme use, ou l'huile de transmission degradee avec un coefficient de friction insuffisant. Un changement d'huile de transmission avec le bon type de fluide peut parfois resoudre le probleme si le patinage est leger. Si l'embrayage est mecaniquement use, le convertisseur doit etre remplace.
description.en: The P0741 diagnostic code indicates a problem with torque converter clutch — circuit performance in your gearbox system. Modern automatic and semi-automatic gearboxes are controlled by a dedicated computer that manages gear changes, torque converter operation, and various solenoid valves. When this computer detects an anomaly, it stores a fault code and may put the gearbox into limp mode — this is a safety feature that limits the car to one or two gears to protect the transmission from further damage. You might notice harsh or delayed gear changes, a reluctance to shift, or the car staying in a low gear regardless of speed. While it can be concerning, limp mode is actually your gearbox protecting itself. A specialist garage with gearbox diagnostic equipment can read the code and assess whether the issue is electrical — such as a faulty speed sensor or solenoid — or mechanical, like worn clutch packs or a failing torque converter. Gearbox repairs can be costly, so early diagnosis is essential. Sometimes a simple fluid change and solenoid replacement is all that is needed, saving you from a far more expensive rebuild.
description.de: Der P0741 zeigt an, dass die Ueberbrueckungskupplung des Drehmomentwandlers durchrutscht, anstatt sich fest zu verriegeln. Das Steuergeraet befiehlt die Verriegelung, erkennt aber eine Abweichung zwischen den Eingangs- und Ausgangsdrehzahlen des Wandlers, was auf Schlupf hindeutet. Das TCC-Magnetventil im Ventilkoerper kann ermueden, die Kupplung selbst verschlissen oder das Getriebe-oel mit unzureichendem Reibungskoeffizienten degradiert sein. Ein Getriebeoel-Wechsel mit der richtigen Fluessigkeit kann das Problem manchmal loesen, wenn der Schlupf gering ist. Wenn die Kupplung mechanisch verschlissen ist, muss der Drehmomentwandler ersetzt werden.
description.es: El P0741 indica que el embrague de puente del convertidor de par patina en lugar de bloquearse firmemente. La centralita ordena el bloqueo pero detecta una diferencia entre las velocidades de entrada y salida del convertidor, senal de deslizamiento. El solenoide TCC en el cuerpo de valvulas puede estar fatigado, el embrague en si desgastado, o el aceite de transmision degradado con un coeficiente de friccion insuficiente. Un cambio de aceite de transmision con el tipo correcto de fluido puede a veces resolver el problema si el deslizamiento es leve. Si el embrague esta mecanicamente desgastado, el convertidor debe ser reemplazado.
description.pt: O P0741 indica que a embraiagem de ponte do conversor de binario patina em vez de se bloquear firmemente. A centralina comanda o bloqueio mas deteta uma diferenca entre as velocidades de entrada e saida do conversor, sinal de patinagem. O solenoide TCC no corpo de valvulas pode estar fatigado, a embraiagem em si gasta, ou o oleo de transmissao degradado com um coeficiente de friccao insuficiente. Uma mudanca de oleo de transmissao com o tipo correto de fluido pode por vezes resolver o problema se a patinagem for ligeira. Se a embraiagem estiver mecanicamente gasta, o conversor de binario deve ser substituido.

es: Ligera vibracion en velocidad de crucero
pt: Ligeira vibracao em velocidade de cruzeiro

en.question: What does the P0741 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0741 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with torque converter clutch — circuit performance. This is a medium-severity gearbox fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0741 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0741 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

en.question: How much does P0741 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0741 fault typically range from around £70 to £1315, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is degraded gearbox oil, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.
