motFail: Gearbox faults do not typically cause a direct MOT failure unless they affect the operation of the vehicle in a way that makes it unsafe. However, associated warning lights or driveability issues may be noted.

description.fr: Le P0751 signale que l'electrovanne de passage A de la boite automatique ne fonctionne pas correctement en termes de performance. La vanne repond mais pas dans les delais ou avec la precision attendue. Cela provoque des changements de rapport hesitants, retardes ou brutaux. L'huile de transmission encrassee qui empeche le libre mouvement du tiroir de l'electrovanne est une cause frequente. Un changement d'huile et de filtre de boite peut parfois resoudre les performances degradees d'une electrovanne. Si le probleme persiste, l'electrovanne doit etre remplacee dans le corps de vanne.
description.en: A P0751 fault code has been logged by your gearbox control module, indicating an issue with shift solenoid a — performance. This is a transmission-related fault that warrants prompt attention. Your automatic gearbox uses a network of sensors, solenoid valves, and hydraulic circuits to deliver smooth gear changes. When any of these components develop a fault, the gearbox ECU stores a code and may activate limp mode as a precaution. In limp mode, the gearbox typically locks into a single gear — usually second or third — to prevent further damage while still allowing you to drive to a garage. Symptoms you may have noticed include jerky gear changes, the gearbox slipping, delayed engagement when selecting drive or reverse, or the car revving high before changing gear. A transmission specialist will be able to diagnose the issue properly using dedicated equipment. The fix might be relatively simple, such as replacing a speed sensor or a solenoid valve, or it could indicate a more significant internal problem. Getting an accurate diagnosis early on can prevent a minor issue from turning into a major and expensive repair.
description.de: Der P0751 meldet, dass der Schaltmagnet A des Automatikgetriebes in Bezug auf die Leistung nicht korrekt funktioniert. Das Ventil reagiert, aber nicht innerhalb der erwarteten Zeiten oder mit der erwarteten Praezision. Dies verursacht zoegerliche, verzoegerte oder ruckartige Gangwechsel. Verschmutztes Getriebeoel, das die freie Bewegung des Schiebers im Magneten verhindert, ist eine haeufige Ursache. Ein Getriebeoel- und Filterwechsel kann die nachlassende Leistung eines Schaltmagneten manchmal beheben. Wenn das Problem weiterhin besteht, muss der Schaltmagnet im Ventilkoerper ersetzt werden.
description.es: El P0751 senala que el solenoide de cambio A de la caja automatica no funciona correctamente en terminos de rendimiento. La valvula responde pero no dentro de los plazos o con la precision esperada. Esto provoca cambios de marcha vacilantes, retrasados o bruscos. El aceite de transmision sucio que impide el libre movimiento del corredera del solenoide es una causa frecuente. Un cambio de aceite y filtro de caja puede a veces resolver el rendimiento degradado de un solenoide. Si el problema persiste, el solenoide debe ser reemplazado en el cuerpo de valvulas.
description.pt: O P0751 assinala que o solenoide de mudanca A da caixa automatica nao funciona corretamente em termos de desempenho. A valvula responde mas nao dentro dos prazos ou com a precisao esperada. Isto provoca mudancas de velocidade hesitantes, atrasadas ou bruscas. O oleo de transmissao sujo que impede o livre movimento da corredicca do solenoide e uma causa frequente. Uma mudanca de oleo e filtro da caixa pode por vezes resolver o desempenho degradado de um solenoide. Se o problema persistir, o solenoide deve ser substituido no corpo de valvulas.

name.pt: Solenoide de mudanca A a substituir

name.fr: Correction carburant aval trop pauvre banque 1
name.en: Post-catalyst fuel trim too lean — bank 1
name.es: Corrección de combustible posterior demasiado pobre banco 1
name.pt: Correção de combustível posterior demasiado pobre banco 1

description.fr: Le P2096 indique que le calculateur a atteint la limite de sa capacite de correction du melange basee sur la sonde lambda aval. La correction en aval est la correction fine que le calculateur fait en plus de la correction principale basee sur la sonde amont. Si cette correction est systematiquement trop positive (ajout de carburant), le calculateur stocke ce code. Les causes sous-jacentes incluent un catalyseur qui commence a perdre sa capacite de stockage d'oxygene, une sonde aval vieillissante, ou un probleme de melange que la correction amont ne compense pas completement.
description.en: When your car shows a P2096 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to post-catalyst fuel trim too lean — bank 1. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P2096 zeigt an, dass das Steuergerät die Grenze seiner Gemischkorrekturkapazität auf Basis der Nachkatsonde erreicht hat. Die Nachkat-Korrektur ist die Feinkorrektur, die das Steuergerät zusätzlich zur Hauptkorrektur auf Basis der Vorkatsonde vornimmt. Wenn diese Korrektur systematisch zu positiv ist (Hinzufügen von Kraftstoff), speichert das Steuergerät diesen Code. Zu den zugrunde liegenden Ursachen gehören ein Katalysator, der beginnt, seine Sauerstoffspeicherfähigkeit zu verlieren, eine alternde Nachkatsonde oder ein Gemischproblem, das die Vorkat-Korrektur nicht vollständig kompensiert.
description.es: El P2096 indica que la ECU ha alcanzado el límite de su capacidad de corrección de la mezcla basada en la sonda lambda posterior. La corrección posterior es la corrección fina que la ECU hace además de la corrección principal basada en la sonda anterior. Si esta corrección es sistemáticamente demasiado positiva (añadiendo combustible), la ECU almacena este código. Las causas subyacentes incluyen un catalizador que empieza a perder su capacidad de almacenamiento de oxígeno, una sonda posterior envejecida, o un problema de mezcla que la corrección anterior no compensa completamente.
description.pt: O P2096 indica que a ECU atingiu o limite da sua capacidade de correção da mistura baseada na sonda lambda posterior. A correção posterior é a correção fina que a ECU faz além da correção principal baseada na sonda anterior. Se esta correção for sistematicamente demasiado positiva (adicionando combustível), a ECU armazena este código. As causas subjacentes incluem um catalisador que começa a perder a sua capacidade de armazenamento de oxigénio, uma sonda posterior envelhecida, ou um problema de mistura que a correção anterior não compensa completamente.

en.answer: The P2096 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with post-catalyst fuel trim too lean — bank 1. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P2096 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Correction carburant aval trop riche banque 1
name.en: Post-catalyst fuel trim too rich — bank 1
name.es: Corrección de combustible posterior demasiado rica banco 1
name.pt: Correção de combustível posterior demasiado rica banco 1

description.fr: Le P2097 est l'inverse du P2096 : la correction de melange basee sur la sonde aval est systematiquement trop negative (reduction de carburant). Cela indique que le catalyseur stocke trop d'oxygene ou que la sonde aval est biaisee vers le riche. Un catalyseur neuf mais d'une qualite inferieure a l'original peut aussi provoquer ce code car sa capacite de stockage d'oxygene differe. Si le catalyseur a ete recemment remplace, cette cause est a considerer. Sinon, la sonde aval est generalement en fin de vie et donne une lecture legerement faussee vers le riche.
description.en: A P2097 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with post-catalyst fuel trim too rich — bank 1. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P2097 ist das Gegenteil des P2096: die Gemischkorrektur basierend auf der Nachkatsonde ist systematisch zu negativ (Kraftstoffreduktion). Das deutet darauf hin, dass der Katalysator zu viel Sauerstoff speichert oder dass die Nachkatsonde zum Fetten hin verzerrt ist. Ein neuer Katalysator, aber von geringerer Qualität als das Original, kann ebenfalls diesen Code verursachen, weil seine Sauerstoffspeicherkapazität abweicht. Wenn der Katalysator kürzlich ersetzt wurde, ist diese Ursache zu berücksichtigen. Ansonsten ist die Nachkatsonde im Allgemeinen am Ende ihrer Lebensdauer und gibt eine leicht zum Fetten hin verfälschte Ablesung.
description.es: El P2097 es el inverso del P2096: la corrección de mezcla basada en la sonda posterior es sistemáticamente demasiado negativa (reducción de combustible). Esto indica que el catalizador almacena demasiado oxígeno o que la sonda posterior está sesgada hacia el rico. Un catalizador nuevo pero de una calidad inferior al original también puede provocar este código porque su capacidad de almacenamiento de oxígeno difiere. Si el catalizador ha sido reemplazado recientemente, esta causa debe considerarse. Si no, la sonda posterior está generalmente al final de su vida y da una lectura ligeramente falseada hacia el rico.
description.pt: O P2097 é o inverso do P2096: a correção de mistura baseada na sonda posterior é sistematicamente demasiado negativa (redução de combustível). Isto indica que o catalisador armazena demasiado oxigénio ou que a sonda posterior está enviesada para o rico. Um catalisador novo mas de uma qualidade inferior ao original também pode provocar este código porque a sua capacidade de armazenamento de oxigénio difere. Se o catalisador foi substituído recentemente, esta causa deve ser considerada. Caso contrário, a sonda posterior está geralmente no fim da sua vida e dá uma leitura ligeiramente falseada para o rico.

en.question: What does the P2097 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P2097 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with post-catalyst fuel trim too rich — bank 1. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P2097 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P2097 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P2097 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P2097 fault typically range from around £67 to £1046, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is biased downstream lambda sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Melange trop pauvre au ralenti banque 1
name.en: Fuel mixture too lean at idle — bank 1
name.de: Gemisch zu mager im Leerlauf — Bank 1
name.es: Mezcla demasiado pobre en ralentí — banco 1
name.pt: Mistura demasiado pobre ao ralenti — banco 1

description.fr: Le P2187 est plus specifique que le P0171 : le melange est trop pauvre uniquement au ralenti. A plus haut regime, le dosage est normal. Cela pointe vers une prise d'air qui n'est significative qu'au ralenti, quand le debit d'air est faible. Un joint de collecteur d'admission qui ne fait plus son etancheite, un axe de papillon use qui laisse passer de l'air, ou un injecteur qui sous-dose legerement sont les pistes principales. C'est un code utile pour le diagnostic car il localise le probleme aux conditions de ralenti, ce qui reduit le champ des investigations.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P2187 relates to fuel mixture too lean at idle — bank 1, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P2187 ist spezifischer als der P0171: Das Gemisch ist nur im Leerlauf zu mager. Bei höheren Drehzahlen ist die Dosierung normal. Das deutet auf eine Falschluft hin, die nur im Leerlauf relevant ist, wenn der Luftdurchsatz gering ist. Eine undichte Ansaugkrümmerdichtung, eine verschlissene Drosselklappenwelle, die Luft durchlässt, oder ein Einspritzventil mit leichter Unterdosierung sind die Hauptverdächtigen. Dieser Code ist diagnostisch wertvoll, da er das Problem auf die Leerlaufbedingungen eingrenzt und den Suchbereich reduziert.
description.es: El P2187 es más específico que el P0171: la mezcla es demasiado pobre únicamente en ralentí. A regímenes más altos, la dosificación es normal. Esto apunta a una entrada de aire que solo es significativa en ralentí, cuando el caudal de aire es bajo. Una junta del colector de admisión que ya no sella, un eje de mariposa desgastado que deja pasar aire o un inyector que subdosifica ligeramente son las pistas principales. Es un código útil para el diagnóstico porque localiza el problema en condiciones de ralentí, lo que reduce el campo de investigación.
description.pt: O P2187 é mais específico do que o P0171: a mistura é demasiado pobre apenas ao ralenti. A regimes mais altos, a dosagem é normal. Isto aponta para uma entrada de ar que só é significativa ao ralenti, quando o caudal de ar é baixo. Uma junta do coletor de admissão que já não veda, um eixo da borboleta desgastado que deixa passar ar, ou um injector que subdosifica ligeiramente são as pistas principais. É um código útil para o diagnóstico porque localiza o problema nas condições de ralenti, reduzindo o campo de investigação.

name.fr: Melange trop riche au ralenti banque 1
name.en: Fuel mixture too rich at idle — bank 1
name.de: Gemisch zu fett im Leerlauf — Bank 1
name.es: Mezcla demasiado rica en ralentí — banco 1
name.pt: Mistura demasiado rica ao ralenti — banco 1

description.fr: Le P2188 signale un melange trop riche specifiquement au ralenti. A plus haut regime le melange est normal. Un injecteur qui fuit au ralenti (goutte a goutte), un capteur de temperature d'air qui indique toujours froid, ou un regulateur de pression qui suralimente legerement au ralenti sont des causes possibles. Les bougies du vehicule peuvent aussi donner un indice : si elles sont noires et encrassees, le melange riche est confirme. Ce code est plus rare que le P2187 car les problemes de richesse au ralenti sont moins courants que les problemes de pauvrete.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P2188 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel mixture too rich at idle — bank 1. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P2188 weist auf ein zu fettes Gemisch speziell im Leerlauf hin. Bei höheren Drehzahlen ist das Gemisch normal. Ein Einspritzventil, das im Leerlauf tropft, ein Ansauglufttemperatursensor, der ständig „kalt" meldet, oder ein Kraftstoffdruckregler, der im Leerlauf leicht zu viel Druck liefert, sind mögliche Ursachen. Die Zündkerzen des Fahrzeugs können ebenfalls einen Hinweis geben: Sind sie schwarz und verrußt, bestätigt das ein zu fettes Gemisch. Dieser Code ist seltener als der P2187, da Probleme mit zu fettem Gemisch im Leerlauf weniger häufig vorkommen als zu magere.
description.es: El P2188 indica una mezcla demasiado rica específicamente en ralentí. A regímenes más altos la mezcla es normal. Un inyector que gotea en ralentí, un sensor de temperatura del aire que indica siempre frío, o un regulador de presión que sobrealimenta ligeramente en ralentí son causas posibles. Las bujías del vehículo también pueden dar una pista: si están negras y sucias, la mezcla rica queda confirmada. Este código es más raro que el P2187 porque los problemas de mezcla rica en ralentí son menos habituales que los de mezcla pobre.
description.pt: O P2188 indica uma mistura demasiado rica especificamente ao ralenti. A regimes mais altos, a mistura é normal. Um injector que pinga ao ralenti, um sensor de temperatura do ar que indica sempre frio, ou um regulador de pressão que sobrealimenta ligeiramente ao ralenti são causas possíveis. As velas de ignição do veículo também podem dar uma pista: se estiverem pretas e sujas, a mistura rica fica confirmada. Este código é mais raro do que o P2187 porque os problemas de mistura rica ao ralenti são menos frequentes do que os de mistura pobre.

name.fr: Sonde lambda aval signal reste pauvre banque 1
name.en: Downstream lambda sensor signal stuck lean — bank 1
name.es: Señal sonda lambda posterior se mantiene pobre banco 1
name.pt: Sinal sonda lambda posterior mantém-se pobre banco 1

description.fr: Le P2270 indique que la sonde lambda aval banque 1 envoie un signal constamment pauvre (tension basse). Cela peut signifier que le catalyseur n'est plus efficace et laisse passer un melange pauvre, ou que la sonde elle-meme est biaisee. Si la sonde amont et les corrections carburant sont normales, c'est probablement la sonde aval qui est en fin de vie. Un diagnostic en temps reel permet de voir si la sonde aval est figee en bas ou si elle reagit encore aux variations du melange. Ce code est souvent associe ou precurseur du P0420.
description.en: A P2270 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor signal stuck lean — bank 1. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P2270 zeigt an, dass die Nachkatsonde Bank 1 ein konstant mageres Signal (niedrige Spannung) sendet. Das kann bedeuten, dass der Katalysator nicht mehr effizient ist und ein mageres Gemisch durchlässt, oder dass die Sonde selbst verzerrt ist. Wenn die Vorkatsonde und die Kraftstoffkorrekturen normal sind, ist es wahrscheinlich die Nachkatsonde, die am Ende ihrer Lebensdauer ist. Eine Echtzeitdiagnose ermöglicht zu sehen, ob die Nachkatsonde unten festhängt oder noch auf Gemischvariationen reagiert. Dieser Code ist oft mit dem P0420 verbunden oder dessen Vorbote.
description.es: El P2270 indica que la sonda lambda posterior banco 1 envía una señal constantemente pobre (tensión baja). Esto puede significar que el catalizador ya no es eficiente y deja pasar una mezcla pobre, o que la propia sonda está sesgada. Si la sonda anterior y las correcciones de combustible son normales, probablemente es la sonda posterior la que está al final de su vida. Un diagnóstico en tiempo real permite ver si la sonda posterior está congelada abajo o si todavía reacciona a las variaciones de la mezcla. Este código es a menudo asociado o precursor del P0420.
description.pt: O P2270 indica que a sonda lambda posterior banco 1 envia um sinal constantemente pobre (tensão baixa). Isto pode significar que o catalisador já não é eficiente e deixa passar uma mistura pobre, ou que a própria sonda está enviesada. Se a sonda anterior e as correções de combustível estiverem normais, é provavelmente a sonda posterior que está no fim da sua vida. Um diagnóstico em tempo real permite ver se a sonda posterior está congelada em baixo ou se ainda reage às variações da mistura. Este código é muitas vezes associado ou precursor do P0420.

fr.answer: La gravite depend du contexte. Un diagnostic professionnel avec lecture des donnees en temps reel est recommande pour evaluer la situation exacte de votre vehicule.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Sonde lambda aval signal reste riche banque 1
name.en: Downstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1
name.es: Señal sonda lambda posterior se mantiene rica banco 1
name.pt: Sinal sonda lambda posterior mantém-se rico banco 1

description.fr: Le P2271 est l'inverse du P2270 : la sonde aval reste en signal riche (tension haute) en permanence. Un catalyseur qui absorbe trop de carburant non brule, une sonde en court-circuit interne, ou un melange effectivement trop riche qui traverse le catalyseur sont les causes. Si le P0172 est aussi present, le probleme vient d'un melange riche en amont que le catalyseur ne peut pas entierement convertir. Si la sonde aval est la seule en defaut, remplacez-la en priorite car c'est la solution la moins couteuse. Le catalyseur est a tester seulement si le code revient apres remplacement de la sonde.
description.en: The P2271 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with downstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P2271 ist das Gegenteil des P2270: die Nachkatsonde bleibt dauerhaft im fetten Signal (hohe Spannung). Ein Katalysator, der zu viel unverbrannten Kraftstoff absorbiert, eine intern kurzgeschlossene Sonde oder ein tatsächlich zu fettes Gemisch, das den Katalysator durchquert, sind die Ursachen. Wenn auch der P0172 vorhanden ist, kommt das Problem von einem fetten Vorkat-Gemisch, das der Katalysator nicht vollständig umwandeln kann. Wenn die Nachkatsonde die einzige Fehlerquelle ist, ersetzen Sie sie vorrangig, da es die kostengünstigste Lösung ist. Der Katalysator ist nur zu testen, wenn der Code nach dem Austausch der Sonde zurückkommt.
description.es: El P2271 es el inverso del P2270: la sonda posterior permanece en señal rica (tensión alta) permanentemente. Un catalizador que absorbe demasiado combustible no quemado, una sonda en cortocircuito interno, o una mezcla efectivamente demasiado rica que atraviesa el catalizador son las causas. Si el P0172 también está presente, el problema viene de una mezcla rica aguas arriba que el catalizador no puede convertir por completo. Si la sonda posterior es la única en fallo, reemplázala prioritariamente porque es la solución menos costosa. El catalizador debe probarse solo si el código vuelve tras el reemplazo de la sonda.
description.pt: O P2271 é o inverso do P2270: a sonda posterior permanece em sinal rico (tensão alta) permanentemente. Um catalisador que absorve demasiado combustível não queimado, uma sonda em curto-circuito interno, ou uma mistura efetivamente demasiado rica que atravessa o catalisador são as causas. Se o P0172 também estiver presente, o problema vem de uma mistura rica a montante que o catalisador não pode converter por completo. Se a sonda posterior for a única em defeito, substitua-a prioritariamente porque é a solução menos cara. O catalisador deve ser testado apenas se o código voltar após a substituição da sonda.

name.en: Rich mixture passing through catalytic converter
name.es: Mezcla rica que atraviesa el catalizador
name.pt: Mistura rica a atravessar o catalisador

en.question: What does the P2271 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P2271 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P2271 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P2271 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P2271 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P2271 fault typically range from around £50 to £1001, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is short-circuited downstream sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Modulo electronico de frenado — tension baja
name.pt: Modulo eletronico de travagem — tensao baixa

description.fr: Le C0242 signale que le module electronique de freinage (calculateur ABS/ESP) recoit une tension d'alimentation trop basse. Un calculateur sous-alimente ne peut pas garantir le bon fonctionnement des electrovannes ABS et desactive le systeme par securite. Les causes incluent une batterie faible, des connexions de batterie corrodees, un fusible a haute resistance, ou un cablage d'alimentation du module ABS endommage. Ce code peut aussi apparaitre si la tension chute brutalement au demarrage (demarreur qui consomme trop). Verifiez d'abord l'etat de la batterie et de ses connexions avant de suspecter le module ABS.
description.en: The C0242 fault code relates to electronic braking module — low voltage in your anti-lock braking system. The ABS is a crucial safety feature that prevents your wheels from locking up during heavy braking, allowing you to maintain steering control in emergency situations. When the ABS module detects a fault, it illuminates the ABS warning light on your dashboard and stores this code. Your normal brakes will still work perfectly fine, but the ABS function may be deactivated until the fault is repaired. This means that in an emergency stop, your wheels could lock up on slippery surfaces, which reduces your ability to steer. Common causes of ABS faults include dirty or damaged wheel speed sensors, corroded wiring, a faulty ABS ring on the wheel hub, or problems with the ABS hydraulic unit itself. A mechanic can diagnose the issue by reading the fault code and checking the sensor signals. Many ABS repairs are relatively straightforward and involve cleaning or replacing a sensor. It is worth noting that the MOT test does check the ABS warning light, so this needs fixing before your next test.
description.de: Der C0242 meldet, dass das elektronische Bremsmodul (ABS/ESP-Steuergeraet) eine zu niedrige Versorgungsspannung erhaelt. Ein unterversorgtes Steuergeraet kann die korrekte Funktion der ABS-Magnetventile nicht gewaehrleisten und deaktiviert das System aus Sicherheitsgruenden. Die Ursachen umfassen eine schwache Batterie, korrodierte Batterieanschluesse, eine Sicherung mit hohem Widerstand oder eine beschaedigte Versorgungsleitung zum ABS-Modul. Dieser Code kann auch auftreten, wenn die Spannung beim Starten abrupt abfaellt (Anlasser zieht zu viel Strom). Pruefen Sie zuerst den Zustand der Batterie und ihrer Anschluesse, bevor Sie das ABS-Modul verdaechtigen.
description.es: El C0242 senala que el modulo electronico de frenado (centralita ABS/ESP) recibe una tension de alimentacion demasiado baja. Una centralita subalimentada no puede garantizar el buen funcionamiento de las electrovalvulas ABS y desactiva el sistema por seguridad. Las causas incluyen una bateria debil, conexiones de bateria corroidas, un fusible con alta resistencia o un cableado de alimentacion del modulo ABS danado. Este codigo puede aparecer tambien si la tension cae bruscamente al arrancar (motor de arranque que consume demasiado). Verifique primero el estado de la bateria y de sus conexiones antes de sospechar del modulo ABS.
description.pt: O C0242 assinala que o modulo eletronico de travagem (centralina ABS/ESP) recebe uma tensao de alimentacao demasiado baixa. Uma centralina subalimentada nao pode garantir o bom funcionamento das eletrovalvulas ABS e desativa o sistema por seguranca. As causas incluem uma bateria fraca, ligacoes de bateria corroidas, um fusivel com alta resistencia ou uma cablagem de alimentacao do modulo ABS danificada. Este codigo pode tambem aparecer se a tensao cair bruscamente ao arrancar (motor de arranque que consome demasiado). Verifique primeiro o estado da bateria e das suas ligacoes antes de suspeitar do modulo ABS.

name.es: Airbag lateral del pasajero — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Airbag lateral do passageiro — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B0011 est l'equivalent du B0010 pour le cote passager. L'airbag lateral du passager avant a un probleme de circuit electrique. Le connecteur sous le siege passager est soumis aux memes contraintes que cote conducteur : mouvements du siege, vibrations et risque de dommage par des objets glisses dessous. Les housses de siege non certifiees airbag peuvent aussi perturber le circuit en comprimant les connecteurs ou en bloquant le deploiement. Ce defaut desactive l'airbag lateral passager, reduisant la protection en cas de choc lateral. La reparation est urgente pour la securite du passager.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a B0011 code, indicating a fault with passenger side airbag — circuit fault in the airbag system. The airbag warning light on your dashboard will be illuminated, signalling that the system may not function as intended in the event of an accident. While this does not affect the drivability of your car, it is a critical safety concern that should be addressed as soon as possible. The airbag system is made up of multiple components — crash sensors, the airbag control module, wiring harnesses, and the airbag units themselves. A fault in any of these can trigger a warning code. Common culprits include damaged wiring under the front seats, a worn clock spring in the steering column, a faulty seat occupancy sensor, or a connector that has become corroded over time. Due to the explosive nature of airbag components, repairs must be carried out by a trained professional. Your mechanic will use a specialist scanner to identify the specific fault and recommend the appropriate repair. Remember that an illuminated airbag light will result in an MOT failure, so this needs attention before your next test date.
description.de: Der B0011 ist das Gegenstueck zum B0010 fuer die Beifahrerseite. Der Seitenairbag des vorderen Beifahrers hat ein Problem im elektrischen Stromkreis. Der Stecker unter dem Beifahrersitz ist denselben Belastungen ausgesetzt wie auf der Fahrerseite: Sitzbewegungen, Vibrationen und Risiko einer Beschaedigung durch unter den Sitz gerutschte Gegenstaende. Nicht als airbag-kompatibel zertifizierte Sitzbezuege koennen ebenfalls den Stromkreis stoeren, indem sie die Stecker zusammendruecken oder die Ausloesung blockieren. Dieser Fehler deaktiviert den Beifahrer-Seitenairbag und verringert den Schutz bei einem Seitenaufprall. Die Reparatur ist fuer die Sicherheit des Beifahrers dringend.
description.es: El B0011 es el equivalente del B0010 para el lado del pasajero. El airbag lateral del pasajero delantero tiene un problema de circuito electrico. El conector bajo el asiento del pasajero esta sometido a las mismas restricciones que en el lado del conductor: movimientos del asiento, vibraciones y riesgo de dano por objetos deslizados debajo. Las fundas de asiento no certificadas para airbag tambien pueden perturbar el circuito al comprimir los conectores o bloquear el despliegue. Este defecto desactiva el airbag lateral del pasajero, reduciendo la proteccion en caso de impacto lateral. La reparacion es urgente para la seguridad del pasajero.
description.pt: O B0011 e o equivalente do B0010 para o lado do passageiro. O airbag lateral do passageiro da frente tem um problema no circuito eletrico. O conector sob o banco do passageiro esta sujeito as mesmas restricoes que do lado do condutor: movimentos do banco, vibracoes e risco de dano por objetos que escorregaram por baixo. As capas de banco nao certificadas para airbag tambem podem perturbar o circuito ao comprimir os conectores ou bloquear o acionamento. Este defeito desativa o airbag lateral do passageiro, reduzindo a protecao em caso de impacto lateral. A reparacao e urgente para a seguranca do passageiro.

name.es: Conector bajo el asiento del pasajero
name.pt: Conector sob o banco do passageiro

name.es: Modulo del airbag lateral del pasajero
name.pt: Modulo do airbag lateral do passageiro

en.question: What does the B0011 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B0011 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with passenger side airbag — circuit fault. This is a critical-severity airbag safety fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B0011 code?
en.answer: While the car may still run, this is a critical fault and you should drive with extreme caution. Limit your driving to essential journeys only and get to a garage as soon as possible. Continuing to drive could cause further damage or put your safety at risk.

en.question: Will B0011 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

name.es: Airbag de cortina izquierdo — circuito defectuoso
name.pt: Airbag de cortina esquerdo — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B0028 concerne l'airbag rideau du cote gauche (conducteur). Cet airbag, loge dans le pavillon au-dessus des vitres, se deploie verticalement pour proteger la tete des occupants en cas de choc lateral ou de tonneau. Le circuit electrique est defaillant — le deploiement n'est pas garanti en cas d'accident. Le cablage chemine dans le montant A, le pavillon et parfois le montant C. Un defaut de connexion ou un fil pince lors d'un demontage du pavillon (pour toit ouvrant, antenne, etc.) peut provoquer ce code. L'intervention sur les airbags rideaux est delicate car les detonateurs sont puissants.
description.en: The B0028 fault code is a serious one — it relates to left curtain airbag — circuit fault in your supplemental restraint system, commonly known as the airbag system. When the airbag warning light is illuminated on your dashboard, it means the airbag control module has detected a fault that could prevent one or more airbags from deploying correctly in a collision. This is obviously a significant safety concern, and while the car is perfectly safe to drive in terms of engine and braking performance, you should be aware that your passive safety protection may be compromised. Common causes include a faulty clock spring behind the steering wheel, a damaged wiring connector under a seat, a worn seat occupancy sensor, or an issue with the airbag module itself. Airbag repairs should always be carried out by a qualified technician because the system contains explosive charges. Never attempt to work on airbag components yourself. A diagnostic scan will identify exactly which part of the system is at fault, and your mechanic can then advise on the repair. The MOT test does check the airbag warning light, so this will need to be resolved before your next test.
description.de: Der B0028 betrifft den Kopfairbag (Curtain-Airbag) auf der linken Seite (Fahrerseite). Dieser Airbag befindet sich im Dachhimmel ueber den Fenstern und entfaltet sich vertikal, um den Kopf der Insassen bei einem Seitenaufprall oder Ueberschlag zu schuetzen. Der elektrische Stromkreis ist defekt — die Ausloesung ist bei einem Unfall nicht gewaehrleistet. Die Verkabelung verlaeuft durch die A-Saeule, den Dachhimmel und manchmal die C-Saeule. Ein Verbindungsfehler oder ein eingeklemmtes Kabel bei einer Demontage des Dachhimmels (fuer Schiebedach, Antenne usw.) kann diesen Code ausloesen. Die Arbeit an Kopfairbags ist heikel, da die Zuender sehr stark sind.
description.es: El B0028 se refiere al airbag de cortina del lado izquierdo (conductor). Este airbag, alojado en el techo por encima de las ventanillas, se despliega verticalmente para proteger la cabeza de los ocupantes en caso de impacto lateral o vuelco. El circuito electrico esta defectuoso — el despliegue no esta garantizado en caso de accidente. El cableado recorre el pilar A, el techo y a veces el pilar C. Un defecto de conexion o un cable pinzado durante un desmontaje del techo (para techo solar, antena, etc.) puede provocar este codigo. La intervencion en los airbags de cortina es delicada ya que los detonadores son potentes.
description.pt: O B0028 diz respeito ao airbag de cortina do lado esquerdo (condutor). Este airbag, alojado no tejadilho acima dos vidros, aciona-se verticalmente para proteger a cabeca dos ocupantes em caso de impacto lateral ou capotamento. O circuito eletrico esta defeituoso — o acionamento nao esta garantido em caso de acidente. A cablagem percorre o pilar A, o tejadilho e por vezes o pilar C. Um defeito de ligacao ou um fio prensado durante uma desmontagem do tejadilho (para teto de abrir, antena, etc.) pode provocar este codigo. A intervencao nos airbags de cortina e delicada pois os detonadores sao potentes.

fr.question: Ce code est-il grave ?

en.question: What does the B0028 fault code mean?
en.answer: The B0028 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with left curtain airbag — circuit fault. This is a critical-severity airbag safety fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a B0028 code?
en.answer: While the car may still run, this is a critical fault and you should drive with extreme caution. Limit your driving to essential journeys only and get to a garage as soon as possible. Continuing to drive could cause further damage or put your safety at risk.

en.question: Will B0028 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, the airbag warning light is checked during the MOT test. An illuminated airbag light is an automatic MOT failure. The supplemental restraint system must show no warning lights to pass.

en.question: How much does B0028 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a B0028 fault typically range from around £17 to £585, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is wiring airbag rideau, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.pt: Airbag de cortina direito — circuito com defeito

description.fr: Le B0029 est le symetrique du B0028 pour le cote droit (passager). L'airbag rideau droit ne se deploiera probablement pas en cas de choc lateral cote passager. Les causes et le diagnostic sont identiques au B0028. Sur les vehicules avec rideau lateraux couvrant les deux rangees, le cablage est plus long et traverse le pavillon de bout en bout. Un toit ouvrant qui fuit peut egalement endommager le cablage avec l'humidite. La reparation necessite souvent le demontage de garnitures de pavillon, ce qui peut augmenter le temps de main d'oeuvre.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a B0029 code, indicating a fault with right curtain airbag — circuit fault in the airbag system. The airbag warning light on your dashboard will be illuminated, signalling that the system may not function as intended in the event of an accident. While this does not affect the drivability of your car, it is a critical safety concern that should be addressed as soon as possible. The airbag system is made up of multiple components — crash sensors, the airbag control module, wiring harnesses, and the airbag units themselves. A fault in any of these can trigger a warning code. Common culprits include damaged wiring under the front seats, a worn clock spring in the steering column, a faulty seat occupancy sensor, or a connector that has become corroded over time. Due to the explosive nature of airbag components, repairs must be carried out by a trained professional. Your mechanic will use a specialist scanner to identify the specific fault and recommend the appropriate repair. Remember that an illuminated airbag light will result in an MOT failure, so this needs attention before your next test date.
description.de: Der B0029 ist das Gegenstueck zum B0028 fuer die rechte Seite (Beifahrerseite). Der rechte Kopfairbag wird bei einem Seitenaufprall auf der Beifahrerseite wahrscheinlich nicht ausloesen. Die Ursachen und die Diagnose sind identisch mit dem B0028. Bei Fahrzeugen mit seitlichen Kopfairbags, die beide Sitzreihen abdecken, ist die Verkabelung laenger und verlaeuft durch den gesamten Dachhimmel. Ein undichtes Schiebedach kann durch Feuchtigkeit ebenfalls die Verkabelung beschaedigen. Die Reparatur erfordert oft die Demontage der Dachhimmelverkleidung, was die Arbeitszeit erhoehen kann.
description.es: El B0029 es el simetrico del B0028 para el lado derecho (pasajero). El airbag de cortina derecho probablemente no se desplegara en caso de impacto lateral del lado del pasajero. Las causas y el diagnostico son identicos al B0028. En los vehiculos con cortinas laterales que cubren las dos filas, el cableado es mas largo y recorre el techo de extremo a extremo. Un techo solar con fugas tambien puede danar el cableado con la humedad. La reparacion requiere a menudo el desmontaje de las guarniciones del techo, lo que puede aumentar el tiempo de mano de obra.
description.pt: O B0029 e o simetrico do B0028 para o lado direito (passageiro). O airbag de cortina direito provavelmente nao se acionara em caso de impacto lateral do lado do passageiro. As causas e o diagnostico sao identicos ao B0028. Nos veiculos com cortinas laterais que cobrem as duas filas, a cablagem e mais longa e percorre o tejadilho de ponta a ponta. Um teto de abrir com fugas tambem pode danificar a cablagem com a humidade. A reparacao requer frequentemente a desmontagem das guarnicoes do tejadilho, o que pode aumentar o tempo de mao de obra.

description.fr: Le U0073 est un code reseau qui signale une deconnexion du bus CAN A. Le bus CAN A est generalement le bus haute vitesse qui relie les calculateurs critiques : moteur, transmission, ABS. Une deconnexion partielle peut signifier qu'un segment du bus est coupe mais que certains modules communiquent encore entre eux via d'autres chemins. Les symptomes varient selon quels modules sont isoles du bus. Un connecteur de diagnostic OBD2 endommage peut aussi causer ce code si le bus CAN passe par cette connexion. Verifiez l'etat de la prise OBD2 et du cablage CAN qui y mene.
description.en: The U0073 fault code relates to can bus a disconnected, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.
description.de: Der U0073 ist ein Netzwerkcode, der eine Trennung des CAN-Bus A anzeigt. Der CAN-Bus A ist in der Regel der Hochgeschwindigkeitsbus, der die kritischen Steuergeraete verbindet: Motor, Getriebe, ABS. Eine teilweise Trennung kann bedeuten, dass ein Bussegment unterbrochen ist, aber einige Module noch ueber andere Wege miteinander kommunizieren. Die Symptome variieren je nachdem, welche Module vom Bus isoliert sind. Ein beschaedigter OBD2-Diagnosestecker kann diesen Code ebenfalls verursachen, wenn der CAN-Bus durch diesen Anschluss verlaeuft. Pruefen Sie den Zustand der OBD2-Buchse und der CAN-Verkabelung, die dorthin fuehrt.
description.es: El U0073 es un codigo de red que indica una desconexion del bus CAN A. El bus CAN A es generalmente el bus de alta velocidad que conecta las centralitas criticas: motor, transmision, ABS. Una desconexion parcial puede significar que un segmento del bus esta cortado pero que algunas centralitas aun comunican entre si por otros caminos. Los sintomas varian segun que modulos estan aislados del bus. Un conector de diagnostico OBD2 danado tambien puede causar este codigo si el bus CAN pasa por esta conexion. Verifique el estado de la toma OBD2 y del cableado CAN que llega a ella.
description.pt: O U0073 e um codigo de rede que indica uma desconexao do barramento CAN A. O barramento CAN A e geralmente o barramento de alta velocidade que liga as centralinas criticas: motor, transmissao, ABS. Uma desconexao parcial pode significar que um segmento do barramento esta cortado mas que algumas centralinas ainda comunicam entre si por outros caminhos. Os sintomas variam consoante os modulos que estao isolados do barramento. Um conector de diagnostico OBD2 danificado tambem pode causar este codigo se o barramento CAN passar por esta ligacao. Verifique o estado da tomada OBD2 e da cablagem CAN que conduz a ela.

description.fr: Le U0028 signale une deconnexion du bus CAN vehicule, distinct du bus CAN moteur/transmission. Ce bus relie souvent les fonctions de confort et de carrosserie : BCM, combine d'instruments, systeme multimedia. Une deconnexion affecte les fonctions de confort mais pas necessairement le moteur et la transmission. Les fils CAN sont souvent des paires torsadees qui cheminent dans le faisceau principal. Un pincement ou une coupure a un endroit suffit a couper la communication. Le diagnostic par oscilloscope permet de localiser la zone de rupture en mesurant la qualite du signal a differents points du reseau.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a U0028 fault code, indicating vehicle can bus disconnected, a problem on the vehicle's CAN bus communication network. Think of the CAN bus as the nervous system of your car — it allows all the different electronic control units to talk to each other and share vital information. When this communication breaks down, it can affect multiple systems simultaneously. You might notice several warning lights appearing at once, instruments behaving erratically, or certain functions becoming unresponsive. The root cause could be a physical wiring problem — a broken wire, a corroded connector, or water ingress into a plug. It could also be a failed electronic module dragging down the entire network, or a software mismatch between modules. A skilled auto electrician or diagnostic specialist can use an oscilloscope and advanced scanner to examine the CAN bus signals and isolate the fault. Repairs might be as simple as fixing a damaged connector, or they could involve replacing a faulty control module. These issues are best addressed promptly, as a degraded communication network can lead to unpredictable behaviour from safety-critical systems like the ABS or airbag.
description.de: Der U0028 zeigt eine Trennung des Fahrzeug-CAN-Bus an, der sich vom Motor-/Getriebe-CAN-Bus unterscheidet. Dieser Bus verbindet oft die Komfort- und Karosseriefunktionen: BCM, Kombiinstrument, Multimediasystem. Eine Trennung beeintraechtigt die Komfortfunktionen, aber nicht unbedingt Motor und Getriebe. Die CAN-Draehte sind oft verdrillte Paare, die im Hauptkabelbaum verlaufen. Ein Einklemmen oder ein Schnitt an einer Stelle genuegt, um die Kommunikation zu unterbrechen. Die Diagnose per Oszilloskop erlaubt die Lokalisierung der Bruchstelle durch Messung der Signalqualitaet an verschiedenen Punkten des Netzwerks.
description.es: El U0028 indica una desconexion del bus CAN del vehiculo, distinto del bus CAN de motor/transmision. Este bus conecta a menudo las funciones de confort y carroceria: BCM, cuadro de instrumentos, sistema multimedia. Una desconexion afecta las funciones de confort pero no necesariamente el motor y la transmision. Los cables CAN son a menudo pares trenzados que discurren por el mazo de cables principal. Un pinzamiento o un corte en un punto basta para cortar la comunicacion. El diagnostico por osciloscopio permite localizar la zona de rotura midiendo la calidad de la senal en diferentes puntos de la red.
description.pt: O U0028 indica uma desconexao do barramento CAN do veiculo, distinto do barramento CAN do motor/transmissao. Este barramento liga frequentemente as funcoes de conforto e carroceria: BCM, quadro de instrumentos, sistema multimidia. Uma desconexao afeta as funcoes de conforto mas nao necessariamente o motor e a transmissao. Os fios CAN sao frequentemente pares trancados que percorrem a cablagem principal. Um aperto ou um corte num ponto basta para cortar a comunicacao. O diagnostico por osciloscopio permite localizar a zona de rotura medindo a qualidade do sinal em diferentes pontos da rede.

name.en: Lost communication with fuel injection ECU
name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con la centralita de inyeccion
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com a centralina de injecao

description.fr: Le U0102 concerne specifiquement la perte de communication avec le module de gestion de l'injection carburant. Sur certains vehicules, l'injection est geree par un module separe du calculateur moteur principal. Ce module controle les injecteurs, la pompe haute pression et le regulateur de pression. Sans communication, le systeme d'injection peut se mettre en mode degrade autonome ou s'arreter completement. Les vehicules diesel common rail sont particulierement concernes car leur systeme d'injection est souvent gere par un module dedie. Verifiez l'alimentation et les connexions CAN du module d'injection.
description.en: The U0102 fault code relates to lost communication with fuel injection ecu, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.
description.de: Der U0102 betrifft speziell den Kommunikationsverlust mit dem Kraftstoffeinspritzmodul. Bei einigen Fahrzeugen wird die Einspritzung von einem separaten Modul des Hauptmotorsteuergeraets verwaltet. Dieses Modul steuert die Einspritzduesen, die Hochdruckpumpe und den Druckregler. Ohne Kommunikation kann sich das Einspritzsystem in einen autonomen Notlauf versetzen oder vollstaendig abschalten. Common-Rail-Dieselfahrzeuge sind besonders betroffen, da ihr Einspritzsystem oft von einem speziellen Modul verwaltet wird. Pruefen Sie die Stromversorgung und die CAN-Anschluesse des Einspritzmoduls.
description.es: El U0102 se refiere especificamente a la perdida de comunicacion con el modulo de gestion de la inyeccion de combustible. En algunos vehiculos, la inyeccion esta gestionada por un modulo separado de la centralita principal del motor. Este modulo controla los inyectores, la bomba de alta presion y el regulador de presion. Sin comunicacion, el sistema de inyeccion puede ponerse en modo degradado autonomo o detenerse completamente. Los vehiculos diesel common rail estan particularmente afectados porque su sistema de inyeccion suele estar gestionado por un modulo dedicado. Verifique la alimentacion y las conexiones CAN del modulo de inyeccion.
description.pt: O U0102 refere-se especificamente a perda de comunicacao com o modulo de gestao da injecao de combustivel. Em alguns veiculos, a injecao e gerida por um modulo separado da centralina principal do motor. Este modulo controla os injetores, a bomba de alta pressao e o regulador de pressao. Sem comunicacao, o sistema de injecao pode entrar em modo degradado autonomo ou parar completamente. Os veiculos diesel common rail sao particularmente afetados porque o seu sistema de injecao e frequentemente gerido por um modulo dedicado. Verifique a alimentacao e as ligacoes CAN do modulo de injecao.

en.question: What does the U0102 fault code mean?
en.answer: The U0102 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with lost communication with fuel injection ecu. This is a high-severity CAN bus network fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a U0102 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will U0102 fail my MOT?
en.answer: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Perdida de comunicacion con la centralita de climatizacion
name.pt: Perda de comunicacao com a centralina da climatizacao

description.fr: Le U0164 indique que le module de climatisation ne communique plus sur le bus CAN. La climatisation est generalement autonome mais communique avec les autres modules pour des informations comme la vitesse vehicule (pour ajuster la puissance), le regime moteur (pour gerer la charge du compresseur) et la temperature exterieure. Sans communication, la climatisation peut fonctionner en mode degrade ou s'arreter. Le module de climatisation est souvent derriere le tableau de bord, dans une zone moins exposee. Verifiez son alimentation et le fusible dedie avant de suspecter un probleme de bus CAN.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a U0164 fault code, indicating lost communication with a/c ecu, a problem on the vehicle's CAN bus communication network. Think of the CAN bus as the nervous system of your car — it allows all the different electronic control units to talk to each other and share vital information. When this communication breaks down, it can affect multiple systems simultaneously. You might notice several warning lights appearing at once, instruments behaving erratically, or certain functions becoming unresponsive. The root cause could be a physical wiring problem — a broken wire, a corroded connector, or water ingress into a plug. It could also be a failed electronic module dragging down the entire network, or a software mismatch between modules. A skilled auto electrician or diagnostic specialist can use an oscilloscope and advanced scanner to examine the CAN bus signals and isolate the fault. Repairs might be as simple as fixing a damaged connector, or they could involve replacing a faulty control module. These issues are best addressed promptly, as a degraded communication network can lead to unpredictable behaviour from safety-critical systems like the ABS or airbag.
description.de: Der U0164 zeigt an, dass das Klimaanlagenmodul nicht mehr auf dem CAN-Bus kommuniziert. Die Klimaanlage arbeitet in der Regel autonom, kommuniziert aber mit den anderen Modulen fuer Informationen wie die Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeit (zur Leistungsanpassung), die Motordrehzahl (zur Verwaltung der Kompressorlast) und die Aussentemperatur. Ohne Kommunikation kann die Klimaanlage im Notlauf arbeiten oder sich abschalten. Das Klimaanlagenmodul befindet sich oft hinter dem Armaturenbrett, in einem weniger exponierten Bereich. Pruefen Sie seine Stromversorgung und die zugehoerige Sicherung, bevor Sie ein CAN-Bus-Problem vermuten.
description.es: El U0164 indica que el modulo de climatizacion ya no comunica en el bus CAN. La climatizacion es generalmente autonoma pero comunica con los demas modulos para informaciones como la velocidad del vehiculo (para ajustar la potencia), las revoluciones del motor (para gestionar la carga del compresor) y la temperatura exterior. Sin comunicacion, la climatizacion puede funcionar en modo degradado o detenerse. El modulo de climatizacion esta a menudo detras del salpicadero, en una zona menos expuesta. Verifique su alimentacion y el fusible dedicado antes de sospechar un problema del bus CAN.
description.pt: O U0164 indica que o modulo de climatizacao ja nao comunica no barramento CAN. A climatizacao e geralmente autonoma mas comunica com os outros modulos para informacoes como a velocidade do veiculo (para ajustar a potencia), as rotacoes do motor (para gerir a carga do compressor) e a temperatura exterior. Sem comunicacao, a climatizacao pode funcionar em modo degradado ou parar. O modulo de climatizacao esta frequentemente atras do painel de instrumentos, numa zona menos exposta. Verifique a sua alimentacao e o fusivel dedicado antes de suspeitar de um problema no barramento CAN.

description.fr: Le U0300 signale une incompatibilite de version logicielle entre deux ou plusieurs calculateurs du vehicule. Apres une mise a jour logicielle d'un module ou le remplacement d'un calculateur, les versions de protocole doivent correspondre pour que la communication soit fiable. Un module avec un logiciel plus ancien peut ne pas comprendre les nouvelles commandes d'un module recemment mis a jour. Ce code apparait souvent apres des interventions en atelier qui n'ont pas mis a jour tous les modules concernes. Un passage chez le concessionnaire pour une mise a jour globale des calculateurs est generalement necessaire.
description.en: The U0300 fault code relates to software incompatibility between modules, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.
description.de: Der U0300 zeigt eine Softwareversions-Inkompatibilitaet zwischen zwei oder mehreren Steuergeraeten des Fahrzeugs an. Nach einem Software-Update eines Moduls oder dem Austausch eines Steuergeraets muessen die Protokollversionen uebereinstimmen, damit die Kommunikation zuverlaessig ist. Ein Modul mit aelterer Software versteht moeglicherweise die neuen Befehle eines kuerzlich aktualisierten Moduls nicht. Dieser Code erscheint oft nach Werkstattarbeiten, bei denen nicht alle betroffenen Module aktualisiert wurden. Ein Besuch beim Haendler fuer ein globales Steuergeraete-Update ist in der Regel erforderlich.
description.es: El U0300 indica una incompatibilidad de version de software entre dos o mas centralitas del vehiculo. Tras una actualizacion de software de un modulo o el reemplazo de una centralita, las versiones de protocolo deben coincidir para que la comunicacion sea fiable. Un modulo con software mas antiguo puede no entender los nuevos comandos de un modulo recientemente actualizado. Este codigo aparece a menudo tras intervenciones en taller que no han actualizado todos los modulos afectados. Una visita al concesionario para una actualizacion global de las centralitas suele ser necesaria.
description.pt: O U0300 indica uma incompatibilidade de versao de software entre duas ou mais centralinas do veiculo. Apos uma atualizacao de software de um modulo ou a substituicao de uma centralina, as versoes de protocolo devem corresponder para que a comunicacao seja fiavel. Um modulo com software mais antigo pode nao compreender os novos comandos de um modulo recentemente atualizado. Este codigo aparece frequentemente apos intervencoes em oficina que nao atualizaram todos os modulos afetados. Uma visita ao concessionario para uma atualizacao global das centralinas e geralmente necessaria.

name.es: Sensor de posición de la mariposa — correlación A/B
name.pt: Sensor de posição da borboleta — correlação A/B

description.fr: Le P2135 est un code de securite critique signalant que les signaux des capteurs A et B du papillon des gaz ne correspondent pas entre eux. Sur les vehicules avec papillon electronique, les deux capteurs doivent se suivre en miroir — si l'un augmente, l'autre doit diminuer proportionnellement. Une discordance au-dela du seuil de tolerance active immediatement le mode degrade. Ce code peut apparaitre si le boitier papillon est tres encrasse et que les deux capteurs ne lisent plus les memes positions. Un nettoyage suivi d'un reapprentissage est la premiere intervention. Si le probleme persiste, le boitier complet doit etre remplace.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P2135 code, it is telling you there is a problem with throttle position sensor a/b correlation. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P2135 ist ein sicherheitskritischer Code, der anzeigt, dass die Signale der Drosselklappensensoren A und B nicht übereinstimmen. Bei Fahrzeugen mit elektronischer Drosselklappe müssen beide Sensoren sich spiegelverkehrt verhalten — steigt der eine, muss der andere proportional sinken. Eine Abweichung über die Toleranzgrenze hinaus aktiviert sofort den Notlaufmodus. Dieser Code kann auftreten, wenn das Drosselklappengehäuse stark verschmutzt ist und beide Sensoren nicht mehr die gleichen Positionen messen. Eine Reinigung gefolgt von einer Neuanlernung ist die erste Maßnahme. Besteht das Problem weiter, muss das gesamte Drosselklappengehäuse ersetzt werden.
description.es: El P2135 es un código de seguridad crítico que indica que las señales de los sensores A y B de la mariposa del acelerador no se corresponden entre sí. En los vehículos con mariposa electrónica, ambos sensores deben seguirse en espejo — si uno sube, el otro debe bajar proporcionalmente. Una discrepancia superior al umbral de tolerancia activa inmediatamente el modo degradado. Este código puede aparecer si el cuerpo de mariposa está muy sucio y ambos sensores ya no leen las mismas posiciones. Una limpieza seguida de un reaprendizaje es la primera intervención. Si el problema persiste, hay que sustituir el cuerpo de mariposa completo.
description.pt: O P2135 é um código de segurança crítico que indica que os sinais dos sensores A e B da borboleta de aceleração não correspondem entre si. Nos veículos com borboleta eletrónica, os dois sensores devem seguir-se em espelho — se um sobe, o outro deve descer proporcionalmente. Uma discordância acima do limiar de tolerância ativa imediatamente o modo degradado. Este código pode aparecer se o corpo da borboleta estiver muito sujo e os dois sensores já não lerem as mesmas posições. Uma limpeza seguida de uma reaprendizagem é a primeira intervenção. Se o problema persistir, o corpo da borboleta completo deve ser substituído.

en.question: What does the P2135 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P2135 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with throttle position sensor a/b correlation. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P2135 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P2135 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P2135 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P2135 fault typically range from around £25 to £512, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is very dirty throttle body, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Capteur position pedale accelerateur correlation D/E
name.en: Accelerator pedal position sensor D/E correlation
name.es: Sensor de posición del pedal del acelerador — correlación D/E
name.pt: Sensor de posição do pedal do acelerador — correlação D/E

description.fr: Le P2138 signale que les deux capteurs integres a la pedale d'accelerateur electronique ne sont pas en accord. Comme pour le papillon, la pedale dispose de deux capteurs redondants pour la securite. Si les signaux divergent, le calculateur ne peut pas determiner la demande reelle du conducteur et active le mode degrade. La pedale d'accelerateur electronique est un composant robuste mais le connecteur et le cablage sous le tableau de bord peuvent souffrir de l'humidite (surtout si le vehicule fuit au pare-brise). Un tapis de sol mal positionne qui interfere mecaniquement avec la pedale peut aussi fausser les lectures.
description.en: A P2138 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with accelerator pedal position sensor d/e correlation. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P2138 zeigt an, dass die beiden im elektronischen Gaspedal integrierten Sensoren nicht übereinstimmen. Wie bei der Drosselklappe verfügt das Pedal aus Sicherheitsgründen über zwei redundante Sensoren. Wenn die Signale abweichen, kann das Steuergerät die tatsächliche Fahreranforderung nicht bestimmen und aktiviert den Notlaufmodus. Das elektronische Gaspedal ist ein robustes Bauteil, aber der Stecker und die Verkabelung unter dem Armaturenbrett können unter Feuchtigkeit leiden (besonders bei undichter Windschutzscheibe). Eine falsch positionierte Fußmatte, die mechanisch mit dem Pedal interferiert, kann ebenfalls die Messwerte verfälschen.
description.es: El P2138 indica que los dos sensores integrados en el pedal del acelerador electrónico no concuerdan. Al igual que con la mariposa, el pedal dispone de dos sensores redundantes por seguridad. Si las señales divergen, la centralita no puede determinar la demanda real del conductor y activa el modo degradado. El pedal del acelerador electrónico es un componente robusto, pero el conector y el cableado bajo el salpicadero pueden sufrir por la humedad (sobre todo si el vehículo tiene fugas en el parabrisas). Una alfombrilla mal colocada que interfiera mecánicamente con el pedal también puede falsear las lecturas.
description.pt: O P2138 indica que os dois sensores integrados no pedal do acelerador eletrónico não concordam. Tal como com a borboleta, o pedal dispõe de dois sensores redundantes por segurança. Se os sinais divergem, a centralina não consegue determinar o pedido real do condutor e ativa o modo degradado. O pedal do acelerador eletrónico é um componente robusto, mas o conector e a cablagem debaixo do painel podem sofrer com a humidade (sobretudo se o veículo tiver fugas no para-brisas). Um tapete mal posicionado que interfira mecanicamente com o pedal também pode falsear as leituras.

en.question: What does the P2138 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P2138 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with accelerator pedal position sensor d/e correlation. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P2138 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P2138 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P2138 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P2138 fault typically range from around £12 to £249, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty accelerator pedal, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.
