name.es: Sensor de posición del colector de admisión — rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de posição do coletor de admissão — gama/desempenho

description.fr: Le P2015 concerne le capteur de position des volets dans le collecteur d'admission a longueur variable. Les collecteurs modernes ont des volets internes qui modifient la longueur des conduits d'admission pour optimiser le remplissage a differents regimes. Le capteur detecte la position de ces volets. Si le capteur indique une position qui ne correspond pas a la commande du calculateur, ce code apparait. Les volets peuvent se bloquer par l'encrassement (calamine) surtout sur les moteurs a injection directe ou la recirculation EGR souille l'admission. Un nettoyage du collecteur est parfois necessaire en plus du remplacement du capteur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P2015 relates to intake manifold position sensor — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P2015 betrifft den Positionssensor der Klappen im variablen Saugrohr. Moderne Ansaugkrümmer haben interne Klappen, die die Länge der Ansaugkanäle ändern, um die Zylinderfüllung bei verschiedenen Drehzahlen zu optimieren. Der Sensor erkennt die Position dieser Klappen. Wenn der Sensor eine Position meldet, die nicht dem Befehl des Steuergeräts entspricht, erscheint dieser Code. Die Klappen können durch Verkokung blockiert sein, besonders bei Direkteinspritzern, bei denen die AGR-Rückführung die Ansaugung verschmutzt. Eine Reinigung des Krümmers kann zusätzlich zum Sensoraustausch erforderlich sein.
description.es: El P2015 se refiere al sensor de posición de las aletas del colector de admisión de longitud variable. Los colectores modernos tienen aletas internas que modifican la longitud de los conductos de admisión para optimizar el llenado a distintos regímenes. El sensor detecta la posición de estas aletas. Si el sensor indica una posición que no corresponde a la orden de la centralita, aparece este código. Las aletas pueden bloquearse por acumulación de carbonilla, especialmente en los motores de inyección directa donde la recirculación EGR ensucia la admisión. Puede ser necesaria una limpieza del colector además de la sustitución del sensor.
description.pt: O P2015 refere-se ao sensor de posição das válvulas no coletor de admissão de comprimento variável. Os coletores modernos têm válvulas internas que modificam o comprimento dos condutos de admissão para otimizar o enchimento a diferentes regimes. O sensor deteta a posição destas válvulas. Se o sensor indica uma posição que não corresponde ao comando da centralina, este código aparece. As válvulas podem bloquear-se por acumulação de carvão, especialmente nos motores de injeção direta onde a recirculação EGR suja a admissão. Pode ser necessária uma limpeza do coletor além da substituição do sensor.

pt: Perda de potência a certos regimes

name.fr: Melange trop pauvre hors ralenti banque 1
name.en: Fuel mixture too lean off-idle — bank 1
name.de: Gemisch zu mager außerhalb des Leerlaufs — Bank 1
name.es: Mezcla demasiado pobre fuera de ralentí — banco 1
name.pt: Mistura demasiado pobre fora do ralenti — banco 1

description.fr: Le P2177 est complementaire au P2187 : le melange est pauvre mais uniquement en dehors du ralenti, c'est-a-dire en charge. Au ralenti, le dosage est correct. Cela pointe vers un debitmetre qui sous-estime le debit d'air a haut debit, une pompe a carburant qui ne suit pas la demande en charge, ou un filtre a carburant qui restreint le debit. La prise d'air est moins probable car au ralenti elle aurait aussi un impact. Ce code affine le diagnostic par rapport au P0171 general et oriente vers les composants sollicites en charge. Verifiez la pression de carburant sous charge avec un manometre.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P2177 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel mixture too lean off-idle — bank 1. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P2177 ist komplementär zum P2187: Das Gemisch ist mager, aber nur außerhalb des Leerlaufs, also unter Last. Im Leerlauf ist die Dosierung korrekt. Das deutet auf einen Luftmassenmesser hin, der den Luftdurchsatz bei hohem Durchfluss unterschätzt, eine Kraftstoffpumpe, die unter Last nicht mithalten kann, oder einen verstopften Kraftstofffilter. Falschluft ist weniger wahrscheinlich, da sie sich auch im Leerlauf auswirken würde. Dieser Code verfeinert die Diagnose gegenüber dem allgemeinen P0171 und zeigt auf Bauteile, die unter Last beansprucht werden. Prüfen Sie den Kraftstoffdruck unter Last mit einem Manometer.
description.es: El P2177 es complementario al P2187: la mezcla es pobre pero únicamente fuera del ralentí, es decir, en carga. En ralentí la dosificación es correcta. Esto apunta a un caudalímetro que subestima el caudal de aire a alto caudal, una bomba de combustible que no sigue la demanda en carga, o un filtro de combustible que restringe el caudal. La entrada de aire es menos probable ya que en ralentí también tendría impacto. Este código afina el diagnóstico respecto al P0171 general y orienta hacia los componentes solicitados en carga. Compruebe la presión de combustible en carga con un manómetro.
description.pt: O P2177 é complementar ao P2187: a mistura é pobre mas apenas fora do ralenti, ou seja, em carga. Ao ralenti a dosagem é correta. Isto aponta para um caudalímetro que subestima o caudal de ar a alto caudal, uma bomba de combustível que não acompanha a procura em carga, ou um filtro de combustível que restringe o caudal. A entrada de ar falso é menos provável, pois ao ralenti também teria impacto. Este código refina o diagnóstico em relação ao P0171 geral e orienta para os componentes solicitados em carga. Verifique a pressão de combustível em carga com um manómetro.

name.fr: Melange trop riche hors ralenti banque 1
name.en: Fuel mixture too rich off-idle — bank 1
name.de: Gemisch zu fett außerhalb des Leerlaufs — Bank 1
name.es: Mezcla demasiado rica fuera de ralentí — banco 1
name.pt: Mistura demasiado rica fora do ralenti — banco 1

description.fr: Le P2178 signale un melange riche uniquement en charge. Au ralenti le melange est correct. Un regulateur de pression de carburant qui fournit trop de pression en charge, un capteur MAP ou MAF qui surestime le debit d'air, ou un capteur de temperature d'air qui indique une temperature trop basse (air dense = plus de carburant) sont les causes probables. Ce code permet de cibler les composants qui ne fonctionnent pas correctement uniquement sous charge, ce qui reduit la liste des suspects par rapport au P0172 general. Verifiez les lectures des capteurs en temps reel pendant une acceleration.
description.en: A P2178 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with fuel mixture too rich off-idle — bank 1. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P2178 weist auf ein fettes Gemisch nur unter Last hin. Im Leerlauf ist das Gemisch korrekt. Ein Kraftstoffdruckregler, der unter Last zu viel Druck liefert, ein MAP- oder MAF-Sensor, der den Luftdurchsatz überschätzt, oder ein Ansauglufttemperatursensor, der eine zu niedrige Temperatur meldet (dichte Luft = mehr Kraftstoff), sind wahrscheinliche Ursachen. Dieser Code ermöglicht es, Bauteile einzugrenzen, die nur unter Last fehlerhaft arbeiten, wodurch die Verdächtigenliste gegenüber dem allgemeinen P0172 reduziert wird. Prüfen Sie die Sensorwerte in Echtzeit während einer Beschleunigung.
description.es: El P2178 indica una mezcla rica únicamente en carga. En ralentí la mezcla es correcta. Un regulador de presión de combustible que proporciona demasiada presión en carga, un sensor MAP o MAF que sobreestima el caudal de aire, o un sensor de temperatura del aire que indica una temperatura demasiado baja (aire denso = más combustible) son las causas probables. Este código permite identificar los componentes que solo funcionan incorrectamente bajo carga, lo que reduce la lista de sospechosos respecto al P0172 general. Compruebe las lecturas de los sensores en tiempo real durante una aceleración.
description.pt: O P2178 indica uma mistura rica apenas em carga. Ao ralenti a mistura é correta. Um regulador de pressão de combustível que fornece pressão excessiva em carga, um sensor MAP ou MAF que sobrestima o caudal de ar, ou um sensor de temperatura do ar que indica uma temperatura demasiado baixa (ar denso = mais combustível) são as causas prováveis. Este código permite identificar os componentes que só funcionam incorretamente sob carga, reduzindo a lista de suspeitos em relação ao P0172 geral. Verifique as leituras dos sensores em tempo real durante uma aceleração.

name.es: Regulador de presión excesivo en carga
name.pt: Regulador de pressão excessivo em carga

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda amont tension basse banque 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1)
name.es: Calentamiento sonda lambda anterior tensión baja banco 1
name.pt: Aquecimento sonda lambda anterior tensão baixa banco 1

description.fr: Le P0031 indique que le circuit de chauffage de la sonde lambda amont banque 1 a une tension anormalement basse. Un court-circuit dans le cablage du chauffage ou un element chauffant partiellement en court-circuit sont les causes typiques. L'element chauffant consomme normalement entre 2 et 5 amperes. Si la resistance est trop faible, le courant augmente et la tension chute. Le fusible du chauffage peut aussi griller si le court-circuit est severe. Verifiez la resistance du chauffage avec un multimetre : elle doit etre entre 3 et 15 ohms selon le modele de sonde.
description.en: The P0031 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with upstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0031 zeigt an, dass der Heizschaltkreis der Vorkatsonde Bank 1 eine abnormal niedrige Spannung hat. Ein Kurzschluss in der Heizungsverkabelung oder ein teilweise kurzgeschlossenes Heizelement sind die typischen Ursachen. Das Heizelement verbraucht normalerweise zwischen 2 und 5 Ampere. Wenn der Widerstand zu niedrig ist, steigt der Strom und die Spannung fällt. Die Heizungssicherung kann ebenfalls durchbrennen, wenn der Kurzschluss schwerwiegend ist. Prüfen Sie den Heizungswiderstand mit einem Multimeter: Er muss je nach Sondenmodell zwischen 3 und 15 Ohm liegen.
description.es: El P0031 indica que el circuito de calentamiento de la sonda lambda anterior banco 1 tiene una tensión anormalmente baja. Un cortocircuito en el cableado del calentamiento o un elemento calentador parcialmente en cortocircuito son las causas típicas. El elemento calentador consume normalmente entre 2 y 5 amperios. Si la resistencia es demasiado baja, la corriente aumenta y la tensión cae. El fusible del calentamiento también puede quemarse si el cortocircuito es severo. Verifica la resistencia del calentamiento con un multímetro: debe estar entre 3 y 15 ohmios según el modelo de sonda.
description.pt: O P0031 indica que o circuito de aquecimento da sonda lambda anterior banco 1 tem uma tensão anormalmente baixa. Um curto-circuito na cablagem do aquecimento ou um elemento aquecedor parcialmente em curto-circuito são as causas típicas. O elemento aquecedor consome normalmente entre 2 e 5 amperes. Se a resistência for demasiado baixa, a corrente aumenta e a tensão cai. O fusível do aquecimento também pode queimar se o curto-circuito for severo. Verifique a resistência do aquecimento com um multímetro: deve estar entre 3 e 15 ohms conforme o modelo de sonda.

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda amont tension haute banque 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor heater — high voltage (bank 1)
name.es: Calentamiento sonda lambda anterior tensión alta banco 1
name.pt: Aquecimento sonda lambda anterior tensão alta banco 1

description.fr: Le P0032 signale une tension haute sur le circuit de chauffage de la sonde amont, generalement un circuit ouvert. Le fil de chauffage est coupe ou le connecteur est debranche. Sans chauffage, la sonde met plusieurs minutes a atteindre sa temperature de fonctionnement au lieu de 20 secondes. Le calculateur maintient la boucle ouverte plus longtemps, augmentant la consommation et les emissions. Verifiez le connecteur de la sonde, surtout s'il a ete debranche recemment lors d'un entretien. Un fil ronge par un rongeur est aussi une cause frequente.
description.en: When your car shows a P0032 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to upstream lambda sensor heater — high voltage (bank 1). Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0032 meldet eine hohe Spannung am Heizschaltkreis der Vorkatsonde, im Allgemeinen einen offenen Schaltkreis. Der Heizdraht ist unterbrochen oder der Stecker ist getrennt. Ohne Heizung braucht die Sonde statt 20 Sekunden mehrere Minuten, um ihre Betriebstemperatur zu erreichen. Das Steuergerät hält den offenen Regelkreis länger aufrecht, was Verbrauch und Emissionen erhöht. Prüfen Sie den Stecker der Sonde, besonders wenn er kürzlich bei einer Wartung getrennt wurde. Ein von einem Nagetier angeknabberter Draht ist ebenfalls eine häufige Ursache.
description.es: El P0032 señala una tensión alta en el circuito de calentamiento de la sonda anterior, generalmente un circuito abierto. El hilo de calentamiento está cortado o el conector está desconectado. Sin calentamiento, la sonda tarda varios minutos en alcanzar su temperatura de funcionamiento en lugar de 20 segundos. La ECU mantiene el bucle abierto más tiempo, aumentando el consumo y las emisiones. Verifica el conector de la sonda, sobre todo si ha sido desconectado recientemente durante un mantenimiento. Un hilo roído por un roedor también es una causa frecuente.
description.pt: O P0032 assinala uma tensão alta no circuito de aquecimento da sonda anterior, geralmente um circuito aberto. O fio de aquecimento está cortado ou o conector está desligado. Sem aquecimento, a sonda demora vários minutos a atingir a sua temperatura de funcionamento em vez de 20 segundos. A ECU mantém o ciclo aberto mais tempo, aumentando o consumo e as emissões. Verifique o conector da sonda, sobretudo se foi desligado recentemente durante uma manutenção. Um fio roído por um roedor também é uma causa frequente.

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda aval tension basse banque 1
name.en: Downstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1)
name.es: Calentamiento sonda lambda posterior tensión baja banco 1
name.pt: Aquecimento sonda lambda posterior tensão baixa banco 1

description.fr: Le P0037 concerne la tension basse du circuit de chauffage de la sonde aval. Le chauffage de la sonde situee apres le catalyseur presente un court-circuit. Comme la sonde aval ne participe pas au reglage du melange, l'impact sur la conduite est nul. Cependant, la sonde ne peut plus correctement surveiller le catalyseur quand elle n'atteint pas sa temperature de fonctionnement rapidement. Le fusible et le cablage sont les premiers elements a verifier avant de remplacer la sonde. Le court-circuit peut aussi provenir de l'interieur de la sonde elle-meme.
description.en: A P0037 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1). This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0037 betrifft die niedrige Spannung des Heizschaltkreises der Nachkatsonde. Die Heizung der Sonde, die sich hinter dem Katalysator befindet, weist einen Kurzschluss auf. Da die Nachkatsonde nicht an der Gemischregelung beteiligt ist, ist die Auswirkung auf das Fahren gleich null. Allerdings kann die Sonde den Katalysator nicht mehr korrekt überwachen, wenn sie ihre Betriebstemperatur nicht schnell erreicht. Sicherung und Verkabelung sind die ersten zu prüfenden Elemente, bevor die Sonde ersetzt wird. Der Kurzschluss kann auch aus dem Inneren der Sonde selbst stammen.
description.es: El P0037 concierne a la tensión baja del circuito de calentamiento de la sonda posterior. El calentamiento de la sonda situada tras el catalizador presenta un cortocircuito. Como la sonda posterior no participa en el ajuste de la mezcla, el impacto en la conducción es nulo. Sin embargo, la sonda ya no puede vigilar correctamente el catalizador cuando no alcanza rápidamente su temperatura de funcionamiento. El fusible y el cableado son los primeros elementos a verificar antes de reemplazar la sonda. El cortocircuito también puede provenir del interior de la propia sonda.
description.pt: O P0037 diz respeito à tensão baixa do circuito de aquecimento da sonda posterior. O aquecimento da sonda situada após o catalisador apresenta um curto-circuito. Como a sonda posterior não participa no ajuste da mistura, o impacto na condução é nulo. No entanto, a sonda já não pode vigiar corretamente o catalisador quando não atinge rapidamente a sua temperatura de funcionamento. O fusível e a cablagem são os primeiros elementos a verificar antes de substituir a sonda. O curto-circuito também pode provir do interior da própria sonda.

La sonde mettra plusieurs minutes a s'activer apres le demarrage, pendant lesquelles le catalyseur ne sera pas surveille. L'impact est minimal sur la conduite quotidienne mais le code provoque l'allumage du voyant moteur et un echec au controle technique. Verifiez le connecteur qui peut se deconnecter sous l'effet des vibrations, puis mesurez la resistance du chauffage de la sonde elle-meme.
description.en: The P0038 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with downstream lambda sensor heater — high voltage (bank 1). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0038 zeigt einen offenen Schaltkreis in der Heizung der Nachkatsonde Bank 1 an. Das Heizelement ist unterbrochen oder abgeklemmt. Die Sonde wird mehrere Minuten brauchen, um sich nach dem Starten zu aktivieren, während derer der Katalysator nicht überwacht wird. Die Auswirkung auf das tägliche Fahren ist minimal, aber der Code führt zum Aufleuchten der Motorwarnleuchte und einem TÜV-Durchfall. Prüfen Sie den Stecker, der sich unter Vibrationseinfluss trennen kann, und messen Sie dann den Widerstand der Sondenheizung selbst.
description.es: El P0038 indica un circuito abierto en el calentamiento de la sonda lambda posterior banco 1. El elemento calentador está cortado o desconectado. La sonda tardará varios minutos en activarse tras el arranque, durante los cuales el catalizador no será vigilado. El impacto es mínimo en la conducción diaria pero el código provoca el encendido del testigo del motor y un fallo en la ITV. Verifica el conector que puede desconectarse bajo el efecto de las vibraciones, y luego mide la resistencia del calentamiento de la propia sonda.
description.pt: O P0038 indica um circuito aberto no aquecimento da sonda lambda posterior banco 1. O elemento aquecedor está cortado ou desligado. A sonda demorará vários minutos a ativar-se após o arranque, durante os quais o catalisador não será vigiado. O impacto é mínimo na condução diária mas o código provoca o acendimento da luz de avaria do motor e uma reprovação na IPO. Verifique o conector que pode desligar-se sob o efeito das vibrações, e depois meça a resistência do aquecimento da própria sonda.

name.es: Elemento calentador de sonda posterior quemado
name.pt: Elemento aquecedor de sonda posterior queimado

en.question: What does the P0038 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0038 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor heater — high voltage (bank 1). This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0038 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0038 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0038 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0038 fault typically range from around £4 to £187, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is blown downstream sensor heating element, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

description.fr: Le P0105 est le code general du capteur de pression absolue du collecteur (MAP) signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Le signal est absent ou completement hors plage. Le calculateur ne peut pas determiner la charge moteur et utilise une estimation basee sur le regime et la position du papillon. Cette estimation est moins precise et degrade les performances et la consommation. Le capteur MAP est un composant petit et peu couteux mais son tuyau de raccordement est souvent la source du probleme : fissure, debranche ou bouche par de la condensation.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0105 code, it is telling you there is a problem with map sensor — circuit fault. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0105 ist der allgemeine Code des Saugrohr-Absolutdrucksensors (MAP), der eine Schaltkreisstörung signalisiert. Das Signal fehlt oder liegt komplett außerhalb des Bereichs. Das Steuergerät kann die Motorlast nicht bestimmen und verwendet eine Schätzung basierend auf Drehzahl und Drosselklappenposition. Diese Schätzung ist weniger genau und verschlechtert Leistung und Verbrauch. Der MAP-Sensor ist ein kleines, günstiges Bauteil, aber sein Anschlussschlauch ist oft die Problemquelle: gerissen, abgezogen oder durch Kondenswasser verstopft.
description.es: El P0105 es el código general del sensor de presión absoluta del colector (MAP) que indica un fallo de circuito. La señal está ausente o completamente fuera de rango. La centralita no puede determinar la carga del motor y utiliza una estimación basada en el régimen y la posición de la mariposa. Esta estimación es menos precisa y degrada el rendimiento y el consumo. El sensor MAP es un componente pequeño y poco costoso, pero su tubo de conexión suele ser la fuente del problema: fisurado, desconectado u obstruido por condensación.
description.pt: O P0105 é o código geral do sensor de pressão absoluta do coletor (MAP) indicando uma falha de circuito. O sinal está ausente ou completamente fora de gama. A centralina não consegue determinar a carga do motor e utiliza uma estimativa baseada no regime e na posição da borboleta. Esta estimativa é menos precisa e degrada o desempenho e o consumo. O sensor MAP é um componente pequeno e pouco dispendioso, mas o seu tubo de ligação é frequentemente a fonte do problema: fissurado, desligado ou obstruído por condensação.

name.es: Sensor de temperatura del aire de admisión — rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de temperatura do ar de admissão — gama/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0111 signale que le capteur de temperature d'air d'admission fonctionne mais ses valeurs ne correspondent pas aux attentes du calculateur. La temperature mesuree change trop vite, trop lentement ou ne correspond pas aux conditions ambiantes. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive, un emplacement incorrect apres un remplacement de filtre a air, ou un capteur expose a de l'air chaud recircule sont des causes possibles. Le calculateur compare la temperature IAT avec la temperature ECT au demarrage a froid pour verifier la coherence.
description.en: A P0111 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with intake air temperature sensor — range/performance. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0111 zeigt an, dass der Ansauglufttemperatursensor funktioniert, seine Werte aber nicht den Erwartungen des Steuergeräts entsprechen. Die gemessene Temperatur ändert sich zu schnell, zu langsam oder passt nicht zu den Umgebungsbedingungen. Ein Sensor mit verschobener Kennlinie, eine falsche Platzierung nach einem Luftfilterwechsel oder ein Sensor, der von heißer Umluft angeströmt wird, sind mögliche Ursachen. Das Steuergerät vergleicht die IAT- mit der Kühlmitteltemperatur beim Kaltstart, um die Plausibilität zu überprüfen.
description.es: El P0111 indica que el sensor de temperatura del aire de admisión funciona pero sus valores no corresponden a lo que la centralita espera. La temperatura medida cambia demasiado rápido, demasiado lento o no corresponde a las condiciones ambientales. Un sensor cuya característica ha derivado, un emplazamiento incorrecto tras un cambio de filtro de aire, o un sensor expuesto a aire caliente recirculado son causas posibles. La centralita compara la temperatura IAT con la temperatura ECT durante el arranque en frío para verificar la coherencia.
description.pt: O P0111 indica que o sensor de temperatura do ar de admissão funciona mas os seus valores não correspondem ao esperado pela centralina. A temperatura medida muda demasiado depressa, demasiado devagar ou não corresponde às condições ambientais. Um sensor cuja característica se alterou, um posicionamento incorreto após a troca do filtro de ar, ou um sensor exposto a ar quente recirculado são causas possíveis. A centralina compara a temperatura IAT com a temperatura ECT no arranque a frio para verificar a coerência.

name.es: Sensor de temperatura del líquido refrigerante — circuito
name.pt: Sensor de temperatura do líquido de arrefecimento — circuito

description.fr: Le P0115 est le code general du capteur ECT signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Le signal de temperature est absent ou completement hors plage. Le calculateur ne connait pas la temperature du moteur et utilise une valeur par defaut, generalement 80 degres. Cela signifie que les corrections de temperature a froid ne sont pas appliquees et que le ventilateur peut etre mal commande. Le capteur est un petit composant visse dans le bloc moteur ou le boitier de thermostat, generalement facile d'acces et peu couteux. Le probleme est souvent au connecteur plutot qu'au capteur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0115 relates to coolant temperature sensor — circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0115 ist der allgemeine Code des Kühlmitteltemperatursensors (ECT) und signalisiert eine Schaltkreisstörung. Das Temperatursignal fehlt oder liegt komplett außerhalb des Bereichs. Das Steuergerät kennt die Motortemperatur nicht und verwendet einen Standardwert, meist 80 Grad. Das bedeutet, dass die Kaltstartkorrekturen nicht angewendet werden und die Lüfter falsch gesteuert werden können. Der Sensor ist ein kleines Bauteil, das in den Motorblock oder das Thermostatgehäuse geschraubt ist, in der Regel leicht zugänglich und kostengünstig. Das Problem liegt oft am Stecker und nicht am Sensor selbst.
description.es: El P0115 es el código general del sensor de temperatura del líquido refrigerante (ECT) que indica un fallo de circuito. La señal de temperatura está ausente o completamente fuera de rango. La centralita no conoce la temperatura del motor y utiliza un valor por defecto, generalmente 80 grados. Esto significa que las correcciones de arranque en frío no se aplican y que el ventilador puede estar mal controlado. El sensor es un pequeño componente atornillado en el bloque motor o en la caja del termostato, generalmente de fácil acceso y poco costoso. El problema suele estar en el conector más que en el propio sensor.
description.pt: O P0115 é o código geral do sensor de temperatura do líquido de arrefecimento (ECT) indicando uma falha de circuito. O sinal de temperatura está ausente ou completamente fora de gama. A centralina não conhece a temperatura do motor e utiliza um valor por defeito, geralmente 80 graus. Isto significa que as correções de arranque a frio não são aplicadas e que o ventilador pode ser mal comandado. O sensor é um pequeno componente enroscado no bloco do motor ou na caixa do termostato, geralmente de fácil acesso e pouco dispendioso. O problema está frequentemente no conector e não no próprio sensor.

name.es: Corrección de combustible banco 1 — mal funcionamiento
name.pt: Correção de combustível banco 1 — mau funcionamento

description.fr: Le P0170 indique que les corrections carburant de la banque 1 sont en dehors de la plage acceptable. Ce code est plus general que P0171 ou P0172 car il couvre les deux directions — trop pauvre ou trop riche. Le calculateur n'arrive pas a maintenir les corrections dans les limites normales de plus ou moins 25%. Les causes sont les memes que pour les P0171/P0172 : prises d'air, debitmetre, injecteurs, pression de carburant ou sondes lambda. Ce code est utilise par certains constructeurs comme Toyota et Lexus a la place ou en complement des P0171/P0172.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0170 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel trim bank 1 — malfunction. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0170 zeigt an, dass die Kraftstoffkorrekturen der Bank 1 außerhalb des akzeptablen Bereichs liegen. Dieser Code ist allgemeiner als P0171 oder P0172, da er beide Richtungen abdeckt — zu mager oder zu fett. Das Steuergerät kann die Korrekturen nicht innerhalb der Normalgrenzen von plus minus 25 % halten. Die Ursachen sind die gleichen wie bei P0171/P0172: Falschluft, Luftmassenmesser, Einspritzventile, Kraftstoffdruck oder Lambdasonden. Dieser Code wird von einigen Herstellern wie Toyota und Lexus anstelle oder zusätzlich zu P0171/P0172 verwendet.
description.es: El P0170 indica que las correcciones de combustible del banco 1 están fuera del rango aceptable. Este código es más general que el P0171 o el P0172 porque cubre ambas direcciones — demasiado pobre o demasiado rico. La centralita no consigue mantener las correcciones dentro de los límites normales de más o menos 25 %. Las causas son las mismas que para el P0171/P0172: entradas de aire, caudalímetro, inyectores, presión de combustible o sondas lambda. Algunos fabricantes como Toyota y Lexus utilizan este código en lugar del o además del P0171/P0172.
description.pt: O P0170 indica que as correções de combustível do banco 1 estão fora da gama aceitável. Este código é mais geral do que o P0171 ou P0172, pois cobre ambas as direções — demasiado pobre ou demasiado rico. A centralina não consegue manter as correções dentro dos limites normais de mais ou menos 25 %. As causas são as mesmas que para o P0171/P0172: entradas de ar falso, caudalímetro, injectores, pressão de combustível ou sondas lambda. Este código é utilizado por alguns fabricantes como Toyota e Lexus em vez do ou em complemento ao P0171/P0172.

en.question: What does the P0170 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0170 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel trim bank 1 — malfunction. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0170 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0170 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0170 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0170 fault typically range from around £26 to £249, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is dirty air flow sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Corrección de combustible banco 2 — mal funcionamiento
name.pt: Correção de combustível banco 2 — mau funcionamento

description.fr: Le P0173 est l'equivalent du P0170 pour la banque 2 sur les moteurs en V. Les corrections carburant de la banque 2 sont hors limites. Si P0170 et P0173 sont presents ensemble, le probleme affecte les deux banques et pointe vers un composant commun. Si seul le P0173 apparait, le probleme est specifique a la banque 2. Les memes causes s'appliquent : debitmetre, prises d'air, injecteurs, pression carburant ou sonde lambda. Le diagnostic par comparaison des corrections entre banques est la cle pour localiser le probleme.
description.en: A P0173 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with fuel trim bank 2 — malfunction. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0173 ist das Gegenstück zum P0170 für Bank 2 bei V-Motoren. Die Kraftstoffkorrekturen der Bank 2 liegen außerhalb der Grenzen. Wenn P0170 und P0173 zusammen auftreten, betrifft das Problem beide Bänke und deutet auf ein gemeinsames Bauteil hin. Erscheint nur der P0173, ist das Problem bankspezifisch. Die gleichen Ursachen gelten: Luftmassenmesser, Falschluft, Einspritzventile, Kraftstoffdruck oder Lambdasonde. Der Vergleich der Korrekturen zwischen den Bänken ist der Schlüssel zur Fehlerlokalisierung.
description.es: El P0173 es el equivalente del P0170 para el banco 2 en los motores en V. Las correcciones de combustible del banco 2 están fuera de límites. Si P0170 y P0173 aparecen juntos, el problema afecta a ambos bancos y apunta a un componente común. Si solo aparece el P0173, el problema es específico del banco 2. Las mismas causas aplican: caudalímetro, entradas de aire, inyectores, presión de combustible o sonda lambda. La comparación de las correcciones entre bancos es la clave para localizar el problema.
description.pt: O P0173 é o equivalente do P0170 para o banco 2 nos motores em V. As correções de combustível do banco 2 estão fora dos limites. Se o P0170 e o P0173 aparecem juntos, o problema afeta ambos os bancos e aponta para um componente comum. Se apenas o P0173 aparece, o problema é específico do banco 2. As mesmas causas aplicam-se: caudalímetro, entradas de ar falso, injectores, pressão de combustível ou sonda lambda. A comparação das correções entre bancos é a chave para localizar o problema.

name.pt: Componente comum a ambos os bancos

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0205 concerne le circuit electrique de l'injecteur du cylindre 5, present sur les moteurs 5 cylindres et plus. Le diagnostic et les causes sont identiques aux P0201-P0204 mais localises sur le cinquieme cylindre. Sur les moteurs en V, l'injecteur du cylindre 5 fait partie de la banque 2 et son cablage peut avoir un cheminement different de ceux de la banque 1. Verifiez la resistance de l'injecteur, l'etat du connecteur et du faisceau. La permutation avec un injecteur d'un autre cylindre permet de confirmer si c'est l'injecteur ou le cablage.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0205 relates to fuel injector cylinder 5 — circuit fault, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0205 betrifft den elektrischen Schaltkreis des Einspritzventils von Zylinder 5, der bei Motoren mit 5 Zylindern oder mehr vorhanden ist. Die Diagnose und Ursachen sind identisch mit P0201-P0204, aber auf den fünften Zylinder lokalisiert. Bei V-Motoren gehört das Einspritzventil von Zylinder 5 zur Bank 2 und seine Verkabelung kann einen anderen Verlauf haben als die der Bank 1. Prüfen Sie den Widerstand des Einspritzventils, den Zustand des Steckers und des Kabelbaums. Ein Tausch mit einem Einspritzventil eines anderen Zylinders bestätigt, ob es am Ventil oder an der Verkabelung liegt.
description.es: El P0205 se refiere al circuito eléctrico del inyector del cilindro 5, presente en motores de 5 cilindros o más. El diagnóstico y las causas son idénticos a los P0201-P0204 pero localizados en el quinto cilindro. En los motores en V, el inyector del cilindro 5 pertenece al banco 2 y su cableado puede tener un recorrido diferente al del banco 1. Compruebe la resistencia del inyector, el estado del conector y del mazo de cables. La permutación con un inyector de otro cilindro permite confirmar si el problema es el inyector o el cableado.
description.pt: O P0205 refere-se ao circuito elétrico do injector do cilindro 5, presente em motores de 5 cilindros ou mais. O diagnóstico e as causas são idênticos aos P0201-P0204 mas localizados no quinto cilindro. Nos motores em V, o injector do cilindro 5 pertence ao banco 2 e a sua cablagem pode ter um percurso diferente da do banco 1. Verifique a resistência do injector, o estado do conector e da cablagem. A permuta com um injector de outro cilindro permite confirmar se o problema é o injector ou a cablagem.

description.fr: Le P0206 signale un defaut electrique sur l'injecteur du cylindre 6. Ce code n'apparait que sur les moteurs 6 cylindres et plus. L'injecteur du cylindre 6 est generalement le dernier de la rampe d'injection et peut avoir un cablage plus long, plus expose aux dommages mecaniques et thermiques. Sur les 6 cylindres en ligne, cet injecteur est le plus proche du volant moteur. Sur les V6, il est generalement le troisieme de la banque 2. Mesurez la resistance de l'injecteur et verifiez l'etat complet du faisceau d'injection cote banque 2.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0206 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel injector cylinder 6 — circuit fault. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0206 signalisiert einen elektrischen Fehler am Einspritzventil von Zylinder 6. Dieser Code tritt nur bei Motoren mit 6 Zylindern oder mehr auf. Das Einspritzventil von Zylinder 6 ist in der Regel das letzte an der Kraftstoffleiste und kann längere, hitze- und mechanikempfindlichere Verkabelung haben. Bei Reihensechszylindern liegt dieses Ventil am nächsten zum Schwungrad. Bei V6-Motoren ist es in der Regel das dritte der Bank 2. Messen Sie den Widerstand des Einspritzventils und prüfen Sie den gesamten Einspritz-Kabelbaum auf der Bank-2-Seite.
description.es: El P0206 indica un fallo eléctrico en el inyector del cilindro 6. Este código solo aparece en motores de 6 cilindros o más. El inyector del cilindro 6 suele ser el último de la rampa de inyección y puede tener un cableado más largo, más expuesto a daños mecánicos y térmicos. En los 6 cilindros en línea, este inyector es el más cercano al volante motor. En los V6, suele ser el tercero del banco 2. Mida la resistencia del inyector y compruebe el estado completo del mazo de inyección del lado del banco 2.
description.pt: O P0206 indica um defeito elétrico no injector do cilindro 6. Este código só aparece em motores de 6 cilindros ou mais. O injector do cilindro 6 é geralmente o último da rampa de injeção e pode ter uma cablagem mais longa, mais exposta a danos mecânicos e térmicos. Nos 6 cilindros em linha, este injector é o mais próximo do volante do motor. Nos V6, é geralmente o terceiro do banco 2. Meça a resistência do injector e verifique o estado completo da cablagem de injeção do lado do banco 2.

name.es: Mazo de cables de inyección banco 2

name.en: Injection pump metering unit A — range/performance
name.es: Dosificador de la bomba de inyección A — rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Unidade de dosagem da bomba de injeção A — gama/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0251 concerne le doseur de carburant de la pompe d'injection, principalement sur les moteurs diesel a pompe distributrice. Le doseur controle la quantite de carburant envoye aux injecteurs. Si ses performances sont degradees, le dosage est imprecis : trop ou pas assez de carburant. Le moteur peut avoir des a-coups, des variations de regime et des fumees. Sur les pompes Bosch VP44 et Lucas/Delphi, le doseur est un composant electromagnetique integre a la pompe. Sa defaillance peut necessiter la renovation complete de la pompe d'injection, une operation specialisee.
description.en: A P0251 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with injection pump metering unit a — range/performance. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0251 betrifft die Kraftstoffdosiereinheit der Einspritzpumpe, hauptsächlich bei Dieselmotoren mit Verteilereinspritzpumpe. Die Dosiereinheit steuert die Kraftstoffmenge, die an die Einspritzventile geliefert wird. Bei nachlassender Leistung wird die Dosierung ungenau: zu viel oder zu wenig Kraftstoff. Der Motor kann ruckeln, Drehzahlschwankungen und Rauchentwicklung zeigen. Bei Bosch VP44- und Lucas/Delphi-Pumpen ist die Dosiereinheit ein elektromagnetisches Bauteil in der Pumpe. Ein Ausfall kann eine komplette Überholung der Einspritzpumpe erfordern — eine Spezialarbeit.
description.es: El P0251 se refiere al dosificador de combustible de la bomba de inyección, principalmente en motores diésel con bomba distribuidora. El dosificador controla la cantidad de combustible enviada a los inyectores. Si su rendimiento se degrada, la dosificación es imprecisa: demasiado o insuficiente combustible. El motor puede dar tirones, variaciones de régimen y humo. En las bombas Bosch VP44 y Lucas/Delphi, el dosificador es un componente electromagnético integrado en la bomba. Su avería puede requerir la renovación completa de la bomba de inyección, una operación especializada.
description.pt: O P0251 refere-se à unidade de dosagem de combustível da bomba de injeção, principalmente em motores diesel com bomba distribuidora. A unidade de dosagem controla a quantidade de combustível enviada aos injectores. Se o seu desempenho se degradar, a dosagem é imprecisa: combustível a mais ou a menos. O motor pode dar solavancos, variações de regime e fumos. Nas bombas Bosch VP44 e Lucas/Delphi, a unidade de dosagem é um componente eletromagnético integrado na bomba. A sua avaria pode exigir a renovação completa da bomba de injeção, uma operação especializada.

name.es: Dosificador de la bomba de inyección
name.pt: Unidade de dosagem da bomba de injeção

name.es: Renovación de la bomba de inyección

en.question: What does the P0251 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0251 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with injection pump metering unit a — range/performance. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0251 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0251 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0251 fault typically range from around £26 to £1018, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is injection pump metering unit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0326 indique que le capteur de cliquetis banque 1 fonctionne mais ses performances sont degradees. Le signal est present mais trop faible ou parasite pour etre fiable. Un capteur mal serre est souvent en cause : le couple de serrage du capteur piezoelectrique sur le bloc est critique. Trop serre, il est ecrase et ne vibre plus. Pas assez serre, il ne capte pas correctement les vibrations du bloc. Un support moteur use qui transmet des vibrations parasites peut aussi perturber le signal. Le calculateur retarde l'avance par precaution.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0326 relates to knock sensor bank 1 — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0326 zeigt an, dass der Klopfsensor der Bank 1 funktioniert, aber seine Leistung eingeschränkt ist. Das Signal ist vorhanden, aber zu schwach oder gestört, um zuverlässig zu sein. Häufig ist ein falsch angezogener Sensor die Ursache: Das Anzugsmoment des piezoelektrischen Sensors am Block ist entscheidend. Zu fest angezogen wird er gequetscht und schwingt nicht mehr. Nicht fest genug erfasst er die Blockschwingungen nicht richtig. Ein verschlissenes Motorlager, das Störschwingungen überträgt, kann das Signal ebenfalls beeinträchtigen. Das Steuergerät nimmt vorsorglich die Zündung zurück.
description.es: El P0326 indica que el sensor de detonación del banco 1 funciona pero su rendimiento está degradado. La señal está presente pero es demasiado débil o parasitada para ser fiable. Un sensor mal apretado suele ser la causa: el par de apriete del sensor piezoeléctrico sobre el bloque es crítico. Demasiado apretado, queda aplastado y deja de vibrar. Insuficientemente apretado, no capta correctamente las vibraciones del bloque. Un soporte de motor desgastado que transmite vibraciones parásitas también puede perturbar la señal. La centralita retrasa el avance como precaución.
description.pt: O P0326 indica que o sensor de detonação do banco 1 funciona mas o seu desempenho está degradado. O sinal está presente mas é demasiado fraco ou parasitado para ser fiável. Um sensor mal apertado é frequentemente a causa: o binário de aperto do sensor piezoelétrico no bloco é crítico. Demasiado apertado, fica esmagado e deixa de vibrar. Insuficientemente apertado, não capta corretamente as vibrações do bloco. Um apoio de motor desgastado que transmite vibrações parasitas também pode perturbar o sinal. A centralina atrasa o avanço como precaução.

name.es: Soporte de motor desgastado transmitiendo vibraciones
name.pt: Apoio de motor desgastado a transmitir vibrações

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0337 indique que le signal du capteur de vilebrequin est trop faible. Le capteur est un generateur magnetique dont le signal depend de la distance avec la roue dentee et de la qualite du capteur. Un entrefer trop grand (capteur repousse, usure mecanique) ou un capteur dont l'aimant s'affaiblit sont les causes principales. Le signal faible provoque des lectures erratiques de la vitesse du vilebrequin, ce qui affecte le timing d'injection et d'allumage. Le moteur peut hesiter, avoir des a-coups ou des difficultes de demarrage.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0337 code, it is telling you there is a problem with crankshaft position sensor — low voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0337 zeigt an, dass das Signal des Kurbelwellensensors zu schwach ist. Der Sensor ist ein magnetischer Generator, dessen Signal von der Entfernung zum Zahnrad und der Qualität des Sensors abhängt. Ein zu großer Luftspalt (Sensor zurückgeschoben, mechanischer Verschleiß) oder ein Sensor mit schwächer werdendem Magneten sind die Hauptursachen. Das schwache Signal verursacht fehlerhafte Drehzahlmessungen der Kurbelwelle, was den Einspritz- und Zündzeitpunkt beeinflusst. Der Motor kann ruckeln, Stottern oder Startschwierigkeiten zeigen.
description.es: El P0337 indica que la señal del sensor del cigüeñal es demasiado débil. El sensor es un generador magnético cuya señal depende de la distancia con la rueda dentada y de la calidad del sensor. Un entrehierro demasiado grande (sensor desplazado, desgaste mecánico) o un sensor cuyo imán se debilita son las causas principales. La señal débil provoca lecturas erráticas de la velocidad del cigüeñal, lo que afecta al timing de inyección y encendido. El motor puede titubear, dar tirones o tener dificultades de arranque.
description.pt: O P0337 indica que o sinal do sensor da cambota é demasiado fraco. O sensor é um gerador magnético cujo sinal depende da distância à roda dentada e da qualidade do sensor. Um entreferro demasiado grande (sensor recuado, desgaste mecânico) ou um sensor cujo íman se enfraquece são as causas principais. O sinal fraco provoca leituras erráticas da velocidade da cambota, o que afeta o timing de injeção e de ignição. O motor pode hesitar, dar solavancos ou ter dificuldades de arranque.

name.es: Señal débil del sensor del cigüeñal
name.pt: Sinal fraco do sensor da cambota

description.fr: Le P0338 signale une tension anormalement haute sur le capteur de vilebrequin, soit un circuit ouvert. Le fil de signal est coupe entre le capteur et le calculateur. Sans signal de vilebrequin, le moteur ne peut generalement pas demarrer ou s'arrete instantanement. Certains vehicules peuvent fonctionner avec le seul capteur d'arbre a cames en mode degrade. Inspectez visuellement le cablage du capteur qui chemine pres des pieces rotatives du moteur et peut etre coupe par frottement. Un rongeur peut aussi avoir grignote l'isolant du fil.
description.en: A P0338 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with crankshaft position sensor — high voltage. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0338 signalisiert eine ungewöhnlich hohe Spannung am Kurbelwellensensor, also eine Unterbrechung. Die Signalleitung ist zwischen Sensor und Steuergerät unterbrochen. Ohne Kurbelwellensignal kann der Motor in der Regel nicht starten oder geht sofort aus. Manche Fahrzeuge können im Notlauf nur mit dem Nockenwellensensor weiterlaufen. Prüfen Sie die Verkabelung visuell, die in der Nähe rotierender Motorteile verläuft und durch Reibung beschädigt sein kann. Auch Nagetiere können die Kabelisolierung angenagt haben.
description.es: El P0338 indica una tensión anormalmente alta en el sensor del cigüeñal, es decir, un circuito abierto. El cable de señal está cortado entre el sensor y la centralita. Sin señal de cigüeñal, el motor generalmente no puede arrancar o se para instantáneamente. Algunos vehículos pueden funcionar en modo degradado solo con el sensor del árbol de levas. Inspeccione visualmente el cableado del sensor que pasa cerca de las piezas rotativas del motor y puede haberse cortado por rozamiento. Un roedor también puede haber roído el aislante del cable.
description.pt: O P0338 indica uma tensão anormalmente alta no sensor da cambota, ou seja, um circuito aberto. O fio de sinal está cortado entre o sensor e a centralina. Sem sinal da cambota, o motor geralmente não consegue arrancar ou para instantaneamente. Alguns veículos podem funcionar em modo degradado apenas com o sensor da árvore de cames. Inspecione visualmente a cablagem do sensor que passa perto das peças rotativas do motor e pode ter sido cortada por fricção. Um roedor também pode ter roído o isolamento do fio.

fr.question: Ce code est-il grave ?
fr.answer: La gravite depend du contexte vehicule. Consultez les causes possibles et faites diagnostiquer par un professionnel pour une evaluation precise.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation ?

en.question: What does the P0338 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0338 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with crankshaft position sensor — high voltage. This is a critical-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0338 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0338 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0338 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0338 fault typically range from around £4 to £123, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is cut sensor wire, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Capteur position EGR A tension haute
name.en: EGR position sensor A — high voltage
name.es: Sensor de posición EGR A — tensión alta
name.pt: Sensor de posição EGR A — tensão alta

description.fr: Le P0406 signale une tension elevee sur le capteur de position de la vanne EGR, indiquant que la vanne semble ouverte en permanence. Si c'est un faux signal (capteur ou cablage en circuit ouvert), le calculateur desactive l'EGR par securite. Si la vanne est reellement bloquee ouverte, le moteur etouffe au ralenti car les gaz d'echappement remplacent l'air frais. Differencier les deux cas necessite une inspection visuelle de la vanne et un test electrique du capteur. Les vannes EGR se bloquent ouvertes quand la calamine s'accumule au point d'empecher la fermeture.
description.en: The P0406 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with egr position sensor a — high voltage. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0406 meldet eine erhöhte Spannung am Positionssensor des AGR-Ventils, was darauf hinweist, dass das Ventil dauerhaft geöffnet zu sein scheint. Wenn es sich um ein falsches Signal handelt (Sensor oder Verkabelung mit offenem Schaltkreis), deaktiviert das Steuergerät die AGR aus Sicherheitsgründen. Wenn das Ventil wirklich offen blockiert ist, erstickt der Motor im Leerlauf, weil die Abgase die Frischluft ersetzen. Um die beiden Fälle zu unterscheiden, ist eine Sichtprüfung des Ventils und ein elektrischer Test des Sensors erforderlich. AGR-Ventile blockieren offen, wenn sich die Ölkohle so weit ansammelt, dass das Schließen verhindert wird.
description.es: El P0406 señala una tensión elevada en el sensor de posición de la válvula EGR, indicando que la válvula parece abierta permanentemente. Si es una señal falsa (sensor o cableado en circuito abierto), la ECU desactiva la EGR por seguridad. Si la válvula está realmente bloqueada abierta, el motor se ahoga al ralentí porque los gases de escape reemplazan al aire fresco. Diferenciar los dos casos requiere una inspección visual de la válvula y una prueba eléctrica del sensor. Las válvulas EGR se bloquean abiertas cuando la carbonilla se acumula hasta impedir el cierre.
description.pt: O P0406 assinala uma tensão elevada no sensor de posição da válvula EGR, indicando que a válvula parece aberta permanentemente. Se for um sinal falso (sensor ou cablagem em circuito aberto), a ECU desativa a EGR por segurança. Se a válvula estiver realmente bloqueada aberta, o motor sufoca ao ralenti porque os gases de escape substituem o ar fresco. Diferenciar os dois casos requer uma inspeção visual da válvula e um teste elétrico do sensor. As válvulas EGR bloqueiam abertas quando a carbonilha se acumula ao ponto de impedir o fecho.

name.fr: Capteur position EGR B tension basse
name.en: EGR position sensor B — low voltage
name.es: Sensor de posición EGR B — tensión baja
name.pt: Sensor de posição EGR B — tensão baixa

description.fr: Le P0407 concerne le capteur secondaire de position EGR (si present) avec une tension basse. Certaines vannes EGR ont deux capteurs de position pour la redondance. Une tension basse signifie un court-circuit dans le circuit du second capteur. Le diagnostic et les causes sont similaires au P0405. Si le vehicule n'a qu'un seul capteur EGR, ce code peut indiquer un defaut interne du module EGR integre. Le remplacement de la vanne EGR complete resout generalement le probleme. Avant de remplacer la piece, verifiez bien le faisceau electrique et les connecteurs pour exclure une cause plus simple et moins couteuse.
description.en: When your car shows a P0407 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to egr position sensor b — low voltage. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0407 betrifft den sekundären AGR-Positionssensor (falls vorhanden) mit einer niedrigen Spannung. Einige AGR-Ventile haben zwei Positionssensoren zur Redundanz. Eine niedrige Spannung bedeutet einen Kurzschluss im Schaltkreis des zweiten Sensors. Die Diagnose und die Ursachen sind ähnlich denen des P0405. Wenn das Fahrzeug nur einen einzigen AGR-Sensor hat, kann dieser Code einen internen Fehler des integrierten AGR-Moduls anzeigen. Der Austausch des kompletten AGR-Ventils löst in der Regel das Problem. Bevor das Teil ersetzt wird, sollten Sie Kabelbaum und Stecker gut überprüfen, um eine einfachere und kostengünstigere Ursache auszuschließen.
description.es: El P0407 concierne al sensor secundario de posición EGR (si está presente) con una tensión baja. Algunas válvulas EGR tienen dos sensores de posición para la redundancia. Una tensión baja significa un cortocircuito en el circuito del segundo sensor. El diagnóstico y las causas son similares al P0405. Si el vehículo solo tiene un sensor EGR, este código puede indicar un fallo interno del módulo EGR integrado. El reemplazo de la válvula EGR completa generalmente resuelve el problema. Antes de reemplazar la pieza, verifica bien el mazo eléctrico y los conectores para excluir una causa más simple y menos costosa.
description.pt: O P0407 diz respeito ao sensor secundário de posição EGR (se presente) com uma tensão baixa. Algumas válvulas EGR têm dois sensores de posição para a redundância. Uma tensão baixa significa um curto-circuito no circuito do segundo sensor. O diagnóstico e as causas são semelhantes ao P0405. Se o veículo só tiver um sensor EGR, este código pode indicar um defeito interno do módulo EGR integrado. A substituição da válvula EGR completa geralmente resolve o problema. Antes de substituir a peça, verifique bem a cablagem elétrica e os conectores para excluir uma causa mais simples e menos cara.
