name.es: Válvula de purga EVAP — circuito abierto
name.pt: Válvula de purga EVAP — circuito aberto

description.fr: Le P0444 indique que le circuit de la vanne de purge EVAP est en circuit ouvert. La bobine de l'electrovanne ne recoit plus de courant car le fil est coupe, le connecteur est debranche ou la bobine elle-meme est grillee. La vanne reste fermee en permanence et les vapeurs du canister ne sont jamais purgees vers le moteur. A terme, le canister peut saturer et les vapeurs d'essence s'echappent dans l'atmosphere. Ce code n'affecte pas la conduite mais pose un probleme environnemental et de controle technique.
description.en: A P0444 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with evap purge valve — open circuit. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0444 zeigt an, dass der Schaltkreis des EVAP-Spülventils offen ist. Die Spule des Magnetventils erhält keinen Strom mehr, weil der Draht unterbrochen ist, der Stecker getrennt ist oder die Spule selbst durchgebrannt ist. Das Ventil bleibt dauerhaft geschlossen und die Dämpfe des Aktivkohlebehälters werden nie zum Motor gespült. Mit der Zeit kann der Aktivkohlebehälter sättigen und die Benzindämpfe entweichen in die Atmosphäre. Dieser Code beeinträchtigt das Fahren nicht, stellt aber ein Umwelt- und TÜV-Problem dar.
description.es: El P0444 indica que el circuito de la válvula de purga EVAP está en circuito abierto. La bobina de la electroválvula ya no recibe corriente porque el hilo está cortado, el conector está desconectado o la propia bobina se ha quemado. La válvula permanece cerrada permanentemente y los vapores del cánister nunca se purgan hacia el motor. A la larga, el cánister puede saturarse y los vapores de gasolina escapan a la atmósfera. Este código no afecta a la conducción pero plantea un problema medioambiental y de ITV.
description.pt: O P0444 indica que o circuito da válvula de purga EVAP está em circuito aberto. A bobina da eletroválvula já não recebe corrente porque o fio está cortado, o conector está desligado ou a própria bobina se queimou. A válvula permanece fechada permanentemente e os vapores do cânister nunca são purgados para o motor. A prazo, o cânister pode saturar e os vapores de gasolina escapam para a atmosfera. Este código não afeta a condução mas coloca um problema ambiental e de IPO.

es: Saturación del cánister a la larga

description.fr: Le P0445 signale un court-circuit sur le circuit de la vanne de purge EVAP. Le courant consomme est anormalement eleve, ce qui peut griller le driver dans le calculateur. Le calculateur desactive la commande de la vanne par securite. Un fil pince qui touche la masse, un connecteur infiltre par l'eau ou une vanne dont la bobine est en court-circuit interne sont les causes. Ce code est plus urgent que le P0444 car un court-circuit peut endommager le calculateur. Debranchez le connecteur de la vanne et effacez le code. S'il revient, le probleme est dans le cablage.
description.en: The P0445 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with evap purge valve — short circuit. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.
description.de: Der P0445 meldet einen Kurzschluss am Schaltkreis des EVAP-Spülventils. Der verbrauchte Strom ist abnormal hoch, was den Treiber im Steuergerät durchbrennen kann. Das Steuergerät deaktiviert die Ventilansteuerung aus Sicherheitsgründen. Ein eingeklemmter Draht, der die Masse berührt, ein durch Wasser infiltrierter Stecker oder ein Ventil mit intern kurzgeschlossener Spule sind die Ursachen. Dieser Code ist dringender als der P0444, weil ein Kurzschluss das Steuergerät beschädigen kann. Trennen Sie den Stecker des Ventils und löschen Sie den Code. Wenn er zurückkommt, liegt das Problem in der Verkabelung.
description.es: El P0445 señala un cortocircuito en el circuito de la válvula de purga EVAP. La corriente consumida es anormalmente elevada, lo que puede quemar el driver en la ECU. La ECU desactiva el mando de la válvula por seguridad. Un hilo pinzado que toca la masa, un conector infiltrado por el agua o una válvula cuya bobina está en cortocircuito interno son las causas. Este código es más urgente que el P0444 porque un cortocircuito puede dañar la ECU. Desconecta el conector de la válvula y borra el código. Si vuelve, el problema está en el cableado.
description.pt: O P0445 assinala um curto-circuito no circuito da válvula de purga EVAP. A corrente consumida é anormalmente elevada, o que pode queimar o driver na ECU. A ECU desativa o comando da válvula por segurança. Um fio entalado que toca a massa, um conector infiltrado por água ou uma válvula cuja bobina está em curto-circuito interno são as causas. Este código é mais urgente que o P0444 porque um curto-circuito pode danificar a ECU. Desligue o conector da válvula e apague o código. Se voltar, o problema está na cablagem.

en.question: What does the P0445 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0445 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with evap purge valve — short circuit. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0445 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0445 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0445 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0445 fault typically range from around £8 to £130, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is short-circuited purge valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.es: Válvula de ventilación EVAP — circuito abierto
name.pt: Válvula de ventilação EVAP — circuito aberto

description.fr: Le P0447 signale un circuit ouvert sur la vanne de ventilation du systeme EVAP. Cette vanne controle l'entree d'air dans le canister pour les cycles de test et de purge. En circuit ouvert, la vanne reste dans sa position de repos (generalement ouverte) et le calculateur ne peut plus fermer le systeme pour les tests d'etancheite. Les tests EVAP echouent systematiquement. Ce code est souvent accompagne de P0440 ou P0442. La vanne de ventilation est generalement sur le canister lui-meme, sous le vehicule. L'exposition aux intemperies favorise la corrosion du connecteur.
description.en: When your car shows a P0447 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to evap vent valve — open circuit. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.
description.de: Der P0447 meldet einen offenen Schaltkreis am Entlüftungsventil des EVAP-Systems. Dieses Ventil steuert den Lufteintritt in den Aktivkohlebehälter für die Test- und Spülzyklen. Bei offenem Schaltkreis bleibt das Ventil in seiner Ruheposition (im Allgemeinen geöffnet) und das Steuergerät kann das System nicht mehr für die Dichtheitstests schließen. Die EVAP-Tests schlagen systematisch fehl. Dieser Code wird oft von P0440 oder P0442 begleitet. Das Entlüftungsventil befindet sich im Allgemeinen auf dem Aktivkohlebehälter selbst unter dem Fahrzeug. Witterungseinflüsse begünstigen die Korrosion des Steckers.
description.es: El P0447 señala un circuito abierto en la válvula de ventilación del sistema EVAP. Esta válvula controla la entrada de aire al cánister para los ciclos de test y purga. En circuito abierto, la válvula permanece en su posición de reposo (generalmente abierta) y la ECU ya no puede cerrar el sistema para las pruebas de estanqueidad. Los tests EVAP fallan sistemáticamente. Este código a menudo va acompañado de P0440 o P0442. La válvula de ventilación generalmente está en el propio cánister, bajo el vehículo. La exposición a la intemperie favorece la corrosión del conector.
description.pt: O P0447 assinala um circuito aberto na válvula de ventilação do sistema EVAP. Esta válvula controla a entrada de ar no cânister para os ciclos de teste e purga. Em circuito aberto, a válvula permanece na sua posição de repouso (geralmente aberta) e a ECU já não pode fechar o sistema para os testes de estanqueidade. Os testes EVAP falham sistematicamente. Este código é muitas vezes acompanhado de P0440 ou P0442. A válvula de ventilação geralmente está no próprio cânister, debaixo do veículo. A exposição às intempéries favorece a corrosão do conector.

description.fr: Le P0448 indique un court-circuit sur le circuit de la vanne de ventilation EVAP. La vanne reste activee en permanence (fermee) ou le calculateur detecte un courant excessif. Si la vanne est fermee en permanence, le canister ne peut plus respirer, ce qui cree une depression dans le reservoir de carburant. Cela peut rendre le plein d'essence difficile car le pistolet se coupe continuellement. Un bruit de succion quand vous ouvrez le bouchon de reservoir confirme une depression anormale. Debranchez le connecteur pour liberer la depression temporairement.
description.en: A P0448 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with evap vent valve — short circuit. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.
description.de: Der P0448 zeigt einen Kurzschluss am Schaltkreis des EVAP-Entlüftungsventils an. Das Ventil bleibt dauerhaft aktiviert (geschlossen) oder das Steuergerät erkennt einen übermäßigen Strom. Wenn das Ventil dauerhaft geschlossen ist, kann der Aktivkohlebehälter nicht mehr atmen, was im Kraftstofftank einen Unterdruck erzeugt. Das kann das Tanken erschweren, weil die Zapfpistole sich ständig abschaltet. Ein Sauggeräusch beim Öffnen des Tankdeckels bestätigt einen abnormalen Unterdruck. Trennen Sie den Stecker, um den Unterdruck vorübergehend abzulassen.
description.es: El P0448 indica un cortocircuito en el circuito de la válvula de ventilación EVAP. La válvula permanece activada permanentemente (cerrada) o la ECU detecta una corriente excesiva. Si la válvula está cerrada permanentemente, el cánister ya no puede respirar, lo que crea una depresión en el depósito de combustible. Esto puede hacer difícil el llenado de gasolina porque la pistola se corta continuamente. Un ruido de succión cuando abres el tapón del depósito confirma una depresión anormal. Desconecta el conector para liberar la depresión temporalmente.
description.pt: O P0448 indica um curto-circuito no circuito da válvula de ventilação EVAP. A válvula permanece ativada permanentemente (fechada) ou a ECU deteta uma corrente excessiva. Se a válvula estiver fechada permanentemente, o cânister já não pode respirar, o que cria uma depressão no depósito de combustível. Isto pode tornar difícil o abastecimento de combustível porque a pistola corta continuamente. Um ruído de sucção quando abre a tampa do depósito confirma uma depressão anormal. Desligue o conector para libertar a depressão temporariamente.

name.es: Sensor de nivel de combustible — voltaje bajo
name.pt: Sensor de nivel de combustivel — voltagem baixa

description.fr: Le P0462 signale que la tension du capteur de niveau de carburant est trop basse, indiquant un reservoir plein en permanence. Meme apres avoir consomme du carburant, la jauge reste au maximum. Un court-circuit dans le cablage du capteur ou un flotteur bloque en position haute sont les causes typiques. Le temoin de reserve ne s'allumera pas, ce qui peut vous laisser tomber en panne seche sans avertissement. En attendant la reparation, notez votre kilometrage a chaque plein pour estimer votre consommation et anticiper les ravitaillements.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0462 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with fuel level sensor — low voltage. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0462 signalisiert, dass die Spannung des Kraftstoffstandgebers zu niedrig ist und damit einen dauerhaft vollen Tank anzeigt. Selbst nach Kraftstoffverbrauch bleibt die Tankanzeige auf Maximum. Ein Kurzschluss im Kabel des Sensors oder ein in oberer Position blockierter Schwimmer sind die typischen Ursachen. Die Reservewarnung wird nicht aufleuchten, was dazu fuehren kann, dass Sie ohne Vorwarnung liegenbleiben. In der Zwischenzeit notieren Sie Ihren Kilometerstand bei jeder Tankfuellung, um Ihren Verbrauch zu schaetzen und das Tanken vorausschauend zu planen.
description.es: El P0462 senala que el voltaje del sensor de nivel de combustible es demasiado bajo, indicando un deposito lleno permanentemente. Incluso despues de consumir combustible, el indicador permanece al maximo. Un cortocircuito en el cableado del sensor o un flotador bloqueado en posicion alta son las causas tipicas. El testigo de reserva no se encendera, lo que puede dejarle sin combustible sin aviso. Mientras tanto, anote su kilometraje en cada repostaje para estimar su consumo y anticipar los repostajes.
description.pt: O P0462 sinaliza que a voltagem do sensor de nivel de combustivel esta demasiado baixa, indicando um deposito cheio permanentemente. Mesmo apos consumir combustivel, o indicador permanece no maximo. Um curto-circuito na cablagem do sensor ou um flutuador bloqueado na posicao alta sao as causas tipicas. O aviso de reserva nao se acendera, o que pode deixa-lo sem combustivel sem aviso. Entretanto, anote a sua quilometragem a cada abastecimento para estimar o seu consumo e antecipar os abastecimentos.

name.es: Sensor de nivel de combustible — voltaje alto
name.pt: Sensor de nivel de combustivel — voltagem alta

description.fr: Le P0463 indique une tension haute du capteur de niveau de carburant, correspondant a un reservoir affiche comme vide en permanence. Le temoin de reserve est allume en continu meme reservoir plein. Un circuit ouvert dans le cablage, un connecteur debranche ou un flotteur bloque en bas sont les causes. Ce defaut est genant car le temoin de reserve permanent masque la vraie situation du reservoir. Certains vehicules limitent aussi la puissance ou passent en mode degrade quand le niveau indique est tres bas.
description.en: The P0463 code indicates an electrical system fault related to fuel level sensor — high voltage. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0463 zeigt eine hohe Spannung des Kraftstoffstandgebers an, was einem dauerhaft leeren Tank entspricht. Die Reservewarnung leuchtet staendig, auch bei vollem Tank. Ein offener Schaltkreis in der Verkabelung, ein getrennter Stecker oder ein unten blockierter Schwimmer sind die Ursachen. Dieser Defekt ist laestig, da die permanente Reservewarnung die tatsaechliche Tanksituation verbirgt. Einige Fahrzeuge begrenzen auch die Leistung oder gehen in den Notlaufmodus, wenn der angezeigte Fuellstand sehr niedrig ist.
description.es: El P0463 indica un voltaje alto del sensor de nivel de combustible, correspondiente a un deposito mostrado como vacio permanentemente. El testigo de reserva esta encendido continuamente incluso con el deposito lleno. Un circuito abierto en el cableado, un conector desconectado o un flotador bloqueado abajo son las causas. Este fallo es molesto ya que el testigo de reserva permanente enmascara la situacion real del deposito. Algunos vehiculos tambien limitan la potencia o pasan a modo de emergencia cuando el nivel indicado es muy bajo.
description.pt: O P0463 indica uma voltagem alta do sensor de nivel de combustivel, correspondendo a um deposito mostrado como vazio permanentemente. O aviso de reserva esta aceso continuamente mesmo com o deposito cheio. Um circuito aberto na cablagem, um conector desconectado ou um flutuador bloqueado em baixo sao as causas. Este defeito e incomodo pois o aviso de reserva permanente mascara a situacao real do deposito. Alguns veiculos tambem limitam a potencia ou passam a modo de emergencia quando o nivel indicado e muito baixo.

name.es: Circuito abierto del sensor de nivel de combustible
name.pt: Circuito aberto do sensor de nivel de combustivel

en.question: What does the P0463 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0463 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel level sensor — high voltage. This is a low-severity electrical fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0463 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0463 fail my MOT?
en.answer: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

en.question: How much does P0463 repair cost in the UK?

The most common fix is fuel level sensor open circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: An illuminated engine management light is not an automatic MOT failure. However, if the electrical fault affects lighting, emissions, or other testable systems, it could contribute to a fail.

name.es: Sensor de velocidad del vehículo — tensión baja
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade do veículo — tensão baixa

description.fr: Le P0502 indique une tension basse sur le capteur de vitesse du vehicule. Le signal est en court-circuit, empechant le calculateur de connaitre la vitesse reelle. Le compteur de vitesse reste a zero et les systemes qui dependent de la vitesse (ABS, BVA, regulateur) sont perturbes. Sur les vehicules avec compteur mecanique converti en electronique, le capteur est monte sur la boite de vitesses et peut etre endommage par une fuite d'huile de boite. Verifiez le connecteur, le cablage et la resistance du capteur.
description.en: A P0502 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with vehicle speed sensor — low voltage. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0502 zeigt eine niedrige Spannung am Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeitssensor an. Das Signal hat einen Kurzschluss, wodurch das Steuergerät die tatsächliche Geschwindigkeit nicht kennt. Der Tacho bleibt auf Null und geschwindigkeitsabhängige Systeme (ABS, Automatikgetriebe, Tempomat) werden gestört. Bei Fahrzeugen mit umgerüstetem mechanischem Tacho sitzt der Sensor am Getriebe und kann durch Getriebeölleck beschädigt sein. Prüfen Sie Stecker, Verkabelung und Widerstand des Sensors.
description.es: El P0502 indica una tensión baja en el sensor de velocidad del vehículo. La señal está en cortocircuito, impidiendo que la centralita conozca la velocidad real. El velocímetro se queda en cero y los sistemas que dependen de la velocidad (ABS, cambio automático, control de velocidad) se ven perturbados. En los vehículos con velocímetro mecánico convertido a electrónico, el sensor está montado en la caja de cambios y puede dañarse por una fuga de aceite. Compruebe el conector, el cableado y la resistencia del sensor.
description.pt: O P0502 indica uma tensão baixa no sensor de velocidade do veículo. O sinal está em curto-circuito, impedindo a centralina de conhecer a velocidade real. O velocímetro fica a zero e os sistemas dependentes da velocidade (ABS, caixa automática, cruise control) são perturbados. Nos veículos com velocímetro mecânico convertido em eletrónico, o sensor está montado na caixa de velocidades e pode ser danificado por uma fuga de óleo. Verifique o conector, a cablagem e a resistência do sensor.

name.es: Fuga de aceite de la caja sobre el sensor
name.pt: Fuga de óleo da caixa no sensor

name.es: Sensor de velocidad del vehículo — señal intermitente
name.pt: Sensor de velocidade do veículo — sinal intermitente

description.fr: Le P0503 signale un signal de vitesse erratique ou intermittent. Le capteur fonctionne par moments mais perd le signal de maniere aleatoire. Le compteur de vitesse saute ou affiche des valeurs aberrantes. Un capteur dont l'entrefer est marginal, des dents manquantes sur la roue dentee ou un faux contact dans le connecteur provoquent ce comportement intermittent. Les vibrations en conduite peuvent agraver un faux contact qui ne se manifeste pas a l'arret. Le diagnostic est plus complexe qu'un defaut permanent car le probleme ne se reproduit pas a la demande.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0503 relates to vehicle speed sensor — intermittent signal, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0503 signalisiert ein sporadisches oder intermittierendes Geschwindigkeitssignal. Der Sensor funktioniert phasenweise, verliert aber das Signal zufällig. Der Tacho springt oder zeigt unrealistische Werte. Ein Sensor mit marginalem Luftspalt, fehlende Zähne am Zahnkranz oder ein Wackelkontakt am Stecker verursachen dieses intermittierende Verhalten. Vibrationen während der Fahrt können einen Wackelkontakt verschlimmern, der im Stand nicht auftritt. Die Diagnose ist komplexer als bei einem dauerhaften Fehler, da sich das Problem nicht auf Kommando reproduziert.
description.es: El P0503 indica una señal de velocidad errática o intermitente. El sensor funciona por momentos pero pierde la señal de forma aleatoria. El velocímetro salta o muestra valores aberrantes. Un sensor con entrehierro marginal, dientes faltantes en la rueda dentada o un falso contacto en el conector provocan este comportamiento intermitente. Las vibraciones en conducción pueden agravar un falso contacto que no se manifiesta en parado. El diagnóstico es más complejo que un fallo permanente ya que el problema no se reproduce a voluntad.
description.pt: O P0503 indica um sinal de velocidade errático ou intermitente. O sensor funciona por momentos mas perde o sinal de forma aleatória. O velocímetro salta ou apresenta valores aberrantes. Um sensor com entreferro marginal, dentes em falta na roda dentada ou um falso contacto no conector provocam este comportamento intermitente. As vibrações em condução podem agravar um falso contacto que não se manifesta com o carro parado. O diagnóstico é mais complexo do que um defeito permanente, pois o problema não se reproduz a pedido.

name.en: Vehicle speed sensor marginal air gap
name.es: Sensor de velocidad con entrehierro marginal

name.es: Sensor de presión de aceite — rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de pressão do óleo — gama/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0521 indique que les valeurs du capteur de pression d'huile sont incoherentes avec les conditions de fonctionnement. La pression lue ne correspond pas au regime moteur et a la temperature d'huile. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive donne des lectures erronees que le calculateur detecte par comparaison. IMPORTANT : avant de conclure que c'est le capteur, verifiez le niveau et l'etat de l'huile. Une huile trop fluide (mauvaise viscosite) ou un niveau trop bas donnent une pression reellement anormale. Ne prenez pas le risque de rouler sans pression d'huile correcte.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0521 code, it is telling you there is a problem with oil pressure sensor — range/performance. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0521 zeigt an, dass die Werte des Öldrucksensors nicht zu den Betriebsbedingungen passen. Der gemessene Druck stimmt nicht mit Drehzahl und Öltemperatur überein. Ein Sensor mit verschobener Kennlinie liefert falsche Messwerte, die das Steuergerät durch Vergleich erkennt. WICHTIG: Bevor Sie auf den Sensor schließen, prüfen Sie Ölstand und Zustand. Ein zu dünnflüssiges Öl (falsche Viskosität) oder ein zu niedriger Stand ergeben tatsächlich abnormalen Druck. Fahren Sie nicht ohne korrekten Öldruck weiter.
description.es: El P0521 indica que los valores del sensor de presión de aceite son incoherentes con las condiciones de funcionamiento. La presión medida no corresponde al régimen ni a la temperatura del aceite. Un sensor cuya característica ha derivado da lecturas erróneas que la centralita detecta por comparación. IMPORTANTE: antes de concluir que es el sensor, compruebe el nivel y estado del aceite. Un aceite demasiado fluido (viscosidad incorrecta) o un nivel demasiado bajo dan una presión realmente anormal. No se arriesgue a circular sin una presión de aceite correcta.
description.pt: O P0521 indica que os valores do sensor de pressão do óleo são incoerentes com as condições de funcionamento. A pressão medida não corresponde ao regime nem à temperatura do óleo. Um sensor cuja característica se alterou dá leituras erróneas que a centralina deteta por comparação. IMPORTANTE: antes de concluir que é o sensor, verifique o nível e o estado do óleo. Um óleo demasiado fluido (viscosidade incorreta) ou um nível demasiado baixo dão uma pressão realmente anormal. Não arrisque conduzir sem uma pressão de óleo correta.

name.es: Sensor de presión de aceite derivado
name.pt: Sensor de pressão do óleo com desvio

pt: Luz de aviso do óleo intermitente

description.fr: Le P0522 signale une tension basse du capteur de pression d'huile. Le calculateur interprete cela comme une pression d'huile extremement basse. Si c'est un faux signal, le voyant d'huile s'allume inutilement et crée de l'inquietude. Si c'est une vraie pression basse, le moteur est en danger immediat. Par precaution, arretez-vous et verifiez le niveau d'huile. Si le niveau est bon, le capteur ou son cablage est probablement en cause. Si le niveau est bas, faites l'appoint immediatement et cherchez la cause de la consommation d'huile.
description.en: A P0522 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with oil pressure sensor — low voltage. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P0522 signalisiert eine niedrige Spannung am Öldrucksensor. Das Steuergerät interpretiert dies als extrem niedrigen Öldruck. Wenn es ein Fehlsignal ist, leuchtet die Ölwarnleuchte unnötig und erzeugt Besorgnis. Wenn es tatsächlich niedriger Druck ist, ist der Motor in unmittelbarer Gefahr. Halten Sie vorsichtshalber an und prüfen Sie den Ölstand. Wenn der Stand in Ordnung ist, liegt es wahrscheinlich am Sensor oder der Verkabelung. Wenn der Stand niedrig ist, füllen Sie sofort nach und suchen Sie die Ursache des Ölverbrauchs.
description.es: El P0522 indica una tensión baja del sensor de presión de aceite. La centralita interpreta esto como una presión de aceite extremadamente baja. Si es una señal falsa, el testigo de aceite se enciende innecesariamente y genera preocupación. Si es una presión realmente baja, el motor está en peligro inmediato. Por precaución, deténgase y compruebe el nivel de aceite. Si el nivel es correcto, probablemente sea el sensor o su cableado. Si el nivel es bajo, rellene inmediatamente y busque la causa del consumo de aceite.
description.pt: O P0522 indica uma tensão baixa do sensor de pressão do óleo. A centralina interpreta isto como uma pressão de óleo extremamente baixa. Se for um sinal falso, a luz de aviso do óleo acende-se desnecessariamente e gera preocupação. Se for uma pressão realmente baixa, o motor está em perigo imediato. Por precaução, pare e verifique o nível de óleo. Se o nível estiver correto, é provavelmente o sensor ou a sua cablagem. Se o nível estiver baixo, reabasteça imediatamente e procure a causa do consumo de óleo.

en.question: What does the P0522 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0522 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with oil pressure sensor — low voltage. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0522 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0522 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0522 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0522 fault typically range from around £13 to £692, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is oil pressure sensor short circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

description.fr: Le P0523 indique une tension haute du capteur de pression d'huile, correspondant a une pression anormalement elevee ou un circuit ouvert. Une pression d'huile trop haute peut indiquer un filtre a huile bouche, un clapet de surpression bloque, ou simplement un capteur qui ne fonctionne plus. Un capteur en circuit ouvert donne une tension maximale qui simule une haute pression. Verifiez le connecteur du capteur, mesurez la tension et comparez avec les specifications. Si la pression est reellement haute, le filtre a huile est le premier suspect.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0523 relates to oil pressure sensor — high voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P0523 zeigt eine hohe Spannung am Öldrucksensor an, was einem abnormal hohen Druck oder einer Unterbrechung entspricht. Ein zu hoher Öldruck kann auf einen verstopften Ölfilter, ein klemmendes Überdruckventil oder einfach einen defekten Sensor hindeuten. Ein Sensor mit Unterbrechung liefert die maximale Spannung, die einen hohen Druck simuliert. Prüfen Sie den Sensorstecker, messen Sie die Spannung und vergleichen Sie mit den Spezifikationen. Wenn der Druck tatsächlich zu hoch ist, ist der Ölfilter der erste Verdächtige.
description.es: El P0523 indica una tensión alta del sensor de presión de aceite, correspondiendo a una presión anormalmente elevada o un circuito abierto. Una presión de aceite demasiado alta puede indicar un filtro de aceite obstruido, una válvula de sobrepresión bloqueada, o simplemente un sensor que ya no funciona. Un sensor en circuito abierto da una tensión máxima que simula una alta presión. Compruebe el conector del sensor, mida la tensión y compare con las especificaciones. Si la presión es realmente alta, el filtro de aceite es el primer sospechoso.
description.pt: O P0523 indica uma tensão alta do sensor de pressão do óleo, correspondendo a uma pressão anormalmente elevada ou a um circuito aberto. Uma pressão de óleo demasiado alta pode indicar um filtro de óleo obstruído, uma válvula de sobrepressão bloqueada, ou simplesmente um sensor que já não funciona. Um sensor em circuito aberto dá uma tensão máxima que simula uma alta pressão. Verifique o conector do sensor, meça a tensão e compare com as especificações. Se a pressão for realmente alta, o filtro de óleo é o primeiro suspeito.

name.es: Sensor de presion del refrigerante de climatizacion — rango/rendimiento
name.pt: Sensor de pressao do refrigerante de climatizacao — faixa/desempenho

description.fr: Le P0531 indique que les valeurs du capteur de pression de climatisation sont incoherentes. La pression lue ne correspond pas aux conditions de fonctionnement (temperature exterieure, regime compresseur). Un manque de refrigerant, un capteur fatigue, ou un bouchon dans le circuit de clim peuvent provoquer des lectures anormales. Le compresseur peut fonctionner de maniere irreguliere car le calculateur ne sait pas quelle pression reelle il y a dans le circuit. Un controle de la charge de refrigerant chez un specialiste clim est recommande.
description.en: The P0531 fault code indicates a problem with a/c refrigerant pressure sensor — range/performance in your air conditioning system. While A/C faults are not as urgent as engine or brake issues, they can make driving uncomfortable, especially during warmer months. Your car's climate control system uses a network of sensors to monitor interior and exterior temperatures, refrigerant pressure, and compressor operation. When one of these sensors or components develops a fault, the system may not regulate temperature properly, the A/C might blow only warm air, or it might cut out intermittently. Common causes include a faulty temperature sensor, a refrigerant leak, a worn compressor clutch, or a clogged condenser. A garage equipped with A/C diagnostic tools can identify the specific issue quickly. Many A/C repairs are quite affordable — a sensor replacement or a re-gas might be all that is needed. More significant repairs like compressor replacement cost more, but they are still manageable. While this fault will not cause your car to fail its MOT directly, having a properly functioning climate control system makes for much more pleasant driving, particularly during the British summer and winter months.
description.de: Der P0531 zeigt an, dass die Werte des Klima-Drucksensors inkonsistent sind. Der gemessene Druck stimmt nicht mit den Betriebsbedingungen ueberein (Aussentemperatur, Kompressordrehzahl). Ein Kaeltemittelmangel, ein verschlissener Sensor oder eine Verstopfung im Klimakreislauf koennen zu abnormalen Messwerten fuehren. Der Kompressor kann unregelmaessig arbeiten, da das Steuergeraet nicht weiss, welcher Druck tatsaechlich im Kreislauf herrscht. Eine Ueberpruefung der Kaeltemittelladung bei einem Klima-Spezialisten wird empfohlen.
description.es: El P0531 indica que los valores del sensor de presion del aire acondicionado son incoherentes. La presion leida no corresponde a las condiciones de funcionamiento (temperatura exterior, regimen del compresor). Una falta de refrigerante, un sensor fatigado o una obstruccion en el circuito de climatizacion pueden provocar lecturas anormales. El compresor puede funcionar de manera irregular porque la centralita no sabe cual es la presion real en el circuito. Se recomienda un control de la carga de refrigerante con un especialista en climatizacion.
description.pt: O P0531 indica que os valores do sensor de pressao do ar condicionado sao incoerentes. A pressao lida nao corresponde as condicoes de funcionamento (temperatura exterior, regime do compressor). Uma falta de refrigerante, um sensor fatigado ou um entupimento no circuito de climatizacao podem provocar leituras anormais. O compressor pode funcionar de forma irregular pois a centralina nao sabe qual a pressao real no circuito. Recomenda-se um controlo da carga de refrigerante junto de um especialista em climatizacao.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0531 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. name.fr: Capteur pression refrigerant clim tension basse

name.es: Sensor de presion del refrigerante de climatizacion — tension baja
name.pt: Sensor de pressao do refrigerante de climatizacao — tensao baixa

description.fr: Le P0532 signale une tension basse du pressostat de climatisation. Le calculateur interprete cela comme une pression tres basse dans le circuit, ce qui desactive le compresseur pour le proteger. Si le refrigerant est effectivement bas (fuite), le compresseur ne doit effectivement pas tourner a vide. Si le capteur est en court-circuit, le compresseur est desactive inutilement et la clim ne refroidit plus. La verification de la charge de refrigerant et le test electrique du capteur permettent de differencier les deux cas.
description.en: Your car has logged a P0532 code related to a/c refrigerant pressure sensor — low voltage in the climate control system. The air conditioning in modern vehicles is managed by a dedicated module that reads temperature and pressure sensors to maintain your chosen cabin temperature. When one of these sensors sends an abnormal signal, the system may not work correctly — you might find the A/C blowing warm air, the fan behaving oddly, or the system switching itself off. This kind of fault is usually down to a sensor failure, a wiring issue, or a problem with the refrigerant charge. A qualified technician can diagnose the issue using a combination of OBD2 scanning and manual checks on the A/C system pressure and component function. Repairs are typically straightforward and can range from a simple sensor swap to an A/C system re-gas or, in more serious cases, compressor replacement. While an A/C fault will not make your car unsafe to drive or cause an MOT failure, it can be a real nuisance, especially in extreme weather. Getting it fixed will restore your comfort and help keep the windscreen clear during winter, which is important for safe driving.
description.de: Der P0532 meldet eine niedrige Spannung des Klima-Druckschalters. Das Steuergeraet interpretiert dies als sehr niedrigen Druck im Kreislauf, was den Kompressor zum Schutz deaktiviert. Wenn das Kaeltemittel tatsaechlich niedrig ist (Leck), darf der Kompressor auch nicht trocken laufen. Wenn der Sensor einen Kurzschluss hat, wird der Kompressor unnoetig deaktiviert und die Klimaanlage kuehlt nicht mehr. Die Ueberpruefung der Kaeltemittelladung und ein elektrischer Test des Sensors ermoeglichen es, die beiden Faelle zu unterscheiden.
description.es: El P0532 senala una tension baja del presostato de climatizacion. La centralita lo interpreta como una presion muy baja en el circuito, lo que desactiva el compresor para protegerlo. Si el refrigerante esta efectivamente bajo (fuga), el compresor no debe funcionar en vacio. Si el sensor esta en cortocircuito, el compresor se desactiva inutilmente y el aire acondicionado ya no enfria. La verificacion de la carga de refrigerante y la prueba electrica del sensor permiten diferenciar los dos casos.
description.pt: O P0532 assinala uma tensao baixa do pressostato de climatizacao. A centralina interpreta isto como uma pressao muito baixa no circuito, o que desativa o compressor para o proteger. Se o refrigerante estiver efetivamente baixo (fuga), o compressor nao deve funcionar em vazio. Se o sensor estiver em curto-circuito, o compressor e desativado desnecessariamente e o ar condicionado ja nao arrefece. A verificacao da carga de refrigerante e o teste eletrico do sensor permitem diferenciar os dois casos.

name.fr: Capteur pression refrigerant clim tension haute
name.en: A/C refrigerant pressure sensor — high voltage
name.es: Sensor de presion del refrigerante de climatizacion — tension alta
name.pt: Sensor de pressao do refrigerante de climatizacao — tensao alta

description.fr: Le P0533 indique une tension haute du pressostat, correspondant a une pression elevee dans le circuit de climatisation. Une surpression peut indiquer un condenseur encrasse qui ne dissipe pas la chaleur, un ventilateur de condenseur inactif, ou une surcharge de refrigerant. Le calculateur peut aussi desactiver le compresseur par securite. Si c'est un faux signal (circuit ouvert du capteur), la pression est normale mais le calculateur coupe le compresseur par precaution. Verifiez d'abord que le ventilateur du condenseur fonctionne, surtout en ete.
description.en: The P0533 fault code indicates a problem with a/c refrigerant pressure sensor — high voltage in your air conditioning system. While A/C faults are not as urgent as engine or brake issues, they can make driving uncomfortable, especially during warmer months. Your car's climate control system uses a network of sensors to monitor interior and exterior temperatures, refrigerant pressure, and compressor operation. When one of these sensors or components develops a fault, the system may not regulate temperature properly, the A/C might blow only warm air, or it might cut out intermittently. Common causes include a faulty temperature sensor, a refrigerant leak, a worn compressor clutch, or a clogged condenser. A garage equipped with A/C diagnostic tools can identify the specific issue quickly. Many A/C repairs are quite affordable — a sensor replacement or a re-gas might be all that is needed. More significant repairs like compressor replacement cost more, but they are still manageable. While this fault will not cause your car to fail its MOT directly, having a properly functioning climate control system makes for much more pleasant driving, particularly during the British summer and winter months.
description.de: Der P0533 zeigt eine hohe Spannung des Druckschalters an, die einem hohen Druck im Klimakreislauf entspricht. Ein Ueberdruck kann auf einen verschmutzten Kondensator hinweisen, der die Waerme nicht ableitet, auf einen inaktiven Kondensatorventilator oder auf eine Ueberladung mit Kaeltemittel. Das Steuergeraet kann den Kompressor aus Sicherheitsgruenden ebenfalls deaktivieren. Wenn es ein falsches Signal ist (offener Stromkreis des Sensors), ist der Druck normal, aber das Steuergeraet schaltet den Kompressor vorsichtshalber ab. Pruefen Sie zuerst, ob der Ventilator des Kondensators funktioniert, besonders im Sommer.
description.es: El P0533 indica una tension alta del presostato, correspondiente a una presion elevada en el circuito de climatizacion. Una sobrepresion puede indicar un condensador sucio que no disipa el calor, un ventilador del condensador inactivo o una sobrecarga de refrigerante. La centralita tambien puede desactivar el compresor por seguridad. Si es una senal falsa (circuito abierto del sensor), la presion es normal pero la centralita corta el compresor por precaucion. Verifique primero que el ventilador del condensador funciona, sobre todo en verano.
description.pt: O P0533 indica uma tensao alta do pressostato, correspondendo a uma pressao elevada no circuito de climatizacao. Uma sobrepressao pode indicar um condensador sujo que nao dissipa o calor, um ventilador do condensador inativo ou uma sobrecarga de refrigerante. A centralina tambem pode desativar o compressor por seguranca. Se for um sinal falso (circuito aberto do sensor), a pressao e normal mas a centralina corta o compressor por precaucao. Verifique primeiro se o ventilador do condensador funciona, especialmente no verao.

en.question: What does the P0533 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0533 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with a/c refrigerant pressure sensor — high voltage. This is a low-severity air conditioning fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0533 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0533 fail my MOT?
en.answer: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

en.question: How much does P0533 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0533 fault typically range from around £26 to £250, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is clogged condenser, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: No, air conditioning faults do not cause an MOT failure. The A/C system is not part of the MOT test. However, if the fault affects the demister function, it could indirectly impact windscreen visibility checks.

description.fr: Le P0561 signale des fluctuations anormales de la tension electrique du vehicule. La tension oscille de maniere imprevisible entre valeurs hautes et basses. Un alternateur dont le regulateur est instable, un fusible de liaison corrodé, ou une masse vehicule intermittente sont les causes principales. Les fluctuations de tension peuvent perturber tous les calculateurs et provoquer des comportements erratiques multiples. Le diagnostic electrique commence par une mesure de tension aux bornes de la batterie avec un oscilloscope pour voir les fluctuations. Un simple multimetre peut ne pas les capter.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0561 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with system voltage — unstable. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0561 signalisiert ungewoehnliche Schwankungen der Bordspannung des Fahrzeugs. Die Spannung oszilliert unvorhersehbar zwischen hohen und niedrigen Werten. Eine Lichtmaschine mit instabilem Regler, eine korrodierte Hauptsicherung oder eine intermittierende Fahrzeugmasse sind die Hauptursachen. Spannungsschwankungen koennen alle Steuergeraete stoeren und multiple unberechenbare Verhaltensweisen verursachen. Die Elektrodiagnose beginnt mit einer Spannungsmessung an den Batteriepolen mit einem Oszilloskop, um die Schwankungen sichtbar zu machen. Ein einfaches Multimeter kann diese moeglicherweise nicht erfassen.
description.es: El P0561 senala fluctuaciones anormales del voltaje electrico del vehiculo. El voltaje oscila de manera impredecible entre valores altos y bajos. Un alternador cuyo regulador es inestable, un fusible de enlace corroido o una masa del vehiculo intermitente son las causas principales. Las fluctuaciones de voltaje pueden perturbar todas las centralitas y provocar comportamientos erraticos multiples. El diagnostico electrico comienza con una medicion de voltaje en los bornes de la bateria con un osciloscopio para visualizar las fluctuaciones. Un simple multimetro puede no captarlas.
description.pt: O P0561 sinaliza flutuacoes anormais da voltagem eletrica do veiculo. A voltagem oscila de forma imprevisivel entre valores altos e baixos. Um alternador com regulador instavel, um fusivel de ligacao corroido ou uma massa do veiculo intermitente sao as causas principais. As flutuacoes de voltagem podem perturbar todas as centralinas e provocar comportamentos erraticos multiplos. O diagnostico eletrico comeca com uma medicao de voltagem nos terminais da bateria com um osciloscopio para visualizar as flutuacoes. Um simples multimetro pode nao as captar.

name.fr: Alternateur tension de champ circuit haute
name.es: Voltaje de campo del alternador — circuito alto
name.pt: Voltagem de campo do alternador — circuito alto

description.fr: Le P0626 indique une tension haute sur le circuit de champ de l'alternateur. Le regulateur ou le cablage d'excitation presente un circuit ouvert. L'alternateur peut continuer a charger mais de maniere non controlee par le calculateur, ce qui peut provoquer des surtensions ou des sous-charges. Les vehicules modernes utilisent la regulation intelligente de l'alternateur pour optimiser la consommation : l'alternateur charge plus en deceleration et moins en acceleration. Sans cette communication, le vehicule consomme plus. Le regulateur est souvent integre a l'alternateur.
description.en: The P0626 code indicates an electrical system fault related to alternator field voltage — high circuit. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0626 zeigt eine hohe Spannung im Erregerkreis der Lichtmaschine an. Der Regler oder die Erregerkabel weisen einen offenen Schaltkreis auf. Die Lichtmaschine kann weiterhin laden, aber unkontrolliert durch das Steuergeraet, was zu Ueber- oder Unterspannungen fuehren kann. Moderne Fahrzeuge nutzen die intelligente Regulierung der Lichtmaschine, um den Verbrauch zu optimieren: Die Lichtmaschine laedt staerker bei Verzoegerung und weniger bei Beschleunigung. Ohne diese Kommunikation verbraucht das Fahrzeug mehr Kraftstoff. Der Regler ist oft in die Lichtmaschine integriert.
description.es: El P0626 indica un voltaje alto en el circuito de campo del alternador. El regulador o el cableado de excitacion presenta un circuito abierto. El alternador puede seguir cargando pero de manera no controlada por la centralita, lo que puede provocar sobretensiones o subtensiones. Los vehiculos modernos utilizan la regulacion inteligente del alternador para optimizar el consumo: el alternador carga mas en deceleracion y menos en aceleracion. Sin esta comunicacion, el vehiculo consume mas. El regulador suele estar integrado en el alternador.
description.pt: O P0626 indica uma voltagem alta no circuito de campo do alternador. O regulador ou a cablagem de excitacao apresenta um circuito aberto. O alternador pode continuar a carregar mas de forma nao controlada pela centralina, o que pode provocar sobretensoes ou subtensoes. Os veiculos modernos utilizam a regulacao inteligente do alternador para otimizar o consumo: o alternador carrega mais em desaceleracao e menos em aceleracao. Sem esta comunicacao, o veiculo consome mais. O regulador esta frequentemente integrado no alternador.

name.es: Rele principal de la centralita — circuito abierto
name.pt: Rele principal da centralina — circuito aberto

description.fr: Le P0686 est plus specifique que le P0685 : le circuit du relais principal est en circuit ouvert. Le calculateur ne recoit plus d'alimentation de maniere fiable. Cela peut provoquer des calages aleatoires, des redemarrages spontanes du calculateur et des pertes de memoire adaptative. Un relais dont les contacts internes sont uses, un fusible affaibli ou un fil coupe dans le circuit d'alimentation principal sont les causes. Le relais est un composant peu couteux mais sa defaillance a des consequences importantes car il alimente le cerveau du vehicule.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0686 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with main ecu relay — open circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.
description.de: Der P0686 ist spezifischer als der P0685: Der Schaltkreis des Hauptrelais ist offen. Das Steuergeraet erhaelt keine zuverlaessige Stromversorgung mehr. Dies kann zu zufaelligen Motorstillstaenden, spontanen Neustarts des Steuergeraets und Verlusten der Adaptionswerte fuehren. Ein Relais mit verschlissenen internen Kontakten, eine schwache Sicherung oder ein unterbrochenes Kabel im Hauptstromkreis sind die Ursachen. Das Relais ist ein kostenguenstiges Bauteil, aber sein Ausfall hat erhebliche Folgen, da es das Gehirn des Fahrzeugs versorgt.
description.es: El P0686 es mas especifico que el P0685: el circuito del rele principal esta en circuito abierto. La centralita ya no recibe alimentacion de manera fiable. Esto puede provocar calados aleatorios, reinicios espontaneos de la centralita y perdidas de memoria adaptativa. Un rele cuyos contactos internos estan desgastados, un fusible debilitado o un cable cortado en el circuito de alimentacion principal son las causas. El rele es un componente poco costoso pero su fallo tiene consecuencias importantes ya que alimenta el cerebro del vehiculo.
description.pt: O P0686 e mais especifico que o P0685: o circuito do rele principal esta em circuito aberto. A centralina ja nao recebe alimentacao de forma fiavel. Isto pode provocar paragens aleatorias, reinicializacoes espontaneas da centralina e perdas de memoria adaptativa. Um rele cujos contactos internos estao gastos, um fusivel enfraquecido ou um fio cortado no circuito de alimentacao principal sao as causas. O rele e um componente pouco dispendioso mas a sua falha tem consequencias importantes pois alimenta o cerebro do veiculo.

es: Perdida de adaptaciones de la centralita

name.es: Rele principal de la centralita — cortocircuito

description.fr: Le P0687 signale un court-circuit dans le circuit du relais principal du calculateur. Le relais est alimente en permanence alors qu'il ne devrait l'etre que cle en position contact. Cela signifie que le calculateur reste alimente en permanence, drainant la batterie meme vehicule eteint. Vous pouvez vous retrouver avec une batterie dechargee apres quelques jours de stationnement. Un relais dont les contacts sont soudes, un cablage qui touche un fil permanent, ou un probleme dans le circuit de commande du relais sont les causes. Verifiez la tension aux bornes du calculateur cle retiree.
description.en: The P0687 code indicates an electrical system fault related to main ecu relay — short circuit. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.
description.de: Der P0687 signalisiert einen Kurzschluss im Schaltkreis des Hauptrelais des Steuergeraets. Das Relais wird dauerhaft bestromt, obwohl es nur bei eingeschalteter Zuendung aktiv sein sollte. Das bedeutet, dass das Steuergeraet dauerhaft eingeschaltet bleibt und die Batterie auch bei abgestelltem Fahrzeug entleert. Sie koennen nach einigen Tagen Parkzeit eine leere Batterie vorfinden. Ein Relais mit verschweissten Kontakten, ein Kabel, das ein Dauerstromkabel beruehrt, oder ein Problem im Relaissteuerkreis sind die Ursachen. Pruefen Sie die Spannung am Steuergeraet bei abgezogenem Zuendschluessel.
description.es: El P0687 senala un cortocircuito en el circuito del rele principal de la centralita. El rele esta alimentado permanentemente cuando solo deberia estarlo con la llave en posicion de contacto. Esto significa que la centralita permanece alimentada permanentemente, drenando la bateria incluso con el vehiculo apagado. Puede encontrarse con una bateria descargada despues de unos dias de aparcamiento. Un rele cuyos contactos estan soldados, un cableado que toca un cable permanente, o un problema en el circuito de control del rele son las causas. Verifique el voltaje en los bornes de la centralita con la llave retirada.
description.pt: O P0687 sinaliza um curto-circuito no circuito do rele principal da centralina. O rele esta alimentado permanentemente quando so deveria estar com a chave na posicao de contacto. Isto significa que a centralina permanece alimentada permanentemente, drenando a bateria mesmo com o veiculo desligado. Pode encontrar-se com uma bateria descarregada apos alguns dias de estacionamento. Um rele cujos contactos estao soldados, uma cablagem que toca num fio permanente, ou um problema no circuito de comando do rele sao as causas. Verifique a voltagem nos terminais da centralina com a chave retirada.

name.fr: Sonde lambda amont signal reste pauvre banque 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor signal stuck lean — bank 1
name.de: Vordere Lambdasonde Signal bleibt mager — Bank 1
name.es: Sonda lambda anterior señal permanece pobre — banco 1
name.pt: Sonda lambda a montante sinal permanece pobre — banco 1

description.fr: Le P2195 indique que la sonde lambda amont de la banque 1 envoie un signal constamment pauvre. Contrairement au P0131 qui mesure la tension, le P2195 evalue la tendance sur une periode. La sonde detecte un melange systematiquement pauvre, ce qui peut etre une prise d'air, un debitmetre sous-evaluant, ou des injecteurs qui ne delivrent pas assez de carburant. Ce code est souvent accompagne de corrections carburant fortement positives. Le diagnostic commence par la lecture des fuel trims en temps reel pour evaluer l'amplitude du probleme.
description.en: A P2195 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with upstream lambda sensor signal stuck lean — bank 1. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.
description.de: Der P2195 zeigt an, dass die vordere Lambdasonde der Bank 1 ein dauerhaft mageres Signal sendet. Im Gegensatz zum P0131, der die Spannung misst, bewertet der P2195 den Trend über einen Zeitraum. Die Sonde erkennt ein systematisch mageres Gemisch, was auf Falschluft, einen unterbewertenden Luftmassenmesser oder Einspritzventile hindeuten kann, die zu wenig Kraftstoff liefern. Dieser Code wird oft von stark positiven Kraftstoffkorrekturen begleitet. Die Diagnose beginnt mit dem Ablesen der Fuel Trims in Echtzeit, um das Ausmaß des Problems zu bewerten.
description.es: El P2195 indica que la sonda lambda anterior del banco 1 envía una señal constantemente pobre. A diferencia del P0131 que mide la tensión, el P2195 evalúa la tendencia sobre un período. La sonda detecta una mezcla sistemáticamente pobre, lo que puede deberse a una entrada de aire, un caudalímetro subestimando, o inyectores que no entregan suficiente combustible. Este código suele ir acompañado de correcciones de combustible fuertemente positivas. El diagnóstico comienza por la lectura de los fuel trims en tiempo real para evaluar la magnitud del problema.
description.pt: O P2195 indica que a sonda lambda a montante do banco 1 envia um sinal constantemente pobre. Ao contrário do P0131 que mede a tensão, o P2195 avalia a tendência ao longo de um período. A sonda deteta uma mistura sistematicamente pobre, o que pode dever-se a uma entrada de ar falso, um caudalímetro a subestimar, ou injectores que não entregam combustível suficiente. Este código é frequentemente acompanhado de correções de combustível fortemente positivas. O diagnóstico começa pela leitura dos fuel trims em tempo real para avaliar a amplitude do problema.

name.fr: Sonde lambda amont signal reste riche banque 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1
name.de: Vordere Lambdasonde Signal bleibt fett — Bank 1
name.es: Sonda lambda anterior señal permanece rica — banco 1
name.pt: Sonda lambda a montante sinal permanece rico — banco 1

description.fr: Le P2196 est l'inverse du P2195 : la sonde amont detecte un melange constamment riche. Les corrections carburant sont fortement negatives car le calculateur essaie de reduire le carburant sans y parvenir completement. Un injecteur qui fuit, un regulateur de pression qui fournit trop de pression, ou une sonde lambda vieillissante qui biaise les lectures vers le riche sont les causes principales. L'exces de carburant endommage le catalyseur a la longue. Traitez ce code rapidement pour proteger les composants couteux du systeme d'echappement.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P2196 relates to upstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.
description.de: Der P2196 ist das Gegenstück zum P2195: Die vordere Sonde erkennt ein dauerhaft fettes Gemisch. Die Kraftstoffkorrekturen sind stark negativ, weil das Steuergerät versucht, den Kraftstoff zu reduzieren, ohne es vollständig zu schaffen. Ein undichtes Einspritzventil, ein Druckregler, der zu viel Druck liefert, oder eine alternde Lambdasonde, die die Messwerte ins Fette verfälscht, sind die Hauptursachen. Der Kraftstoffüberschuss schädigt langfristig den Katalysator. Beheben Sie diesen Code schnell, um die teuren Bauteile der Abgasanlage zu schützen.
description.es: El P2196 es el inverso del P2195: la sonda anterior detecta una mezcla constantemente rica. Las correcciones de combustible son fuertemente negativas porque la centralita intenta reducir el combustible sin lograrlo completamente. Un inyector que gotea, un regulador de presión que suministra demasiada presión, o una sonda lambda envejecida que sesga las lecturas hacia el rico son las causas principales. El exceso de combustible daña el catalizador a largo plazo. Trate este código rápidamente para proteger los componentes costosos del sistema de escape.
description.pt: O P2196 é o inverso do P2195: a sonda a montante deteta uma mistura constantemente rica. As correções de combustível são fortemente negativas porque a centralina tenta reduzir o combustível sem o conseguir completamente. Um injector que pinga, um regulador de pressão que fornece pressão excessiva, ou uma sonda lambda envelhecida que desvia as leituras para o rico são as causas principais. O excesso de combustível danifica o catalisador a longo prazo. Trate este código rapidamente para proteger os componentes dispendiosos do sistema de escape.

name.pt: Sonda lambda com desvio para rico

description.fr: Le P0033 signale un defaut sur le circuit de commande du turbocompresseur. L'electrovanne ou le moteur pas a pas qui controle la pression du turbo a un probleme electrique. Le turbo reste en position par defaut, ce qui limite les performances ou provoque des variations de pression incontrolees. Verifiez le connecteur de l'actuateur de turbo et le cablage. Sur les turbos a geometrie variable, l'actuateur electronique peut aussi etre en cause. Le mode degrade limite generalement la pression turbo a un niveau sur mais reduit.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0033 code, it is telling you there is a problem with turbo boost control circuit. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
description.de: Der P0033 signalisiert einen Fehler im Steuerkreis des Turboladers. Das Magnetventil oder der Schrittmotor, der den Ladedruck regelt, hat ein elektrisches Problem. Der Turbo verbleibt in der Standardposition, was die Leistung einschränkt oder unkontrollierte Druckschwankungen verursacht. Prüfen Sie den Stecker des Turbo-Aktuators und die Verkabelung. Bei Turbos mit variabler Geometrie kann auch der elektronische Aktuator die Ursache sein. Der Notlaufmodus begrenzt den Ladedruck in der Regel auf ein sicheres, aber reduziertes Niveau.
description.es: El P0033 indica un fallo en el circuito de control del turbocompresor. La electroválvula o el motor paso a paso que controla la presión del turbo tiene un problema eléctrico. El turbo se queda en posición por defecto, lo que limita el rendimiento o provoca variaciones de presión incontroladas. Compruebe el conector del actuador del turbo y el cableado. En los turbos de geometría variable, el actuador electrónico también puede ser la causa. El modo degradado suele limitar la presión del turbo a un nivel seguro pero reducido.
description.pt: O P0033 indica uma avaria no circuito de controlo do turbocompressor. A eletroválvula ou o motor de passo que controla a pressão do turbo tem um problema elétrico. O turbo fica na posição por defeito, o que limita o desempenho ou provoca variações de pressão descontroladas. Verifique o conector do atuador do turbo e a cablagem. Nos turbos de geometria variável, o atuador eletrónico também pode ser a causa. O modo degradado limita geralmente a pressão do turbo a um nível seguro mas reduzido.
